en.tldr: Proposes hybrid mesh-based graph neural networks with physics-aware attention to predict structural deformation fields in full-vehicle crash, achieving 3.20 mm RMSE on an industrial lateral pole-impact benchmark.
en.motivation: Full-vehicle crash simulations are computationally expensive, limiting iterative design exploration; fast and physically plausible surrogates are needed.
en.method: Combines local mesh message passing, geometry-aware global attention, and sparse contact-aware correction in hybrid surrogate models (MeshTransolver, MeshGeoTransolver, MeshGeoFLARE) for autoregressive crash rollout.
en.result: The best hybrid model achieves a temporal mean RMSE of 3.20 mm on a 25-sample test set, balancing scalar accuracy, survival-space consistency, and physically interpretable displacement fields.
en.help_to_user: Enables fast prediction of crash deformation fields, saving simulation time while maintaining engineering interpretability.

idea_spark.idea: Integrates sparse contact-aware attention with graph neural networks to capture dynamic proximity interactions, improving physical plausibility of long-range deformation predictions.
idea_spark.risk: Models may generalize poorly to crash scenarios outside the training distribution, and geometry-aware attention baselines exhibit local noise in qualitative inspection.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining global error metrics with downstream safety-relevant quantities and qualitative field inspection provides a more comprehensive validation framework for surrogate models in engineering.

papers.title: Moving localized observations and Ces{à}ro asymptotic observability for conservative PDEs
papers.summary: We develop a deterministic large-time mechanism yielding Ces{à}ro asymptotic observability inequalities from moving localized observations for conservative evolutions. On each observation interval, exact convexification on a compact measured homogeneous space replaces full observation on the whole observation manifold by a finite convex combination of translates of one prototype subset. A switching realization theorem then turns that static design into a genuinely moving observer, while a Hilbertian tail-reduction proposition shows that interval estimates proved only on growing spectral windows still recover the full conserved energy after Ces{à}ro averaging. The resulting design-to-observability chain applies to interior observations for wave, Klein-Gordon, and Schr{ö}dinger equations on compact measured homogeneous manifolds, to moving boundary caps on the Euclidean ball, and to a singular almost-separated gas-giant boundary model. The framework is especially relevant when each instantaneous observation set is too small for one to expect a finite-time GCC or time-dependent GCC statement.

ai.tldr: 针对保守偏微分方程，提出一种确定性大时间机制，通过移动局部观测实现Cesàro渐近可观测性。
ai.motivation: 当每个瞬时观测集过小，无法期望有限时间或时变GCC条件时，仍需要保证长时间观测下的能量恢复。
ai.method: 在紧致齐次空间上利用精确凸化将全局观测替换为有限平移凸组合，通过切换实现定理转化为移动观测器，并借助Hilbert尾缩减引理在Cesàro平均下恢复全能量。
ai.result: 该框架适用于波方程、Klein-Gordon方程、Schrödinger方程的内观测、欧氏球上的移动边界帽以及奇异气体巨星边界模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为移动传感器或边界观测场景下的保守系统提供渐近可观测性理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将静态凸化设计通过切换定理转化为动态移动观测器，结合Cesàro平均克服瞬时观测不足。
idea_spark.risk: 切换实现定理对系统光滑性和齐次空间结构有较强假设，可能限制应用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受控制论中切换系统与平均化方法启发，将有限时间观测扩展为渐近平均观测。

zh.tldr: 针对保守偏微分方程，提出一种确定性大时间机制，通过移动局部观测实现Cesàro渐近可观测性。
zh.motivation: 当每个瞬时观测集过小，无法期望有限时间或时变GCC条件时，仍需要保证长时间观测下的能量恢复。
zh.method: 在紧致齐次空间上利用精确凸化将全局观测替换为有限平移凸组合，通过切换实现定理转化为移动观测器，并借助Hilbert尾缩减引理在Cesàro平均下恢复全能量。
zh.result: 该框架适用于波方程、Klein-Gordon方程、Schrödinger方程的内观测、欧氏球上的移动边界帽以及奇异气体巨星边界模型。
zh.help_to_user: 为移动传感器或边界观测场景下的保守系统提供渐近可观测性理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将静态凸化设计通过切换定理转化为动态移动观测器，结合Cesàro平均克服瞬时观测不足。
idea_spark.risk: 切换实现定理对系统光滑性和齐次空间结构有较强假设，可能限制应用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受控制论中切换系统与平均化方法启发，将有限时间观测扩展为渐近平均观测。

en.tldr: A deterministic large-time mechanism is developed to achieve Cesàro asymptotic observability from moving localized observations for conservative PDEs.
en.motivation: To guarantee energy recovery over long time when each instantaneous observation set is too small for finite-time or time-dependent GCC conditions.
en.method: Exact convexification on compact homogeneous spaces replaces full observation by a finite convex combination of translates; a switching realization theorem turns this into a moving observer; a Hilbertian tail-reduction lemma recovers full energy after Cesàro averaging.
en.result: The framework applies to interior observations for wave, Klein-Gordon, and Schrödinger equations on compact homogeneous manifolds, moving boundary caps on the Euclidean ball, and a singular gas-giant boundary model.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical observability tools for conservative systems with moving sensors or boundary observations.

idea_spark.idea: Convert static convexification into a dynamic moving observer via a switching theorem, and use Cesàro averaging to overcome insufficient instantaneous observations.
idea_spark.risk: The switching theorem relies on strong assumptions about system smoothness and homogeneous space structure, which may limit applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by switching systems and averaging methods in control theory, extending finite-time observation to asymptotic averaged observation.

papers.title: Efficient Learning of Affine and Rational Dependency LPV Models With Linear Fractional Representation
papers.summary: Identifying control-friendly models of nonlinear systems remains one of the major challenges at the intersection of system identification and control. The Linear Parameter-Varying (LPV) framework offers a promising solution, but existing identification methods often rely on model structures with affine scheduling dependency. Instead, this work proposes the use of LPV models with Linear Fractional Representation (LFR) admitting a rational scheduling-dependency, capable of modelling complex nonlinear systems with fewer scheduling variables compared to affine models. This work introduces a direct parameterization to ensure well-posedness of rational LPV-LFR models, which by joint-estimation of an LPV plant and scheduling map, using only input-output data, is capable of modelling complex nonlinear systems. Accuracy of the proposed approach is shown on two simulation examples.

ai.tldr: 提出一种使用线性分式表示（LFR）的LPV模型，支持有理调度依赖，能更高效地建模复杂非线性系统。
ai.motivation: 现有LPV识别方法多依赖仿射调度依赖，建模复杂非线性系统时需要大量调度变量。
ai.method: 引入直接参数化保证有理LPV-LFR模型的适定性，通过联合估计LPV对象和调度映射，仅使用输入输出数据。
ai.result: 两个仿真示例验证了所提方法的准确性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用更少的调度变量高效识别非线性系统的控制友好模型。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将LPV-LFR模型用于实时调度中的非线性系统建模，例如多核处理器上的任务调度。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统可能不满足有理调度假设，或联合估计计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从系统识别角度为多核实时调度中的非线性行为建模提供新思路。

zh.tldr: 提出一种使用线性分式表示（LFR）的LPV模型，支持有理调度依赖，能更高效地建模复杂非线性系统。
zh.motivation: 现有LPV识别方法多依赖仿射调度依赖，建模复杂非线性系统时需要大量调度变量。
zh.method: 引入直接参数化保证有理LPV-LFR模型的适定性，通过联合估计LPV对象和调度映射，仅使用输入输出数据。

idea_spark.risk: 实际系统可能不满足有理调度假设，或联合估计计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从系统识别角度为多核实时调度中的非线性行为建模提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes LPV models with Linear Fractional Representation (LFR) that admit rational scheduling dependency, enabling efficient modeling of complex nonlinear systems with fewer scheduling variables.
en.motivation: Existing LPV identification methods rely on affine scheduling dependency, requiring many scheduling variables for complex nonlinear systems.
en.method: Introduces a direct parameterization to ensure well-posedness of rational LPV-LFR models, via joint estimation of LPV plant and scheduling map using only input-output data.
en.result: Accuracy is demonstrated on two simulation examples.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to efficiently identify control-friendly models of nonlinear systems with fewer scheduling variables.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using LPV-LFR models for nonlinear system modeling in real-time scheduling, e.g., task scheduling on multicore processors.
idea_spark.risk: Real systems may not satisfy rational scheduling assumptions, or joint estimation may be computationally expensive.
idea_spark.inspiration: Provides a new perspective from system identification for modeling nonlinear behavior in multicore real-time scheduling.

papers.title: Dependence of the nonlinear Schr{ö}dinger flow upon the nonlinearity
papers.summary: We consider the defocusing nonlinear Schr{ö}dinger equation in the energy-subcritical case, and investigate the dependence of the solution upon the power of the nonlinearity. Special attention is paid to the global in time description. The main three aspects addressed, in the decreasing order of difficulty, are the limit when the total power tends to one, along with the connection with the logarithmic Schr{ö}dinger equation, the description when long range effects may be present, and the continuity of the scattering operator in the short range case. This text resumes the presentation given by the first author at {É}cole polytechnique for the Laurent Schwartz seminar, in May 2026.

ai.tldr: 研究能量次临界散焦非线性薛定谔方程的解对非线性幂次依赖关系，重点分析全局时间行为，包括幂次趋近1时的极限、长程效应以及短程散射算子的连续性。
ai.motivation: 理解非线性薛定谔方程中非线性强度变化对解全局行为的影响，特别是从幂次非线性到对数非线性的过渡。
ai.method: 理论分析，基于能量次临界假设，分别处理幂次趋近1、长程效应和短程散射三种情形。
ai.result: 给出了非线性幂次趋近1时解收敛到对数薛定谔方程解的极限描述；刻画了长程效应下的解行为；证明了短程情形下散射算子的连续性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解非线性薛定谔方程中非线性幂次变化如何影响解的全局存在性和散射性质。

idea_spark.idea: 探索非线性幂次趋近临界值时，解是否会出现新的奇性结构或长时间行为转变。
idea_spark.risk: 长程效应分析可能依赖于特定非线性形式，推广到一般非线性时需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从幂次非线性到对数非线性的过渡启发我们研究其他非线性退化极限（如指数型、饱和型）的动力学。

en.tldr: Investigates the dependence of solutions to the defocusing energy-subcritical nonlinear Schrödinger equation on the power of nonlinearity, focusing on global-in-time behavior, including the limit as the power tends to one, long-range effects, and continuity of the scattering operator in the short-range case.
en.motivation: To understand how changes in nonlinearity strength affect the global dynamics of the nonlinear Schrödinger equation, especially the transition from power-type to logarithmic nonlinearity.
en.method: Theoretical analysis under the energy-subcritical assumption, addressing three regimes: power approaching one, long-range effects, and short-range scattering.
en.result: Establishes the limit of solutions to the logarithmic Schrödinger equation as the power tends to one; describes solution behavior under long-range effects; proves continuity of the scattering operator in the short-range case.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how varying the nonlinearity power influences global existence and scattering properties of the nonlinear Schrödinger equation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether new singular structures or long-time behavioral transitions occur when the nonlinearity power approaches a critical value.
idea_spark.risk: Long-range effect analysis may rely on specific nonlinear forms; generalization to arbitrary nonlinearities requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: The transition from power-type to logarithmic nonlinearity inspires studying other degenerate nonlinear limits (e.g., exponential, saturating) in dynamics.

papers.title: On the existence and nonexistence of global solutions of the semilinear heat equation
papers.summary: We consider the semilinear heat equation $$ u_t-Δu=|u|^{p-1}u,\ \ (t,x)\in\mathbb{R}^+\times\mathbb{R}^n. $$ The well-known difficulty with this problem is that the potential well method cannot be applied directly, due to the scaling invariance which leads to a potential well of zero depth. We employ the forward similarity transform to convert the equation into a new parabolic equation, so that we can apply the potential well method in weighted Sobolev spaces. As a result, we obtain a new criterion that establishes whether solutions to the heat equation blow up in finite time or exist globally. This work extends the partial results of Ikehata et al. (\textit{Ann. Inst. H. Poincaré Anal. Non Linéaire}, \textbf{27} (2010) 877-900) from critical Sobolev exponent to the case $p_F<p<p_S$, where $p_F=1+2/n$ is the Fujita exponent and $p_S=(n+2)/(n-2)$ (for $n\ge3$) is the critical Sobolev exponent.

ai.tldr: 研究半线性热方程全局解的存在性与爆破性，利用前向相似变换和加权Sobolev空间中的势阱方法，将结果从临界Sobolev指数推广到Fujita指数与临界Sobolev指数之间的范围。
ai.motivation: 半线性热方程因尺度不变性导致势阱深度为零，传统势阱方法无法直接应用，需要新方法判断解的全局存在性或有限时间爆破。
ai.method: 采用前向相似变换将原方程转化为新的抛物方程，从而在加权Sobolev空间中应用势阱方法。
ai.result: 得到了一个判断解全局存在或有限时间爆破的新准则，将Ikehata等人的部分结果从临界Sobolev指数情形推广到p_F < p < p_S的范围。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究具有尺度不变性的非线性抛物型方程的解的长时间行为提供了新的分析工具和判据。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似方法应用于非线性Schrödinger方程或Navier-Stokes方程，研究其解的爆破与全局存在性。
idea_spark.risk: 加权空间的选择和势阱构造可能因方程非线性项不同而失效，需要仔细验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用变换改变方程结构以适用经典方法，是处理尺度不变性难题的有效思路。

zh.tldr: 研究半线性热方程全局解的存在性与爆破性，利用前向相似变换和加权Sobolev空间中的势阱方法，将结果从临界Sobolev指数推广到Fujita指数与临界Sobolev指数之间的范围。

idea_spark.risk: 加权空间的选择和势阱构造可能因方程非线性项不同而失效，需要仔细验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用变换改变方程结构以适用经典方法，是处理尺度不变性难题的有效思路。

en.tldr: Studies global existence and blow-up of solutions to the semilinear heat equation, using forward similarity transform and potential well method in weighted Sobolev spaces, extending results from critical Sobolev exponent to the range between Fujita exponent and critical Sobolev exponent.
en.motivation: The scaling invariance of the semilinear heat equation makes the potential well depth zero, so the classical potential well method cannot be applied directly; a new approach is needed to determine global existence or finite-time blow-up.
en.method: Apply the forward similarity transform to convert the equation into a new parabolic equation, then apply the potential well method in weighted Sobolev spaces.
en.result: Obtain a new criterion for global existence or finite-time blow-up, extending partial results of Ikehata et al. from the critical Sobolev exponent case to the range p_F < p < p_S.
en.help_to_user: Provides new analytical tools and criteria for studying long-time behavior of solutions to nonlinear parabolic equations with scaling invariance.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying a similar approach to the nonlinear Schrödinger equation or Navier-Stokes equations to study blow-up and global existence.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of weighted spaces and construction of potential wells may fail for different nonlinearities and require careful verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using transformations to change the equation structure so that classical methods become applicable is an effective strategy for handling scaling invariance difficulties.

papers.title: RNA-FM: Flow-Matching Generative Model for Genome-wide RNA-Seq Prediction
papers.summary: Histopathology whole-slide images (WSIs) are routinely acquired in clinical practice and contain rich tissue morphology but lack direct molecular architecture and functional programs defining pathological states, whereas RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) provides genome-wide transcriptional profiles at substantial cost, thereby motivating WSI-based genome-wide transcriptomic prediction. Existing approaches for predicting gene expression from WSIs predominantly rely on deterministic regression with one-to-one mapping, limiting their ability to capture biological heterogeneity and predictive uncertainty. We propose RNA-FM, a flow-matching generative framework for genome-wide bulk RNA-seq prediction from WSIs. RNA-FM formulates transcriptomic prediction as a continuous-time conditional transport problem, learning a velocity field that maps a simple prior to the target gene expression distribution conditioned on morphologies. By integrating pathway-level structure, RNA-FM enables scalable and biologically interpretable genome-wide gene expression imputation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RNA-FM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches while maintaining biological meaningfulness. Code is available at https://github.com/YXSong000/RNA-FM.

ai.tldr: 提出RNA-FM，一种基于流匹配的生成模型，用于从组织病理学全切片图像预测全基因组RNA-seq表达谱。
ai.motivation: 现有方法使用确定性回归，无法捕捉生物异质性和预测不确定性，且成本高昂。
ai.method: 将转录组预测建模为连续时间条件传输问题，学习从简单先验到目标基因表达分布的流速场，并整合通路级结构。
ai.result: 在多个数据集上优于现有方法，且保持生物学可解释性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员从常规病理图像低成本获取全基因组转录信息，支持疾病机制研究。

idea_spark.idea: 结合空间转录组数据，将预测扩展到空间分辨率的基因表达图谱。
idea_spark.risk: 通路级先验可能引入偏差，需验证在不同癌症类型中的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用生成模型处理生物数据中的多模态映射不确定性，启发其他组学预测任务。

en.tldr: Proposes RNA-FM, a flow-matching generative model for predicting genome-wide RNA-seq expression from histopathology whole-slide images.
en.motivation: Existing deterministic regression methods fail to capture biological heterogeneity and predictive uncertainty, and are costly.
en.method: Formulates transcriptomic prediction as a continuous-time conditional transport problem, learning a velocity field from a simple prior to target gene expression distribution, integrating pathway-level structure.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art methods on multiple datasets while maintaining biological interpretability.
en.help_to_user: Enables cost-effective genome-wide transcriptomic profiling from routine pathology images, aiding disease mechanism research.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate spatial transcriptomics data to extend prediction to spatially resolved gene expression maps.
idea_spark.risk: Pathway-level priors may introduce bias; generalization across cancer types needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging generative models to handle multi-modal mapping uncertainty in biological data inspires other omics prediction tasks.

papers.title: Adaptive Multi-Round Allocation with Stochastic Arrivals
papers.summary: We study a sequential resource allocation problem motivated by adaptive network recruitment, in which a limited budget of identical resources must be allocated over multiple rounds to individuals with stochastic referral capacity. Successful referrals endogenously generate future decision opportunities while allocating additional resources to an individual exhibits diminishing returns. We first show that the single-round allocation problem admits an exact greedy solution based on marginal survival probabilities. In the multi-round setting, the resulting Bellman recursion is intractable due to the stochastic, high-dimensional evolution of the frontier. To address this, we introduce a population-level surrogate value function that depends only on the remaining budget and frontier size. This surrogate enables an exact dynamic program via truncated probability generating functions, yielding a planning algorithm with polynomial complexity in the total budget. We further analyze robustness under model misspecification, proving a multi-round error bound that decomposes into a tight single-round frontier error and a population-level transition error. Finally, we evaluate our method on real-world inspired recruitment scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出一种在随机到达场景下进行多轮自适应资源分配的方法，通过人口水平替代价值函数实现多项式时间规划，并给出模型误设下的误差界。
ai.motivation: 自适应网络招募中，有限资源需多轮分配给具有随机推荐能力的个体，且成功推荐会内生产生未来决策机会，但多轮贝尔曼递归因随机高维前沿状态而难以求解。
ai.method: 引入仅依赖剩余预算和前沿规模的人口水平替代价值函数，利用截断概率生成函数实现精确动态规划，算法复杂度为预算的多项式阶。
ai.result: 单轮问题存在基于边际生存概率的贪心解；多轮算法在真实场景招募数据上有效；模型误设下误差可分解为单轮前沿误差和人口水平转移误差。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在随机到达和递减回报下高效分配有限资源，并提供可计算的规划算法及鲁棒性保证。

idea_spark.idea: 将高维随机前沿状态压缩为仅含预算和前沿规模的标量，通过截断概率生成函数精确求解，避免维数灾难。
idea_spark.risk: 替代函数可能丢失个体异质性信息，在极端异质场景下规划可能次优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受网络招募中推荐链动态启发，将复杂随机过程简化为可计算的人口水平模型，类似平均场近似思想。

zh.method: 引入仅依赖剩余预算和前沿规模的人口水平替代价值函数，利用截断概率生成函数实现精确动态规划，算法复杂度为预算的多项式阶。
zh.result: 单轮问题存在基于边际生存概率的贪心解；多轮算法在真实场景招募数据上有效；模型误设下误差可分解为单轮前沿误差和人口水平转移误差。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在随机到达和递减回报下高效分配有限资源，并提供可计算的规划算法及鲁棒性保证。

idea_spark.idea: 将高维随机前沿状态压缩为仅含预算和前沿规模的标量，通过截断概率生成函数精确求解，避免维数灾难。
idea_spark.risk: 替代函数可能丢失个体异质性信息，在极端异质场景下规划可能次优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受网络招募中推荐链动态启发，将复杂随机过程简化为可计算的人口水平模型，类似平均场近似思想。

en.tldr: Proposes an adaptive multi-round allocation method under stochastic arrivals, using a population-level surrogate value function to achieve polynomial-time planning, with error bounds under model misspecification.
en.motivation: In adaptive network recruitment, limited resources must be allocated over multiple rounds to individuals with stochastic referral capacity, where successful referrals endogenously generate future opportunities, but the multi-round Bellman recursion is intractable due to stochastic high-dimensional frontier evolution.
en.method: Introduces a population-level surrogate value function depending only on remaining budget and frontier size, enabling exact dynamic programming via truncated probability generating functions with polynomial complexity in total budget.
en.result: Single-round problem admits an exact greedy solution based on marginal survival probabilities; multi-round algorithm performs well on real-world recruitment scenarios; error under model misspecification decomposes into tight single-round frontier error and population-level transition error.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to efficiently allocate limited resources under stochastic arrivals and diminishing returns, providing a computable planning algorithm with robustness guarantees.

idea_spark.idea: Compress the high-dimensional stochastic frontier into a scalar of remaining budget and frontier size, then solve exactly via truncated probability generating functions, avoiding the curse of dimensionality.
idea_spark.risk: The surrogate may lose individual heterogeneity information, leading to suboptimal planning in extremely heterogeneous scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by referral chain dynamics in network recruitment, simplifies complex stochastic processes into a computable population-level model, akin to mean-field approximation.

papers.title: Discrete Flow Matching for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
papers.summary: Many reinforcement learning (RL) tasks have discrete action spaces, but most generative policy methods based on diffusion and flow matching are designed for continuous control. Meanwhile, generative policies usually rely heavily on offline datasets and offline-to-online RL is itself challenging, as the policy must improve from new interaction without losing useful behavior learned from static data. To address those challenges, we introduce DRIFT, an online fine-tuning method that updates an offline pretrained continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC) policy with an advantage-weighted discrete flow matching loss. To preserve useful pretrained knowledge, we add a path-space penalty that regularizes the full CTMC trajectory distribution, rather than only the final action distribution. For large discrete action spaces, we introduce a candidate-set approximation that updates the actor over a small subset of actions sampled from reference-policy rollouts and uniform exploration. Our theoretical analysis shows that the candidate-set error is controlled by missing target probability mass, and the induced CTMC generator error decreases as the candidate set covers more high-probability actions. Experiments on prevailing discrete action RL task show that our method provides stable offline-to-online improvement across all tasks, achieving the highest average score on Jericho with a simple GRU encoder while outperforming methods that use pretrained language models. Controlled experiments further confirm that the path-space penalty remains bounded during fine-tuning and that the CTMC generator adapts to shifted rewards faster than deterministic baselines. The candidate-set mechanism is supported by a stability analysis showing that the generator error decreases exponentially with candidate coverage.

ai.tldr: 提出DRIFT方法，利用离散流匹配和路径空间惩罚，实现离线到在线强化学习的稳定微调。
ai.motivation: 现有生成策略方法多针对连续控制，且离线到在线强化学习面临策略退化问题。
ai.method: 使用优势加权离散流匹配损失更新预训练连续时间马尔可夫链策略，并加入路径空间惩罚保留知识；对大型离散动作空间采用候选集近似。
ai.result: 在离散动作任务上实现稳定改进，在Jericho上取得最高平均分，且路径空间惩罚保持有界，生成器适应奖励变化更快。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种适用于离散动作空间的离线到在线强化学习微调框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将连续时间马尔可夫链与优势加权流匹配结合，并引入轨迹级正则化。
idea_spark.risk: 候选集近似可能遗漏高概率动作，影响策略优化质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从扩散模型和流匹配的连续控制成功中，借鉴其生成框架并适配离散动作空间。

zh.motivation: 现有生成策略方法多针对连续控制，且离线到在线强化学习面临策略退化问题。

en.tldr: DRIFT uses discrete flow matching with a path-space penalty to stably fine-tune offline pretrained policies in offline-to-online RL.
en.motivation: Existing generative policy methods focus on continuous control, and offline-to-online RL suffers from policy degradation.
en.method: Updates a pretrained continuous-time Markov chain policy via advantage-weighted discrete flow matching loss, adds path-space penalty to preserve knowledge, and uses candidate-set approximation for large discrete action spaces.
en.result: Achieves stable improvement across discrete action tasks, highest average score on Jericho, bounded path-space penalty, and faster reward adaptation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a fine-tuning framework for offline-to-online RL with discrete action spaces.

idea_spark.idea: Combine continuous-time Markov chains with advantage-weighted flow matching and trajectory-level regularization.
idea_spark.risk: Candidate-set approximation may miss high-probability actions, degrading policy optimization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by diffusion and flow matching successes in continuous control, adapted to discrete action spaces.

papers.title: SEMIR: Semantic Minor-Induced Representation Learning on Graphs for Visual Segmentation
papers.summary: Segmenting small and sparse structures in large-scale images is fundamentally constrained by voxel-level, lattice-bound computation and extreme class imbalance -- dense, full-resolution inference scales poorly and forces most pipelines to rely on fixed regionization or downsampling, coupling computational cost to image resolution and attenuating boundary evidence precisely where minority structures are most informative. We introduce SEMIR (Semantic Minor-Induced Representation Learning), a representation framework that decouples inference from the native grid by learning a task-adapted, topology-preserving latent graph representation with exact decoding. SEMIR transforms the underlying grid graph into a compact, boundary-aligned graph minor through parameterized edge contraction, node deletion, and edge deletion, while preserving an exact lifting map from minor predictions to lattice labels. Minor construction is formalized as a few-shot structure learning problem that replaces hand-tuned preprocessing with a boundary-alignment objective: minor parameters are learned by maximizing agreement between predicted boundary elements and target-specific semantic edges under a boundary Dice criterion, and the induced minor is annotated with scale- and rotation-robust geometric and intensity descriptors and supports efficient region-level inference via message passing on a graph neural network (GNN) with relational edge features. We benchmark SEMIR on three tumor segmentation datasets -- BraTS 2021, KiTS23, and LiTS -- where targets exhibit high structural variability and distributional uncertainty. SEMIR yields consistent improvements in minority-structure Dice at practical runtime. More broadly, SEMIR establishes a framework for learning task-adapted, topology-preserving latent representations with exact decoding for high-resolution structured visual data.

ai.tldr: 提出SEMIR框架，通过学习任务自适应的拓扑保持潜图表示，将推理与原始网格解耦，实现高效且精确的小目标分割。
ai.motivation: 大规模图像中稀疏小结构的分割受限于体素级密集计算和极端类别不平衡，传统方法依赖固定区域化或降采样，导致计算成本高且边界信息丢失。
ai.method: 将原始网格图通过参数化边收缩、节点删除和边删除转换为紧凑的边界对齐图子式，并保留精确的升维映射；子式构建形式化为少样本结构学习，使用边界Dice准则优化；子式节点附带几何和强度描述符，通过图神经网络进行区域级推理。
ai.result: 在BraTS 2021、KiTS23和LiTS三个肿瘤分割数据集上，SEMIR在保持实际运行时间的同时，一致提升了少数结构Dice系数。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将高分辨率图像分割转化为图子式学习的新思路，可帮助用户处理极端类别不平衡和小目标分割问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将图子式构造与少样本学习结合，自动学习任务特定的边界对齐子图，替代手工预处理。
idea_spark.risk: 图子式构造的优化可能对初始参数敏感，且在大规模图上计算开销仍需评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受图论中子式概念启发，将网格图压缩为保留拓扑结构的紧凑表示，实现高效推理。

idea_spark.idea: 将图子式构造与少样本学习结合，自动学习任务特定的边界对齐子图，替代手工预处理。
idea_spark.risk: 图子式构造的优化可能对初始参数敏感，且在大规模图上计算开销仍需评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受图论中子式概念启发，将网格图压缩为保留拓扑结构的紧凑表示，实现高效推理。

en.tldr: SEMIR learns a task-adapted, topology-preserving latent graph representation via graph minor construction, decoupling inference from the native grid for efficient and accurate segmentation of small structures.
en.motivation: Segmenting small and sparse structures in large-scale images is hindered by voxel-level dense computation and extreme class imbalance; conventional methods rely on fixed regionization or downsampling, causing high computational cost and loss of boundary information.
en.method: Transform the original grid graph into a compact, boundary-aligned graph minor via parameterized edge contraction, node deletion, and edge deletion while preserving an exact lifting map; formulate minor construction as few-shot structure learning optimized by a boundary Dice criterion; annotate minor nodes with geometric and intensity descriptors and perform region-level inference via a GNN with relational edge features.
en.result: On BraTS 2021, KiTS23, and LiTS tumor segmentation datasets, SEMIR consistently improves minority-structure Dice at practical runtime.
en.help_to_user: Offers a novel approach to convert high-resolution image segmentation into graph minor learning, aiding users in handling extreme class imbalance and small object segmentation.

idea_spark.idea: Combine graph minor construction with few-shot learning to automatically learn task-specific boundary-aligned subgraphs, replacing hand-crafted preprocessing.
idea_spark.risk: Optimization of graph minor construction may be sensitive to initial parameters, and computational cost on large graphs needs further evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the concept of graph minors in graph theory, compressing the grid graph into a compact representation that preserves topology for efficient inference.

papers.title: ShardTensor: Domain Parallelism for Scientific Machine Learning
papers.summary: Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) faces unique challenges for extreme-resolution data, with mitigations that often fail to scale or degrade the accuracy of trained models. While some specialized methods have achieved remarkable results in training models or performing inference on massive spatial datasets with bespoke techniques, there is no generalized framework for parallelization over input data below batch size one per device. In this work we introduce ShardTensor: a novel paradigm of domain parallelism that enables flexible scaling of input data to arbitrary sizes. By decoupling the spatial dimensionality of input data from hardware constraints, ShardTensor enables scientific machine learning workloads to reach new levels of high fidelity training and inference. We demonstrate both strong and weak scaling of workloads during training and inference, showing improved latency with strong scaling and demonstrating the capacity to process higher data sizes with weak scaling. Additionally, we demonstrate multiple dimensions of parallelization, removing barriers to SciML on extreme-scale inputs.

ai.tldr: 提出ShardTensor，一种领域并行范式，用于科学机器学习中极端分辨率数据的灵活扩展。
ai.motivation: 科学机器学习处理极端分辨率数据时，现有方法难以扩展或降低模型精度，缺乏通用的数据并行框架。
ai.method: 通过将输入数据的空间维度与硬件约束解耦，实现领域并行，支持任意大小输入数据的灵活扩展。
ai.result: 在训练和推理中展示了强扩展和弱扩展，强扩展降低延迟，弱扩展处理更大数据量，并实现了多维度并行。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户处理大规模科学数据，提升模型训练和推理的保真度与效率。

idea_spark.idea: 结合自适应数据分片与动态负载均衡，进一步优化多维度并行性能。
idea_spark.risk: 解耦空间维度可能引入通信开销，需权衡并行粒度与效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受科学计算中区域分解方法启发，将并行策略从计算域扩展到数据域。

zh.tldr: 提出ShardTensor，一种领域并行范式，用于科学机器学习中极端分辨率数据的灵活扩展。

en.tldr: Introduces ShardTensor, a domain parallelism paradigm for flexible scaling of extreme-resolution data in scientific machine learning.
en.motivation: Existing methods for extreme-resolution data in SciML fail to scale or degrade accuracy, lacking a general data parallelism framework.
en.method: Decouples spatial dimensionality from hardware constraints, enabling domain parallelism for arbitrary input sizes.
en.result: Demonstrates strong and weak scaling in training and inference, with improved latency and capacity for larger data, plus multi-dimensional parallelism.
en.help_to_user: Helps users process large-scale scientific data with higher fidelity and efficiency in model training and inference.

idea_spark.idea: Combine adaptive data partitioning with dynamic load balancing to further optimize multi-dimensional parallel performance.
idea_spark.risk: Decoupling spatial dimensions may introduce communication overhead, requiring trade-offs between granularity and efficiency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by domain decomposition methods in scientific computing, extending parallel strategies from computation to data domains.

papers.title: Sharp upper bound for a branched transport problem coming from Ginzburg-Landau models
papers.summary: We consider a branched transport type problem with weakly imposed boundary conditions, which can be seen as a blown-up version of a reduced model for type-I superconductors in the regime of vanishing external magnetic field. We prove that if the irrigated measure is (locally) Ahlfors regular then it is of dimension at most $8/5$ in agreement with the conjecture by Conti, the third author and Serfaty.

ai.tldr: 针对Ginzburg-Landau模型中的分支输运问题，证明了若灌溉测度局部Ahlfors正则，则其维数不超过8/5。
ai.motivation: 为第一类超导体在零外磁场极限下的简化模型提供严格的维数上界，验证Conti等人提出的猜想。
ai.method: 通过弱边界条件建立分支输运问题，利用Ahlfors正则性分析测度维数。
ai.result: 灌溉测度的维数上界为8/5。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了分支输运问题中测度维数的精确上界，有助于理解超导模型中的几何结构。

idea_spark.idea: 将弱边界条件与正则性条件结合，可能用于研究更一般的能量极小化问题。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于Ahlfors正则性假设，实际应用中可能难以验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法应用于其他物理模型中的分支结构，如位错或涡旋阵列。

zh.tldr: 针对Ginzburg-Landau模型中的分支输运问题，证明了若灌溉测度局部Ahlfors正则，则其维数不超过8/5。

idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法应用于其他物理模型中的分支结构，如位错或涡旋阵列。

en.tldr: For a branched transport problem arising from Ginzburg-Landau models, we prove that if the irrigated measure is locally Ahlfors regular, its dimension is at most 8/5.
en.motivation: To provide a rigorous upper bound for the dimension in a reduced model of type-I superconductors in the vanishing external magnetic field regime, confirming a conjecture by Conti, the third author, and Serfaty.
en.method: We formulate a branched transport problem with weakly imposed boundary conditions and analyze the dimension of the irrigated measure using Ahlfors regularity.
en.result: The dimension of the irrigated measure is bounded above by 8/5.
en.help_to_user: This result gives a precise dimensional upper bound in branched transport, aiding the understanding of geometric structures in superconductor models.

idea_spark.idea: Combining weak boundary conditions with regularity conditions may be useful for studying more general energy minimization problems.
idea_spark.risk: The result depends on the Ahlfors regularity assumption, which may be difficult to verify in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to branched structures in other physical models, such as dislocations or vortex arrays.

papers.title: Uniform sampling of multitype continuous-time Bienaymé-Galton-Watson trees
papers.summary: We study the genealogy of a sample of $k$ individuals taken uniformly without replacement from a continuous-time multitype Bienaymé--Galton--Watson process at fixed times. Our results are quite general, requiring only that the process be non-simple and conservative, and that every type has a positive probability to ``eventually lead to'' all other types within the population. The corresponding single-type case has recently been studied by Johnston (2019), Harris, Johnston, and Roberts (2020), and Harris, Johnston, and Pardo (2024).   Our approach is based on a $k$-spine decomposition and a suitable change of measure under which the distinguished spines form a uniform sample at time $T$, while the population size is subject to $k$-size biasing and exponential discounting. This construction preserves a branching Markov property and yields an explicit description of the genealogical tree at fixed times.   In particular, we characterise spine splitting times, offspring distributions, and type-dependent ancestral structures, revealing rich interactions between types that are absent in the single-type setting. The present results form the basis of a forthcoming series of papers in which limiting genealogical behaviour is analysed under various asymptotic regimes and more general sampling schemes by the authors, see Angtuncio et al. (2026b), (2026c) and (2026d).

ai.tldr: 研究从多类型连续时间Bienaymé-Galton-Watson过程中无放回均匀抽取k个样本的家系结构，通过k-脊柱分解和测度变换给出固定时刻家系树的显式描述。
ai.motivation: 将单类型情形下均匀抽样的家系分析推广到多类型过程，揭示类型间相互作用对家系结构的影响。
ai.method: 基于k-脊柱分解和适当的测度变换，使区分出的脊柱在时间T形成均匀样本，同时种群大小受k-大小偏倚和指数折扣影响，保留分支马尔可夫性。
ai.result: 刻画了脊柱分裂时间、后代分布和类型依赖的祖先结构，展示了单类型情形不存在的丰富类型间相互作用。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解多类型分支过程中样本的家系关系提供理论框架，可用于种群遗传学或流行病学中的祖先推断。

idea_spark.idea: 利用k-脊柱分解和测度变换，将均匀采样问题转化为带偏倚的分支过程，从而显式描述家系树。
idea_spark.risk: 测度变换的构造可能依赖于过程的具体性质，推广时需验证条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从单类型脊柱方法出发，通过多类型扩展发现类型间相互作用的新现象。

zh.tldr: 研究从多类型连续时间Bienaymé-Galton-Watson过程中无放回均匀抽取k个样本的家系结构，通过k-脊柱分解和测度变换给出固定时刻家系树的显式描述。
zh.motivation: 将单类型情形下均匀抽样的家系分析推广到多类型过程，揭示类型间相互作用对家系结构的影响。
zh.method: 基于k-脊柱分解和适当的测度变换，使区分出的脊柱在时间T形成均匀样本，同时种群大小受k-大小偏倚和指数折扣影响，保留分支马尔可夫性。
zh.result: 刻画了脊柱分裂时间、后代分布和类型依赖的祖先结构，展示了单类型情形不存在的丰富类型间相互作用。
zh.help_to_user: 为理解多类型分支过程中样本的家系关系提供理论框架，可用于种群遗传学或流行病学中的祖先推断。

idea_spark.idea: 利用k-脊柱分解和测度变换，将均匀采样问题转化为带偏倚的分支过程，从而显式描述家系树。
idea_spark.risk: 测度变换的构造可能依赖于过程的具体性质，推广时需验证条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从单类型脊柱方法出发，通过多类型扩展发现类型间相互作用的新现象。

en.tldr: We study the genealogy of a uniform sample of k individuals from a multitype continuous-time Bienaymé-Galton-Watson process, using a k-spine decomposition and change of measure to obtain an explicit description of the genealogical tree at fixed times.
en.motivation: Extend the single-type uniform sampling genealogy analysis to multitype processes, revealing how type interactions shape ancestral structures.
en.method: A k-spine decomposition and a suitable change of measure are employed, under which the distinguished spines form a uniform sample at time T while the population size is k-size biased and exponentially discounted, preserving a branching Markov property.
en.result: We characterize spine splitting times, offspring distributions, and type-dependent ancestral structures, uncovering rich type interactions absent in the single-type setting.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for understanding genealogical relationships in multitype branching processes, applicable to ancestry inference in population genetics or epidemiology.

idea_spark.idea: Use k-spine decomposition and change of measure to transform uniform sampling into a biased branching process, enabling explicit genealogical tree description.
idea_spark.risk: Construction of the change of measure may depend on specific process properties; generalization requires verifying conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Building on single-type spine methods, the multitype extension reveals new phenomena from type interactions.

papers.title: Post-ADC Inference: Valid Inference After Active Data Collection
papers.summary: The validity of statistical inference depends critically on how data are collected. When data gathered through active data collection (ADC) are reused for a post-hoc inferential task, conventional inference can fail because the sampling is adaptively biased toward regions favored by the collection strategy. This issue is especially pronounced in black-box optimization, where sequential model-based optimization (SMBO) methods such as the tree-structured Parzen estimator (TPE) and Gaussian process upper confidence bound (GP-UCB) preferentially concentrate evaluations in promising regions. We study statistical inference on actively collected data when the inferential target is constructed in a data-dependent manner after data collection. To enable valid inference in this setting, we propose post-ADC inference, a framework that accounts for the biases arising from both the active data collection process and the subsequent data-driven target construction. Our method builds on selective inference and provides valid $p$-values and confidence intervals that correct for both sources of bias. The framework applies to a broad class of ADC processes by imposing only assumptions on the observation noise, without requiring any assumptions on the underlying black-box function or the surrogate model used by the SMBO algorithm. Empirical results also show that post-ADC inference provides valid inference for data collected by GP-UCB and TPE.

ai.tldr: 提出一种后主动数据收集推断框架，修正主动采样和数据驱动目标构建带来的偏差，实现有效统计推断。
ai.motivation: 主动收集的数据存在自适应采样偏差，传统推断方法失效，尤其在后设推断目标也依赖数据时偏差更严重。
ai.method: 基于选择性推断，同时校正主动数据收集过程和数据驱动目标构建两种偏差，仅对观测噪声做假设，不依赖黑箱函数或代理模型。
ai.result: 在GP-UCB和TPE收集的数据上，该方法能提供有效的p值和置信区间。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员在主动学习或贝叶斯优化场景下，对已收集数据做可靠的统计推断。

idea_spark.idea: 将选择性推断推广到后设推断目标也依赖数据的情形，并统一校正两种偏差。
idea_spark.risk: 对观测噪声假设的敏感性，以及计算复杂度可能较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在更多自适应数据收集框架中嵌入统计推断校正机制。

idea_spark.risk: 对观测噪声假设的敏感性，以及计算复杂度可能较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在更多自适应数据收集框架中嵌入统计推断校正机制。

en.tldr: Proposes a post-ADC inference framework that corrects biases from both active sampling and data-driven target construction for valid statistical inference.
en.motivation: Active data collection introduces adaptive sampling bias, causing conventional inference to fail, especially when the inferential target is also data-dependent.
en.method: Builds on selective inference to correct both sources of bias, requiring only assumptions on observation noise, not on the black-box function or surrogate model.
en.result: Provides valid p-values and confidence intervals on data collected by GP-UCB and TPE.
en.help_to_user: Enables reliable statistical inference on data collected via active learning or Bayesian optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Extends selective inference to handle post-hoc data-dependent targets and unifies bias correction for both sources.
idea_spark.risk: Sensitivity to observation noise assumptions and potential computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires embedding inference correction mechanisms in more adaptive data collection frameworks.

papers.title: Fluctuation analysis for a randomly perturbed dynamical system with state-dependent impulse effects
papers.summary: The principal aim of the present work is to explore limit theorems for small random perturbations of a planar impulsive dynamical system, where impulses occur at hitting times of a suitable switching surface, and are thus state-dependent. Working with a simplified example in polar coordinates, we obtain-for any fixed time horizon-a small noise expansion for the radial component, together with rigorous error estimates in the Skorohod space of right-continuous functions with left limits.

ai.tldr: 研究平面脉冲动力系统在随机小扰动下的极限定理，其中脉冲发生在状态依赖的切换面上。
ai.motivation: 探索状态依赖脉冲效应下随机扰动的极限行为，为复杂系统建模提供理论支撑。
ai.method: 以极坐标简化模型为例，对径向分量进行小噪声展开，并在Skorohod空间给出严格误差估计。
ai.result: 对任意固定时间区间，得到了径向分量的渐近展开及误差界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解状态依赖脉冲系统中随机扰动的影响，可用于分析生物、工程等领域的脉冲现象。

idea_spark.idea: 将状态依赖脉冲视为随机切换过程，结合鞅方法研究其极限分布。
idea_spark.risk: 简化模型可能忽略实际系统的非线性耦合，需验证一般性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受随机微分方程与脉冲动力系统交叉领域启发，可探索状态依赖脉冲的随机共振现象。

en.tldr: Limit theorems for small random perturbations of a planar impulsive dynamical system with state-dependent impulses are studied.
en.motivation: To understand the asymptotic behavior of stochastic perturbations in systems where impulses occur at state-dependent hitting times.
en.method: Using a simplified polar-coordinate example, a small noise expansion for the radial component is derived with rigorous error estimates in the Skorohod space.
en.result: For any fixed time horizon, an asymptotic expansion and error bounds for the radial component are obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for analyzing state-dependent impulsive systems under noise, applicable to biological or engineering pulse phenomena.

idea_spark.idea: Treat state-dependent impulses as a stochastic switching process and use martingale methods to study limiting distributions.
idea_spark.risk: The simplified model may miss nonlinear couplings in real systems; generality needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the intersection of stochastic differential equations and impulsive dynamics, stochastic resonance in state-dependent impulses could be explored.

papers.title: On solution of Diffusion Equation using Conformable Laplace Transform
papers.summary: The inversion theorem and convolution theorem of the conformable fractional Laplace transforms are developed. All the elementary properties of the classical Laplace transform are extended to the conformable fractional transform, and using these properties, we found analytical solutions to the initial-boundary value problems of the diffusion equation.

ai.tldr: 本文发展了相容分数阶拉普拉斯变换的反演定理和卷积定理，并用于求解扩散方程的初边值问题。
ai.motivation: 经典拉普拉斯变换在分数阶扩散方程求解中存在局限，需要推广到相容分数阶情形。
ai.method: 将经典拉普拉斯变换的初等性质扩展到相容分数阶变换，并利用反演和卷积定理推导解析解。
ai.result: 成功获得了扩散方程初边值问题的解析解。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了相容分数阶拉普拉斯变换的完整理论框架，可用于求解其他分数阶偏微分方程。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将相容分数阶拉普拉斯变换与数值方法结合，处理非线性分数阶方程。
idea_spark.risk: 变换的逆运算可能对复杂边界条件不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 分数阶变换的卷积定理可能启发新的分数阶积分方程求解策略。

en.tldr: This paper develops the inversion and convolution theorems of the conformable fractional Laplace transform and applies them to solve initial-boundary value problems of the diffusion equation.
en.motivation: Classical Laplace transform has limitations in solving fractional diffusion equations, necessitating extension to the conformable fractional case.
en.method: All elementary properties of the classical Laplace transform are extended to the conformable fractional transform, and analytical solutions are derived using the inversion and convolution theorems.
en.result: Analytical solutions to initial-boundary value problems of the diffusion equation are obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides a complete theoretical framework for the conformable fractional Laplace transform, applicable to other fractional partial differential equations.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to combine the conformable fractional Laplace transform with numerical methods for nonlinear fractional equations.
idea_spark.risk: The inverse transform may not be applicable to complex boundary conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The convolution theorem of fractional transforms may inspire new strategies for solving fractional integral equations.

papers.title: General and concise operator approach to the dyadic Green's function of layered media
papers.summary: Dyadic Green's function is an important tool of computational photonics, giving deeper insights into light-matter interaction. We present an operator approach to the derivation of the dyadic Green's function of a generic anisotropic planarly-layered medium for both electric and magnetic fields. The resulting Green's function is expressed through the evolution operators (a kind of transfer matrices) of the comprising layers and the surface impedance tensors, the singular term being naturally separated from other terms. The operator approach to the Green's function simplifies both the conceptual understanding of the problem and the subsequent practical applications, some of which are demonstrated here. The proposed approach can be easily generalized to the case of spherical and cylindrical layers. The obtained results can be applied in nanophotonics engineering problems.

ai.tldr: 提出一种通用且简洁的算子方法，用于推导各向异性平面分层介质中电场和磁场的并矢格林函数。
ai.motivation: 并矢格林函数是计算光子学的重要工具，但现有推导方法复杂，缺乏统一简洁的框架。
ai.method: 通过演化算子（一种传输矩阵）和表面阻抗张量来表达格林函数，并自然分离奇异项。
ai.result: 得到的格林函数形式简洁，易于概念理解和实际应用，并可推广到球面和柱面分层情况。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速掌握分层介质中格林函数的算子推导方法，并应用于纳米光子学工程问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将演化算子与表面阻抗结合，或许能用于设计具有特定光场调控功能的多层薄膜器件。
idea_spark.risk: 对于强非均匀或非线性介质，算子形式可能不再保持简洁，需要额外修正。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受量子力学中传输矩阵方法的启发，将类似思想引入经典电磁学格林函数推导。

en.tldr: A general and concise operator approach is presented for deriving the dyadic Green's function of anisotropic planarly-layered media for both electric and magnetic fields.
en.motivation: The dyadic Green's function is a key tool in computational photonics, but existing derivations lack a unified and simple framework.
en.method: The Green's function is expressed via evolution operators (a kind of transfer matrices) and surface impedance tensors, with the singular term naturally separated.
en.result: The resulting Green's function is conceptually clear and practically useful, and can be generalized to spherical and cylindrical layers.
en.help_to_user: Helps users quickly grasp the operator-based derivation of Green's functions in layered media and apply it to nanophotonics engineering problems.

idea_spark.idea: Combining evolution operators with surface impedance may enable design of multilayer thin-film devices with tailored optical field control.
idea_spark.risk: For strongly inhomogeneous or nonlinear media, the operator form may lose simplicity and require additional corrections.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the transfer matrix method in quantum mechanics, similar ideas are introduced into classical electromagnetic Green's function derivation.

papers.title: A Volume of Fluid Immersed Boundary Method for Industrial Polymer Mixing
papers.summary: This work develops advanced numerical methods for free-surface simulations of polymer mixing processes, integrating a Volume of Fluid (VOF) interface-capturing approach with a non-conforming Immersed Boundary (IB) method to model two-phase flows of highly viscous polymer melts and air within partially filled rotating mixing devices, implemented within the Finite Volume OpenFOAM library. To overcome severe numerical instabilities arising from the strong viscosity contrast between polymer melts and air, a block-coupled scheme providing fully implicit viscous diffusion treatment is integrated into the VOF-IB framework, relaxing time-step stability constraints and substantially reducing computational cost with respect to standard segregated solvers. The resulting BC-VOF-IB solver is applied to industrially relevant geometries of single- and twin-screw extruders, yielding physically consistent predictions of velocity and pressure fields under partial filling conditions. While further developments, most notably the inclusion of thermal effects, remain necessary, the proposed framework represents a meaningful step toward bridging academic CFD research and the practical demands of industrial polymer processing.

ai.tldr: 开发了一种结合VOF和浸入边界法的数值方法，用于模拟聚合物混合过程中的自由表面流动。
ai.motivation: 工业聚合物混合设备中高粘度熔体与空气的强粘度对比导致数值不稳定，现有方法计算成本高。
ai.method: 在OpenFOAM中集成VOF界面捕捉与非一致浸入边界法，并采用块耦合隐式粘性扩散处理。
ai.result: BC-VOF-IB求解器在单双螺杆挤出机几何中给出物理一致的预测，显著降低计算成本。
ai.help_to_user: 为聚合物加工领域的CFD模拟提供更稳定高效的求解方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将热效应耦合进BC-VOF-IB框架以模拟非等温聚合物混合过程。
idea_spark.risk: 热-流耦合可能引入额外数值刚度和计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴该框架处理自由表面与复杂运动边界的思路，可用于生物流体或食品加工模拟。

en.tldr: Developed a numerical method combining VOF and immersed boundary for free-surface simulations of polymer mixing.
en.motivation: Severe numerical instabilities due to high viscosity contrast between polymer melts and air in industrial mixing devices.
en.method: Integrated VOF interface-capturing with non-conforming immersed boundary method in OpenFOAM, using block-coupled implicit viscous diffusion.
en.result: BC-VOF-IB solver yields physically consistent predictions for single- and twin-screw extruders with reduced computational cost.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more stable and efficient CFD solver for polymer processing simulations.

idea_spark.idea: Couple thermal effects into the BC-VOF-IB framework for non-isothermal polymer mixing.
idea_spark.risk: Thermal-fluid coupling may introduce additional numerical stiffness and computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach for free-surface and moving boundaries could inspire simulations in biofluids or food processing.

papers.title: NOFE -- Neural Operator Function Embedding
papers.summary: Most dimensionality reduction methods treat data as discrete point clouds, ignoring the continuous domain structure inherent to many real-world processes. To bridge this gap, we introduce Neural Operator Function Embedding (NOFE), a domain-aware framework for continuous dimensionality reduction. NOFE learns function-to-function mappings via a Graph Kernel Operator, enabling mesh-free evaluation at arbitrary query locations independent of input discretization. We establish NOFE as approximation of sheaf-to-sheaf mappings, generalizing Sheaf Neural Networks to continuous domains. We evaluate NOFE across different datasets, comparing it against PCA, t-SNE, and UMAP. Our results demonstrate that NOFE significantly outperforms baselines in local structure preservation, achieving a local Stress of 0.111 compared to 0.398 for PCA, 0.773 for t-SNE, and 0.791 for UMAP for the ERA5 climate reanalysis dataset. NOFE also exhibits robust sampling independence, reducing the Patch Stitching Error by up to $20.0\times$ relative to UMAP (59.0 vs. 267.6 under regional normalization) and ensuring consistency across disjoint domain patches. While maintaining competitive global structure preservation (Stress-1: 0.379 vs. PCA's 0.268), NOFE resolves fine-grained structures and produces smooth, consistent embeddings that generalize across varying sample densities, addressing key limitations of discrete reduction methods.

ai.tldr: 提出NOFE框架，将连续降维视为函数到函数的映射，利用图核算子实现任意查询点的无网格评估，在局部结构保持和采样独立性上显著优于PCA、t-SNE和UMAP。
ai.motivation: 现有降维方法将数据视为离散点云，忽略了真实世界过程的连续域结构，导致局部结构失真和采样依赖。
ai.method: 通过图核算子学习函数到函数的映射，将降维建模为层到层的映射，推广了层神经网络到连续域。
ai.result: 在ERA5气候再分析数据集上，局部Stress为0.111（PCA 0.398，t-SNE 0.773，UMAP 0.791）；补丁拼接误差比UMAP降低最多20倍；全局结构保持与PCA相当。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种能处理连续域数据、保持局部结构且采样鲁棒的降维方法，适用于气候、物理等连续过程数据。

idea_spark.idea: 将NOFE与生成模型结合，学习从低维嵌入到高维连续场的可逆映射，实现数据生成与插值。
idea_spark.risk: 图核算子的计算复杂度可能随数据规模增长，需关注扩展性；层映射的理论解释需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受层神经网络启发，将代数拓扑中的层概念引入降维，为连续域表示学习提供新视角。

zh.tldr: 提出NOFE框架，将连续降维视为函数到函数的映射，利用图核算子实现任意查询点的无网格评估，在局部结构保持和采样独立性上显著优于PCA、t-SNE和UMAP。

en.tldr: NOFE is a domain-aware continuous dimensionality reduction framework that learns function-to-function mappings via a Graph Kernel Operator, enabling mesh-free evaluation and significantly outperforming PCA, t-SNE, and UMAP in local structure preservation and sampling independence.
en.motivation: Existing dimensionality reduction methods treat data as discrete point clouds, ignoring the continuous domain structure inherent in many real-world processes, leading to distorted local structures and sampling dependence.
en.method: NOFE learns function-to-function mappings via a Graph Kernel Operator, generalizing Sheaf Neural Networks to continuous domains and enabling mesh-free evaluation at arbitrary query locations.
en.result: On the ERA5 climate reanalysis dataset, NOFE achieves a local Stress of 0.111 vs. 0.398 (PCA), 0.773 (t-SNE), 0.791 (UMAP); reduces Patch Stitching Error by up to 20× compared to UMAP; and maintains competitive global structure preservation (Stress-1: 0.379 vs. PCA's 0.268).
en.help_to_user: Provides a dimensionality reduction method that handles continuous-domain data, preserves local structure, and is robust to sampling density, suitable for climate, physics, and other continuous processes.

idea_spark.idea: Combine NOFE with generative models to learn invertible mappings from low-dimensional embeddings to high-dimensional continuous fields for data generation and interpolation.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity of the Graph Kernel Operator may scale with data size; the theoretical interpretation of sheaf mappings needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Sheaf Neural Networks, introducing sheaf theory from algebraic topology into dimensionality reduction offers a new perspective for continuous-domain representation learning.

papers.title: Offline Policy Evaluation for Manipulation Policies via Discounted Liveness Formulation
papers.summary: Policy evaluation is a fundamental component of the development and deployment pipeline for robotic policies. In modern manipulation systems, this problem is particularly challenging: rewards are often sparse, task progression of evaluation rollouts are often non-monotonic as the policies exhibit recovery behaviors, and evaluation rollouts are necessarily of finite length. This finite length introduces truncation bias, breaking the infinite-horizon assumptions underlying standard methods relying on Bellman equations/principle of optimality. In this work, we propose a framework for offline policy evaluation from sparse rewards based on a liveness-based Bellman operator. Our formulation interprets policy evaluation as a task-completion problem and yields a conservative fixed-point value function that is robust to finite-horizon truncation. We analyze the theoretical properties of the proposed operator, including contraction guarantees, and show how it encodes task progression while mitigating truncation bias. We evaluate our method on two simulated manipulation tasks using both a Vision-Language-Action model and a diffusion policy, and a cloth folding task using human demonstrations. Empirical results demonstrate that our approach more accurately reflects task progress and substantially reduces truncation bias, outperforming classical baselines such as TD(0) and Monte Carlo policy evaluation.

ai.tldr: 提出基于活性的Bellman算子框架，用于从稀疏奖励中离线评估操作策略，有效缓解有限水平截断偏差。
ai.motivation: 现代操作系统中奖励稀疏、任务进展非单调且评估轨迹长度有限，导致标准无限水平方法存在截断偏差。
ai.method: 将策略评估视为任务完成问题，定义活性Bellman算子，得到保守的不动点值函数，理论证明其收缩性并编码任务进展。
ai.result: 在模拟操作任务（VLA模型和扩散策略）及真实布料折叠任务上，该方法比TD(0)和蒙特卡洛评估更准确反映任务进展，显著降低截断偏差。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种离线评估操作策略的实用方法，尤其适用于奖励稀疏、任务进展非单调的机器人学习场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将活性概念与保守值函数结合，为离线评估提供新视角，可进一步探索与模型预测控制或逆强化学习的融合。
idea_spark.risk: 活性定义可能依赖任务先验，在复杂多阶段任务中需谨慎设计；理论保证在连续状态空间下需额外验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从任务完成角度重新定义值函数，启发我们思考如何将领域知识（如任务结构）融入离线评估框架。

en.tldr: Proposes a liveness-based Bellman operator framework for offline policy evaluation from sparse rewards, effectively mitigating finite-horizon truncation bias.
en.motivation: In modern manipulation systems, rewards are sparse, task progression is non-monotonic, and evaluation rollouts are finite, causing truncation bias in standard infinite-horizon methods.
en.method: Formulates policy evaluation as a task-completion problem, defines a liveness Bellman operator yielding a conservative fixed-point value function, with theoretical contraction guarantees and truncation bias mitigation.
en.result: On simulated manipulation tasks (VLA model and diffusion policy) and a real cloth folding task, the method more accurately reflects task progress and substantially reduces truncation bias compared to TD(0) and Monte Carlo evaluation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical offline evaluation method for manipulation policies, especially useful in robot learning scenarios with sparse rewards and non-monotonic task progression.

idea_spark.idea: Combining liveness with conservative value functions offers a new perspective for offline evaluation; further integration with model predictive control or inverse reinforcement learning is promising.
idea_spark.risk: Liveness definition may rely on task priors and requires careful design for complex multi-stage tasks; theoretical guarantees need additional verification in continuous state spaces.
idea_spark.inspiration: Redefining value functions from a task-completion viewpoint inspires incorporating domain knowledge (e.g., task structure) into offline evaluation frameworks.

papers.title: Language Modeling with Hyperspherical Flows
papers.summary: Discrete Diffusion Language Models progressed rapidly as an alternative to autoregressive (AR) models, motivated by their parallel generation abilities. However, for tractability, discrete diffusion models sample from a factorized distribution, which is less expressive than AR. Recent Flow Language Models (FLMs) apply continuous flows to language, transporting noise to data with a deterministic ODE that avoids factorized sampling. FLMs operate on one-hot vectors whose dimension scales with the vocabulary size, making FLMs costly to train. Moreover, since all distinct one-hot embeddings are equidistant in $\ell_2$, adding Gaussian noise does not have a clear semantic interpretation (unlike images, where Gaussian noise progressively degrades structure). We introduce $\mathbb{S}$-FLM, a latent FLM in the hypersphere. $\mathbb{S}$-FLM generates sequences by rotating vectors in $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ along a velocity field learned with cross-entropy, avoiding the overhead of materializing one-hot vectors. Previous FLMs match AR in Generative Perplexity (Gen.\ PPL), but samples with high likelihood are not necessarily correct in verifiable domains such as math and code. $\mathbb{S}$-FLM substantially improves continuous flow language models on large-vocabulary reasoning and closes the gap to masked diffusion under standard-temperature sampling ($T=1$), while a gap remains under optimized low-temperature ($T=0.1$) decoding.

ai.tldr: 提出一种在超球面上操作的连续流语言模型S-FLM，避免独热向量开销，在大型词汇推理任务上显著提升性能。
ai.motivation: 离散扩散语言模型因并行生成能力而受关注，但其因子化分布表达能力弱于自回归模型；现有流语言模型在独热向量上操作，训练成本高且高斯噪声缺乏语义解释。
ai.method: 在超球面S^{d-1}上通过旋转向量生成序列，利用交叉熵学习速度场，避免显式构造独热向量。
ai.result: S-FLM在大型词汇推理任务上大幅改进连续流语言模型，在标准温度采样下缩小了与掩码扩散模型的差距，但在优化低温解码下仍有差距。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过几何约束（超球面）提升语言模型并行生成的质量和效率。

idea_spark.idea: 利用超球面上的旋转操作替代独热向量，可能启发更紧凑的离散表示学习方法。
idea_spark.risk: 在低温解码下性能仍不如掩码扩散模型，可能限制高精度推理应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将连续流与几何约束结合，为语言模型提供新的生成范式，类似图像领域的流模型。

idea_spark.risk: 在低温解码下性能仍不如掩码扩散模型，可能限制高精度推理应用。

en.tldr: Proposes S-FLM, a latent flow language model on the hypersphere that avoids one-hot vector overhead and significantly improves performance on large-vocabulary reasoning tasks.
en.motivation: Discrete diffusion language models are motivated by parallel generation but suffer from less expressive factorized distributions; existing flow language models operate on one-hot vectors, which are costly and lack semantic interpretation for Gaussian noise.
en.method: Generates sequences by rotating vectors on the hypersphere S^{d-1} along a velocity field learned with cross-entropy, avoiding explicit one-hot vector construction.
en.result: S-FLM substantially improves continuous flow language models on large-vocabulary reasoning, closing the gap to masked diffusion under standard-temperature sampling, while a gap remains under optimized low-temperature decoding.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how geometric constraints (hypersphere) can improve the quality and efficiency of parallel generation in language models.

idea_spark.idea: Using rotations on the hypersphere instead of one-hot vectors may inspire more compact discrete representation learning methods.
idea_spark.risk: Performance under low-temperature decoding still lags behind masked diffusion models, potentially limiting high-precision reasoning applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining continuous flows with geometric constraints offers a new generative paradigm for language models, analogous to flow models in image domains.

papers.title: Implications of structured continuous maximal regularity
papers.summary: We study how maximal regularity estimates with respect to the continuous functions improve automatically in cases where the spatial norm is fundamentally different from the supremum norm. More precisely, we invoke properties such as weak compactness of convolution-type operators related to the mild solutions of the underlying linear evolution equations to sharpen the a priori estimates. These results have several applications: such as a new proof of Guerre-Delabriere's result on $\mathrm{L}^1$-maximal regularity and an extension of Baillon's theorem; a simplification for well-known perturbation theorems for generation of $\mathrm{C}_0$-semigroups; and we resolve an open problem on input-to-state stability from control theory for a general abstract class of systems.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了结构化的连续最大正则性，通过利用卷积型算子的弱紧性改进先验估计，并应用于L1最大正则性、C0半群扰动定理以及控制理论中的输入-状态稳定性问题。
ai.motivation: 现有最大正则性估计在空间范数不同于上确界范数时不够精细，需要更一般的理论框架。
ai.method: 利用卷积型算子的弱紧性，结合线性演化方程的温和解，推导出更精确的先验估计。
ai.result: 给出了Guerre-Delabriere定理的新证明，扩展了Baillon定理，简化了C0半群生成扰动定理，并解决了控制理论中一类抽象系统的输入-状态稳定性开放问题。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解最大正则性在非上确界范数下的改进机制及其在偏微分方程、半群理论和控制论中的交叉应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将弱紧性分析与输入-状态稳定性结合，可能发展出新的稳定性判据。
idea_spark.risk: 弱紧性条件在非自反空间或非线性系统中可能失效，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从控制理论中的稳定性问题出发，反向推动泛函分析中正则性理论的发展。

en.tldr: This paper studies structured continuous maximal regularity, improving a priori estimates via weak compactness of convolution-type operators, with applications to L1-maximal regularity, perturbation theorems for C0-semigroups, and input-to-state stability in control theory.
en.motivation: Existing maximal regularity estimates are insufficient when the spatial norm differs from the supremum norm, requiring a more general framework.
en.method: Leveraging weak compactness of convolution-type operators and mild solutions of linear evolution equations to derive sharper a priori estimates.
en.result: Provides a new proof of Guerre-Delabriere's theorem, extends Baillon's theorem, simplifies perturbation theorems for C0-semigroup generation, and resolves an open problem on input-to-state stability for a general abstract class of systems.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand improvements of maximal regularity under non-supremum norms and their cross-applications in PDEs, semigroup theory, and control theory.

idea_spark.idea: Combining weak compactness analysis with input-to-state stability may lead to new stability criteria.
idea_spark.risk: Weak compactness conditions may fail in non-reflexive spaces or nonlinear systems, requiring careful verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from stability problems in control theory to drive advances in regularity theory within functional analysis.

keywords_raw: mild solutions of linear evolution equations

papers.title: Convex order and heat flow for projection profiles of $\ell_p^n$ balls
papers.summary: Let $B_p^n$ be the unit ball of $\ell_p^n$, with $1\le p<2$. We study central densities of one-dimensional marginals of the uniform measure on $B_p^n$ and of its Gaussian heat-flow regularizations. The profile is standardized by multiplying the central density by the standard deviation of the marginal. The key comparison is distributional: if the squared coordinates of one direction majorize those of another, then the corresponding squared projection is larger in convex order. A heat-flow identity turns this distributional comparison into strict Schur convexity of the smoothed central profile at every positive time. Together with the classical central-section theorem at $t=0$, this gives coordinate maximizers and diagonal minimizers for every $t\ge0$. We also evaluate the endpoint constants along the standard coordinate-to-diagonal chain and give a fourth-cumulant criterion for monotonicity of the coordinate profile.

ai.tldr: 研究ℓ_p^n球（1≤p<2）均匀测度的一维边缘的中心密度及其高斯热流正则化，发现平方坐标的凸序比较导致平方投影的凸序更大，并通过热流恒等式证明平滑后中心轮廓的严格Schur凸性。
ai.motivation: 理解高维凸体（如ℓ_p^n球）的投影性质，特别是边缘分布的中心密度与方向的关系。
ai.method: 利用凸序比较、热流恒等式和中心截面定理，分析平方坐标的优超关系与平方投影凸序的对应，并推导Schur凸性。
ai.result: 坐标方向最大化、对角线方向最小化中心轮廓（对所有t≥0）；给出沿坐标-对角线链的端点常数，以及坐标轮廓单调性的四阶累积量判据。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种将凸序与热流结合分析高维几何中投影分布的方法，可用于优化或概率比较问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用热流正则化将离散的几何比较转化为连续凸性，可能推广到非均匀测度或非线性变换。
idea_spark.risk: p<2的限制可能使结果对p≥2不成立，需验证边界情况。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从中心截面定理到热流平滑的过渡，启发将静态几何定理动态化以获取更精细结构。

en.tldr: Studies central densities of one-dimensional marginals of the uniform measure on ℓ_p^n balls (1≤p<2) and their Gaussian heat-flow regularizations, showing that majorization of squared coordinates implies larger squared projection in convex order, and proving strict Schur convexity of the smoothed central profile via a heat-flow identity.
en.motivation: To understand projection properties of high-dimensional convex bodies (e.g., ℓ_p^n balls), especially the relationship between central density of marginal distributions and direction.
en.method: Uses convex order comparison, heat-flow identity, and the central-section theorem to analyze the correspondence between majorization of squared coordinates and convex order of squared projections, and derives Schur convexity.
en.result: Coordinate directions maximize and diagonal directions minimize the central profile (for all t≥0); provides endpoint constants along the coordinate-to-diagonal chain and a fourth-cumulant criterion for monotonicity of the coordinate profile.
en.help_to_user: Offers a method combining convex order and heat flow to analyze projection distributions in high-dimensional geometry, applicable to optimization or probability comparison problems.

idea_spark.idea: Using heat-flow regularization to turn discrete geometric comparisons into continuous convexity may extend to non-uniform measures or nonlinear transformations.
idea_spark.risk: The restriction p<2 may cause results to fail for p≥2; boundary cases need verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The transition from the central-section theorem to heat-flow smoothing inspires dynamizing static geometric theorems to obtain finer structure.

papers.title: Lane-Aware Graph Attention Network for Multi-Vehicle Trajectory Prediction in Expressway Merge Zones
papers.summary: Accurate multi-vehicle trajectory prediction in expressway merge and diverge areas is fundamental to the decision-making frameworks of autonomous vehicle systems. However, the majority of existing graph-based prediction models are developed and validated on mainline freeway segments and do not address the geometrically distinct interaction structures that characterize merge zones. Furthermore, standard evaluation protocols rely exclusively on displacement error metrics, leaving the safety consequences of predicted trajectories unquantified. This paper proposes a Lane-Aware Graph Attention Network (LA-GAT) that encodes vehicle interaction within dynamic scene graphs, augmented with a trainable lane-relationship attention bias that prioritizes merge-conflict interactions from the outset of training. The model is pre-trained on the raw NGSIM US-101 and I-80 datasets and subsequently fine-tuned on UAV-captured UTE SQM-W-1 trajectory data from a Chinese expressway merge area, with final evaluation on the held-out SQM-W-2 dataset. Evaluation spans both displacement metrics (ADE, FDE at 1s, 3s, 5s horizons) and surrogate safety measures (TTC violation rate, DRAC exceedance rate, collision rate). Fine-tuned results on SQM-W-2 yield ADE of 0.865 m at 1s and 2.518 m at 3s, demonstrating that drone-informed fine-tuning substantially reduces the cross-dataset transfer gap. The deliberate use of unfiltered NGSIM data is shown to characterize raw-condition generalization limits, with the performance degradation attributed to the well-documented measurement errors in that dataset.

ai.tldr: 提出车道感知图注意力网络（LA-GAT），在高速公路合流区进行多车轨迹预测，并引入安全指标评估。
ai.motivation: 现有图模型主要在主线高速上验证，未考虑合流区几何交互结构，且仅用位移误差评估，忽略安全后果。
ai.method: 构建动态场景图，加入可训练的车道关系注意力偏置，优先关注合流冲突交互；在NGSIM预训练后，用无人机数据微调。
ai.result: 在SQM-W-2上，1秒ADE为0.865米，3秒ADE为2.518米，微调显著缩小跨数据集迁移差距。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何结合车道信息与图注意力机制提升合流区轨迹预测精度，并引入安全指标评估。

idea_spark.idea: 将安全指标（如TTC违规率）直接作为训练损失的一部分，优化预测轨迹的安全性。
idea_spark.risk: 安全指标可能引入非凸优化问题，导致训练不稳定或收敛困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用无人机数据微调可有效缓解跨数据集分布偏移，启发低成本数据增强策略。

en.tldr: Proposes Lane-Aware Graph Attention Network (LA-GAT) for multi-vehicle trajectory prediction in expressway merge zones, incorporating safety metrics.
en.motivation: Existing graph models are validated on mainline freeways, ignoring merge-zone interaction structures, and rely solely on displacement errors without safety quantification.
en.method: Encodes vehicle interactions in dynamic scene graphs with a trainable lane-relationship attention bias prioritizing merge conflicts; pre-trained on NGSIM, fine-tuned on UAV data.
en.result: On SQM-W-2, achieves ADE of 0.865 m at 1s and 2.518 m at 3s; fine-tuning significantly reduces cross-dataset transfer gap.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how lane-aware graph attention improves trajectory prediction in merge zones and introduces safety evaluation.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate safety metrics (e.g., TTC violation rate) directly into training loss to optimize for safer trajectories.
idea_spark.risk: Safety metrics may introduce non-convex optimization issues, causing training instability or convergence difficulties.
idea_spark.inspiration: UAV data fine-tuning effectively mitigates cross-dataset distribution shift, inspiring low-cost data augmentation strategies.

papers.title: Regularization of a mean-field SDE by an additive common noise: The conditional expectation case
papers.summary: We investigate a McKean-Vlasov stochastic differential equation with an additive common noise and in which the interaction is through the conditional expectation. We show that, in the presence of an additive individual noise, existence and uniqueness of a weak solution hold for any drift given by a bounded and measurable function of the position and the conditional expectation. When there is no individual noise, existence and uniqueness still hold if the drift is in addition Lipschitz in the position variable. This shows that the presence of a finite dimensional common noise may allow to overcome the discontinuity of the drift with respect to the interaction term, provided that this interaction term is a conditional expectation. We also prove propagation of chaos for systems of particles where the conditional expectation is replaced by the empirical mean of the positions or by a closely related contribution with better prepared noise.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类带加性共同噪声且交互项为条件期望的McKean-Vlasov随机微分方程，证明了个体噪声存在时弱解的存在唯一性，以及无个体噪声时在Lipschitz条件下的存在唯一性，并证明了粒子系统的混沌传播。
ai.motivation: 探索有限维共同噪声能否克服漂移项关于交互项的不连续性，特别是当交互项为条件期望时。
ai.method: 通过分析加性共同噪声和个体噪声的作用，建立弱解的存在唯一性定理，并利用经验均值或精心准备的噪声替代条件期望来证明混沌传播。
ai.result: 有界可测漂移下弱解存在唯一；无个体噪声时需漂移关于位置Lipschitz；共同噪声可缓解交互项的不连续性。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解共同噪声在平均场随机微分方程中的正则化作用提供了理论依据，有助于设计更鲁棒的粒子系统模拟。

idea_spark.idea: 利用条件期望作为交互项，结合共同噪声，可能简化高维随机系统的理论分析。
idea_spark.risk: 条件期望的计算在实际中可能复杂，且理论结果依赖于噪声的加性结构，推广至更一般噪声形式需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于共同噪声能“平滑”不连续交互，可尝试在机器学习中引入类似机制来稳定训练过程。

idea_spark.risk: 条件期望的计算在实际中可能复杂，且理论结果依赖于噪声的加性结构，推广至更一般噪声形式需谨慎。

en.tldr: Investigates a McKean-Vlasov SDE with additive common noise and interaction via conditional expectation, proving existence and uniqueness of weak solutions under bounded measurable drift, and under Lipschitz drift when individual noise is absent, along with propagation of chaos.
en.motivation: To explore whether finite-dimensional common noise can overcome drift discontinuity with respect to the interaction term, especially when the interaction is a conditional expectation.
en.method: Analyzes the roles of additive common and individual noises, establishes weak solution existence/uniqueness theorems, and proves propagation of chaos by replacing conditional expectation with empirical mean or a well-prepared noise contribution.
en.result: Weak solution exists and is unique for bounded measurable drift; Lipschitz condition on position is needed without individual noise; common noise regularizes the interaction discontinuity.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insight into the regularizing effect of common noise in mean-field SDEs, aiding the design of more robust particle system simulations.

idea_spark.idea: Using conditional expectation as interaction combined with common noise may simplify theoretical analysis of high-dimensional stochastic systems.
idea_spark.risk: Computing conditional expectation can be complex in practice, and the results rely on additive noise structure; generalization to more general noise forms requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by common noise smoothing discontinuous interactions, one might introduce similar mechanisms in machine learning to stabilize training.

papers.title: Multi-Fidelity Emulation of Atmospheric Correction Coefficients with Physics-Guided Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
papers.summary: Atmospheric correction is a critical preprocessing step in optical remote sensing, but repeated high-fidelity radiative transfer simulations remain computationally expensive for dense look-up-table generation, sensitivity analysis, retrieval support, and operational preprocessing. This study presents a physics-aware multi-fidelity surrogate framework for emulating atmospheric correction coefficients using paired 6S and libRadtran simulations. Atmospheric and geometric states are sampled using Latin Hypercube Sampling, and both radiative transfer models are evaluated under matched conditions for Sentinel-2 bands using spectral-response-function-aware coefficient generation. The high-fidelity targets are path reflectance, total transmittance, and spherical albedo. A physics-guided Kolmogorov-Arnold Network, termed pKANrtm, receives the atmospheric state and low-fidelity 6S coefficients, predicts the residual relative to libRadtran, and reconstructs the high-fidelity coefficients. The pKANrtm model uses an Efficient-KAN architecture and is trained with a physics-consistency penalty applied in the original coefficient space. The proposed model is evaluated against state-of-the-art regression-based RTM surrogates. Across both standard and out-of-distribution evaluation settings, pKANrtm achieves the strongest overall predictive performance among the compared models. Runtime benchmarking demonstrates substantial acceleration relative to libRadtran, with GPU inference providing approximately four orders of magnitude single-sample speedup and batched inference reaching tens of thousands of samples per second. These results indicate that physics-aware multi-fidelity pKANrtm emulation provides an accurate, physically structured, and computationally efficient strategy for atmospheric correction coefficient generation.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种物理引导的多保真度代理框架pKANrtm，用于高效模拟大气校正系数，在精度和速度上均优于现有方法。
ai.motivation: 高保真辐射传输模拟计算成本高，难以支持密集查找表生成、敏感性分析和业务化预处理。
ai.method: 使用拉丁超立方采样生成大气和几何状态，结合6S（低保真）和libRadtran（高保真）模拟，通过Efficient-KAN架构和物理一致性惩罚训练残差预测模型。
ai.result: 在标准分布和分布外评估中，pKANrtm预测性能最优；GPU推理单样本加速约四个数量级，批量推理每秒数万样本。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速、准确地生成大气校正系数，降低计算成本，适用于遥感预处理和敏感性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将KAN网络与物理约束结合，利用低保真模拟作为输入特征，预测高保真残差，实现高效且物理一致的代理建模。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖配对模拟数据的质量和覆盖范围；物理约束可能增加训练复杂度；对极端大气状态的外推能力需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用低保真模型作为先验信息，结合神经网络学习残差，是平衡精度与计算效率的有效策略。
