idea_spark.inspiration: 利用低保真模型作为先验信息，结合神经网络学习残差，是平衡精度与计算效率的有效策略。

en.tldr: A physics-guided multi-fidelity surrogate framework pKANrtm is proposed for efficient emulation of atmospheric correction coefficients, outperforming existing methods in accuracy and speed.
en.motivation: High-fidelity radiative transfer simulations are computationally expensive, hindering dense look-up-table generation, sensitivity analysis, and operational preprocessing.
en.method: Atmospheric and geometric states are sampled via Latin Hypercube Sampling; paired 6S (low-fidelity) and libRadtran (high-fidelity) simulations are used. An Efficient-KAN architecture with a physics-consistency penalty predicts the residual to reconstruct high-fidelity coefficients.
en.result: pKANrtm achieves the best predictive performance in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings; GPU inference yields ~4 orders of magnitude speedup per sample and tens of thousands of samples per second in batch mode.
en.help_to_user: Enables fast and accurate generation of atmospheric correction coefficients, reducing computational cost for remote sensing preprocessing and sensitivity analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Combine KAN networks with physical constraints, using low-fidelity simulations as input features to predict high-fidelity residuals, achieving efficient and physically consistent surrogate modeling.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on quality and coverage of paired simulation data; physical constraints may increase training complexity; extrapolation to extreme atmospheric states needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using low-fidelity models as prior information and learning residuals with neural networks is an effective strategy to balance accuracy and computational efficiency.

papers.title: An H-convergence-based implicit function theorem for homogenization of nonlinear non-smooth elliptic systems
papers.summary: We consider homogenization of Dirichlet problems for semilinear elliptic systems with non-smooth data. We suppose that the diffusion tensors H-converge if the homogenization parameter tends to zero. Our result is of implicit function theorem type: For small homogenization parameter there exists exactly one weak solution close to a given non-degenerate weak solution to the homogenized problem. For the proofs we use gradient estimates of Meyers (if the space dimension is two) or Morrey (if the diffusion tensors are triangular) type for solutions to linear elliptic systems.

ai.tldr: 针对具有非光滑数据的半线性椭圆系统，在扩散张量H-收敛的假设下，证明了当均匀化参数很小时，存在唯一的弱解，该解接近均匀化问题的非退化弱解。
ai.motivation: 研究非线性非光滑椭圆系统在均匀化过程中的解的存在唯一性，特别是当扩散张量H-收敛时，如何保证解的结构稳定性。
ai.method: 利用Meyers梯度估计（二维情形）或Morrey梯度估计（三角扩散张量情形）对线性椭圆系统解进行估计，并应用隐函数定理框架。
ai.result: 建立了H-收敛意义下的隐函数定理：对于小的均匀化参数，存在唯一的弱解，且该解连续依赖于均匀化问题的非退化解。
ai.help_to_user: 为非线性非光滑椭圆系统的均匀化理论提供了严格的数学基础，有助于理解复合材料或异质介质中解的局部唯一性和稳定性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合H-收敛与隐函数定理，可进一步研究随机均匀化或具有随机系数的非线性系统。
idea_spark.risk: 梯度估计的适用性依赖于空间维度和扩散张量的特殊结构（如三角形式），限制了方法的普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Meyers和Morrey估计与隐函数定理结合，为处理非光滑系数下的非线性问题提供了新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 结合H-收敛与隐函数定理，可进一步研究随机均匀化或具有随机系数的非线性系统。
idea_spark.risk: 梯度估计的适用性依赖于空间维度和扩散张量的特殊结构（如三角形式），限制了方法的普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Meyers和Morrey估计与隐函数定理结合，为处理非光滑系数下的非线性问题提供了新思路。

en.tldr: For semilinear elliptic systems with non-smooth data, under the assumption that the diffusion tensors H-converge, we prove that for small homogenization parameter there exists a unique weak solution close to a non-degenerate weak solution of the homogenized problem.
en.motivation: To study the existence and uniqueness of solutions for nonlinear non-smooth elliptic systems under homogenization, especially ensuring structural stability when diffusion tensors H-converge.
en.method: Uses Meyers gradient estimates (in two dimensions) or Morrey gradient estimates (for triangular diffusion tensors) for solutions to linear elliptic systems, combined with an implicit function theorem framework.
en.result: Establishes an implicit function theorem in the sense of H-convergence: for small homogenization parameter, there exists a unique weak solution that depends continuously on the non-degenerate solution of the homogenized problem.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for homogenization theory of nonlinear non-smooth elliptic systems, aiding understanding of local uniqueness and stability of solutions in composite or heterogeneous media.

idea_spark.idea: Combining H-convergence with the implicit function theorem could further study stochastic homogenization or nonlinear systems with random coefficients.
idea_spark.risk: The applicability of gradient estimates depends on spatial dimension and special structure of diffusion tensors (e.g., triangular form), limiting the generality of the method.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining Meyers and Morrey estimates with the implicit function theorem offers a new approach to handle nonlinear problems with non-smooth coefficients.

papers.title: STAGE: Tackling Semantic Drift in Multimodal Federated Graph Learning
papers.summary: Federated graph learning (FGL) enables collaborative training on graph data across multiple clients. As graph data increasingly contain multimodal node attributes such as text and images, multimodal federated graph learning (MM-FGL) has become an important yet substantially harder setting. The key challenge is that clients from different modality domains may not share a common semantic space: even for the same concept, their local encoders can produce inconsistent representations before collaboration begins. This makes direct parameter coordination unreliable and further causes two downstream problems: forcing heterogeneous client representations into a naively shared semantic space may create false semantic agreement, and graph message passing may amplify residual inconsistency across neighborhoods. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{STAGE}, a protocol-first framework for MM-FGL. Instead of relying on direct parameter averaging, STAGE builds a shared semantic space that first translates heterogeneous multimodal features into comparable representations and then regulates how these representations propagate over local graph structures. In this way, STAGE not only improves cross-client semantic calibration, but also reduces the risk of inconsistency amplification during graph learning. Extensive experiments on 8 multimodal-attributed graphs across 5 graph-centric and modality-centric tasks show that STAGE consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance while reducing per-round communication payload.

ai.tldr: 提出STAGE框架，通过协议优先的方法解决多模态联邦图学习中的语义漂移问题，实现跨客户端语义校准并降低通信开销。
ai.motivation: 多模态联邦图学习中，不同模态域的客户端缺乏共享语义空间，导致参数协调不可靠、虚假语义一致性和邻域不一致放大等问题。
ai.method: STAGE采用协议优先策略，先构建共享语义空间将异构多模态特征转化为可比表示，再规范这些表示在局部图结构上的传播。
ai.result: 在8个多模态属性图和5类任务上，STAGE取得最先进性能，同时降低每轮通信负载。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解多模态联邦图学习中语义漂移的挑战及STAGE的解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 设计协议优先的框架，先对齐语义再传播，避免直接参数平均的缺陷。
idea_spark.risk: 协议设计可能增加初始计算开销，且对极端异构数据仍需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从跨模态对齐和消息传递机制的结合中获得启发，解决分布式图学习中的语义不一致问题。

en.tldr: Proposes STAGE, a protocol-first framework to tackle semantic drift in multimodal federated graph learning, achieving cross-client semantic calibration and reduced communication overhead.
en.motivation: In multimodal federated graph learning, clients from different modality domains lack a shared semantic space, causing unreliable parameter coordination, false semantic agreement, and amplified inconsistency in graph message passing.
en.method: STAGE first builds a shared semantic space to translate heterogeneous multimodal features into comparable representations, then regulates their propagation over local graph structures.
en.result: On 8 multimodal-attributed graphs across 5 tasks, STAGE achieves state-of-the-art performance while reducing per-round communication payload.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the challenge of semantic drift in multimodal federated graph learning and how STAGE addresses it.

idea_spark.idea: Design a protocol-first framework that aligns semantics before propagation, avoiding pitfalls of direct parameter averaging.
idea_spark.risk: Protocol design may introduce initial computational overhead, and robustness under extreme heterogeneity needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by combining cross-modal alignment with message passing mechanisms to resolve semantic inconsistency in distributed graph learning.

papers.title: Unification of Signal Transform Theory
papers.summary: We unify the discrete Fourier transform (DFT), discrete cosine transform (DCT), Walsh-Hadamard, Haar wavelet, Karhunen-Loève transform, and several others along with their continuous counterparts (Fourier transform, Fourier series, spherical harmonics, fractional Fourier transform) under one representation-theoretic principle: each is the eigenbasis of every covariance invariant under a specific finite or compact group, with columns constructed from the irreducible matrix elements of the group via the Peter-Weyl theorem. The unification rests on the Algebraic Diversity (AD) framework, which identifies the matched group of a covariance as the foundational object of second-order signal processing. The data-dependent KLT emerges as the trivial-matched-group limit; classical transforms emerge as the cyclic, dihedral, elementary abelian, iterated wreath, and hybrid wreath cases. Composition rules cover direct, wreath, and semidirect products. The Reed-Muller and arithmetic transforms appear as related change-of-basis transforms on the matched group of Walsh-Hadamard. A polynomial-time algorithm for matched-group discovery, the DAD-CAD relaxation cast as a generalized eigenvalue problem in double-commutator form, closes the operational loop: the matched group of any empirical covariance is discovered without expert judgment, with noise-aware variants via the commutativity residual $δ$ and algebraic coloring index $α$ for finite-SNR settings. The fractional Fourier transform is treated as the metaplectic $SO(2)$ case with Hermite-Gauss matched basis, and a structural principle relates matched group size inversely to transform resolution. Modern applications (massive-MIMO, graph neural networks, transformer attention, point cloud and 3D vision, brain connectivity, single-cell genomics, quantum informatics) are sketched with their matched groups.

ai.tldr: 本文统一了多种离散和连续信号变换（如DFT、DCT、Walsh-Hadamard、Haar小波、KLT等），指出它们都是特定群作用下协方差不变性的特征基，并通过Peter-Weyl定理构建。
ai.motivation: 现有信号变换种类繁多，缺乏统一的数学框架，导致选择和应用依赖专家经验。
ai.method: 提出代数多样性（AD）框架，将协方差的匹配群作为二阶信号处理的基础对象，利用表示论和Peter-Weyl定理构造变换基，并给出多项式时间的匹配群发现算法（DAD-CAD松弛）。
ai.result: 经典变换（循环群、二面体群、初等阿贝尔群等情形）被统一解释；分数阶傅里叶变换作为辛群SO(2)情形处理；匹配群大小与变换分辨率成反比。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解不同信号变换之间的内在联系，并自动为任意协方差矩阵发现最合适的变换基，无需人工判断。

idea_spark.idea: 将匹配群发现算法应用于图神经网络中的图卷积核设计，自动学习图数据的对称性结构。
idea_spark.risk: 实际数据中噪声可能破坏群对称性，算法对噪声的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受群表示论统一变换的启发，可探索将其他信号处理操作（如滤波、压缩）也纳入群论框架。

en.tldr: This paper unifies many discrete and continuous signal transforms (DFT, DCT, Walsh-Hadamard, Haar wavelet, KLT, etc.) as eigenbases of covariances invariant under specific finite or compact groups, constructed via the Peter-Weyl theorem.
en.motivation: Existing signal transforms lack a unified mathematical framework, making selection and application dependent on expert judgment.
en.method: The Algebraic Diversity (AD) framework identifies the matched group of a covariance as the foundational object, uses representation theory and the Peter-Weyl theorem to construct transform bases, and provides a polynomial-time matched-group discovery algorithm (DAD-CAD relaxation).
en.result: Classical transforms are explained as cyclic, dihedral, elementary abelian, wreath, and hybrid wreath cases; the fractional Fourier transform is treated as the metaplectic SO(2) case; matched group size inversely relates to transform resolution.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the intrinsic connections among different signal transforms and automatically discovers the optimal transform basis for any empirical covariance without expert input.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the matched-group discovery algorithm to design graph convolution kernels in GNNs, automatically learning the symmetry structure of graph data.
idea_spark.risk: Noise in real data may break group symmetries; the algorithm's robustness to noise needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the group-theoretic unification of transforms, one could explore incorporating other signal processing operations (e.g., filtering, compression) into the group framework.

papers.title: Aligning Flow Map Policies with Optimal Q-Guidance
papers.summary: Generative policies based on expressive model classes, such as diffusion and flow matching, are well-suited to complex control problems with highly multimodal action distributions. Their expressivity, however, comes at a significant inference cost: generating each action typically requires simulating many steps of the generative process, compounding latency across sequential decision-making rollouts. We introduce flow map policies, a novel class of generative policies designed for fast action generation by learning to take arbitrary-size jumps including one-step jumps-across the generative dynamics of existing flow-based policies. We instantiate flow map policies for offline-to-online reinforcement learning (RL) and formulate online adaptation as a trust-region optimization problem that improves the critic's Q-value while remaining close to the offline policy. We theoretically derive FLOW MAP Q-GUIDANCE (FMQ), a principled closed-form learning target that is optimal for adapting offline flow map policies under a critic-guided trust-region constraint. We further introduce Q-GUIDED BEAM SEARCH (QGBS), a stochastic flow-map sampler that combines renoising with beam search to enable iterative inference-time refinement. Across 12 challenging robotic manipulation and locomotion tasks from OGBench and RoboMimic, FMQ achieves state-of-the-art performance in offline-to-online RL, outperforming the previous one-step policy MVP by a relative improvement of 21.3% on the average success rate.

ai.tldr: 提出流图策略和最优Q引导方法，实现离线到在线强化学习中的快速动作生成，在12个机器人任务上取得最优性能。
ai.motivation: 现有生成式策略推理成本高，每个动作需多步模拟，导致决策延迟累积。
ai.method: 设计流图策略支持任意步长跳跃，将在线适应建模为信任域优化问题，推导出闭式最优学习目标FMQ，并引入Q引导束搜索QGBS实现迭代精化。
ai.result: 在OGBench和RoboMimic的12个任务上，FMQ平均成功率比MVP提升21.3%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效的动作生成框架，适用于需要快速决策的机器人控制场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将信任域约束与Q值引导结合，设计闭形式学习目标，避免在线微调时的策略退化。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖离线策略的初始质量，若离线数据分布偏差大，在线适应可能不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受扩散模型加速采样启发，将多步生成压缩为单步或少量步长，同时保持策略表达力。

en.tldr: Proposes flow map policies and optimal Q-guidance for fast action generation in offline-to-online RL, achieving state-of-the-art on 12 robotic tasks.
en.motivation: Generative policies suffer from high inference cost due to multi-step simulation per action, compounding latency in sequential decision-making.
en.method: Introduces flow map policies supporting arbitrary-size jumps, formulates online adaptation as trust-region optimization, derives closed-form optimal target FMQ, and proposes Q-guided beam search QGBS for iterative refinement.
en.result: FMQ outperforms previous one-step policy MVP by 21.3% average success rate across 12 tasks from OGBench and RoboMimic.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient action generation framework suitable for robotic control scenarios requiring fast decisions.

idea_spark.idea: Combines trust-region constraints with Q-value guidance to design a closed-form learning target, avoiding policy degradation during online fine-tuning.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on the quality of the offline policy; poor offline data distribution may cause unstable online adaptation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by accelerated sampling in diffusion models, compressing multi-step generation into single or few steps while preserving policy expressivity.

papers.title: Geometric Asymptotics of Score Mixing and Guidance in Diffusion Models
papers.summary: Diffusion models are routinely guided in practice by combining multiple score fields, yet the mathematical structure of score mixing is still poorly understood. We study the small-time generation dynamics driven by mixed scores $$ s=λ\,\nabla\log u_1+(1-λ)\,\nabla\log u_2,\qquad λ\ge 0, $$ in the heat-flow framework, where $u_1,u_2$ are heat evolutions of two compactly supported probability measures. This single formulation covers both the mixture-of-experts regime $(0\leq λ\leq 1)$ and the classifier-free guidance regime $(λ>1)$. Exploiting a Laplace-Varadhan principle under a similarity-time rescaling, we show that the small-time generation dynamics is governed by the explicit geometric potential $$ Φ_λ=λd_1^2+(1-λ)d_2^2, $$ which depends only on the supports of the initial measures and on the mixing parameter. This gives a rigorous reduction from a singular, non-autonomous score-driven dynamics to autonomous Clarke-type subgradient inclusions. In the empirical setting of finite Dirac mixtures, the limiting potential is piecewise quadratic with a Voronoi-type structure; this rigidity yields convergence of all autonomous limiting trajectories to critical points and a conditional convergence criterion for the original generation flow toward local minimizers of the potential, with rate $\mathcal O(\sqrt t)$ in the smooth stable case.

ai.tldr: 本文在热流框架下研究了扩散模型中混合分数场的几何渐近行为，揭示了小时间生成动力学由显式几何势函数控制，并建立了从奇异非自治分数驱动到自治Clarke型次梯度包含的严格约化。
ai.motivation: 扩散模型实践中常通过混合多个分数场进行引导，但分数混合的数学结构尚不清晰，缺乏严格的理论分析。
ai.method: 利用相似时间重缩放下Laplace-Varadhan原理，将小时间生成动力学约化为依赖于初始测度支撑和混合参数的几何势函数，并引入Clarke型次梯度包含描述极限动力学。
ai.result: 证明了极限势函数为Φ_λ=λd_1^2+(1-λ)d_2^2，在有限Dirac混合情形下势函数呈分段二次Voronoi结构，所有自治极限轨迹收敛到临界点，原始生成流在光滑稳定情形下以O(√t)速率条件收敛到局部极小值。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解扩散模型中分数混合的几何本质，为设计更高效的引导策略提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Voronoi结构设计自适应混合参数λ，使生成轨迹避开鞍点并加速收敛。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果基于紧支撑测度和热流框架，实际高维非紧支撑数据可能偏离假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将分数混合视为几何势的梯度流，启发从优化角度重新审视引导机制。

en.tldr: This paper studies the geometric asymptotics of score mixing in diffusion models within the heat-flow framework, revealing that small-time generation dynamics are governed by an explicit geometric potential, and establishes a rigorous reduction from singular non-autonomous score dynamics to autonomous Clarke-type subgradient inclusions.
en.motivation: Diffusion models are routinely guided by mixing multiple score fields, yet the mathematical structure of score mixing remains poorly understood, lacking rigorous theoretical analysis.
en.method: Using a Laplace-Varadhan principle under similarity-time rescaling, the small-time generation dynamics are reduced to a geometric potential depending only on the supports of initial measures and the mixing parameter, with limiting dynamics described by Clarke-type subgradient inclusions.
en.result: The limiting potential is Φ_λ=λd_1^2+(1-λ)d_2^2; for finite Dirac mixtures, it is piecewise quadratic with a Voronoi structure. All autonomous limiting trajectories converge to critical points, and the original generation flow converges conditionally to local minimizers at rate O(√t) in the smooth stable case.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the geometric essence of score mixing in diffusion models, providing theoretical foundations for designing more efficient guidance strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the Voronoi structure to design adaptive mixing parameters λ that steer generation trajectories away from saddle points and accelerate convergence.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on compactly supported measures and the heat-flow framework; high-dimensional non-compact data may violate assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing score mixing as gradient flow of a geometric potential inspires rethinking guidance mechanisms from an optimization perspective.

papers.title: A variational approach to the derivation of reduced models for bubbly flows
papers.summary: In this paper, we derive reduced models for the motion of gas bubbles in an ambient inviscid liquid, using Hamilton's least action principle. We first explain how to recover from this principle the classical sharp interface model, in which the pressure is continuous across the surfaces of the bubbles. We then show how to reduce the complexity of the model, by simplifying the description of those surfaces. Namely, we impose them to evolve within a subclass of hypersurfaces described by a finite number of parameters (the simplest example being spheres, that is neglecting deviation of the bubbles from sphericity). The difficulty from a mathematical and modeling point of view is to determine the interface conditions that substitute to pressure continuity. We complete the derivation of the reduced models by some well-posedness analysis, in the case of curl-free liquid flow and homogeneous pressure in the bubbles.

ai.tldr: 利用哈密顿最小作用量原理，从经典尖锐界面模型出发，通过简化气泡表面描述（如假设为球体），推导出气泡流动的简化模型，并分析了无旋液体和气泡内均匀压力情况下的适定性。
ai.motivation: 气泡流动的完整界面模型计算复杂，需要发展简化模型以降低计算成本，同时保持物理准确性。
ai.method: 基于哈密顿最小作用量原理，先恢复经典尖锐界面模型，再通过限制气泡表面演化到有限参数子类（如球体）来简化模型，并推导替代压力连续性的界面条件。
ai.result: 成功推导出简化模型，并在无旋液体和气泡内均匀压力条件下完成了适定性分析。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种系统性的变分方法，用于推导气泡流动的简化模型，有助于在工程和物理模拟中平衡精度与效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将气泡表面限制为球体并推导新的界面条件，可启发类似简化策略用于复杂界面系统。
idea_spark.risk: 简化可能丢失非球形变形的重要物理效应，需验证适用场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用变分原理进行模型降阶的思路，可应用于其他受界面约束的物理系统。

zh.method: 基于哈密顿最小作用量原理，先恢复经典尖锐界面模型，再通过限制气泡表面演化到有限参数子类（如球体）来简化模型，并推导替代压力连续性的界面条件。
zh.result: 成功推导出简化模型，并在无旋液体和气泡内均匀压力条件下完成了适定性分析。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种系统性的变分方法，用于推导气泡流动的简化模型，有助于在工程和物理模拟中平衡精度与效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将气泡表面限制为球体并推导新的界面条件，可启发类似简化策略用于复杂界面系统。
idea_spark.risk: 简化可能丢失非球形变形的重要物理效应，需验证适用场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用变分原理进行模型降阶的思路，可应用于其他受界面约束的物理系统。

en.tldr: Using Hamilton's least action principle, this work derives reduced models for bubbly flows by simplifying bubble surface descriptions (e.g., spheres), starting from the classical sharp interface model, and analyzes well-posedness under curl-free liquid and homogeneous bubble pressure.
en.motivation: Full interface models for bubbly flows are computationally expensive; reduced models are needed to lower cost while retaining physical accuracy.
en.method: Based on Hamilton's least action principle, the classical sharp interface model is first recovered, then simplified by restricting bubble surface evolution to a finite-parameter subclass (e.g., spheres), with new interface conditions replacing pressure continuity.
en.result: Reduced models are successfully derived, and well-posedness analysis is completed for curl-free liquid flow and homogeneous pressure in bubbles.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic variational approach to derive reduced models for bubbly flows, aiding in balancing accuracy and efficiency in engineering and physics simulations.

idea_spark.idea: Restricting bubble surfaces to spheres and deriving new interface conditions may inspire similar simplification strategies for complex interface systems.
idea_spark.risk: Simplification may miss important physical effects of non-spherical deformation; applicability needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of model reduction via variational principles can be applied to other interface-constrained physical systems.

papers.title: Leak localisation with a measure source convection-diffusion model
papers.summary: We study the inverse problem of locating gas leaks from line-of-sight concentration measurements using a convection-diffusion model with the source term a Radon measure. By imposing sparsity-promoting regularisation on this measure, we recover point sources - identifying both their locations and intensities - rather than diffuse approximations. We jointly estimate the underlying physical convection (wind) and diffusion parameters. Our main theoretical contribution is the stability analysis of the convection-diffusion equation with respect to its parameters: the measure, and the convection and diffusion fields. Numerically, we employ a semi-grid-free optimisation approach for reconstructing the source measure. Our experiments demonstrate accurate localisation, highlighting the potential of the method for practical gas emission detection.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于Radon测度源项的对流-扩散模型，通过稀疏正则化从视线浓度测量中定位气体泄漏点源，并联合估计风场和扩散参数。
ai.motivation: 现有方法通常将泄漏源近似为扩散分布，难以精确定位点源；实际气体泄漏检测需要同时识别位置和强度。
ai.method: 将源项建模为Radon测度，施加稀疏促进正则化恢复点源；采用半无网格优化方法重构源测度，并联合估计对流（风）和扩散参数。
ai.result: 实验表明该方法能准确定位泄漏点，验证了模型在实际气体排放检测中的潜力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需网格离散化的泄漏定位新思路，适用于环境监测和工业安全领域。

idea_spark.idea: 结合移动传感器网络或无人机路径规划，实现动态环境下的实时泄漏源追踪。
idea_spark.risk: 实际风场和扩散参数可能时变，模型假设的稳态参数估计需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从数学物理反问题角度出发，利用测度正则化突破传统扩散近似局限，启发更广泛的稀疏源重构研究。

en.tldr: We study the inverse problem of locating gas leaks from line-of-sight concentration measurements using a convection-diffusion model with the source term a Radon measure, recovering point sources via sparsity-promoting regularisation and jointly estimating wind and diffusion parameters.
en.motivation: Existing methods often approximate leak sources as diffuse distributions, failing to pinpoint point sources; practical gas detection requires simultaneous identification of location and intensity.
en.method: Model the source as a Radon measure with sparsity-promoting regularisation to recover point sources; employ a semi-grid-free optimisation approach to reconstruct the source measure while jointly estimating convection (wind) and diffusion parameters.
en.result: Experiments demonstrate accurate localisation, highlighting the method's potential for practical gas emission detection.
en.help_to_user: Provides a grid-free approach for leak localisation, applicable to environmental monitoring and industrial safety.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate with mobile sensor networks or drone path planning for real-time leak source tracking in dynamic environments.
idea_spark.risk: Actual wind and diffusion parameters may be time-varying; robustness of the assumed steady-state parameter estimation needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging measure regularisation from mathematical physics to overcome traditional diffusion approximations, inspiring broader sparse source reconstruction research.

papers.title: A noisy min-max game on trees
papers.summary: We study a noisy version of a min-max type zero-sum game on the $d$-ary tree. Each edge of the tree is assigned an i.i.d.\ cookie, distributed uniformly on $\{+1,-1\}$. The game is played as follows: starting at the root, two players alternate turns in choosing a child to move to, with the game ending after each player took $n$ turns. Both players have full knowledge of the cookies on the whole tree. The cookies along the traversed edges are picked up and placed in a shared cookie jar. The first player's payoff is the sum of the cookies in the cookie jar, while the second player pays that sum. The value $V_n$ of the $n$-round game is the largest signed sum which can be guaranteed by the first player.   We analyze the value $V_n$ and show that as $n \to \infty$, the value is tight for $d=2$, converges in distribution for $d \ge 3$, and converges almost surely for $d \ge 15$. Along the way, we prove various tightness and double exponential tail decay results.   The analysis is a mix of percolation-type arguments for large $d$, and iterations on distributions combined with interval arithmetic for small $d$. For $d=2$ we prove the existence of a continuum of fixed points for this iteration, highlighting surprising qualitative differences with the case $d \ge 3$. The question of convergence for $d=2$ remains open.

ai.tldr: 研究d叉树上的带噪声极小极大零和博弈，分析其值V_n的渐近行为。
ai.motivation: 理解随机环境下树形博弈的极限行为，揭示不同分支度下的定性差异。
ai.method: 结合渗流型论证（大d）与分布迭代及区间算术（小d）。
ai.result: d=2时值紧致；d≥3时依分布收敛；d≥15时几乎必然收敛；d=2存在连续不动点。
ai.help_to_user: 提供树形博弈值收敛性的完整刻画，可用于随机博弈与概率论研究。

idea_spark.idea: 利用渗流相变思想分析高维树上的博弈值收敛速度。
idea_spark.risk: d=2时收敛性问题未解决，可能需全新工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将博弈值视为随机过程，研究其极限分布与尾概率。

en.tldr: Studies a noisy min-max zero-sum game on the d-ary tree and analyzes the asymptotic behavior of its value V_n.
en.motivation: To understand the limiting behavior of tree games under randomness and reveal qualitative differences for different branching degrees.
en.method: Combines percolation-type arguments (large d) with iteration on distributions and interval arithmetic (small d).
en.result: Tight for d=2; converges in distribution for d≥3; converges almost surely for d≥15; continuum of fixed points for d=2.
en.help_to_user: Provides a complete characterization of convergence of tree game values, useful for stochastic games and probability theory.

idea_spark.idea: Use percolation phase transition ideas to analyze convergence rates of game values on high-dimensional trees.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence for d=2 remains open, possibly requiring new tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treat game value as a stochastic process and study its limiting distribution and tail probabilities.

papers.title: When Stochasticity Resolves into Certainty: Hidden Structure of Deterministic Motion
papers.summary: We prove that deterministic motion in dissipative systems emerges as a strict geometric attractor of contact flow, not a statistical approximation. Building on the contact geometry of stochastic vector bundles, we develop time-dependent contact potentials with an exact closure theorem ensuring exact satisfaction of the master equation at any finite order. The Contact Locking Theorem shows that exponential gradient amplification of the probability field is precisely counterbalanced by synchronous stiffness decay, forcing the effective macroscopic-microscopic coupling to vanish exponentially. Deterministic dynamics therefore emerges through deterministic focusing with a universal timescale governed by the drift-field Jacobian spectrum. Validation of the damped-driven Duffing oscillator confirms the predicted rate and exponential convergence.

ai.tldr: 证明耗散系统中确定性运动是接触流的严格几何吸引子，而非统计近似。
ai.motivation: 揭示确定性运动从随机性中涌现的严格几何机制，超越传统统计近似。
ai.method: 基于随机向量丛的接触几何，构造含时接触势，并证明精确闭包定理和接触锁定定理。
ai.result: 指数梯度放大与同步刚度衰减精确抵消，使宏观-微观耦合指数消失，确定性运动以漂移场雅可比谱决定的普适时间尺度涌现。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解耗散系统中确定性涌现提供严格的几何框架和普适时间尺度预测。

idea_spark.idea: 利用接触势的精确闭包性质，设计新型数值算法以高效模拟确定性涌现过程。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（如接触几何结构）在复杂真实系统中可能不严格成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将接触锁定定理类比于机器学习中的梯度消失/爆炸平衡，启发深层网络训练稳定性设计。

en.tldr: Proves that deterministic motion in dissipative systems emerges as a strict geometric attractor of contact flow, not a statistical approximation.
en.motivation: To reveal the strict geometric mechanism by which deterministic motion emerges from stochasticity, going beyond traditional statistical approximations.
en.method: Based on contact geometry of stochastic vector bundles, constructs time-dependent contact potentials and proves an exact closure theorem and the Contact Locking Theorem.
en.result: Exponential gradient amplification is precisely counterbalanced by synchronous stiffness decay, causing macroscopic-microscopic coupling to vanish exponentially; deterministic motion emerges with a universal timescale governed by the drift-field Jacobian spectrum.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous geometric framework and universal timescale prediction for the emergence of determinism in dissipative systems.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the exact closure property of contact potentials to design novel numerical algorithms for efficiently simulating deterministic emergence.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions (e.g., contact geometric structure) may not strictly hold in complex real-world systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analogize the contact locking theorem to gradient vanishing/explosion balance in machine learning, inspiring stability design for deep network training.

keywords_raw: contact geometry of stochastic vector bundles

papers.title: Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers
papers.summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong data-driven scaling by leveraging all-to-all self-attention. However, this flexibility incurs a computational cost that scales quadratically with image resolution, limiting ViTs in high-resolution domains. Underlying this approach is the assumption that pairwise token interactions are necessary for learning rich visual-semantic representations. In this work, we challenge this assumption, demonstrating that effective visual representations can be learned without any direct patch-to-patch interaction. We propose VECA (Visual Elastic Core Attention), a vision transformer architecture that uses efficient linear-time core-periphery structured attention enabled by a small set of learned cores. In VECA, these cores act as a communication interface: patch tokens exchange information exclusively through the core tokens, which are initialized from scratch and propagated across layers. Because the $N$ image patches only directly interact with a resolution invariant set of $C$ learned "core" embeddings, this yields linear complexity $O(N)$ for predetermined $C$, which bypasses quadratic scaling. Compared to prior cross-attention architectures, VECA maintains and iteratively updates the full set of $N$ input tokens, avoiding a small $C$-way bottleneck. Combined with nested training along the core axis, our model can elastically trade off compute and accuracy during inference. Across classification and dense tasks, VECA achieves performance competitive with the latest vision foundation models while reducing computational cost. Our results establish elastic core-periphery attention as a scalable alternative building block for Vision Transformers.

ai.tldr: 提出VECA架构，用核心-外围注意力替代全对全自注意力，实现线性复杂度，在分类和密集任务上达到竞争性能。
ai.motivation: Vision Transformer中全对全自注意力的计算复杂度随图像分辨率二次增长，限制了高分辨率应用。
ai.method: 引入少量可学习的核心token作为通信接口，所有图像patch仅与核心token交互，实现线性复杂度O(N)；核心token跨层传播并支持弹性训练。
ai.result: 在分类和密集任务上，VECA与最新视觉基础模型性能相当，同时显著降低计算成本。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可扩展的视觉Transformer替代方案，适合高分辨率或资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将核心token视为可学习的“记忆槽”，结合弹性推理，可动态调整计算精度。
idea_spark.risk: 核心token数量固定可能限制对极细粒度特征的捕获；跨层传播可能引入信息瓶颈。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受图论中核心-外围结构启发，将复杂全连接交互简化为星型拓扑。

en.tldr: Proposes VECA, a core-periphery attention architecture that replaces all-to-all self-attention, achieving linear complexity and competitive performance on classification and dense tasks.
en.motivation: The quadratic computational cost of all-to-all self-attention in Vision Transformers limits their application in high-resolution domains.
en.method: Introduces a small set of learned core tokens as a communication interface; all image patches interact only with core tokens, yielding linear complexity O(N); cores are propagated across layers and support elastic training.
en.result: VECA achieves performance competitive with state-of-the-art vision foundation models while significantly reducing computational cost.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable alternative for vision transformers, suitable for high-resolution or resource-constrained scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Treat core tokens as learnable 'memory slots' combined with elastic inference to dynamically adjust compute-accuracy trade-off.
idea_spark.risk: Fixed number of core tokens may limit capture of very fine-grained features; cross-layer propagation may introduce information bottleneck.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by core-periphery structures in graph theory, simplifying complex all-to-all interactions into a star topology.

papers.title: Stochastic Ordering under Weaker Likelihood-Ratio Shape Conditions
papers.summary: We show that the shape hypothesis on a likelihood ratio can be weakened while retaining endpoint criteria for the hazard-rate and usual stochastic orders. The endpoint reduction persists under unimodality of the likelihood ratio and under a sign-pattern condition on the likelihood ratio minus one, with at most two sign changes and a negative right tail. It also follows from a direct superlevel-set criterion involving the same expression, which is useful in particular for discontinuous likelihood ratios.

ai.tldr: 本文证明，在似然比形状假设弱化的情况下，仍能保持风险率序和通常随机序的端点准则。
ai.motivation: 探索在更弱的似然比形状条件下，随机序的端点准则是否仍然成立。
ai.method: 通过分析似然比的单峰性、符号模式条件（至多两次变号且右尾为负）以及直接的超水平集准则进行理论推导。
ai.result: 在似然比单峰性、特定符号模式条件以及超水平集准则下，风险率序和通常随机序的端点准则依然成立，尤其适用于不连续的似然比。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在更宽松的假设下如何判断随机序的端点性质，可用于统计决策和可靠性理论。

idea_spark.idea: 将符号模式条件与机器学习中的排序损失函数结合，设计鲁棒的排序算法。
idea_spark.risk: 弱化假设可能导致序关系判定的误判率上升，需谨慎验证实际数据中的条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从似然比符号变化模式出发，启发对复杂分布间序关系的简洁刻画。

zh.tldr: 本文证明，在似然比形状假设弱化的情况下，仍能保持风险率序和通常随机序的端点准则。
zh.motivation: 探索在更弱的似然比形状条件下，随机序的端点准则是否仍然成立。
zh.method: 通过分析似然比的单峰性、符号模式条件（至多两次变号且右尾为负）以及直接的超水平集准则进行理论推导。

en.tldr: We show that the shape hypothesis on a likelihood ratio can be weakened while retaining endpoint criteria for the hazard-rate and usual stochastic orders.
en.motivation: To explore whether endpoint criteria for stochastic orders persist under weaker likelihood-ratio shape conditions.
en.method: Theoretical analysis using unimodality of the likelihood ratio, a sign-pattern condition (at most two sign changes with a negative right tail), and a direct superlevel-set criterion.
en.result: Endpoint criteria for the hazard-rate and usual stochastic orders hold under unimodality, the sign-pattern condition, and the superlevel-set criterion, particularly for discontinuous likelihood ratios.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to determine endpoint properties of stochastic orders under relaxed assumptions, useful in statistical decision theory and reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the sign-pattern condition with ranking loss functions in machine learning to design robust ranking algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Weaker assumptions may increase misclassification rates in order determination; careful validation on real data is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: The sign-change pattern of likelihood ratios inspires concise characterizations of order relations between complex distributions.

papers.title: Exactness of the DNN Relaxation for Random Standard Quadratic Programs
papers.summary: We study the doubly nonnegative (DNN) relaxation of the standard quadratic optimization problem \[ \min\{x^\top Qx:\ x\inΔ^{n-1}\},\qquad Δ^{n-1}:=\{x\in\R_+^n:\ \1^\top x=1\}, \] for random symmetric matrices with independent diagonal and off-diagonal entries. Let $m_n:=\min_{1\le i\le n} Q_{ii}$ and set $M:=Q-m_nE$, where $E$ is the all-ones matrix. The negative off-diagonal entries of $M$ define a defect graph $G_n^-$. Under entrywise independence, absolute continuity, and the tail-decay condition $n^5\E[F_O(m_n)^4]\to 0$, where $F_O$ is the off-diagonal distribution function, we prove that with probability tending to one every defect component has size at most $4$. On this event, the shifted DNN value decomposes over defect components. Since the DNN and completely positive cones coincide in dimensions at most four, each local relaxation is exact. A finite KKT-candidate argument gives local uniqueness, and absolute continuity rules out ties, so the global DNN optimizer is unique and rank one. The graph estimate uses the fact that every connected component of size at least five contains a tree on exactly five vertices. For Gaussian orthogonal ensemble data, we prove the explicit bound \[ \Prob\bigl(\text{the DNN optimizer is unique and rank one}\bigr) \ge 1-K\frac{(\ln n)^2}{n^3}. \] On the same event, the exact optimizer can be recovered in $O(n^2)$ time by constructing the defect graph and solving constant-size local KKT systems. We also verify the tail condition for variance-tuned Gaussian Wigner models, heavy-tailed laws, and finite-lower-endpoint laws.

ai.tldr: 研究了随机标准二次规划问题的DNN松弛的精确性，证明了在概率趋近于1的情况下，DNN松弛是精确的，且最优解唯一且秩为1。
ai.motivation: 标准二次规划在组合优化和机器学习中广泛应用，但其精确求解通常困难。DNN松弛是一种常用方法，但何时精确尚不清楚。本文旨在刻画随机数据下DNN松弛精确的条件。
ai.method: 通过分析缺陷图的结构，证明每个缺陷分量大小至多为4，从而将DNN松弛分解为局部子问题，利用低维完全正锥与DNN锥的等价性得到局部精确性，再通过KKT条件论证全局唯一性。
ai.result: 在较弱的尾条件（n^5 E[F_O(m_n)^4]→0）下，DNN松弛以高概率精确，最优解唯一且秩为1。对高斯正交系综，给出了显式概率下界1 - K (ln n)^2 / n^3，且可在O(n^2)时间内恢复最优解。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解随机二次规划中DNN松弛何时精确，以及如何高效求解。

idea_spark.idea: 利用图论中树结构（5顶点树）来界定缺陷分量大小，结合概率论尾条件，为随机优化问题提供精确性保证。
idea_spark.risk: 理论依赖于特定的随机模型假设（如独立同分布、绝对连续），实际数据可能不满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将图论与随机矩阵理论结合，为随机优化问题的松弛精确性提供新视角。

en.tldr: We study the exactness of the DNN relaxation for random standard quadratic programs, proving that with high probability the relaxation is exact, the optimizer is unique and rank-one.
en.motivation: Standard quadratic programs are widely used but hard to solve exactly. The DNN relaxation is a common approach, but its exactness conditions are unclear. This paper characterizes when it is exact under random data.
en.method: By analyzing the defect graph, we show each defect component has size at most 4, allowing decomposition of the DNN relaxation into local subproblems. Using the equivalence of DNN and completely positive cones in low dimensions, we prove local exactness, and then global uniqueness via KKT conditions.
en.result: Under a mild tail condition (n^5 E[F_O(m_n)^4]→0), the DNN relaxation is exact with high probability, the optimizer is unique and rank-one. For Gaussian orthogonal ensemble, we give an explicit probability lower bound 1 - K (ln n)^2 / n^3, and the optimizer can be recovered in O(n^2) time.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand when the DNN relaxation is exact for random quadratic programs and how to solve them efficiently.

idea_spark.idea: Use graph-theoretic tree structure (5-vertex tree) to bound defect component sizes, combined with probabilistic tail conditions, to provide exactness guarantees for stochastic optimization.
idea_spark.risk: The theory relies on specific random model assumptions (e.g., independence, absolute continuity) that may not hold in real data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining graph theory with random matrix theory offers a new perspective on exactness of relaxations in stochastic optimization.

papers.title: Analysis and funnel control for nonlinear drill strings
papers.summary: We study the output tracking problem for a vertically driven drill string system described by a nonlinear boundary-coupled PDE-ODE model. Solvability analysis of the drill string model is achieved by first casting the model in an abstract boundary value problem involving set-valued operators on an appropriate Hilbert space. The governing equation here consists of evolution and the damping part. Existence of solutions is established within the framework of maximal monotone operators where one first proves that the evolution operator is a linear skew-adjoint operator and the distributed damping term is a Nemytskii relation which is then proven to be maximal monotone. Maximal monotonicity of the combined operator is then a consequence of Rockafellar's theorem. Furthermore, we propose a novel funnel control design that ensures the angular velocity of the drill bit follows a dynamically adjusted reference trajectory, while the tracking error remains confined within a pre-specified performance funnel. The reference adjustment mechanism adapts in response to large wave traveling times that may cause performance degradation. The corresponding feasibility result is illustrated by some simulations.

ai.tldr: 针对非线性钻柱系统的输出跟踪问题，提出基于最大单调算子的可解性分析和漏斗控制设计。
ai.motivation: 钻柱系统由非线性边界耦合的偏微分-常微分方程描述，现有控制方法难以保证大波传播时间下的跟踪性能。
ai.method: 将模型抽象为希尔伯特空间上的集值算子边值问题，利用最大单调算子理论证明解的存在性；设计漏斗控制器，使钻头角速度跟踪动态调整的参考轨迹，误差限制在预设漏斗内。
ai.result: 通过仿真验证了所提漏斗控制在波传播时间较大时仍能维持跟踪误差在漏斗内。
ai.help_to_user: 为石油钻井等领域的钻柱控制提供了严格的理论分析和实用的漏斗控制方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将参考轨迹动态调整机制与漏斗控制结合，可适应时变延迟或大惯性系统。
idea_spark.risk: 漏斗控制对模型不确定性敏感，实际钻柱参数变化可能影响漏斗边界保持。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了非线性系统控制中漏斗控制与算子半群理论的交叉思路。

en.tldr: We analyze solvability of a nonlinear drill string PDE-ODE model via maximal monotone operators and propose a funnel control design for output tracking.
en.motivation: Drill strings are described by a nonlinear boundary-coupled PDE-ODE system, and existing methods struggle with performance degradation under large wave traveling times.
en.method: The model is cast as an abstract boundary value problem with set-valued operators on a Hilbert space; existence of solutions is proven using maximal monotone operator theory. A funnel controller is designed to keep the angular velocity tracking error within a prescribed funnel while the reference trajectory is dynamically adjusted.
en.result: Simulations show that the funnel control maintains the tracking error within the funnel even for large wave traveling times.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous solvability analysis and a practical funnel control scheme for drill string systems in oil drilling.

idea_spark.idea: Combining dynamic reference adjustment with funnel control can handle time-varying delays or large inertia systems.
idea_spark.risk: Funnel control is sensitive to model uncertainties; parameter variations in real drill strings may compromise funnel boundary adherence.
idea_spark.inspiration: The work bridges nonlinear system control (funnel control) with operator semigroup theory for PDE-ODE systems.

papers.title: Robin nullity in mode $|k|=1$ and asymptotic radius of the critical hyperbolic catenoid
papers.summary: For each parameter $a>1/2$, the critical hyperbolic catenoid $Σ_a$ is a rotationally symmetric, free boundary minimal annulus in a geodesic ball $B^3(r(a))\subset\mathbb{H}^3$, in the family of Mori, do Carmo--Dajczer, and Medvedev. We establish three analytic results about $Σ_a$.   (I) Robin nullity and index in mode $|k|=1$. The Robin nullity of the Jacobi operator $L_{Σ_a}=Δ_g+(|II|^2-2)$ in angular Fourier mode $|k|=1$ equals $2$, with kernel spanned by the Killing--Jacobi fields associated to the rotations $L_{12},L_{13}\in\mathfrak{so}(3,1)$ that fix the geodesic axis of $Σ_a$ and send $\partial B^3(r(a))$ to itself. The radial profile admits the closed form $f_*(s)=\partial_sΦ_a^0(s,0)=\frac{d}{ds}[A(s)\cosh\varphi(s)]=\sinh r(s)\cdot r'(s)$, where $r(s)$ is the geodesic distance from $p_0=(1,0,0,0)$. By Sturm--Liouville theory, the Robin Morse index of $Σ_a$ in mode $|k|=1$ also equals $2$, refining the lower bound $\mathrm{ind}(Σ_a)\geq 4$ of Medvedev.   (II) Asymptotic radius. The boundary radius satisfies $r(a)=\tfrac{3}{2}\log a+d_\infty+o(1)$ as $a\to\infty$, with $d_\infty=\log[\sqrt{2}\,Γ(1/4)^2/π^{3/2}]=\log[2\sqrt{2π}/Γ(3/4)^2]$. The closed form for $d_\infty$ follows from a Beta-function evaluation of $I_\infty=\int_0^{\infty}\cosh(2t)^{-3/2}\,dt$.   (III) Degenerate limit. As $a\to(1/2)^+$, $r(a)=c_*\sqrt{a-1/2}\,(1+o(1))$ with $c_*=σ_*\coshσ_*$, where $σ_*$ is the unique positive fixed point of $σ=\cothσ$.   The proof of (I) follows the mode-by-mode strategy of Devyver for the Euclidean critical catenoid, with $\mathfrak{so}(3,1)$ replacing $\mathfrak{so}(3)$, supplemented by the closed-form identification $f_*=\partial_sΦ^0$ specific to the hyperbolic ambient. The proof of (II) is a Laplace-type asymptotic analysis of the implicit free boundary condition.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了双曲空间中临界双曲悬链面的Robin零度、渐近半径和退化极限。
ai.motivation: 理解临界双曲悬链面的谱性质和几何极限。
ai.method: 利用Sturm-Liouville理论、Laplace型渐近分析和隐式自由边界条件。
ai.result: 在模式|k|=1中Robin零度为2，Robin Morse指标也为2；边界半径渐近公式；退化极限的显式常数。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了双曲空间中自由边界极小曲面的谱和渐近行为的精确结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将Robin零度与Killing-Jacobi场联系，可能用于研究更一般自由边界问题的指标。
idea_spark.risk: 结果高度依赖于双曲空间的对称性，推广到其他空间可能困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法应用于其他非紧对称空间中的自由边界极小曲面。

en.tldr: This paper studies the Robin nullity, asymptotic radius, and degenerate limit of the critical hyperbolic catenoid in hyperbolic space.
en.motivation: To understand the spectral properties and geometric limits of the critical hyperbolic catenoid.
en.method: Using Sturm-Liouville theory, Laplace-type asymptotic analysis, and implicit free boundary conditions.
en.result: Robin nullity equals 2 in mode |k|=1, Robin Morse index also 2; asymptotic boundary radius formula; explicit constant for degenerate limit.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise spectral and asymptotic results for free boundary minimal surfaces in hyperbolic space.

idea_spark.idea: Connecting Robin nullity to Killing-Jacobi fields may help study indices of more general free boundary problems.
idea_spark.risk: Results heavily rely on hyperbolic space symmetry; generalization to other spaces may be difficult.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to free boundary minimal surfaces in other non-compact symmetric spaces.

papers.title: Structural Interpretations of Protein Language Model Representations via Differentiable Graph Partitioning
papers.summary: Protein language models such as ESM-2 learn rich residue representations that achieve strong performance on protein function prediction, but their features remain difficult to interpret as structural $\&$ evolutionary signals are encoded in dense latent spaces. We propose a plug-$\&$-play framework that projects ESM-2 representations onto protein contact graphs $\&$ applies $\textbf{SoftBlobGIN}$, a lightweight Graph Isomorphism Network with differentiable Gumbel-softmax substructure pooling, to perform structure-aware message passing $\&$ learn coarse functional substructures for downstream prediction tasks. Across enzyme classification, SoftBlobGIN achieves 92.8\% accuracy $\&$ 0.898 macro-F1. Unlike post hoc analysis of protein language models alone, our method produces directly auditable structural explanations: GNNExplainer recovers biologically meaningful active-site residues, spatially localized functional clusters, $\&$ catalytic contact patterns. On binding-site detection, SoftBlobGIN improves residue AUROC from $0.885$ using an ESM-2 linear probe to $0.983$, indicating that these structural explanations are not recoverable from language-model features alone. Learned blob partitions provide an additional layer of interpretability by automatically grouping residues into functional substructures, with blobs containing annotated active-site residues showing $1.85\times$ higher importance than other blobs ($ρ{=}0.339$, $p{=}0.009$), without any active-site supervision. Our framework requires no retraining of the language model, adds only $\sim$1.1M parameters, $\&$ generalises across ProteinShake tasks, achieving $F_{\max}$ of $0.733$ on Gene Ontology prediction $\&$ AUROC of $0.969$ on binding-site detection. We position this as an interpretable structural companion to protein language models that makes their predictions more transparent $\&$ auditable.

ai.tldr: 提出一种可微图划分框架，将ESM-2表示投影到蛋白质接触图上，通过轻量图同构网络SoftBlobGIN学习功能子结构，实现可解释的蛋白质功能预测。
ai.motivation: 蛋白质语言模型（如ESM-2）的表示难以解释，因为结构和进化信号编码在密集的潜在空间中。
ai.method: 将ESM-2表示投影到蛋白质接触图，使用带Gumbel-softmax子结构池化的图同构网络SoftBlobGIN进行结构感知消息传递，学习粗粒度的功能子结构。
ai.result: 在酶分类上达92.8%准确率和0.898宏F1；结合位点检测残基AUROC从0.885提升至0.983；含活性位点的blob重要性是其他blob的1.85倍。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需重新训练语言模型即可获得结构可解释性的方法，帮助理解蛋白质功能预测的生物学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 将可微图划分与语言模型结合，自动识别功能子结构，无需活性位点监督。
idea_spark.risk: 对图结构质量敏感，可能受接触图预测误差影响；泛化性需在更多任务上验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用图神经网络的可解释性弥补语言模型的黑箱特性，启发其他生物序列分析中的结构-功能关联研究。

en.tldr: A differentiable graph partitioning framework projects ESM-2 representations onto protein contact graphs and uses SoftBlobGIN, a lightweight GIN with Gumbel-softmax substructure pooling, to learn functional substructures for interpretable protein function prediction.
en.motivation: Protein language model representations are difficult to interpret because structural and evolutionary signals are encoded in dense latent spaces.
en.method: Project ESM-2 representations onto protein contact graphs, apply SoftBlobGIN (a GIN with differentiable Gumbel-softmax substructure pooling) for structure-aware message passing and coarse functional substructure learning.
en.result: 92.8% accuracy and 0.898 macro-F1 on enzyme classification; binding-site residue AUROC improves from 0.885 to 0.983; blobs containing active-site residues show 1.85× higher importance than others.
en.help_to_user: Provides a plug-and-play framework that adds structural interpretability to protein language models without retraining, aiding biological understanding of predictions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine differentiable graph partitioning with language models to automatically identify functional substructures without active-site supervision.
idea_spark.risk: Sensitive to contact graph quality; generalization needs validation on more tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverages GNN interpretability to demystify black-box language models, inspiring structure-function studies in other biological sequence analyses.

papers.title: From Message-Passing to Linearized Graph Sequence Models
papers.summary: Message-passing based approaches form the default backbone of most learning architectures on graph-structured data. However, the rapid progress of modern deep learning architectures in other domains, particularly sequence modeling, raises the question of how graph learning can benefit from these advances. We introduce Linearized Graph Sequence Models, a framework that recasts message-passing graph computation from the perspective of sequence modeling to simplify architectural choices. Our approach systematically separates the computational processing depth from the information propagation depth, allowing core graph architectural decisions to be treated as sequence modeling choices. Specifically, we analyze, both empirically and theoretically, what sequence properties make methods effective for learning and preserving the graph inductive bias. In particular, we validate our findings, demonstrating improved performance on long-range information tasks in graphs. Our findings provide a principled way to integrate modern sequence modeling advances into message-passing based graph learning. Beyond this, our work demonstrates how the separation of processing and information depth can recast central architectural questions as input modeling choices.

ai.tldr: 提出线性化图序列模型框架，将消息传递图计算重新表述为序列建模问题，分离处理深度与信息传播深度，简化架构选择。
ai.motivation: 图学习主要依赖消息传递，但序列建模领域进展迅速，如何将序列建模优势引入图学习是核心问题。
ai.method: 将消息传递图计算转化为序列建模视角，系统分离计算处理深度与信息传播深度，使图架构决策转化为序列建模选择。
ai.result: 在长程信息任务上性能提升，验证了序列属性对保持图归纳偏置的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将现代序列建模技术整合到消息传递图学习中的原则性方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将图架构设计问题转化为输入建模选择，可能启发更灵活的图学习系统。
idea_spark.risk: 序列建模假设可能不完全适用于所有图结构，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从序列建模中借鉴位置编码、注意力机制等，用于增强图归纳偏置。

en.tldr: Proposes Linearized Graph Sequence Models, reframing message-passing graph computation as sequence modeling to simplify architectural choices by separating processing depth from information propagation depth.
en.motivation: Graph learning relies on message-passing, but advances in sequence modeling raise the question of how to benefit graph learning from these advances.
en.method: Recasts message-passing graph computation from a sequence modeling perspective, systematically separating computational processing depth from information propagation depth, turning core graph architectural decisions into sequence modeling choices.
en.result: Demonstrates improved performance on long-range information tasks, validating sequence properties for preserving graph inductive bias.
en.help_to_user: Provides a principled way to integrate modern sequence modeling advances into message-passing based graph learning.

idea_spark.idea: Treating graph architecture design as input modeling choices may inspire more flexible graph learning systems.
idea_spark.risk: Sequence modeling assumptions may not fully generalize to all graph structures; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing positional encodings, attention mechanisms from sequence modeling to enhance graph inductive bias.

papers.title: Improvement of flatness in annuli
papers.summary: We present a short and flexible improvement-of-flatness argument adapted to the setting of exterior domains, where one is naturally led to work with annuli instead of balls.   As a model application in the classical setting of minimal surfaces, we give an alternative proof of the end-structure and asymptotics for finite Morse index minimal hypersurfaces with Euclidean area growth in low dimensions.   The method is largely PDE-based and general in its application. Suitable variants have been employed in Bernoulli and Allen--Cahn settings.

ai.tldr: 提出一种适用于外部区域（环面）的平坦性改进论证，并应用于极小曲面末端结构分析。
ai.motivation: 经典平坦性改进论证基于球体，但外部区域自然涉及环面，需要适配论证。
ai.method: 基于PDE的通用方法，通过环面替代球体进行平坦性改进。
ai.result: 给出了低维欧氏面积增长有限Morse指数极小超曲面末端结构与渐近性的替代证明。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种处理外部区域几何问题的PDE工具，可推广至Bernoulli和Allen-Cahn等模型。

en.motivation: Classical flatness improvement uses balls, but exterior domains naturally involve annuli, requiring adaptation.
en.method: PDE-based general method, replacing balls with annuli for flatness improvement.
en.result: Alternative proof of end-structure and asymptotics for finite Morse index minimal hypersurfaces with Euclidean area growth in low dimensions.

idea_spark.inspiration: From minimal surface end-structure, inspire similar treatments for other free boundary problems.

papers.title: Generative Transfer for Entropic Optimal Transport with Unknown Costs
papers.summary: This paper addresses the practical challenge in Entropic Optimal Transport (EOT) where the underlying ground cost function is typically latent and unobserved. Rather than assuming a fixed geometric cost, we adopt a data-driven approach where a shared cost is revealed only through samples from a reference optimal coupling. The question is then: given samples from a reference optimal coupling, can we recover the optimal coupling for new marginals under the same latent cost? We introduce a generative transfer framework that recovers the optimal coupling for new marginals by utilizing an iterative path-wise tilting algorithm. Unlike static importance reweighting, this method evolves the coupling jointly with a marginal transport path, allowing mass to move beyond the reference support. We derive sample-level learning rules for these infinitesimal updates, which yield covariance-type evolution equations for the associated transport vector fields. By integrating this dynamics with Conditional Flow Matching (CFM), we produce a practical sampler for paired data. Finally, we provide theoretical guarantees establishing a global convergence rate of \mathcal{O}(δ), ensuring the generated coupling converges to the target EOT plan in W_1 distance.

ai.tldr: 提出生成式迁移框架，从参考最优耦合样本中恢复未知代价下的新边际最优耦合。
ai.motivation: 实际中熵最优传输的底层代价函数通常未知，需要从参考最优耦合样本中学习。
ai.method: 采用迭代路径倾斜算法，联合演化耦合与边际传输路径，结合条件流匹配生成配对样本。
ai.result: 推导出协方差型演化方程，并证明生成耦合在W_1距离下以O(δ)全局收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需已知代价函数即可生成新边际最优耦合的实用采样方法。

papers.title: The role of asymmetric time delay and its structure in 1D swarmalators
papers.summary: Swarmalators are a class of coupled oscillators that simultaneously synchronize in both space and phase, providing a minimal model for systems ranging from biological microswimmers to robotic swarms. Time delay is ubiquitous in such systems, arising from finite signal propagation speeds and sensory processing lags, yet its structural form, whether symmetric or asymmetric, has received little attention. Here, we study a one-dimensional swarmalator model with asymmetric time delay, in which the delay enters only the self-interaction terms of the spatial and phase dynamics, breaking the symmetry assumed in prior work. We identify various collective states such as async, static phase wave, static π, and active π, and derive analytical stability boundaries for each as a function of the coupling parameters and delay. Our analysis reveals that the asymmetric delay structure fundamentally reshapes the collective phase diagram: in particular, for the asymmetric delay models, increasing the delay systematically expands the active π state at the expense of other ordered states, in contrast to the symmetric delay model, which more strongly promotes the presence of unsteady states that are generally not well ordered. By providing closed-form stability conditions validated against numerical simulations, our work establishes that the internal structure of the delay, not merely its magnitude, is a decisive factor in determining the emergent collective behavior of swarmalator populations.

ai.tldr: 研究一维群聚振子模型中非对称时间延迟对集体行为的影响，发现延迟结构比延迟大小更关键。
ai.motivation: 时间延迟普遍存在于群聚振子系统中，但以往研究多假设对称延迟，忽略了非对称结构的影响。
ai.method: 构建一维群聚振子模型，引入仅作用于自相互作用项的非对称时间延迟，通过解析推导和数值模拟分析稳定性边界。
ai.result: 非对称延迟会扩大active π态并抑制其他有序态，而对称延迟则促进不稳定态；延迟结构是决定集体行为的关键因素。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解时间延迟结构如何影响耦合振子系统的自组织行为，为设计可控的群体动力学提供理论指导。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非对称延迟结构主动调控群聚振子系统的相图，例如通过设计延迟分布来抑制或增强特定集体态。

idea_spark.inspiration: 延迟结构而非仅延迟大小的影响，启发我们重新审视其他耦合系统中延迟的对称性假设。

en.tldr: This work studies how asymmetric time delay structure reshapes collective states in 1D swarmalators, showing that delay structure matters more than magnitude.
en.motivation: Time delay is ubiquitous in swarmalator systems, but prior work assumed symmetric delay, ignoring the role of asymmetric structure.
en.method: A 1D swarmalator model with asymmetric delay (only in self-interaction terms) is analyzed via analytical stability boundaries and numerical simulations.
en.result: Asymmetric delay expands the active π state and suppresses other ordered states, while symmetric delay promotes unsteady states; delay structure is decisive.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into how delay structure governs self-organization in coupled oscillators, aiding design of controllable swarm dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Use asymmetric delay structure to actively tune the phase diagram of swarmalators, e.g., to enhance or suppress specific collective states.
idea_spark.risk: Precise control of delay structure may be challenging in real systems, and analytical stability conditions may become complex in higher dimensions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The finding that delay structure (not just magnitude) matters prompts re-examination of symmetry assumptions in other coupled systems.

papers.title: When Brains Disagree: Biological Ambiguity Underlies the Challenge of Amyloid PET Synthesis from Structural MRI
papers.summary: Structural MRI-to-amyloid PET synthesis has been proposed as a non-invasive alternative for amyloid assessment in Alzheimer's disease (AD). However, reported performance of identical models varies widely across studies, and increasingly complex architectures have not led to consistent gains. This inconsistency is thought to be caused by a fundamental biological ambiguity: MRI captures neurodegeneration, while PET measures amyloid pathology - two processes that are often temporally decoupled in AD. As a result, similar MRI patterns may correspond to different amyloid states, creating ambiguous one-to-many mappings. MRI-to-amyloid PET synthesis may therefore be intrinsically ill-posed; however, this idea has yet to be tested scientifically. The aim of this work is to test this hypothesis through two controlled experiments. We first control the training distribution by stratifying paired MRI-PET data by amyloid and neurodegeneration status. Using two standard synthesis models under a controlled design, we show that biologically unambiguous mappings are learnable in isolation, but performance collapses when data ambiguity is introduced. This demonstrates that ambiguity in the data distribution, rather than architectural capacity, constrains performance. Second, we show that introducing orthogonal biological information in the form of plasma biomarkers resolves this ambiguity. When multimodal inputs are incorporated, performance improves and stability is restored. Together, these findings suggest that limited and inconsistent performance in MRI-to-amyloid PET synthesis is explained by intrinsic biological ambiguity, and that stable, meaningful progress requires multimodal integration rather than architectural complexity.

ai.motivation: 现有模型性能不一致，复杂架构未带来稳定提升，怀疑存在根本性生物歧义。

en.tldr: Structural MRI to amyloid PET synthesis is fundamentally ill-posed due to biological ambiguity; multimodal integration outperforms architectural complexity.
en.motivation: Inconsistent model performance across studies suggests intrinsic biological ambiguity rather than model capacity limits.
en.method: Controlled experiments stratifying paired MRI-PET data by amyloid and neurodegeneration status; introduction of plasma biomarkers as orthogonal information.
en.result: Unambiguous mappings are learnable in isolation; ambiguity collapses performance. Multimodal inputs restore stability and improve performance.
en.help_to_user: Explains why MRI-to-PET synthesis is challenging and highlights multimodal integration as a promising direction.

papers.title: Empirical Convergence of Even-Order Gromov-Wasserstein Functionals
papers.summary: We study the sample complexity of empirical plug-in estimation for the powered even-order Gromov-Wasserstein functional between compactly supported probability measures on \(\mathbb R^{d_x}\) and \(\mathbb R^{d_y}\). For every fixed pair of integers \(r,k\ge 1\), we prove that the two-sample empirical error is bounded at the rate \[ n^{-2/\max\{\min\{d_x,d_y\},4\}}, \] up to a logarithmic factor in the critical case \(\min\{d_x,d_y\}=4\). This extends the known quadratic Euclidean upper rate to the full powered even-order family. The proof uses a polynomial decomposition of the even-order GW functional, a generalized duality formula reducing the coupling-dependent term to a compact family of ordinary optimal transport problems, and entropy estimates for semiconcave dual potentials.

ai.tldr: 研究了紧支撑概率测度上偶阶Gromov-Wasserstein泛函的经验估计样本复杂度，证明了双样本经验误差的收敛速率。
ai.motivation: 将已知的二次欧几里得上界推广到整个偶阶族，填补高阶Gromov-Wasserstein泛函样本复杂度的理论空白。
ai.method: 利用偶阶GW泛函的多项式分解、广义对偶公式将耦合依赖项简化为紧族最优传输问题，以及半凹对偶势的熵估计。
ai.result: 对于任意固定整数对(r,k≥1)，双样本经验误差以n^{-2/\max\{\min\{d_x,d_y\},4\}}速率有界，临界维数4时含对数因子。
ai.help_to_user: 提供偶阶Gromov-Wasserstein泛函经验估计的理论收敛保证，指导实际应用中的样本量选择。

idea_spark.idea: 利用偶阶GW泛函的代数结构，通过多项式分解将复杂耦合问题转化为多个经典最优传输子问题。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下熵估计可能不够紧，导致实际收敛速率慢于理论界。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代数结构入手分解复杂泛函，再结合经典最优传输工具，是处理高阶度量问题的有效思路。

en.tldr: Studies the sample complexity of empirical plug-in estimation for powered even-order Gromov-Wasserstein functionals, proving a convergence rate for two-sample empirical error.
en.motivation: Extends the known quadratic Euclidean upper bound to the full powered even-order family, filling a theoretical gap in sample complexity for higher-order Gromov-Wasserstein functionals.
en.method: Uses polynomial decomposition of the even-order GW functional, a generalized duality formula reducing coupling dependence to a compact family of optimal transport problems, and entropy estimates for semiconcave dual potentials.
en.result: For any fixed integers r,k≥1, the two-sample empirical error is bounded at rate n^{-2/\max\{\min\{d_x,d_y\},4\}}, with a logarithmic factor in the critical dimension 4.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical convergence guarantees for empirical estimation of even-order Gromov-Wasserstein functionals, guiding sample size selection in practice.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit the algebraic structure of even-order GW functionals via polynomial decomposition to decompose complex coupling into multiple classical optimal transport subproblems.
idea_spark.risk: Entropy estimates may be loose in high dimensions, leading to slower actual convergence than the theoretical bound.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing complex functionals by algebraic structure and then leveraging classical optimal transport tools is an effective approach for higher-order metric problems.

papers.title: Computed Tomography Reconstruction Algorithm Using Markov Random Field Model
papers.summary: X-ray computed tomography (CT) reveals the materials' internal structures non-destructively from a tilt series of projected images. Filtered back projection (FBP) is a widely-adopted reconstruction algorithm in CT owing to its small computational cost. Under low-dose or sparse-view conditions, however, FBP often amplifies noise, severely degrading the reconstructed images. In this study, we evaluated the performance of a Bayesian CT reconstruction algorithm based on the Markov random field model under such adverse conditions. Through simulations, we demonstrated that the proposed algorithm shows higher reconstruction performance than FBP under both low-dose and sparse-view conditions. The hyperparameters are estimated by minimizing the Bayesian free energy, enabling adaptive reconstruction that reflects the noise characteristics of the observed projection data. These results suggest that the proposed algorithm can broaden the applicability of CT to dose-sensitive applications and time-constrained measurements, where only limited observed projection data are available.

ai.tldr: 提出基于马尔可夫随机场模型的贝叶斯CT重建算法，在低剂量和稀疏视角条件下优于滤波反投影。
ai.motivation: 滤波反投影在低剂量或稀疏视角下噪声放大严重，需要更鲁棒的重建方法。
ai.method: 采用马尔可夫随机场作为先验模型，通过最小化贝叶斯自由能自适应估计超参数。
ai.result: 仿真表明新算法在低剂量和稀疏视角下重建性能均高于滤波反投影。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解贝叶斯方法如何改善CT图像质量，尤其适用于剂量敏感或时间受限场景。

en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how Bayesian methods improve CT image quality, especially for dose-sensitive or time-constrained applications.

papers.title: Adaptive Diagonal Loading using Krylov Subspaces for Robust Beamforming
papers.summary: Reliable adaptive beamforming is critical for large microphone arrays operating in highly dynamic acoustic environments. In scenarios characterized by fast-moving talkers and interferers, the available sample support for estimating the spatial correlation matrix is often snapshot-deficient. This deficiency degrades the White Noise Gain (WNG), leading to severe target signal cancellation. To ensure stable and robust beamforming, we previously proposed an adaptive diagonal loading method that leverages the Kantorovich inequality to guarantee the WNG remains strictly within specified bounds. However, accurately determining the smallest necessary loading level requires calculating the extreme eigenvalues of the spatial correlation matrix, a computationally expensive $\mathcal{O}(M^3)$ operation for large arrays. In this paper, we introduce a highly efficient $\mathcal{O}(kM^2)$ estimation technique using Lanczos iterations to build a small Krylov subspace. By projecting the correlation matrix onto a tridiagonal matrix of dimension $k \ll M$, we extract Ritz values that rapidly converge to the exact extreme eigenvalues. Our evaluations demonstrate that this Lanczos-accelerated approach achieves performance identical to exact Eigenvalue Decomposition (EVD), ensuring optimal interference suppression and strict WNG adherence at a fraction of the computational cost.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于Lanczos迭代的快速自适应对角加载方法，用于大型麦克风阵列的鲁棒波束形成。
ai.motivation: 在快变声学环境中，样本支持不足导致白噪声增益下降和目标信号抵消，传统对角加载需计算昂贵特征值分解。
ai.method: 利用Lanczos迭代构建小规模Krylov子空间，将相关矩阵投影为三对角矩阵，提取Ritz值逼近极端特征值，实现O(kM²)复杂度。
ai.result: 该方法与精确特征值分解性能相同，保证最优干扰抑制和严格白噪声增益约束，计算成本大幅降低。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何用Krylov子空间加速自适应波束形成中的对角加载计算。

idea_spark.idea: 探索用随机化数值线性代数方法进一步降低计算复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: Ritz值收敛性可能受子空间维度k选择影响，需平衡精度与速度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴数值线性代数中Lanczos方法，为实时阵列处理提供高效特征值估计方案。

en.tldr: Proposes a fast adaptive diagonal loading method using Lanczos iterations for robust beamforming with large microphone arrays.
en.motivation: In dynamic acoustic environments, insufficient sample support degrades white noise gain and causes target cancellation; traditional diagonal loading requires expensive eigenvalue decomposition.
en.method: Uses Lanczos iterations to build a small Krylov subspace, projects the correlation matrix onto a tridiagonal matrix, and extracts Ritz values to approximate extreme eigenvalues with O(kM²) complexity.
en.result: The method achieves identical performance to exact eigenvalue decomposition, ensuring optimal interference suppression and strict WNG adherence at a fraction of the computational cost.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how Krylov subspace techniques can accelerate diagonal loading computation in adaptive beamforming.

idea_spark.idea: Explore randomized numerical linear algebra methods to further reduce computational complexity.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence of Ritz values may depend on the choice of subspace dimension k, requiring a trade-off between accuracy and speed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from Lanczos methods in numerical linear algebra to provide efficient eigenvalue estimation for real-time array processing.

papers.title: $h$-control: Training-Free Camera Control via Block-Conditional Gibbs Refinement
papers.summary: Training-free camera control for pretrained flow-matching video generators is a partial-observation inverse problem: a depth-warped guidance video supplies noisy evidence on a subset of latent sites, which the sampler must reconcile with the pretrained prior. Existing methods struggle to balance the trade-off between trajectory adherence and visual quality and the heuristic guidance-strength tuning lacks robustness. We propose \textbf{$h$-control}, which resolves this dilemma through a structural change to the sampler: each outer hard-replacement guidance step is augmented with an inner-loop \emph{block-conditional pseudo-Gibbs refinement} on the unobserved complement at the same noise level, with provable convergence to the partial-observation conditional data law. To accelerate convergence on high-dimensional video latents, we exploit their conditional locality, partitioning the unobserved complement into 3D patches, each tracked by a custom mixing indicator that adaptively freezes converged patches. On RealEstate10K and DAVIS, \textbf{$h$-control} attains the best FVD against all seven training-free and training-based competitors, outperforming every training-free baseline on every reported metric.

ai.tldr: 提出h-control方法，通过块条件伪吉布斯精炼实现训练自由的相机控制，在视频生成中平衡轨迹遵循与视觉质量。
ai.motivation: 现有训练自由方法在轨迹遵循与视觉质量间存在权衡，且启发式引导强度调参缺乏鲁棒性。
ai.method: 在每次外循环硬替换引导步骤中，增加内循环块条件伪吉布斯精炼，对未观测补集进行同噪声水平采样，并利用条件局部性将未观测补集划分为3D块，通过自适应混合指示器冻结收敛块。
ai.result: 在RealEstate10K和DAVIS数据集上，FVD指标优于所有七种训练自由和训练基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需额外训练即可控制视频生成中相机轨迹的方法，提升生成视频的连贯性和质量。

idea_spark.idea: 将未观测补集划分为3D块并自适应冻结，可加速高维潜变量收敛，类似思想可用于其他高维生成模型。
idea_spark.risk: 块划分策略和自适应阈值需针对不同任务调整，可能影响泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从吉布斯采样与条件局部性结合出发，启发设计更高效的训练自由控制方法。

en.tldr: Proposes h-control, a training-free camera control method via block-conditional pseudo-Gibbs refinement, balancing trajectory adherence and visual quality in video generation.
en.motivation: Existing training-free methods suffer from a trade-off between trajectory adherence and visual quality, and heuristic guidance-strength tuning lacks robustness.
en.method: Augments each outer hard-replacement guidance step with an inner-loop block-conditional pseudo-Gibbs refinement on the unobserved complement at the same noise level, partitions the unobserved complement into 3D patches, and uses an adaptive mixing indicator to freeze converged patches.
en.result: Achieves best FVD on RealEstate10K and DAVIS against all seven training-free and training-based competitors.
en.help_to_user: Provides a training-free method to control camera trajectories in video generation, improving coherence and quality.

idea_spark.risk: Patch partitioning and adaptive thresholds may require task-specific tuning, affecting generalization.

papers.title: Multi-Stream LLMs: Unblocking Language Models with Parallel Streams of Thoughts, Inputs and Outputs
papers.summary: The continued improvements in language model capability have unlocked their widespread use as drivers of autonomous agents, for example in coding or computer use applications. However, the core of these systems has not changed much since early instruction-tuned models like ChatGPT. Even advanced AI agents function on message exchange formats, successively exchanging messages with users, systems, with itself (i.e. chain-of-thought) and tools in a single stream of computation. This bottleneck to a single stream in chat models leads to a number of limitations: the agent cannot act (generate output) while reading, and in reverse, cannot react to new information while writing. Similarly, the agent cannot act while thinking and cannot think while reading or acting on information.   In this work, we show that models can be unblocked by switching from instruction-tuning for sequential message formats to instruction-tuning for multiple, parallel streams of computation, splitting each role into a separate stream. Every forward pass of the language model then simultaneously reads from multiple input streams and generates tokens in multiple output streams, all of which causally depend on earlier timesteps. We argue that this data-driven change remedies a number of usability limitations as outlined above, improves model efficiency through parallelization, improves model security through better separation of concerns and can further improve model monitorability.

ai.tldr: 提出多流语言模型，通过并行计算流解除传统单流对话模型的瓶颈。
ai.motivation: 现有语言模型在单流计算中无法同时读写、思考与行动，限制了自主代理的效率、安全性和可监控性。
ai.method: 将指令微调从顺序消息格式改为多流并行格式，每个前向传播同时读取多个输入流并生成多个输出流，各流因果依赖。
ai.result: 解除单流限制，提升并行效率、安全性和可监控性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过并行流设计改进语言模型在自主代理中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将多流机制用于多模态输入输出（如同时处理文本、图像、音频）。
idea_spark.risk: 并行流可能增加模型复杂度和训练难度，需平衡收益与开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受操作系统多线程或并行计算启发，将计算角色分离为独立流。

en.tldr: Proposes multi-stream LLMs that unblock the single-stream bottleneck by using parallel streams of computation.
en.motivation: Current single-stream chat models cannot read and write simultaneously, nor think while acting, limiting efficiency, security, and monitorability in autonomous agents.
en.method: Shift instruction-tuning from sequential message formats to multiple parallel streams, where each forward pass reads from multiple input streams and generates tokens in multiple output streams with causal dependencies.
en.result: Unblocks single-stream limitations, improving parallel efficiency, security, and monitorability.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how parallel stream design can improve LLM-based autonomous agents.

papers.title: Global well-posedness for the Hele-Shaw problem with point injection
papers.summary: We study the two-dimensional Hele-Shaw problem with point injection for star-shaped domains. We reduce the system to a nonlocal parabolic equation of the interface, and for arbitrary Lipschitz initial interface away from the source, we prove global well-posedness of the interface equation in a strong sense. We also introduce a viscosity-solution framework for the interface equation and relate it to the classical viscosity theory for the Hele-Shaw problem. As an application, we recover angle dynamics of Lipschitz initial interfaces: acute corners exhibit positive waiting time, while obtuse corners move immediately.

ai.tldr: 针对星形区域中带点注入的二维Hele-Shaw问题，证明了全局适定性，并建立了粘性解框架，揭示了尖角等待时间现象。
ai.motivation: 研究点注入下Hele-Shaw问题的全局适定性，特别是初始界面为Lipschitz且远离源点的情况。
ai.method: 将系统约化为界面的非局部抛物方程，引入粘性解框架，并利用经典粘性理论进行分析。
ai.result: 证明了界面方程在强意义下的全局适定性；锐角具有正等待时间，钝角立即移动。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了点注入Hele-Shaw问题的严格数学分析，有助于理解界面奇点演化。

idea_spark.idea: 将粘性解框架与角度动力学结合，可能用于预测界面尖角行为。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于星形假设，推广到一般形状需额外工作。
idea_spark.inspiration: 等待时间现象启发对界面钉扎效应的建模。

en.tldr: For the 2D Hele-Shaw problem with point injection in star-shaped domains, global well-posedness is proved and a viscosity-solution framework is introduced, revealing waiting-time phenomena for acute corners.
