papers.title: DCVD: Dual-Channel Cross-Modal Fusion for Joint Vulnerability Detection and Localization
papers.summary: Software vulnerability detection plays a critical role in ensuring system security, where real-world auditing requires not only determining whether a function is vulnerable but also pinpointing the specific lines responsible. However, existing approaches either rely on a single information source -- sequential, structural, or semantic -- failing to jointly exploit the complementary strengths across modalities, or treat statement-level localization merely as a byproduct of function-level detection without explicit line-level supervision. To address these limitations, we propose DCVD (Dual-Channel Cross-Modal Vulnerability Detection), a unified framework that performs joint function-level detection and statement-level localization. DCVD extracts control-dependency and semantic features through two parallel branches and integrates them via contrastive alignment coupled with bidirectional cross-attention, effectively bridging the cross-modal representation gap. It further introduces explicit supervision signals at both the function and statement levels, enabling collaborative optimization across the two granularities. Extensive experiments on a large-scale real-world vulnerability benchmark demonstrate that DCVD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both function-level detection and statement-level localization. Our code is available at https://github.com/vinsontang1/DCVD.

ai.tldr: 提出DCVD框架，通过双通道跨模态融合实现函数级漏洞检测与语句级定位的联合优化。
ai.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖单一信息源（序列、结构或语义），无法充分利用跨模态互补优势，且语句级定位缺乏显式监督。
ai.method: 双通道并行提取控制依赖与语义特征，通过对比对齐和双向交叉注意力融合，并在函数和语句两级引入显式监督信号。
ai.result: 在大型真实漏洞基准上，DCVD在函数级检测和语句级定位上均优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全研究人员更精确地定位漏洞代码行，提升审计效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将对比学习与交叉注意力结合，用于多模态特征对齐，可推广至多源信息融合场景。
idea_spark.risk: 双通道设计可能增加计算开销，需平衡精度与效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多模态学习启发，将控制流与语义信息互补用于细粒度漏洞定位。

zh.result: 在大型真实漏洞基准上，DCVD在函数级检测和语句级定位上均优于现有方法。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助安全研究人员更精确地定位漏洞代码行，提升审计效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将对比学习与交叉注意力结合，用于多模态特征对齐，可推广至多源信息融合场景。
idea_spark.risk: 双通道设计可能增加计算开销，需平衡精度与效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多模态学习启发，将控制流与语义信息互补用于细粒度漏洞定位。

en.tldr: Proposes DCVD, a dual-channel cross-modal fusion framework for joint function-level vulnerability detection and statement-level localization.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on a single information source and lack explicit supervision for statement-level localization.
en.method: Extracts control-dependency and semantic features via two parallel branches, fuses them with contrastive alignment and bidirectional cross-attention, and applies explicit supervision at both function and statement levels.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both detection and localization on a large real-world benchmark.
en.help_to_user: Helps security researchers precisely locate vulnerable code lines, improving audit efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Combining contrastive learning with cross-attention for multimodal feature alignment can be generalized to multi-source information fusion scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Dual-channel design may increase computational overhead, requiring a balance between accuracy and efficiency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multimodal learning, complementing control flow and semantic information for fine-grained vulnerability localization.

papers.title: Nonuniform relaxation oscillations near SNIPER bifurcations
papers.summary: Properties of spatially dependent relaxation oscillations near a SNIPER bifurcation are described. A SNIPER bifurcation creates a large-amplitude long-period periodic orbit via the annihilation of a pair of fixed points in a saddle-node bifurcation. We show that in spatially extended media, this orbit may undergo a long-wavelength instability, leading to spatially modulated oscillations that persist on both sides of the SNIPER. The oscillations take different forms depending on the system: a chimera state in a theta-reaction-diffusion model, and chaotic spiking in an activator-inhibitor-substrate model. The results are expected to have applications in a number of physical systems exhibiting SNIPER bifurcations, ranging from models of the nervous system through chemical reactions to nonlinear optics.

ai.tldr: 描述了SNIPER分岔附近空间依赖的弛豫振荡特性，发现长波不稳定性导致空间调制振荡，在不同系统中表现为嵌合态或混沌尖峰。
ai.motivation: 理解SNIPER分岔在空间扩展介质中产生的弛豫振荡及其不稳定性，为神经、化学和光学系统提供理论依据。
ai.method: 通过理论分析和数值模拟，研究θ反应扩散模型和激活-抑制-底物模型中的振荡行为。
ai.result: 发现长波不稳定性可在SNIPER分岔两侧产生空间调制振荡，分别形成嵌合态和混沌尖峰。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解SNIPER分岔在空间系统中的动力学行为及其潜在应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用SNIPER分岔附近的振荡模式设计可控的时空模式生成器。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果可能对参数扰动敏感，实验验证需精确控制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 嵌合态和混沌尖峰现象可启发神经科学中同步与去同步的机制研究。

en.tldr: Describes spatially dependent relaxation oscillations near a SNIPER bifurcation, where a long-wavelength instability leads to modulated oscillations, manifesting as chimera states or chaotic spiking in different systems.
en.motivation: To understand the properties and instabilities of relaxation oscillations arising from SNIPER bifurcations in spatially extended media, with applications in neural, chemical, and optical systems.
en.method: Theoretical analysis and numerical simulations of theta-reaction-diffusion and activator-inhibitor-substrate models.
en.result: A long-wavelength instability produces spatially modulated oscillations on both sides of the SNIPER, resulting in chimera states or chaotic spiking.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into the dynamics of SNIPER bifurcations in spatial systems and their potential applications.

idea_spark.idea: Design controllable spatiotemporal pattern generators using oscillation modes near SNIPER bifurcations.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results may be sensitive to parameter perturbations; experimental validation requires precise control.
idea_spark.inspiration: Chimera states and chaotic spiking may inspire studies of synchronization and desynchronization mechanisms in neuroscience.

papers.title: Global Existence and Uniqueness of Strong Solutions for a Phase Transition Model in Atmospheric Dynamics
papers.summary: In this work, we study a phase transition model in atmospheric dynamics, inspired by the works [6,14,15], which analyze the primitive equations governing the evolution of velocity, temperature, and specific humidity. The main difficulty arises from the presence of a multivalued discontinuous nonlinear term in the temperature and in the humidity equations, describing the formation of precipitations, which becomes active under supersaturation conditions. To overcome this issue, we introduce a regularized formulation that ensures the existence and uniqueness of approximate solutions. By employing classical compactness arguments, we then establish the existence of a strong solution to the original model. Additionally, we establish uniqueness under a conditional and physically meaningful assumption. This approach allows us to provide a rigorous justification of the tropical climate model on the whole space $\mathbb{R}^2$, while avoiding the introduction of a viscosity term in the humidity equation.

ai.tldr: 本文研究大气动力学中的相变模型，通过正则化方法克服多值不连续非线性项带来的困难，证明了强解的整体存在唯一性。
ai.motivation: 大气动力学中描述降水形成的相变模型包含多值不连续非线性项，导致经典解的存在唯一性难以建立。
ai.method: 引入正则化公式获得近似解，再利用紧性论证得到原模型的强解，并在物理合理条件下证明唯一性。
ai.result: 在二维全空间上严格证明了热带气候模型强解的整体存在性，且无需在湿度方程中添加粘性项。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了处理含不连续非线性项的大气模型的理论基础，可用于数值模拟和气候预测的数学验证。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将正则化参数与物理过程（如过饱和度阈值）关联，建立自适应正则化策略。
idea_spark.risk: 正则化可能改变解的物理特性，需验证极限解是否保持关键物理守恒律。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受降水形成中过饱和触发机制的启发，可设计更精细的相变阈值函数。

en.tldr: This paper studies a phase transition model in atmospheric dynamics, overcoming a multivalued discontinuous nonlinear term via regularization, and proves global existence and uniqueness of strong solutions.
en.motivation: The phase transition model describing precipitation formation contains a multivalued discontinuous nonlinear term, making existence and uniqueness of classical solutions difficult.
en.method: A regularized formulation is introduced to obtain approximate solutions, then compactness arguments yield a strong solution to the original model; uniqueness is proved under a physically meaningful condition.
en.result: Global existence of strong solutions for the tropical climate model on the whole space ℝ² is rigorously established, without adding a viscosity term in the humidity equation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for atmospheric models with discontinuous nonlinearities, useful for numerical simulations and climate prediction validation.

idea_spark.idea: Try linking the regularization parameter to physical processes (e.g., supersaturation threshold) to design an adaptive regularization strategy.
idea_spark.risk: Regularization may alter the physical properties of solutions; one must verify that the limit solution preserves key physical conservation laws.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the supersaturation trigger mechanism in precipitation formation, one could design more refined phase transition threshold functions.

papers.title: Hypocoercive Langevin dynamics on the Lie group $\mathrm{SE}(2)$
papers.summary: We consider a Langevin-type diffusion on the planar motion group $\mathrm{SE}(2)$, describing the coupled evolution of position and orientation with degenerate noise acting only in the rotational direction. Although hypocoercivity for related models on $\mathbb{R}^2 \times \mathbb{S}^1$ is well understood, our purpose is to present an intrinsic formulation on the Lie group $\mathrm{SE}(2)$, and to highlight the underlying geometric mechanism. By expressing the generator in terms of invariant vector fields and using the natural projection onto the kernel of the symmetric part, we show how an effective macroscopic diffusion on $\mathbb{R}^2$ emerges through averaging over the compact rotation subgroup.

ai.tldr: 在平面运动群SE(2)上构造了Langevin型扩散，仅旋转方向有退化噪声，通过不变向量场和对称部分核的投影，展示了宏观扩散如何通过紧旋转子群的平均化涌现。
ai.motivation: 现有模型在R^2×S^1上的hypocoercivity已清楚，但缺乏在SE(2)李群上的内蕴表述，本文旨在揭示其几何机制。
ai.method: 用不变向量场表达生成元，利用自然投影到对称部分的核，通过紧旋转子群的平均化得到有效宏观扩散。
ai.result: 证明了退化噪声下宏观扩散在R^2上的涌现，并突出了李群结构的作用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解李群上退化噪声扩散的几何机制，为相关物理或机器人运动模型提供数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用李群的不变向量场和子群平均化，设计降维的随机动力学模型。
idea_spark.risk: 高维李群上的计算复杂度可能较高，且平均化假设需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从紧子群平均化得到宏观扩散的思路，可启发多尺度随机系统的简化建模。

en.tldr: We construct a Langevin-type diffusion on the Lie group SE(2) with degenerate noise only in the rotational direction, and show how macroscopic diffusion on R^2 emerges via averaging over the compact rotation subgroup using invariant vector fields and projection onto the kernel of the symmetric part.
en.motivation: Hypocoercivity for related models on R^2×S^1 is well understood, but an intrinsic formulation on the Lie group SE(2) is lacking; this work aims to highlight the underlying geometric mechanism.
en.method: Express the generator in terms of invariant vector fields, use the natural projection onto the kernel of the symmetric part, and average over the compact rotation subgroup to obtain effective macroscopic diffusion.
en.result: Demonstrate the emergence of macroscopic diffusion on R^2 under degenerate noise, emphasizing the role of the Lie group structure.
en.help_to_user: Provides a geometric understanding of degenerate diffusion on Lie groups, offering a mathematical foundation for related physical or robotic motion models.

idea_spark.idea: Use invariant vector fields and subgroup averaging on Lie groups to design reduced-order stochastic dynamics models.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity may be high on higher-dimensional Lie groups, and the averaging assumption requires validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of obtaining macroscopic diffusion via averaging over a compact subgroup can inspire simplified modeling of multiscale stochastic systems.

papers.title: A Counterexample to the Gaussian Completely Monotone Conjecture
papers.summary: We provide an explicit probability measure on $\mathbb{R}$ for which the fifth time derivative of the entropy along the heat flow is positive at some time. This disproves the Gaussian completely monotone (GCM) conjecture (Cheng-Geng '15) and therefore also the Gaussian optimality conjecture (McKean '66) and the entropy power conjecture (Toscani '15). Our proof also implies the existence of a log-concave probability measure on $\mathbb{R}$ for which the GCM conjecture fails at some order. The explicit counterexample was found by GPT-5.5 Pro.

ai.tldr: 构造了一个显式概率测度，使得熵沿热流的五阶时间导数为正，从而否证了高斯完全单调猜想、高斯最优性猜想和熵幂猜想。
ai.motivation: 验证高斯完全单调猜想的正确性，该猜想若成立将蕴含其他两个重要猜想。
ai.method: 通过GPT-5.5 Pro发现显式反例，并证明该反例在log-concave测度类中也成立。
ai.result: 找到了一个概率测度，其熵的五阶时间导数在某时刻为正，否证了三个猜想。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解熵沿热流的导数性质以及相关猜想的反例构造。

idea_spark.idea: 利用机器学习模型（如GPT）辅助发现数学反例。
idea_spark.risk: 反例可能依赖于特定构造，难以推广到一般情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: AI辅助数学发现可加速反例搜索，但需谨慎验证逻辑正确性。

en.tldr: Constructed an explicit probability measure on ℝ for which the fifth time derivative of entropy along the heat flow is positive, disproving the Gaussian completely monotone conjecture, the Gaussian optimality conjecture, and the entropy power conjecture.
en.motivation: To test the validity of the Gaussian completely monotone conjecture, which would imply two other important conjectures if true.
en.method: Discovered an explicit counterexample using GPT-5.5 Pro, and proved it also holds within the class of log-concave probability measures.
en.result: Found a probability measure whose fifth time derivative of entropy is positive at some time, disproving three conjectures.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the derivative properties of entropy along heat flow and the construction of counterexamples to related conjectures.

idea_spark.idea: Use machine learning models like GPT to assist in discovering mathematical counterexamples.
idea_spark.risk: The counterexample may rely on specific constructions that are not generalizable.
idea_spark.inspiration: AI-assisted mathematical discovery can accelerate counterexample search, but logical verification remains crucial.

papers.title: H3D-MarNet: Wavelet-Guided Dual-Path Learning for Metal Artifact Suppression and CT Modality Transformation for Radiotherapy Workflows
papers.summary: Metal artifacts in computed tomography (CT) severely degrade image quality, compromising diagnostic accuracy and radiotherapy planning, especially in cancer patients with high-density implants. We propose H3D-MarNet, a two-stage framework for artifact-aware CT domain transformation from kilo-voltage CT (kVCT) to mega-voltage CT (MVCT). In the first stage, a wavelet-based preprocessing module suppresses metal-induced artifacts through frequency-aware denoising while preserving anatomical structures. In second stage, Domain-TransNet performs kVCT-to-MVCT domain transformation using a hybrid volumetric learning architecture. Domain-TransNet integrates a CNN-based encoder to capture fine-grained local anatomical details and a transformer-based encoder to model long-range volumetric dependencies. The complementary representations are fused through an attention-based feature fusion mechanism to ensure spatial and contextual coherence across slices. A multi-stage, attention-guided decoder, supported by deep supervision, progressively reconstructs artifact-suppressed MVCT volumes.   Extensive experiments demonstrate that H3D-MarNet achieves 28.14 dB PSNR and 0.717 SSIM on artifact-affected slices from full dataset, indicating effective metal artifact suppression and anatomical preservation, highlighting its potential for reliable CT modality transformation in clinical radiotherapy workflows.

ai.tldr: 提出H3D-MarNet两阶段框架，结合小波预处理与混合体积学习，有效抑制金属伪影并实现kVCT到MVCT的模态转换，提升放疗工作流可靠性。
ai.motivation: CT中的金属伪影严重降低图像质量，影响诊断准确性和放疗计划，尤其对于带有高密度植入物的癌症患者。
ai.method: 第一阶段用小波预处理模块进行频率感知去噪；第二阶段Domain-TransNet采用CNN编码器捕捉局部细节、Transformer编码器建模长程依赖，通过注意力融合机制整合特征，并由多阶段注意力引导解码器逐步重建伪影抑制的MVCT体积。
ai.result: 在全数据集伪影切片上达到28.14 dB PSNR和0.717 SSIM，表明有效抑制金属伪影并保留解剖结构。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用小波和混合架构解决医学图像中的金属伪影问题，并实现CT模态转换。

idea_spark.idea: 将小波变换与注意力融合机制结合，在频率域和空间域同时处理伪影，可能启发更高效的图像修复方法。
idea_spark.risk: 小波基函数选择和融合权重可能对特定伪影类型敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用频率感知预处理分离伪影与解剖结构，再通过混合模型重建，可推广到MRI或PET中的伪影校正。

en.tldr: Proposes H3D-MarNet, a two-stage framework combining wavelet preprocessing and hybrid volumetric learning to suppress metal artifacts and transform kVCT to MVCT, enhancing radiotherapy workflow reliability.
en.motivation: Metal artifacts in CT severely degrade image quality, compromising diagnostic accuracy and radiotherapy planning, especially in cancer patients with high-density implants.
en.method: First stage uses wavelet-based preprocessing for frequency-aware denoising; second stage Domain-TransNet employs a CNN encoder for local details and a transformer encoder for long-range dependencies, fused via attention mechanism, with a multi-stage attention-guided decoder for progressive reconstruction.
en.result: Achieves 28.14 dB PSNR and 0.717 SSIM on artifact-affected slices, demonstrating effective metal artifact suppression and anatomical preservation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how wavelet and hybrid architectures address metal artifacts in medical images and enable CT modality transformation.

idea_spark.idea: Combining wavelet transform with attention fusion to process artifacts in both frequency and spatial domains may inspire more efficient image restoration methods.
idea_spark.risk: Wavelet basis selection and fusion weights may be sensitive to specific artifact types, requiring further validation of generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using frequency-aware preprocessing to separate artifacts from anatomy, then reconstructing with hybrid models, could extend to artifact correction in MRI or PET.

papers.title: Can Graphs Help Vision SSMs See Better?
papers.summary: Vision state space models inherit the efficiency and long-range modeling ability of Mamba-style selective scans. However, their performance depends critically on the representation of two-dimensional visual features as one-dimensional token sequences. Existing scan operators range from predefined geometric traversals to dynamic coordinate-based samplers that reroute tokens through predicted offsets and interpolation. While effective, these mechanisms primarily adapt paths or sampling locations, rather than explicitly modeling which local patches should exchange information before global state-space mixing. This motivates a simple question: \emph{can graphs help vision state space models see better?} We introduce \textbf{GraphScan}, a graph-induced dynamic scanning operator for Vision SSMs. For each token, GraphScan constructs a spatially bounded local graph, learns feature-conditioned affinities with relative positional bias, and produces the output token by one-step message passing over its semantic neighborhood. The resulting tokens are locally grounded before being processed by the selective SSM for global aggregation. GraphScan preserves token count and linear scaling in image size, while replacing coordinate-conditioned interpolation with feature-conditioned semantic routing. Integrated into a hierarchical backbone, \textbf{GraphScan-Mamba} achieves state-of-the-art performance among Vision SSMs across image classification, object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation, with modest computational overhead. Our analysis further shows that GraphScan induces interpretable displacement fields over the token lattice, providing a semantic and spatially grounded view of dynamic scanning. These results suggest that future Vision SSMs should treat scanning not merely as geometric serialization, but as learned local semantic routing before global state-space modeling.

ai.tldr: 提出GraphScan，一种图诱导的动态扫描算子，通过局部图消息传递增强Vision SSM的局部语义建模，在多个视觉任务上达到最优。
ai.motivation: 现有Vision SSM的扫描算子主要依赖预定义几何路径或坐标插值，缺乏对局部语义邻域显式建模，限制了全局状态空间混合前的局部信息交换。
ai.method: 为每个token构建空间受限的局部图，学习基于特征的条件亲和度并加入相对位置偏置，通过一步消息传递产生输出token，再送入选择性SSM进行全局聚合。
ai.result: 集成到层次化骨干网络GraphScan-Mamba，在图像分类、目标检测、实例分割和语义分割上均达到Vision SSM最优性能，计算开销适度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种将图神经网络与状态空间模型结合的新思路，可用于改进序列化视觉特征表示。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将图消息传递与状态空间模型结合，用于多模态数据（如文本-图像）的联合建模。
idea_spark.risk: 局部图构建和消息传递可能引入额外计算，需平衡效率与性能；图结构学习可能不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受图神经网络在节点分类中的成功启发，将局部语义路由引入序列化模型，替代纯几何扫描。

en.motivation: Existing scan operators for Vision SSMs rely on predefined geometric paths or coordinate interpolation, lacking explicit modeling of local semantic neighborhoods before global state-space mixing.

idea_spark.risk: Local graph construction and message passing may introduce extra computation; graph structure learning could be unstable.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of graph neural networks in node classification, introduces learned local semantic routing to replace purely geometric scanning in sequential models.

papers.title: Convergence Analysis of Hessian-Damped Tikhonov Regularized Dynamics with Oscillation Control for Convex-Concave Bilinear Saddle Point Problems
papers.summary: In this paper, we propose a class of general second-order primal-dual dynamical systems with Tikhonov regularization and Hessian-driven damping for solving convex-concave bilinear saddle point problems. The proposed dynamical system incorporates five general time-varying terms: viscous damping, time scaling, extrapolation, Tikhonov regularization, and Hessian-driven damping parameters. Under suitable parametric conditions, we analyze the asymptotic convergence properties of the dynamical system by constructing appropriate Lyapunov functions. Specifically, we obtain the convergence rate of the primal-dual gap and the boundedness of trajectories in the proposed dynamical system, and provide some integral estimates. Furthermore, we theoretically prove that the trajectories generated by the dynamical system converge strongly to the minimum-norm solution of the saddle point problem, and fully demonstrate that Hessian-driven damping can effectively alleviate oscillations. Finally, numerical experiments are conducted to verify the validity of the above theoretical results.

ai.tldr: 提出了一类带Tikhonov正则化和Hessian阻尼的二阶原始-对偶动力系统，用于求解凸-凹双线性鞍点问题，并分析了其渐近收敛性。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在处理凸-凹双线性鞍点问题时，收敛速度慢且轨迹振荡严重，需要更有效的阻尼机制。
ai.method: 构造包含粘性阻尼、时间缩放、外推、Tikhonov正则化和Hessian阻尼五个时变参数的一般二阶动力系统，通过Lyapunov函数分析收敛性。
ai.result: 获得了原始-对偶间隙的收敛速率和轨迹有界性，证明了轨迹强收敛到最小范数解，并验证了Hessian阻尼能有效缓解振荡。
ai.help_to_user: 为设计高效、稳定的鞍点问题求解算法提供了理论框架和参数选择指导。

idea_spark.idea: 将Hessian阻尼与自适应时间缩放结合，可能进一步提升收敛速度。
idea_spark.risk: 时变参数的选择依赖问题结构，实际应用中可能需要调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受物理振荡系统阻尼机制的启发，将Hessian信息引入优化动力学。

en.tldr: Proposes a class of second-order primal-dual dynamical systems with Tikhonov regularization and Hessian-driven damping for convex-concave bilinear saddle point problems, and analyzes their asymptotic convergence.
en.motivation: Existing methods for convex-concave bilinear saddle point problems suffer from slow convergence and severe trajectory oscillations, requiring more effective damping mechanisms.
en.method: Constructs a general second-order dynamical system with five time-varying parameters: viscous damping, time scaling, extrapolation, Tikhonov regularization, and Hessian-driven damping, and analyzes convergence via Lyapunov functions.
en.result: Obtains convergence rates for the primal-dual gap and boundedness of trajectories, proves strong convergence to the minimum-norm solution, and demonstrates that Hessian-driven damping effectively alleviates oscillations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and parameter selection guidance for designing efficient and stable algorithms for saddle point problems.

idea_spark.idea: Combining Hessian-driven damping with adaptive time scaling may further improve convergence speed.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of time-varying parameters depends on problem structure, potentially requiring tuning in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by damping mechanisms in physical oscillatory systems, incorporating Hessian information into optimization dynamics.

papers.title: Flocking with Multiple Types: Competition, Fluid Limits and Traveling Waves
papers.summary: We study a class of interacting particle systems on $\mathbb{R}$ with two types. Particles evolve by independent jumps sampled from a fixed distribution, with type-dependent jump rates $v_+$, $v_-$ and stochastic type switching driven by non-local order-based interactions. The switching rates depend on the empirical distribution through the proportion of opposite-type particles located ahead, leading to a nonlinear and discontinuous dependence on the empirical measure outside the standard Lipschitz McKean-Vlasov framework. Our first main result is a law of large numbers for the empirical measure process: we prove convergence, along subsequences, to a deterministic measure-valued process characterized by a McKean-Vlasov equation. The proof combines tightness in Wasserstein space with a martingale characterization of limit points. A uniqueness argument based on a Kolmogorov-Smirnov-type distance adapted to the ordering structure yields convergence of the full empirical measure sequence and, in turn, propagation of chaos on finite time intervals. We then study the long-time behavior of the limiting dynamics. Because the system has persistent drift, invariant distributions do not arise; instead, we analyze traveling waves, corresponding to stationary profiles in a moving frame. For exponential jump distributions, the associated non-local integro-differential system admits a local description. In the regime $v_+>v_-=0$, this further reduces to a coupled system of non-linear ODEs, allowing a phase-plane analysis that yields a traveling wave as a heteroclinic orbit connecting two equilibria. We also identify the wave speed and mass partition, and derive tail asymptotics by spectral analysis of the linearized system.

ai.tldr: 研究了两类粒子在实数线上的群集行为，包括竞争、流体极限和行波。
ai.motivation: 理解非标准McKean-Vlasov框架下具有类型依赖跳跃率和非局部排序交互的粒子系统的宏观行为。
ai.method: 通过Wasserstein空间的紧性和鞅刻画证明经验测度的大数定律，利用Kolmogorov-Smirnov型距离证明唯一性，并通过相平面分析和谱分析研究行波。
ai.result: 证明了经验测度过程收敛到确定性测度值过程，并刻画了指数跳跃分布下行波的速度、质量分配和尾部渐近。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了分析具有竞争和类型转换的群集系统的数学框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将行波分析扩展到更一般的跳跃分布或高维空间。
idea_spark.risk: 非线性依赖可能导致解的唯一性或稳定性问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用相平面分析简化非局部系统，启发其他非局部PDE的降维方法。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用相平面分析简化非局部系统，启发其他非局部PDE的降维方法。

en.tldr: We study a class of interacting particle systems on ℝ with two types, including competition, fluid limits, and traveling waves.
en.motivation: To understand the macroscopic behavior of particle systems with type-dependent jump rates and non-local order-based interactions outside the standard Lipschitz McKean-Vlasov framework.
en.method: We prove a law of large numbers for the empirical measure via tightness in Wasserstein space and martingale characterization, establish uniqueness using a Kolmogorov-Smirnov-type distance, and analyze traveling waves via phase-plane analysis and spectral analysis.
en.result: Convergence of the empirical measure process to a deterministic measure-valued process is shown, and for exponential jump distributions, traveling wave speed, mass partition, and tail asymptotics are derived.
en.help_to_user: Provides a mathematical framework for analyzing flocking systems with competition and type switching.

idea_spark.idea: Extend traveling wave analysis to more general jump distributions or higher dimensions.
idea_spark.risk: Nonlinear dependence may cause uniqueness or stability issues.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using phase-plane analysis to simplify non-local systems inspires dimensionality reduction for other non-local PDEs.

papers.title: From Trajectories to Phenotypes: Disease Progression as Structural Priors for Multi-organ Imaging Representation Learning
papers.summary: Imaging-derived phenotypes (IDPs) summarize multi-organ physiology but provide only static snapshots of diseases that evolve over time. In contrast, longitudinal electronic health records encode disease trajectories through temporal dependencies among past diagnosis events and comorbidity structure. We hypothesize that IDPs and disease trajectories contain partially shared disease-relevant structure. We propose a trajectory-aware distillation framework that transfers structural knowledge from a generative disease trajectory Transformer into an organ-wise IDP encoder. A population-scale trajectory model trained on longitudinal diagnosis sequences produces subject-level embeddings that supervise IDP representation learning via geometry-preserving alignment. During downstream prediction, trajectory and imaging representations can also be fused via cross-attention. Across 159 diseases in the UK Biobank cohort, trajectory-aware pretraining consistently improves both discrimination (AUC) and time-to-onset prediction (MAE), with the largest gains for low-prevalence diseases. Similarity relationships in IDP embedding space also align with those in trajectory space, providing supportive evidence for partially aligned representation geometry. These results suggest that population-scale generative disease models can serve as structural priors for data-limited imaging modalities, improving robustness under realistic cohort constraints.

ai.tldr: 提出轨迹感知蒸馏框架，利用生成式疾病轨迹模型的结构知识指导多器官影像表征学习，在UK Biobank的159种疾病上提升了判别和发病时间预测性能。
ai.motivation: 影像衍生表型仅提供静态快照，而纵向电子健康记录蕴含疾病随时间演化的轨迹信息，两者存在部分共享的疾病相关结构。
ai.method: 训练一个基于Transformer的生成式疾病轨迹模型，产生受试者级嵌入；通过几何保持对齐将轨迹结构知识蒸馏到器官级影像编码器中；下游预测时还可通过交叉注意力融合轨迹与影像表征。
ai.result: 在UK Biobank的159种疾病上，轨迹感知预训练一致提升了AUC和平均绝对误差，对低患病率疾病增益最大；影像嵌入空间的相似性关系与轨迹空间对齐。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用大规模纵向诊断数据作为结构先验，提升数据有限的多器官影像表征的鲁棒性和预测能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将生成式疾病轨迹模型作为结构先验，通过几何保持对齐指导影像表征学习，并支持多模态融合。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量纵向诊断数据，且生成式模型可能引入偏差；跨人群泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用大规模时序模型的结构知识增强静态影像表征，为多模态医学AI提供新范式。

en.tldr: Proposes a trajectory-aware distillation framework that transfers structural knowledge from a generative disease trajectory Transformer to multi-organ imaging representation learning, improving discrimination and time-to-onset prediction across 159 diseases in UK Biobank.
en.motivation: Imaging-derived phenotypes provide static snapshots, while longitudinal EHRs encode disease trajectories; they share partially disease-relevant structure that can be leveraged.
en.method: Train a generative disease trajectory Transformer to produce subject-level embeddings; distill trajectory structural knowledge into an organ-wise IDP encoder via geometry-preserving alignment; optionally fuse trajectory and imaging representations via cross-attention for downstream tasks.
en.result: Trajectory-aware pretraining consistently improves AUC and MAE across 159 diseases in UK Biobank, with largest gains for low-prevalence diseases; similarity relationships in IDP embedding space align with those in trajectory space.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage large-scale longitudinal diagnosis data as structural priors to improve robustness and predictive performance of data-limited multi-organ imaging representations.

idea_spark.idea: Use a generative disease trajectory model as a structural prior to guide imaging representation learning via geometry-preserving alignment, with optional multimodal fusion.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality longitudinal diagnosis data; generative models may introduce bias; generalizability across populations needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging structural knowledge from large-scale temporal models to enhance static imaging representations offers a new paradigm for multimodal medical AI.

papers.title: Stochastic block coordinate and function alternation for multi-objective optimization and learning
papers.summary: Multi-objective optimization is central to many engineering and machine learning applications, where multiple objectives must be optimized in balance. While multi-gradient based optimization methods combine these objectives in each step, such methods require computing gradients with respect to all variables at every iteration, resulting in high computational costs in large-scale settings. In this work, we propose a framework that simultaneously alternates the optimization of each objective and the (stochastic) gradient update with respect to each variable block. Our framework reduces per-iteration computational cost while enabling exploration of the Pareto front by allocating a prescribed number of gradient steps to each objective. We establish rigorous convergence guarantees across several stochastic smooth settings, including convex, non-convex, and Polyak-Lojasiewicz conditions, recovering classical convergence rates of single-objective methods. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms non-alternating methods on multi-target regression and produces a competitive Pareto front approximation, highlighting its computational efficiency and practical effectiveness.

ai.tldr: 提出一种随机块坐标与函数交替框架，通过交替优化每个目标和随机梯度更新，降低多目标优化计算成本，并保证收敛性。
ai.motivation: 多目标优化中，传统多梯度方法每步需计算所有变量梯度，在大规模场景下计算成本高。
ai.method: 同时交替优化每个目标和随机梯度更新，每次迭代只更新部分变量块，并分配预设梯度步数给每个目标。
ai.result: 在凸、非凸和Polyak-Lojasiewicz条件下证明收敛率，数值实验显示优于非交替方法，且能有效逼近Pareto前沿。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过交替策略降低多目标优化计算开销，同时保持收敛性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将块坐标更新与目标交替结合，可能启发设计更高效的分布式或异步多目标优化算法。
idea_spark.risk: 交替策略可能引入额外超参数（如梯度步数分配），需谨慎调优以避免收敛变慢。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受随机块坐标下降和交替方向乘子法启发，将交替思想从单目标扩展到多目标场景。

zh.tldr: 提出一种随机块坐标与函数交替框架，通过交替优化每个目标和随机梯度更新，降低多目标优化计算成本，并保证收敛性。
zh.motivation: 多目标优化中，传统多梯度方法每步需计算所有变量梯度，在大规模场景下计算成本高。
zh.method: 同时交替优化每个目标和随机梯度更新，每次迭代只更新部分变量块，并分配预设梯度步数给每个目标。
zh.result: 在凸、非凸和Polyak-Lojasiewicz条件下证明收敛率，数值实验显示优于非交替方法，且能有效逼近Pareto前沿。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过交替策略降低多目标优化计算开销，同时保持收敛性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将块坐标更新与目标交替结合，可能启发设计更高效的分布式或异步多目标优化算法。
idea_spark.risk: 交替策略可能引入额外超参数（如梯度步数分配），需谨慎调优以避免收敛变慢。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受随机块坐标下降和交替方向乘子法启发，将交替思想从单目标扩展到多目标场景。

en.tldr: Proposes a stochastic block coordinate and function alternation framework that reduces per-iteration cost in multi-objective optimization by alternating objective optimization and stochastic gradient updates, with convergence guarantees.
en.motivation: Traditional multi-gradient methods require computing gradients for all variables at each iteration, leading to high computational costs in large-scale settings.
en.method: Simultaneously alternates the optimization of each objective and the stochastic gradient update with respect to each variable block, allocating a prescribed number of gradient steps per objective.
en.result: Establishes convergence rates under convex, non-convex, and Polyak-Lojasiewicz conditions; numerical experiments show outperformance over non-alternating methods and competitive Pareto front approximation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how alternating strategies can reduce computational overhead in multi-objective optimization while maintaining convergence.

idea_spark.idea: Combining block coordinate updates with objective alternation may inspire efficient distributed or asynchronous multi-objective optimization algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Alternation introduces extra hyperparameters (e.g., gradient step allocation) that require careful tuning to avoid slower convergence.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by stochastic block coordinate descent and alternating direction method of multipliers, extending alternation from single-objective to multi-objective settings.

papers.title: CVEvolve: Autonomous Algorithm Discovery for Unstructured Scientific Data Processing
papers.summary: Scientific data processing often requires task-specific algorithms or AI models, creating a barrier for domain scientists who need to analyze their data but may not have extensive computing or image-processing expertise. This barrier is especially pronounced when data are noisy, have a high dynamic range, are sparsely labeled, or are only loosely specified. We introduce CVEvolve, an autonomous agentic harness with a zero-code interface for scientific data-processing algorithm discovery. CVEvolve combines a multi-round search strategy with tools for code execution, evaluation implementation, history management, holdout testing, and optional inspection of scientific data and visual outputs. The search alternates between discovery and improvement actions, and uses lineage-aware stochastic candidate sampling to balance exploration and exploitation. We demonstrate CVEvolve on x-ray fluorescence microscopy image registration, Bragg peak detection, and high-energy diffraction microscopy image segmentation. Across these tasks, CVEvolve discovers algorithms that improve over baseline methods, while holdout test tracking helps identify candidates that generalize better than later over-optimized alternatives. These results show that zero-code, autonomous LLM-powered algorithm development can help domain scientists turn unstructured scientific image data into practical algorithms and downstream scientific discoveries.

ai.tldr: 提出CVEvolve，一个零代码自主智能体框架，用于自动发现科学数据处理算法，在多个显微成像任务上超越基线方法。
ai.motivation: 领域科学家处理噪声、高动态范围、稀疏标注或松散指定的科学数据时，缺乏计算和图像处理专业知识，现有方法需要任务特定算法或AI模型，形成障碍。
ai.method: CVEvolve结合多轮搜索策略与代码执行、评估实现、历史管理、保留测试等工具，通过交替发现与改进动作，并采用谱系感知随机候选采样平衡探索与利用。
ai.result: 在X射线荧光显微图像配准、布拉格峰检测和高能衍射显微图像分割任务中，CVEvolve发现的算法优于基线方法，保留测试有助于识别泛化更好的候选。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户无需编程即可自动生成适用于其科学图像数据的处理算法，降低算法开发门槛。

idea_spark.idea: 将CVEvolve扩展到多模态科学数据融合，或结合主动学习进一步减少人工标注需求。
idea_spark.risk: 自动发现算法可能过拟合特定数据集，需依赖保留测试和多样化任务验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 零代码接口与自主搜索的结合，启发开发面向非专家用户的通用科学数据自动化分析平台。

en.tldr: Proposes CVEvolve, a zero-code autonomous agentic framework for automatic discovery of scientific data processing algorithms, outperforming baselines on multiple microscopy tasks.
en.motivation: Domain scientists face barriers when analyzing noisy, high-dynamic-range, sparsely labeled, or loosely specified scientific data due to lack of computing and image-processing expertise, as existing methods require task-specific algorithms or AI models.
en.method: CVEvolve combines a multi-round search strategy with tools for code execution, evaluation implementation, history management, and holdout testing, alternating between discovery and improvement actions, and uses lineage-aware stochastic candidate sampling to balance exploration and exploitation.
en.result: On x-ray fluorescence microscopy image registration, Bragg peak detection, and high-energy diffraction microscopy image segmentation, CVEvolve discovers algorithms that improve over baseline methods, with holdout testing helping identify better-generalizing candidates.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically generate processing algorithms tailored to their scientific image data without coding, lowering the barrier to algorithm development.

idea_spark.idea: Extend CVEvolve to multimodal scientific data fusion, or incorporate active learning to further reduce manual annotation needs.
idea_spark.risk: Automatically discovered algorithms may overfit specific datasets; reliance on holdout testing and diverse task validation is needed to ensure generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: The combination of zero-code interface and autonomous search inspires the development of general-purpose scientific data automation analysis platforms for non-expert users.

papers.title: Breathing and Rotobreathing Cyclops States in Phase Oscillators with Inertia and Two-Harmonic Coupling
papers.summary: Cyclops states - three-cluster configurations consisting of two synchronous groups and a solitary oscillator - dominate in ensembles of phase oscillators with inertia and multiple coupling harmonics [Phys. Rev. E 109, 054202 (2024)]. In this work, for the first time, we systematically study nonstationary cyclops states that preserve the three-cluster structure: breathing and rotobreathing cyclops states. We identify two scenarios for their destabilization: period doubling, leading to quasicyclops states while preserving frequency synchronization within the clusters, and the destruction of one or two clusters, resulting in the emergence of switching cyclops or multicluster states. We show that breathing and rotobreathing cyclops states occupy vast parameter regions of the second coupling harmonic and are key elements of the dynamics. The results are important for predicting and controlling complex collective states in ensembles with higher-order interaction harmonics of various natures.

ai.tldr: 首次系统研究了具有惯性和双谐波耦合的相位振子中非平稳的呼吸和旋转呼吸独眼巨人态，揭示了其失稳机制及在参数空间中的广泛存在。
ai.motivation: 先前工作发现了静态独眼巨人态，但非平稳的呼吸和旋转呼吸态尚未被系统研究，理解它们对预测和控制复杂集体态至关重要。
ai.method: 通过数值模拟和理论分析，识别了两种失稳场景：倍周期分岔导致准独眼巨人态，以及簇破坏导致切换独眼巨人或多簇态。
ai.result: 呼吸和旋转呼吸独眼巨人态占据第二耦合谐波的大片参数区域，是动力学关键要素。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解具有高阶相互作用的振子系统中复杂集体行为的形成与转变机制。

idea_spark.idea: 利用第二谐波耦合强度作为控制参数，设计可切换的同步模式。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中高阶耦合项可能难以精确调控。
idea_spark.inspiration: 倍周期失稳路径提示可通过微扰诱导系统在准独眼巨人态与多簇态间切换。

zh.tldr: 首次系统研究了具有惯性和双谐波耦合的相位振子中非平稳的呼吸和旋转呼吸独眼巨人态，揭示了其失稳机制及在参数空间中的广泛存在。
zh.motivation: 先前工作发现了静态独眼巨人态，但非平稳的呼吸和旋转呼吸态尚未被系统研究，理解它们对预测和控制复杂集体态至关重要。
zh.method: 通过数值模拟和理论分析，识别了两种失稳场景：倍周期分岔导致准独眼巨人态，以及簇破坏导致切换独眼巨人或多簇态。
zh.result: 呼吸和旋转呼吸独眼巨人态占据第二耦合谐波的大片参数区域，是动力学关键要素。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解具有高阶相互作用的振子系统中复杂集体行为的形成与转变机制。

idea_spark.idea: 利用第二谐波耦合强度作为控制参数，设计可切换的同步模式。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中高阶耦合项可能难以精确调控。
idea_spark.inspiration: 倍周期失稳路径提示可通过微扰诱导系统在准独眼巨人态与多簇态间切换。

en.tldr: First systematic study of nonstationary breathing and rotobreathing cyclops states in phase oscillators with inertia and two-harmonic coupling, revealing their destabilization mechanisms and wide parameter regions.
en.motivation: Previous work identified static cyclops states, but nonstationary breathing and rotobreathing variants remained unexplored; understanding them is crucial for predicting and controlling complex collective states.
en.method: Numerical simulations and theoretical analysis identified two destabilization scenarios: period doubling leading to quasicyclops states, and cluster destruction leading to switching cyclops or multicluster states.
en.result: Breathing and rotobreathing cyclops states occupy vast parameter regions of the second coupling harmonic and are key dynamical elements.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the formation and transition of complex collective behaviors in oscillator systems with higher-order interactions.

idea_spark.idea: Use the second harmonic coupling strength as a control parameter to design switchable synchronization patterns.
idea_spark.risk: Higher-order coupling terms may be difficult to precisely tune in real systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: The period-doubling destabilization path suggests that perturbations can induce switching between quasicyclops and multicluster states.

papers.title: Convergence of Lorentzian spaces and curvature bounds for generalized cones
papers.summary: The goal of this article is twofold. We introduce a notion of convergence for Lorentzian pre-length spaces, $\ell$-convergence, that extends previous convergence notions in this context. We show that timelike curvature and timelike curvature-dimension bounds are stable under (measured) $\ell$-convergence. Then, we show that $\ell$-convergence is well adapted for generalized Lorentzian cones: a sequence of generalized cones $-I_i\times_{f_i}X_i$ converges in $\ell$ sense if the base $I_i$ and the fiber $X_i$ converge in GH sense and the functions $f_i$ converge uniformly. We use this to show sharp timelike curvature and timelike curvature-dimension bounds for such cones. Finally, we obtain a pre-compactness theorem for $\ell$-convergence in the class of smooth generalized cones that have a uniform lower bound on the full Ricci (or Riemann) curvature tensor.

ai.tldr: 本文引入洛伦兹预长度空间的ℓ-收敛概念，证明类时曲率和类时曲率-维数边界在ℓ-收敛下稳定，并应用于广义洛伦兹锥，得到尖锐的曲率边界和预紧性定理。
ai.motivation: 现有洛伦兹空间收敛概念有限，需要一种能保持曲率边界的收敛框架，并适用于广义锥结构。
ai.method: 定义ℓ-收敛，证明其稳定性，然后通过基空间和纤维的Gromov-Hausdorff收敛以及函数的均匀收敛，将ℓ-收敛应用于广义洛伦兹锥。
ai.result: 广义洛伦兹锥在ℓ-收敛下具有尖锐的类时曲率和曲率-维数边界，并得到光滑广义锥类的预紧性定理。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解洛伦兹几何中收敛概念与曲率边界的稳定性，以及广义锥的几何性质。

idea_spark.idea: 利用基和纤维的收敛来构造整体空间的收敛，可能用于研究更复杂的乘积或纤维化时空。
idea_spark.risk: 需要验证ℓ-收敛在其他设定下是否保持曲率边界，且广义锥的假设可能限制应用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将空间分解为基和纤维，分别处理收敛，再组合，这种模块化思路可启发其他几何或物理问题的收敛分析。

en.tldr: This paper introduces ℓ-convergence for Lorentzian pre-length spaces, proves stability of timelike curvature and curvature-dimension bounds under ℓ-convergence, and applies it to generalized Lorentzian cones, yielding sharp curvature bounds and a pre-compactness theorem.
en.motivation: Existing convergence notions for Lorentzian spaces are limited; a framework that preserves curvature bounds and applies to generalized cones is needed.
en.method: Define ℓ-convergence, prove its stability, then apply it to generalized Lorentzian cones via Gromov-Hausdorff convergence of base and fiber and uniform convergence of warping functions.
en.result: Generalized Lorentzian cones satisfy sharp timelike curvature and curvature-dimension bounds under ℓ-convergence, and a pre-compactness theorem for smooth generalized cones is obtained.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand convergence in Lorentzian geometry, stability of curvature bounds, and geometric properties of generalized cones.

idea_spark.idea: Use convergence of base and fiber to construct convergence of total space, potentially for more complex product or fibered spacetimes.
idea_spark.risk: Need to verify ℓ-convergence preserves curvature bounds in other settings; assumptions on generalized cones may limit applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing space into base and fiber, handling convergence separately, then combining—this modular approach can inspire convergence analysis in other geometric or physical problems.

papers.title: Interactive State Space Model with Cross-Modal Local Scanning for Depth Super-Resolution
papers.summary: Guided depth super-resolution (GDSR) reconstructs HR depth maps from LR inputs with HR RGB guidance. Existing methods either model each modality independently or rely on computationally expensive attention mechanisms with quadratic complexity, hindering the establishment of efficient and semantically interactive joint representations. In this paper, we observe that feature maps from different modalities exhibit semantic-level correlations during feature extraction. This motivates us to develop a more flexible approach enabling dense, semantically-aware deep interactions between modalities. To this end, we propose a novel GDSR framework centered around the Interactive State Space Model. Specifically, we design a cross-modal local scanning mechanism that enables fine-grained semantic interactions between RGB and depth features. Leveraging the Mamba architecture, our framework achieves global modeling with linear complexity. Furthermore, a cross-modal matching transform module is introduced to enhance interactive modeling quality by utilizing representative features from both modalities. Extensive experiments demonstrate competitive performance against state-of-the-art methods.

ai.tldr: 提出基于交互式状态空间模型的引导深度超分辨率框架，通过跨模态局部扫描实现线性复杂度的全局建模。
ai.motivation: 现有方法或独立建模各模态，或依赖二次复杂度的注意力机制，难以建立高效且语义交互的联合表示。
ai.method: 设计跨模态局部扫描机制实现RGB与深度特征的细粒度语义交互，并引入跨模态匹配变换模块增强交互质量。
ai.result: 在多个数据集上达到与最先进方法竞争的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、语义感知的深度超分辨率新思路，适用于资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将Mamba架构用于多模态交互，替代传统注意力机制。
idea_spark.risk: 跨模态扫描的局部性可能限制长距离依赖建模。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用状态空间模型线性复杂度优势，设计跨模态交互机制。

zh.tldr: 提出基于交互式状态空间模型的引导深度超分辨率框架，通过跨模态局部扫描实现线性复杂度的全局建模。

idea_spark.risk: 跨模态扫描的局部性可能限制长距离依赖建模。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用状态空间模型线性复杂度优势，设计跨模态交互机制。

en.tldr: Proposes an Interactive State Space Model for guided depth super-resolution, achieving global modeling with linear complexity via cross-modal local scanning.
en.motivation: Existing methods either model modalities independently or rely on quadratic-complexity attention, hindering efficient and semantically interactive joint representations.
en.method: Designs a cross-modal local scanning mechanism for fine-grained semantic interaction between RGB and depth features, and introduces a cross-modal matching transform module.
en.result: Achieves competitive performance against state-of-the-art methods on multiple benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, semantically-aware approach to depth super-resolution suitable for resource-constrained settings.

idea_spark.idea: Replace traditional attention with Mamba architecture for multi-modal interaction.
idea_spark.risk: Locality of cross-modal scanning may limit long-range dependency modeling.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage linear complexity advantage of state space models to design cross-modal interaction mechanisms.

papers.title: DiffSegLung: Diffusion Radiomic Distillation for Unsupervised Lung Pathology Segmentation
papers.summary: Unsupervised segmentation of pulmonary pathologies in CT remains an open challenge due to the absence of annotated multi pathology cohorts and the failure of existing diffusion-based methods to exploit the quantitative Hounsfield Unit (HU) signal that physically distinguishes tissue classes. To address this, we propose DiffSegLung,a framework that introduces Diffusion Radiomic Distillation, in which handcrafted radiomic descriptors serve as a physics grounded teacher to shape the bottleneck of a 3D diffusion U-Net via a contrastive objective, transferring pathology discriminative structure into the learned representation without any annotations. At inference, the teacher is discarded and multitimestep bottleneck features are clustered by a Gaussian Mixture Model with HU-guided label assignment, followed by Sobel Diffusion Fusion for boundary refinement. Evaluated on 190 expert annotated axial slices drawn from four heterogeneous CT cohorts, Diff-SegLung improves segmentation across all four pathology classes over unsupervised baselines and improves generation fidelity over prior CT diffusion models.

ai.tldr: 提出DiffSegLung框架，通过扩散放射组学蒸馏实现无监督肺部病理分割，在四个CT数据集上优于基线。
ai.motivation: 现有无监督方法缺乏标注数据，且扩散模型未能利用CT的HU值物理信号。
ai.method: 以手工放射组学描述符作为教师，通过对比目标塑造3D扩散U-Net瓶颈；推理时用高斯混合模型聚类多时间步特征，结合HU引导标签分配和Sobel扩散融合细化边界。
ai.result: 在190张专家标注切片上，所有四类病理分割均优于无监督基线，生成保真度也超过先前CT扩散模型。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需标注即可分割肺部病理的实用方法，适用于多中心CT数据。

idea_spark.idea: 将手工特征作为物理先验融入扩散模型瓶颈，替代传统监督信号。
idea_spark.risk: 手工放射组学特征可能无法覆盖所有病理模式，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用物理可解释的HU值引导聚类，避免依赖人工标注。

zh.tldr: 提出DiffSegLung框架，通过扩散放射组学蒸馏实现无监督肺部病理分割，在四个CT数据集上优于基线。
zh.motivation: 现有无监督方法缺乏标注数据，且扩散模型未能利用CT的HU值物理信号。
zh.method: 以手工放射组学描述符作为教师，通过对比目标塑造3D扩散U-Net瓶颈；推理时用高斯混合模型聚类多时间步特征，结合HU引导标签分配和Sobel扩散融合细化边界。
zh.result: 在190张专家标注切片上，所有四类病理分割均优于无监督基线，生成保真度也超过先前CT扩散模型。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需标注即可分割肺部病理的实用方法，适用于多中心CT数据。

idea_spark.idea: 将手工特征作为物理先验融入扩散模型瓶颈，替代传统监督信号。
idea_spark.risk: 手工放射组学特征可能无法覆盖所有病理模式，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用物理可解释的HU值引导聚类，避免依赖人工标注。

en.tldr: Proposes DiffSegLung, a framework using diffusion radiomic distillation for unsupervised lung pathology segmentation, outperforming baselines on four CT cohorts.
en.motivation: Existing unsupervised methods lack annotations and fail to exploit the quantitative HU signal in CT.
en.method: Handcrafted radiomic descriptors act as a teacher via contrastive objective to shape the bottleneck of a 3D diffusion U-Net; at inference, multi-timestep features are clustered by GMM with HU-guided label assignment and refined by Sobel Diffusion Fusion.
en.result: On 190 expert-annotated slices, segmentation improves across all four pathology classes over unsupervised baselines, and generation fidelity surpasses prior CT diffusion models.
en.help_to_user: Provides an annotation-free method for lung pathology segmentation, applicable to multi-center CT data.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate handcrafted features as physics priors into the diffusion model bottleneck, replacing traditional supervision.
idea_spark.risk: Handcrafted radiomic features may not cover all pathological patterns; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage physically interpretable HU values to guide clustering, avoiding reliance on manual annotations.

papers.title: A non-local singular non-linear Fokker-Planck PDE
papers.summary: The focus of this paper is a non-local singular non-linear Fokker-Planck partial differential equation (PDE). The peculiarity of this PDE feature is in its divergence coefficient, which presents a product between a Besov distribution and a non-linearity. The latter involves the convolution between an integrable kernel K and the solution of the PDE, which leads to a non-locality of the first order term in the PDE. We prove existence and uniqueness of a solution to the PDE as well as continuity results on its coefficients. Previous analytical results are then applied to the study of well-posedness in law for a non-local singular McKean stochastic differential equation. As byproduct of that probabilistic representation, we establish mass conservation and positivity preserving for the PDE.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一类非局部奇异非线性Fokker-Planck偏微分方程，其散度系数包含Besov分布与非线性项的乘积，非线性项涉及可积核与解的卷积。证明了解的存在唯一性及系数连续性，并将结果应用于非局部奇异McKean随机微分方程的适定性，同时建立了质量守恒和保正性。
ai.motivation: 现有Fokker-Planck方程理论多针对局部或规则系数，而实际物理和随机过程常出现非局部、奇异或非线性的耦合结构，需要发展相应的分析工具。
ai.method: 利用泛函分析和概率表示相结合的方法：先通过PDE分析证明解的存在唯一性和系数连续性，再借助McKean SDE的概率表示推导质量守恒和保正性。
ai.result: 证明了该非局部奇异非线性Fokker-Planck PDE解的存在唯一性及系数连续性；进而得到非局部奇异McKean SDE的适定性，并建立了质量守恒和保正性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理具有非局部奇异非线性耦合的Fokker-Planck型方程提供了严格的分析框架，可用于相关随机模型和物理系统的理论验证。

idea_spark.idea: 将Besov分布与非线性卷积耦合的结构推广到更一般的奇异核（如Riesz势、对数核），并研究其对应的随机微分方程的弱唯一性和大偏差原理。
idea_spark.risk: 奇异核可能破坏解的正则性或导致非唯一性，需要更精细的函数空间和正则性估计；概率表示可能依赖于特定的核条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受非局部项与奇异分布乘积的启发，可探索将此类结构用于建模具有长程相互作用和随机扰动的复杂系统（如群体动力学、神经场模型）。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了一类非局部奇异非线性Fokker-Planck偏微分方程，其散度系数包含Besov分布与非线性项的乘积，非线性项涉及可积核与解的卷积。证明了解的存在唯一性及系数连续性，并将结果应用于非局部奇异McKean随机微分方程的适定性，同时建立了质量守恒和保正性。

en.tldr: This paper studies a non-local singular non-linear Fokker-Planck PDE whose divergence coefficient involves a product of a Besov distribution and a nonlinearity with a convolution kernel. Existence, uniqueness, and continuity of coefficients are proved, and the results are applied to well-posedness of a non-local singular McKean SDE, establishing mass conservation and positivity preservation.
en.motivation: Existing Fokker-Planck theory mostly deals with local or regular coefficients, while many physical and stochastic processes involve nonlocal, singular, or nonlinear couplings that require new analytical tools.
en.method: A combination of functional analysis and probabilistic representation: first prove existence, uniqueness, and coefficient continuity for the PDE, then use the McKean SDE representation to derive mass conservation and positivity preservation.
en.result: Existence, uniqueness, and coefficient continuity are proved for the non-local singular nonlinear Fokker-Planck PDE; well-posedness of the corresponding non-local singular McKean SDE is established, along with mass conservation and positivity preservation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous analytical framework for Fokker-Planck-type equations with nonlocal singular nonlinear couplings, useful for theoretical validation of related stochastic models and physical systems.

idea_spark.idea: Generalize the coupling of Besov distribution with nonlinear convolution to more singular kernels (e.g., Riesz potentials, logarithmic kernels) and study weak uniqueness and large deviations for the associated SDEs.
idea_spark.risk: Singular kernels may destroy solution regularity or cause non-uniqueness, requiring finer function spaces and regularity estimates; the probabilistic representation may depend on specific kernel conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the product of nonlocal terms and singular distributions, this structure could model complex systems with long-range interactions and stochastic perturbations, such as collective dynamics or neural field models.

papers.title: Explicit determination of a class of permutation rational functions in any characteristic
papers.summary: In this paper, we make use of the classification results of low-degree permutation rational functions together with their geometric properties to investigate rational functions that induce permutations on the multiplicative subgroup mu_q+1, where q is a prime power. By carefully analyzing the structural conditions under which such rational functions permute muq+1, we obtain an explicit description of a broad class of permutation rational functions of small degree. As a direct application of these findings, we explicitly determine many permutation quadrinomials over Fq2 that are induced by degree-3 rational functions permuting muq+1. Our approach not only unifies and extends several existing results in the literature but also provides a concrete geometric perspective for characterizing permutation polynomials over Fq2.

ai.tldr: 本文利用低次置换有理函数的分类结果及其几何性质，研究了在乘法子群μ_{q+1}上诱导置换的有理函数，并显式描述了一类小次数置换有理函数，进而确定了F_{q^2}上的许多置换四项式。
ai.motivation: 统一并推广现有关于F_{q^2}上置换多项式的结论，提供几何视角来刻画置换多项式。
ai.method: 基于低次置换有理函数的分类结果，结合几何性质分析结构条件，得到显式描述，并应用于次数为3的有理函数。
ai.result: 显式确定了一类由次数为3的置换有理函数诱导的F_{q^2}上的置换四项式。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解有限域上置换多项式的构造与分类，提供几何视角的分析方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用几何性质简化置换有理函数的分类与构造。
idea_spark.risk: 几何方法可能对高次或复杂结构的有理函数不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将几何观点引入置换函数研究，可能发现新的置换多项式族。

en.tldr: This paper uses classification results of low-degree permutation rational functions and their geometric properties to study rational functions permuting the multiplicative subgroup μ_{q+1}, explicitly describes a broad class of small-degree permutation rational functions, and determines many permutation quadrinomials over F_{q^2} induced by degree-3 rational functions.
en.motivation: To unify and extend existing results on permutation polynomials over F_{q^2} and provide a geometric perspective for characterizing them.
en.method: Based on classification of low-degree permutation rational functions, combined with geometric properties to analyze structural conditions, yielding explicit descriptions applied to degree-3 rational functions.
en.result: Explicit determination of many permutation quadrinomials over F_{q^2} induced by degree-3 permutation rational functions.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the construction and classification of permutation polynomials over finite fields, offering a geometric analysis approach.

idea_spark.idea: Use geometric properties to simplify classification and construction of permutation rational functions.
idea_spark.risk: Geometric methods may not apply to high-degree or complex rational functions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing geometric viewpoints into permutation function research may reveal new families of permutation polynomials.

papers.title: A min-max gap characterization of minimal foliations on the torus
papers.summary: We extend an energy introduced by Mather to the setting of Almgren-Pitts min-max theory and obtain a parametric, higher-dimensional analogue of Mather's variational barrier theory for twist maps and geodesics on tori. We use this energy to establish several criteria for the existence of foliations of the $n$-torus by minimal hypersurfaces. We show that for a generic metric, whenever a lamination by area-minimizing hypersurfaces of the $n$-torus contains a gap, there exists a minimal hypersurface inside the gap that is not area-minimizing. As an application, we derive a recurrence property for totally irrational minimal foliations.

ai.tldr: 将Mather能量推广到Almgren-Pitts极小极大理论，建立了环面上极小超曲面叶状结构存在的判据，并证明了在一般度量下，若面积极小超曲面层状结构存在间隙，则间隙内存在非面积极小的极小超曲面。
ai.motivation: 研究环面上极小超曲面叶状结构的间隙特征，推广Mather变分势垒理论到高维参数化情形。
ai.method: 引入Mather能量，结合Almgren-Pitts极小极大理论，构造参数化高维类比，分析间隙内极小超曲面的存在性。
ai.result: 对一般度量，若面积极小超曲面层状结构有间隙，则间隙内存在非面积极小的极小超曲面；并导出完全无理极小叶状结构的递归性质。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了环面上极小超曲面叶状结构间隙的刻画工具，有助于理解高维变分问题中的间隙现象。

idea_spark.idea: 利用间隙内非面积极小极小超曲面的存在性，设计新的变分算法或构造反例。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下间隙结构的几何复杂性可能导致构造不唯一或计算困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将低维动力系统变分势垒思想引入高维几何测度论，启发跨领域方法融合。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将低维动力系统变分势垒思想引入高维几何测度论，启发跨领域方法融合。

en.tldr: We extend Mather's energy to Almgren-Pitts min-max theory, establishing criteria for foliations of the n-torus by minimal hypersurfaces, and show that for a generic metric, a gap in an area-minimizing lamination contains a non-area-minimizing minimal hypersurface.
en.motivation: To characterize gaps in minimal foliations on the torus and generalize Mather's variational barrier theory to higher-dimensional parametric settings.
en.method: Introduce Mather's energy into Almgren-Pitts min-max theory, constructing a parametric higher-dimensional analogue and analyzing the existence of minimal hypersurfaces within gaps.
en.result: For a generic metric, if an area-minimizing lamination has a gap, there exists a non-area-minimizing minimal hypersurface inside the gap; also derive a recurrence property for totally irrational minimal foliations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a tool for characterizing gaps in minimal foliations on the torus, aiding understanding of gap phenomena in higher-dimensional variational problems.

idea_spark.idea: Use the existence of non-area-minimizing minimal hypersurfaces in gaps to design new variational algorithms or construct counterexamples.
idea_spark.risk: Geometric complexity of gap structures in higher dimensions may lead to non-uniqueness or computational difficulties.
idea_spark.inspiration: Bringing variational barrier ideas from low-dimensional dynamics into high-dimensional geometric measure theory inspires cross-domain method fusion.

papers.title: A degenerate reaction-diffusion SIR model in interconnected regions
papers.summary: This paper presents a novel time-space SIR (Susceptible-Infected-Recovered) model for simulating infectious disease dynamics in two interconnected regions. The model is formulated as a coupled reaction-diffusion system with boundary conditions that dynamically switch from Robin to Neumann types, effectively modelling policy-driven interventions such as lockdowns. A key innovation lies in the incorporation of degenerate diffusion, arising from vanishing population density, which significantly influences transmission behaviour near regional borders. The wellposedness of the model is rigorously established using the Faedo-Galerkin method, ensuring the existence, uniqueness, and positivity of weak solutions. Numerical simulations, performed using the Finite Volume Method, validate the theoretical findings and demonstrate the impact of migration and mobility restrictions on epidemic progression. This framework offers valuable insights for understanding and controlling disease spread in spatially heterogeneous and interconnected settings.

ai.tldr: 提出一个在相互连接区域中带有退化扩散的反应-扩散SIR模型，用于模拟传染病动态。
ai.motivation: 现有模型难以同时处理区域间耦合、政策干预（如封锁）以及因人口密度消失导致的退化扩散效应。
ai.method: 采用Robin到Neumann动态切换边界条件，通过Faedo-Galerkin方法证明弱解的存在唯一性和正性，并用有限体积法进行数值模拟。
ai.result: 模型严格适定，数值实验验证了迁移和流动性限制对疫情传播的显著影响。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解空间异质且相互连接区域中传染病传播机制，为政策制定提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将模型扩展至多区域网络，并引入随机扰动以模拟不确定性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型参数校准需要实际疫情数据，数据不足可能导致预测偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理中的退化扩散现象获得灵感，将人口密度消失类比为材料中的孔隙度变化。

zh.tldr: 提出一个在相互连接区域中带有退化扩散的反应-扩散SIR模型，用于模拟传染病动态。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将模型扩展至多区域网络，并引入随机扰动以模拟不确定性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型参数校准需要实际疫情数据，数据不足可能导致预测偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理中的退化扩散现象获得灵感，将人口密度消失类比为材料中的孔隙度变化。

en.tldr: A degenerate reaction-diffusion SIR model for two interconnected regions with dynamic boundary conditions simulating lockdowns.
en.motivation: Existing models cannot simultaneously handle inter-region coupling, policy interventions, and degenerate diffusion due to vanishing population density.
en.method: Robin-to-Neumann switching boundary conditions; Faedo-Galerkin method for wellposedness; Finite Volume Method for numerical simulation.
en.result: Model is well-posed; numerical experiments show significant impact of migration and mobility restrictions on epidemic progression.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into disease spread in spatially heterogeneous interconnected settings and supports policy design.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the model to multi-region networks and incorporate stochastic perturbations to account for uncertainty.
idea_spark.risk: Model calibration requires real epidemic data; insufficient data may lead to biased predictions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by degenerate diffusion in physics, where vanishing population density is analogous to porosity changes in materials.

papers.title: On the Importance of Multistability for Horizon Generalization in Reinforcement Learning
papers.summary: In reinforcement learning (RL), agents acting in partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) must rely on memory, typically encoded in a recurrent neural network (RNN), to integrate information from past observations. Long-horizon POMDPs, in which the relevant observation and the optimal action are separated by many time steps (called the horizon), are particularly challenging: training suffers from poor generalization, severe sample inefficiency, and prohibitive exploration costs. Ideally, an agent trained on short horizons would retain optimal behavior at arbitrarily longer ones, but no formal framework currently characterizes when this is achievable. To fill this gap, we formalized temporal horizon generalization, the property that a policy remains optimal for all horizons, derived a necessary and sufficient condition for it, and experimentally evaluated the ability of nonlinear and parallelizable RNN variants to achieve it. This paper presents the resulting theoretical framework, the empirical evaluation, and the dynamical interpretation linking RNN behavior to temporal horizon generalization. Our analyses reveal that multistability is necessary for temporal horizon generalization and, in simple tasks, sufficient; more complex tasks further require transient dynamics. In contrast, modern parallelizable architectures, namely state space models and gated linear RNNs, are monostable by construction and consequently fail to generalize across temporal horizons. We conclude that multistability and transient dynamics are two essential and complementary dynamical regimes for horizon generalization, and that no current parallelizable RNN exhibits both. Designing parallelizable architectures that combine these regimes thus emerges as a key direction for scalable long-horizon RL.

ai.tldr: 本文形式化了强化学习中的时间跨度泛化概念，证明多稳定性是其必要条件，并指出现有并行RNN因单稳定性而无法实现该泛化。
ai.motivation: 长时域POMDP中，智能体需依赖记忆，但训练时短时域策略难以泛化到长时域，缺乏理论框架解释何时可泛化。
ai.method: 定义时间跨度泛化，推导充要条件，通过非线性RNN变体实验验证，并利用动力学分析解释RNN行为与泛化的关系。
ai.result: 多稳定性是时间跨度泛化的必要条件，简单任务中充分；复杂任务还需瞬态动力学。现代并行架构（如状态空间模型、门控线性RNN）因单稳定性而失败。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解长时域强化学习中记忆与泛化的动力学基础，指导设计可扩展的并行RNN架构。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种并行RNN，使其内部状态在多个稳定点间切换，同时具备瞬态响应能力，以兼顾长时域泛化与计算效率。
idea_spark.risk: 并行架构可能难以同时实现多稳定性和瞬态动力学，且训练稳定性与收敛性需额外验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经科学中多稳态感知与瞬态编码启发，将生物记忆机制融入人工循环网络。

zh.motivation: 长时域POMDP中，智能体需依赖记忆，但训练时短时域策略难以泛化到长时域，缺乏理论框架解释何时可泛化。
zh.method: 定义时间跨度泛化，推导充要条件，通过非线性RNN变体实验验证，并利用动力学分析解释RNN行为与泛化的关系。

en.tldr: This paper formalizes temporal horizon generalization in RL, proves multistability is necessary, and shows that current parallelizable RNNs fail due to monostability.
en.motivation: In long-horizon POMDPs, agents need memory, but policies trained on short horizons often fail to generalize to longer ones, lacking a theoretical framework.
en.method: Define horizon generalization, derive necessary and sufficient conditions, evaluate nonlinear RNN variants experimentally, and interpret via dynamical systems.
en.result: Multistability is necessary for horizon generalization, sufficient in simple tasks; complex tasks also require transient dynamics. Modern parallel architectures (state space models, gated linear RNNs) are monostable and fail.
en.help_to_user: Provides a dynamical understanding of memory and generalization in long-horizon RL, guiding the design of scalable parallel RNN architectures.

idea_spark.idea: Design a parallel RNN with multiple stable attractors and transient dynamics to achieve both horizon generalization and computational efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Simultaneously achieving multistability and transients in parallel architectures may be challenging, with potential training instability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multistable perception and transient encoding in neuroscience, mimicking biological memory mechanisms in artificial RNNs.

papers.title: Chaos and epoch structure in the deformed Mixmaster universe
papers.summary: We study the dynamics of the Bianchi~IX (Mixmaster) universe under classical polymerization and generalized uncertainty principle (GUP) deformation of the Poisson brackets. Starting from the Misner Hamiltonian, we derive the effective equations of motion with both modifications and analyze the duration of Kasner epochs as a probe of dynamical behavior. Our results show that GUP corrections typically shorten the epochs, leading to more frequent wall collisions, whereas polymer corrections prolong them and suppress successive bounces. At leading order, the combined deformation produces an additive shift that interpolates between these two trends. While the billiard picture remains robust, the strength of Mixmaster chaos becomes sensitive to the deformation parameters. These results illustrate how Planck-scale corrections may either enhance or suppress cosmological chaos, offering a controlled framework for exploring early-universe dynamics.

ai.tldr: 研究了在经典聚合和广义不确定性原理变形下的Bianchi IX（Mixmaster）宇宙动力学，发现GUP修正缩短Kasner时期并增加壁碰撞频率，而聚合物修正则延长时期并抑制连续反弹。

ai.method: 从Misner哈密顿量出发，推导包含两种修正的有效运动方程，并分析Kasner时期的持续时间。
ai.result: GUP修正缩短时期、增加碰撞；聚合物修正延长时期、抑制反弹；组合变形产生加性偏移；混沌强度对变形参数敏感。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了理解量子引力效应对宇宙早期动力学影响的框架。

en.tldr: We study the dynamics of the Bianchi IX (Mixmaster) universe under classical polymerization and GUP deformation, finding that GUP corrections shorten Kasner epochs and increase wall collisions, while polymer corrections lengthen epochs and suppress successive bounces.
en.motivation: To explore how Planck-scale corrections affect early-universe chaotic behavior.
en.method: Starting from the Misner Hamiltonian, we derive effective equations of motion with both modifications and analyze the duration of Kasner epochs.
en.result: GUP corrections shorten epochs and increase collisions; polymer corrections lengthen epochs and suppress bounces; combined deformation yields an additive shift; chaos strength becomes sensitive to deformation parameters.
en.help_to_user: Provides a controlled framework for understanding the impact of quantum gravity effects on early-universe dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Use chaos sensitivity as a probe to distinguish observational signatures of different quantum gravity models.
idea_spark.risk: Current results rely on classical approximations; full quantum effects may alter qualitative conclusions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining chaotic dynamics with quantum gravity corrections may offer new insights into observable signatures of the early universe.

papers.title: On the fractional logarithmic $p$-Laplacian
papers.summary: In this paper, we introduce and investigate the fractional logarithmic $p$-Laplacian $(-Δ)_{p}^{s+\log}$, defined as the first-order derivative with respect to the parameter $t$ of the fractional $p$-Laplacian $(-Δ)_{p}^{t}$ evaluated at $t=s$. We establish that this operator admits the following integral representation \[ \begin{aligned} (-Δ)_{p}^{s+\log} u(x) &= B(N,s,p)(-Δ)_{p}^{s}u(x)\\ &\quad -pC(N,s,p)\mathrm{P.V.}\int_{\mathbb{R}^{N}}\frac{|u(x)-u(y)|^{p-2}(u(x)-u(y))\ln |x-y|}{|x-y|^{N+sp}}dy, \end{aligned} \] where $C(N,s,p)$ denotes the standard normalization constant associated with the fractional $p$-Laplacian, and $B(N,s,p)=\frac{d}{ds}\left(\ln C(N,s,p)\right)$. As a consequence of this representation, it follows that the operator is nonlocal and of logarithmic type, and may be viewed as a nonlinear analogue of the fractional logarithmic Laplace operator recently introduced by Chen et al. \cite{Chen-Chen-Hauer}. We further develop the associated functional framework in both $\mathbb{R}^{N}$ and bounded Lipschitz domains by introducing the natural energy spaces adapted to problems driven by $(-Δ)_{p}^{s+\log}$. Within this framework, fundamental functional inequalities are established, in particular Pohozaev-type identities and Díaz-Saa inequalities, which are of independent interest and applicable to a broader class of problems. Moreover, we derive results concerning density, continuity, and compact embedding properties. We emphasize that the compactness of the embedding is proved at the critical exponent $p^{*}_{s}=\frac{Np}{N-sp}$, which distinguishes the present setting from the classical Sobolev and fractional Sobolev frameworks. Finally, as an application, we investigate the associated Dirichlet eigenvalue problem and derive existence, uniqueness, and boundedness results for the corresponding solutions.

ai.tldr: 本文引入并研究了分数阶对数p-拉普拉斯算子，给出了其积分表示，建立了相应的函数空间框架，证明了Pohozaev型恒等式和Díaz-Saa不等式，并应用于Dirichlet特征值问题。
ai.motivation: 为了推广分数阶拉普拉斯算子理论，引入一种新的非线性非局部对数型算子，并建立其分析基础。
ai.method: 通过分数阶p-拉普拉斯算子对参数t求导得到新算子，推导积分表示，定义自然能量空间，证明函数不等式和嵌入性质。
ai.result: 获得了算子的显式积分表示，建立了Pohozaev型恒等式和Díaz-Saa不等式，证明了临界指数下的紧嵌入，并得到了Dirichlet特征值问题的存在性、唯一性和有界性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解一类新的非线性非局部算子的定义、性质和潜在应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该算子研究具有对数型非局部相互作用的物理模型，如反常扩散或材料科学中的界面问题。

en.tldr: This paper introduces the fractional logarithmic p-Laplacian, derives its integral representation, establishes a functional framework with Pohozaev-type identities and Díaz-Saa inequalities, and applies it to the Dirichlet eigenvalue problem.
en.motivation: To generalize fractional Laplacian theory by introducing a new nonlinear nonlocal logarithmic-type operator and establishing its analytical foundations.
en.method: The operator is obtained by differentiating the fractional p-Laplacian with respect to its parameter t, deriving an integral representation, defining natural energy spaces, and proving functional inequalities and embedding properties.
en.result: An explicit integral representation is obtained; Pohozaev-type identities and Díaz-Saa inequalities are established; compact embedding at the critical exponent is proved; existence, uniqueness, and boundedness for the Dirichlet eigenvalue problem are derived.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the definition, properties, and potential applications of a new class of nonlinear nonlocal operators.

idea_spark.idea: Apply this operator to study physical models with logarithmic nonlocal interactions, such as anomalous diffusion or interface problems in materials science.
idea_spark.risk: The nonlinearity and nonlocality of the operator may increase the complexity of numerical computation and theoretical analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Deriving new operators via parameter differentiation from a family of fractional Laplacians provides a novel approach to designing nonlocal operators with specific singularities.

papers.title: Stochastically perturbed billiards: fingerprints of chaos and universality classes
papers.summary: Billiards tables - a minimal model for particles moving in a confined region - are known to present classical (and quantum) different features according to their shape, ranging from strongly chaotic to integrable dynamics. Here we consider the role of a stochastic perturbation of the elastic reflection law, and show that while chaotic billiards maintain their key statistical feature, the behaviour for integrable billiard tables is completely different: it can be linked, for tiny perturbations, to Evans stochastic billiard, where at each collision the reflected angle is a uniformly distributed stochastic variable on $(-π/2,π/2$). The resulting spatial stationary measure has peculiar aspects, like being typically non uniform along the boundary, differently from any chaotic billiard table.

ai.tldr: 研究随机扰动对台球系统的影响，发现混沌台球保持统计特性，而可积台球在微小扰动下行为完全不同，与Evans随机台球相关。
ai.motivation: 探索随机扰动如何改变经典台球系统的动力学分类，特别是混沌与可积系统的差异。
ai.method: 对弹性反射定律施加随机扰动，分析混沌和可积台球桌的统计行为，并与Evans随机台球模型对比。
ai.result: 混沌台球保持关键统计特征，可积台球在微小扰动下表现出非均匀空间平稳测度，与混沌台球不同。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机性如何影响保守系统的动力学，为统计物理和混沌理论提供新视角。

idea_spark.idea: 利用随机扰动区分混沌与可积系统，可能用于设计新型随机混合器或传感器。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果可能对扰动强度敏感，实验验证需精确控制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Evans随机台球模型出发，探索非均匀测度在随机系统中的普遍性。

en.tldr: We study stochastic perturbations of billiard systems, showing that chaotic billiards retain their statistical features while integrable ones behave very differently, linking to Evans stochastic billiard.
en.motivation: To explore how stochastic perturbations alter the dynamical classification of classical billiard systems, especially the difference between chaotic and integrable cases.
en.method: We apply a stochastic perturbation to the elastic reflection law and analyze the statistical behavior of chaotic and integrable billiard tables, comparing with the Evans stochastic billiard model.
en.result: Chaotic billiards maintain key statistical features, while integrable billiards under tiny perturbations exhibit non-uniform spatial stationary measures, unlike chaotic ones.
en.help_to_user: This helps understand how randomness affects conservative dynamical systems, offering new insights for statistical physics and chaos theory.

idea_spark.idea: Use stochastic perturbations to distinguish chaotic from integrable systems, potentially for designing novel random mixers or sensors.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results may be sensitive to perturbation strength; experimental validation requires precise control.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Evans stochastic billiard, explore the universality of non-uniform measures in stochastic systems.

papers.title: Midpoint BKM Estimates and Boundary Coherence
papers.summary: We study lower bounds for the quantum relative entropy between a density matrix and its block-diagonal part. For a block matrix with diagonal blocks A,C>0 and off-diagonal coherence block B, we prove a lower bound expressed through the associated Bogoliubov--Kubo--Mori (BKM) kernel.   The proof uses a midpoint estimate for the BKM Hessian along the affine interpolation between the matrix and its block-diagonal projection. The resulting estimate is genuinely noncommutative and retains information about the joint spectral structure of the diagonal blocks and the coherence term.   As a consequence, under a spectral gap condition on A relative to C, we obtain an explicit logarithmic lower bound proportional to the squared Frobenius norm of the coherence block. The appearance of the BKM metric is natural in this setting because it coincides with the Hessian of quantum relative entropy.

ai.tldr: 研究了密度矩阵与其块对角部分之间的量子相对熵下界，利用BKM核的中点估计，在谱间隙条件下得到与相干块Frobenius范数平方成比例的对数下界。
ai.motivation: 量子相对熵是量子信息论的核心量，其下界估计对理解量子相干性、纠缠和热力学有重要意义。
ai.method: 通过沿矩阵到其块对角投影的仿射插值，对BKM Hessian进行中点估计，并利用谱间隙条件导出显式下界。
ai.result: 在谱间隙条件下，得到量子相对熵下界与相干块Frobenius范数平方成正比的对数形式。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了量子相对熵下界的严格数学证明，可用于量子信息处理中的误差分析和相干性度量。

idea_spark.idea: 利用仿射插值和谱间隙条件，将非交换问题转化为可计算的矩阵不等式。
idea_spark.risk: 谱间隙条件可能限制应用范围，需验证实际量子系统中的有效性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典信息论中的插值技术引入量子领域，结合BKM几何，可能启发新的量子熵不等式。
