en.tldr: We study lower bounds for quantum relative entropy between a density matrix and its block-diagonal part, using a midpoint estimate for the BKM Hessian along affine interpolation, yielding an explicit logarithmic bound proportional to the squared Frobenius norm of the coherence block under a spectral gap condition.
en.motivation: Quantum relative entropy is central to quantum information theory; lower bounds are crucial for understanding quantum coherence, entanglement, and thermodynamics.
en.method: A midpoint estimate for the BKM Hessian is derived along the affine interpolation from the matrix to its block-diagonal projection, and a spectral gap condition is used to obtain an explicit bound.
en.result: Under a spectral gap condition, we obtain a logarithmic lower bound proportional to the squared Frobenius norm of the coherence block.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous lower bounds for quantum relative entropy, useful for error analysis and coherence quantification in quantum information processing.

idea_spark.idea: Use affine interpolation and spectral gap conditions to convert noncommutative problems into computable matrix inequalities.
idea_spark.risk: The spectral gap condition may limit applicability; its validity in practical quantum systems needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Bringing classical interpolation techniques into the quantum domain, combined with BKM geometry, may inspire new quantum entropy inequalities.

papers.title: The Grimmer-Shu-Wang Certificate and the Drori-Teboulle Minimax Nonnegative Constant-Stepsize Bound for N >= 3
papers.summary: We prove, for every horizon N >= 3, the existence of the strengthened low-rank performance-estimation certificate proposed by Grimmer, Shu, and Wang for the Drori-Teboulle minimax nonnegative constant-stepsize problem for gradient descent. Let rho_N in (0,1) be the unique solution of rho_N^{2N}(2N rho_N+2N+1)=1. We show that the GSW certificate equations admit positive vectors a, b, c, d satisfying all residual equations. The proof proceeds through a reduced residual system in the variables d, a simplex existence argument for a positive reduced zero, a terminal residual completion identity, and a tail-square convolution argument proving the cumulative margins that force positivity of the certificate coefficients. Consequently, the GSW low-rank PEP certificate exists for every N >= 3 and yields the Drori-Teboulle upper bound. Together with the one-dimensional quadratic and Huber lower-bound examples, this establishes the Drori-Teboulle minimax nonnegative constant-stepsize value for gradient descent for every N >= 3.

ai.tldr: 证明了对于任意N≥3，Grimmer-Shu-Wang低秩性能估计证书的存在性，从而确定了Drori-Teboulle极小极大非负常步长值。
ai.motivation: 验证Grimmer-Shu-Wang提出的强化低秩性能估计证书在N≥3时的存在性，以完善梯度下降法的极小极大非负常步长理论。
ai.method: 通过约化残差系统、单纯形存在性论证、终端残差恒等式和尾部平方卷积方法，证明证书系数全为正。
ai.result: GSW证书对所有N≥3存在，并给出Drori-Teboulle上界，结合二次和Huber下界例子，确定了极小极大非负常步长值。

en.tldr: Proves the existence of the Grimmer-Shu-Wang low-rank performance-estimation certificate for all N≥3, establishing the Drori-Teboulle minimax nonnegative constant-stepsize value.
en.motivation: To verify the strengthened low-rank PEP certificate proposed by Grimmer, Shu, and Wang for N≥3, completing the minimax nonnegative constant-stepsize theory for gradient descent.
en.method: Uses a reduced residual system, simplex existence argument, terminal residual identity, and tail-square convolution to prove positivity of certificate coefficients.
en.result: The GSW certificate exists for every N≥3 and yields the Drori-Teboulle upper bound; together with lower-bound examples, the minimax value is established.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical optimal upper bound for step size selection in gradient descent, aiding algorithm design and convergence analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage low-rank structure and residual systems to simplify existence proofs of certificates in high-dimensional optimization problems.
idea_spark.risk: Existence depends on specific residual equations, which may not hold for more general step sizes or algorithms.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decompose complex optimization problems into low-rank subproblems and simplify proofs using algebraic identities and combinatorial arguments.

papers.title: The unified transform for Burgers' equation: Application to unsaturated flow in finite interval
papers.summary: In this paper, we focus on one-dimensional vertical infiltration, assuming constant diffusivity and a quadratic relationship between hydraulic conductivity and water content. Under these assumptions, Richards' equation reduces to Burgers' equation, which we then linearize via the Hopf-Cole transformation. This turns the initial boundary value problem into a diffusion equation on a finite interval with mixed boundary conditions. To solve it, we use the Unified Transform Method (also known as the Fokas method). This approach gives an explicit integral representation of the solution, and when evaluated numerically, the results match classical Fourier series solutions exactly, but with better convergence and stability. Two examples from hydrological applications are examined.

ai.tldr: 本文利用统一变换法（Fokas方法）求解有限区间上的Burgers方程，并将其应用于一维垂直入渗问题，数值结果与经典傅里叶级数解一致，但收敛性和稳定性更好。
ai.motivation: 将Richards方程简化为Burgers方程后，需要一种高效稳定的方法求解有限区间上的混合边界扩散问题。
ai.method: 通过Hopf-Cole变换将Burgers方程线性化为扩散方程，再应用统一变换法得到解的显式积分表示，并进行数值计算。
ai.result: 数值结果与傅里叶级数解精确匹配，且收敛更快、稳定性更强；两个水文实例验证了方法的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种求解非线性Burgers方程的新数值框架，尤其适用于有限区间上的非饱和流问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将统一变换法与机器学习结合，加速积分表示中的数值求积过程。
idea_spark.risk: 对于更复杂的非线性项或高维问题，积分表示可能变得复杂，数值实现难度增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用解析积分表示替代纯数值离散，可提高计算精度和稳定性，启发其他物理问题的求解策略。

en.tldr: This paper applies the Unified Transform Method (Fokas method) to solve Burgers' equation on a finite interval for one-dimensional vertical infiltration, yielding an explicit integral representation that matches classical Fourier series solutions with better convergence and stability.
en.motivation: To efficiently solve the mixed boundary diffusion problem arising from Richards' equation reduced to Burgers' equation on a finite interval.
en.method: Linearize Burgers' equation via Hopf-Cole transformation, then apply the Unified Transform Method to obtain an explicit integral representation of the solution, evaluated numerically.
en.result: Numerical results exactly match Fourier series solutions, with improved convergence and stability; two hydrological examples demonstrate applicability.
en.help_to_user: Provides a novel numerical framework for solving nonlinear Burgers' equation, particularly for unsaturated flow in finite intervals.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the Unified Transform Method with machine learning to accelerate numerical quadrature in the integral representation.
idea_spark.risk: For more complex nonlinearities or higher dimensions, the integral representation may become complicated, increasing numerical implementation difficulty.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using analytic integral representations instead of pure numerical discretization can improve accuracy and stability, inspiring solution strategies for other physical problems.

papers.title: Averaging principle for a slow-fast stochastic nonlinear fractional Schrödinger equation
papers.summary: We establish an averaging principle for a structural multiscale stochastic nonlinear fractional Schrödinger system on the one-dimensional torus driven by a multiplicative Wiener noise. The slow component is governed by a fractional Schrödinger operator with a general polynomial nonlinearity, while the fast component evolves on a shorter time scale and exhibits dissipative diffusion, nonlinear interactions, and stochastic forcing.    Under suitable dissipative assumptions, we have shown that, as the scale separation parameter tends to zero, the slow component converges strongly to an effective stochastic fractional Schrödinger equation. The effective drift is obtained by averaging the coupling term with respect to the unique invariant measure of the frozen fast dynamics. The proof relies on uniform a priori estimates, ergodicity of the fast equation, Hölder time regularity of the slow component obtained via a vanishing viscosity method, and a Khasminskii-type time discretization argument adapted to fractional dispersive operators. The analysis is technically challenging due to limited smoothing of the fractional Schrödinger semigroup and the presence of general polynomial nonlinearities, which are handled through refined estimates and viscosity approximation.

ai.tldr: 建立了一类慢快随机非线性分数阶薛定谔系统的平均原理，证明慢分量强收敛到有效方程。
ai.motivation: 研究多尺度随机分数阶薛定谔系统的动力学简化，克服分数阶算子光滑性不足和非线性项带来的分析困难。
ai.method: 利用一致先验估计、快方程遍历性、消失粘性法获得慢分量Hölder时间正则性，并采用适应分数阶色散算子的Khasminskii型时间离散化论证。

ai.help_to_user: 为分数阶色散系统中多尺度随机模型的约化提供了严格的理论框架和分析工具。

en.tldr: Establishes an averaging principle for a slow-fast stochastic nonlinear fractional Schrödinger system, proving strong convergence of the slow component to an effective equation.
en.motivation: To simplify the dynamics of multiscale stochastic fractional Schrödinger systems, overcoming challenges from limited smoothing of fractional operators and general polynomial nonlinearities.
en.method: Uses uniform a priori estimates, ergodicity of the fast equation, Hölder time regularity via vanishing viscosity, and a Khasminskii-type time discretization adapted to fractional dispersive operators.

papers.title: A self-adjoint Fourier-type model for the iQuad wavefront sensor
papers.summary: Advanced adaptive optics (AO) systems can use Fourier-type wavefront sensing to correct optical distortions encountered in ground-based telescopes, AO-assisted retinal imaging, and free-space optical communications (FSOC). Recently, a novel Fourier-type wavefront sensor (WFS) known as the iQuad WFS has been introduced. Its design features a focal plane tessellation with a four-quadrant phase mask (FQPM) that incorporates a $\pm π/2$ phase shift between adjacent quadrants.   In this work, we establish a comprehensive mathematical framework for the iQuad WFS, including its forward models and linearizations based on the Fréchet derivative. We reveal a connection between the iQuad WFS and the 2d finite Hilbert transform and demonstrate that the linear iQuad WFS operator is self-adjoint - a unique property among Fourier-type WFSs. Additionally, we introduce the double iQuad WFS, a two-path configuration that combines two rotated iQuad WFSs. This design addresses the limitations of the single iQuad WFS by suppressing poorly-seen phase components. Moreover, the double setup simplifies the mathematical modeling. We also highlight iQuad similarities to the widely used pyramid wavefront sensor (PWFS). Finally, we extend the concept of modulation to the iQuad WFS, further enhancing its versatility.   The theoretical analysis presented here lays the groundwork for the development of fast and robust model-based wavefront reconstruction algorithms for the iQuad WFS, paving the way for future applications in AO instruments.

ai.motivation: 为iQuad波前传感器提供严格的数学基础，以支持快速鲁棒的模型波前重建算法。
ai.method: 推导了前向模型和基于Fréchet导数的线性化，引入双iQuad配置和调制概念。

en.tldr: Established a comprehensive mathematical framework for the iQuad wavefront sensor, revealing its connection to the 2D finite Hilbert transform and proving the self-adjointness of its linear operator.
en.motivation: To provide a rigorous mathematical foundation for the iQuad WFS to enable fast and robust model-based wavefront reconstruction algorithms.
en.method: Derived forward models and linearizations via Fréchet derivative, introduced the double iQuad configuration and modulation.
en.result: Found that the linear iQuad operator is self-adjoint; the double iQuad suppresses poorly-seen phase components and simplifies modeling.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the mathematical essence of the iQuad WFS and its relationship to the pyramid wavefront sensor.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage self-adjointness to design efficient iterative wavefront reconstruction algorithms, or combine with modulation for multi-scale wavefront sensing.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical implementation of the theoretical framework may face computational complexity; optical alignment of the double configuration is demanding.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore deeper connections between wavefront sensing and image reconstruction from the mathematical structure of the 2D finite Hilbert transform.

papers.title: Convergence of zeroth-order proximal point algorithms in the high-temperature regime
papers.summary: Efficient methods for non-convex black-box optimization largely rely on sampling. In this context, the Zeroth-Order Proximal Operator (ZOPO) and the corresponding Zeroth-Order Proximal Point Algorithm (ZOPPA) have attracted significant interest, as they combine the advantage of requiring only objective evaluations with the powerful theoretical framework of proximal point algorithms. ZOPO depends on a temperature parameter which, when going to zero, reduces ZOPO to the exact proximal operator. By exploiting this property, the vanishing-temperature regime has been leveraged in several works to obtain theoretical guarantees via inexact proximal methods. However, this regime is computationally unsustainable when sampling is used to estimate ZOPO, since the corresponding Monte Carlo estimators suffer from severe variance issues. We therefore propose a comprehensive analysis of ZOPO for any fixed positive temperature, and prove convergence of ZOPPA under minimal assumptions on the objective function. We do so by demonstrating that ZOPPA can be interpreted as an exact proximal point method applied to an auxiliary smoothed objective, rather than an inexact method on the original function. Importantly, we further derive explicit guarantees connecting this smoothed problem back to the original objective and establish convergence results for the sampled method (S-ZOPPA) at a fixed temperature.

ai.tldr: 本文分析了高温（固定正温度）下零阶近端算子（ZOPO）及其算法（ZOPPA）的收敛性，避免了低温下蒙特卡洛估计的方差问题，并证明ZOPPA可视为对辅助平滑目标的精确近端点方法。
ai.motivation: 现有零阶近端算法依赖低温极限以获得理论保证，但低温下采样估计方差大、计算不可持续，因此需要研究固定正温度下的收敛性。
ai.method: 将ZOPPA重新解释为对辅助平滑目标的精确近端点方法，而非原函数的非精确方法，并推导平滑问题与原目标之间的显式保证。
ai.result: 在目标函数的最小假设下证明了ZOPPA的收敛性，并建立了固定温度下采样方法S-ZOPPA的收敛结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为黑箱非凸优化提供了一种计算上更稳定的零阶近端算法，并给出了理论收敛保证。

idea_spark.idea: 利用固定正温度下的平滑辅助目标，避免低温采样方差，同时保持理论收敛性。
idea_spark.risk: 平滑目标与原目标之间的差距可能影响实际优化精度，需要进一步量化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受统计物理中高温展开的启发，将温度视为可调参数而非极限参数。

en.tldr: This paper analyzes the convergence of the zeroth-order proximal operator (ZOPO) and its algorithm (ZOPPA) at any fixed positive temperature, avoiding severe Monte Carlo variance issues of the vanishing-temperature regime, and shows ZOPPA is an exact proximal point method on an auxiliary smoothed objective.
en.motivation: Existing zeroth-order proximal algorithms rely on the vanishing-temperature regime for theoretical guarantees, but this regime is computationally unsustainable due to high variance in Monte Carlo estimators; thus convergence at fixed positive temperature is needed.
en.method: Reinterprets ZOPPA as an exact proximal point method on a smoothed auxiliary objective rather than an inexact method on the original function, and derives explicit guarantees connecting the smoothed problem back to the original.
en.result: Proves convergence of ZOPPA under minimal assumptions on the objective function, and establishes convergence results for the sampled method (S-ZOPPA) at a fixed temperature.
en.help_to_user: Provides a computationally more stable zeroth-order proximal algorithm for non-convex black-box optimization with theoretical convergence guarantees.

idea_spark.idea: Use a fixed positive temperature to define a smoothed auxiliary objective, avoiding sampling variance while maintaining theoretical convergence.
idea_spark.risk: The gap between the smoothed and original objectives may affect practical optimization accuracy and needs further quantification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by high-temperature expansions in statistical physics, treating temperature as a tunable parameter rather than a limit.

papers.title: A Fast and Energy-Efficient Latch-Based Memristive Analog Content-Addressable Memory
papers.summary: Analog content-addressable memories (aCAMs) based on memristors provide a promising pathway toward energy-efficient large-scale associative computing for Edge AI and embedded intelligence applications. They have been successfully applied to decision-tree inference and extend the capabilities of compute-in-memory (CIM) architectures beyond conventional vector-matrix multiplication. However, conventional designs such as the 6T2M architecture suffer from static search power, limited voltage gain, and pronounced match-line crosstalk, constraining analog precision and scalability. We introduce a strong-arm latched memristor (SALM) aCAM cell that replaces static voltage division with a dynamic current-race comparator, enabling high regenerative gain, intrinsic result latching, and near-zero static search power. Compared to 6T2M, SALM reduces read energy by 33% at identical latency while eliminating the gain and crosstalk limitations that prevent 6T2M from scaling to large arrays. SALM further enables scalable sequential and parallel latch sharing, and a dataset-aware optimization framework exposes an explicit energy-latency tradeoff, achieving up to 50% energy reduction at 3x latency across representative workloads. To enable architectural exploration, we develop a circuit-accurate behavioral model derived from SPICE lookup tables in 22 nm FD-SOI technology, capturing match-line dynamics and crosstalk. Integrated into the X-TIME decision-tree compiler, this framework demonstrates that SALM maintains near-software accuracy for high-dimensional datasets, whereas baseline designs degrade due to limited gain and cumulative crosstalk.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于强臂锁存比较器的忆阻模拟内容寻址存储器，消除静态搜索功耗并提升可扩展性。

en.tldr: Proposes a strong-arm latched memristor analog content-addressable memory that eliminates static search power and improves scalability.
en.motivation: Conventional 6T2M memristive aCAM suffers from static power, limited gain, and crosstalk, constraining precision and scalability.
en.method: Replaces static voltage division with a dynamic current-race comparator, achieving high regenerative gain, intrinsic latching, and near-zero static search power.
en.result: Reduces read energy by 33% over 6T2M, achieves up to 50% energy reduction at 3x latency on representative workloads, and maintains near-software accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a low-power, scalable analog content-addressable memory design suitable for edge AI inference.

idea_spark.idea: Leverages a dataset-aware optimization framework to explicitly explore the energy-latency tradeoff.
idea_spark.risk: Dynamic circuits are sensitive to process variations, potentially impacting yield.
idea_spark.inspiration: Replacing static division with dynamic competition to eliminate static power can inspire other memory/compute cell designs.

papers.title: Boundary observability for gas giant metrics
papers.summary: We study the observability of waves on gas giant manifolds which are a class of Riemannian manifolds whose metrics are singular at the boundary. Such manifolds arise naturally in modeling of acoustic wave propagation in gas giant planets.We establish an observability inequality using full boundary measurements given by a Neumann-type trace that is natural in the gas giant setting. The proof proceeds in two steps. First, observability for a general gas giant metric is reduced to the so-called separable case via a perturbation argument. In the separable case, we employ a uniform-in-tangential-frequency analysis combined with an Ingham inequality to prove observability.

ai.tldr: 研究了气体巨星度量上波的边界可观测性，通过Neumann型迹和扰动论证建立了可观测性不等式。
ai.motivation: 气体巨星行星中声波传播的数学建模需要处理边界奇异的黎曼流形，现有可观测性理论不直接适用。

ai.result: 建立了气体巨星度量下基于全边界Neumann型迹的可观测性不等式。

papers.title: HorizonDrive: Self-Corrective Autoregressive World Model for Long-horizon Driving Simulation
papers.summary: Closed-loop driving simulation requires real-time interaction beyond short offline clips, pushing current driving world models toward autoregressive (AR) rollout. Existing AR distillation approaches typically rely on frame sinks or student-side degradation training. The former transfers poorly to driving due to fast ego-motion and rapid scene changes, while the latter remains bounded by the teacher's single-pass output length and thus provides only a limited supervision horizon. A natural question is: can the teacher itself be extended via AR rollout to provide unbounded-horizon supervision at bounded memory cost? The key difficulty is that a standard teacher drifts under its own predictions, contaminating the supervision it provides. Our key insight is to make the teacher rollout-capable, ensuring reliable supervision from its own AR rollouts. This is instantiated as HorizonDrive, an anti-drifting training-and-distillation framework for AR driving simulation. First, scheduled rollout recovery (SRR) trains the base model to reconstruct ground-truth future clips from prediction-corrupted histories, yielding a teacher that remains stable across long AR rollouts. Second, the rollout-capable teacher is extended via AR rollout, providing long-horizon distribution-matching supervision under bounded memory, while a short-window student aligns to it with teacher rollout DMD (TRD) for efficient real-time deployment. HorizonDrive natively supports minute-scale AR rollout under bounded memory; on nuScenes, HorizonDrive reduces FID by 52% and FVD by 37%, and lowers ARE and DTW by 21% and 9% relative to the strongest long-horizon streaming baselines, while remaining competitive with single-pass driving video generators.

ai.tldr: 提出HorizonDrive框架，通过自纠正自回归世界模型实现分钟级闭环驾驶模拟，在有限内存下提供无限时域监督。
ai.motivation: 现有自回归蒸馏方法受限于教师模型单次输出长度或学生端退化训练，无法在快速自车运动下提供长时域稳定监督。

en.tldr: HorizonDrive proposes a self-corrective autoregressive world model for minute-scale closed-loop driving simulation with bounded memory cost.
en.motivation: Existing AR distillation methods are limited by teacher single-pass output length or student-side degradation, failing under fast ego-motion and rapid scene changes.
en.method: Scheduled rollout recovery trains a drift-resistant teacher; teacher rollout DMD distills long-horizon distribution-matching supervision to a short-window student.

en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how self-correction and distillation enable stable, efficient long-horizon driving simulation.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the teacher model itself as an autoregressive rollout generator to provide unbounded-horizon supervision at bounded memory cost.
idea_spark.risk: Teacher may still drift in extreme scenarios; rollout recovery training could increase training complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using teacher's own rollouts to extend supervision horizon inspires self-distillation designs in other temporal generation tasks.

papers.title: An analytical approach to calculating stationary PDFs for reflected random walks with an application to BESS-based ramp-rate control
papers.summary: A Wiener-Hopf-type integral equation for the stationary PDF of a reflected random walk is derived rigorously based on modern probability theory, and an application to battery energy storage systems (BESS), specifically the sizing of the inverter, is discussed in depth. The methodological steps include the construction of a Markov kernel, the derivation of a Fredholm integral equation of the second kind for the PDF of the BESS power, and an analytical solution of the equation based on a Neumann series. The analytical results were compared against numerical solutions obtained with the Nystrom method, as well as against the results of an algorithmic simulation using simulated input time series. The use of truncated versions of the analytic solution allows for the construction of simplified design rules for the power systems practitioner. General insights into inverter sizing criteria of storage systems for ramp-rate control of variable renewable energy (VRE) sources such as wind and solar are provided.

ai.tldr: 基于现代概率论严格推导了反射随机游走平稳概率密度的Wiener-Hopf型积分方程，并应用于电池储能系统逆变器容量设计。
ai.motivation: 现有方法难以解析计算反射随机游走的平稳概率密度，且电池储能系统逆变器容量设计缺乏精确解析工具。
ai.method: 构造马尔可夫核，推导第二类Fredholm积分方程，利用Neumann级数解析求解，并与Nyström数值解及仿真结果对比。
ai.result: 解析解与数值解及仿真结果吻合，截断解析解可构建简化设计规则，为变可再生能源斜坡率控制提供逆变器选型依据。
ai.help_to_user: 提供解析公式和简化设计规则，帮助电力系统从业者快速确定储能逆变器容量。

idea_spark.idea: 将解析解截断为显式表达式，用于实时控制或在线优化储能系统功率分配。
idea_spark.risk: 截断近似可能在高波动场景下精度不足，需验证边界条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴概率论与积分方程结合的方式，解决工程中随机过程稳态分析难题。

en.tldr: A rigorous derivation of a Wiener-Hopf-type integral equation for the stationary PDF of a reflected random walk, applied to inverter sizing in battery energy storage systems for ramp-rate control.
en.motivation: Analytical solutions for stationary PDFs of reflected random walks are lacking, and precise inverter sizing for BESS ramp-rate control requires such tools.
en.method: Construct a Markov kernel, derive a Fredholm integral equation of the second kind, solve analytically via Neumann series, and validate against Nyström numerics and simulations.

en.help_to_user: Provides closed-form expressions and simplified rules for practitioners to size BESS inverters for ramp-rate control.

idea_spark.risk: Truncation may lose accuracy under high volatility; boundary conditions need validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine probability theory and integral equations to solve steady-state analysis of stochastic processes in engineering.

papers.title: A Moment-QSOS Hierarchy for a Class of Quaternion Polynomial Optimization Problems
papers.summary: This paper introduces a Moment-Quaternion-Sum-of-Squares (QSOS) hierarchy for solving a class of quaternion polynomial optimization problems. This hierarchy is formulated directly in the quaternion domain and consists of a sequence of semidefinite programming (SDP) relaxations that provide monotonic lower bounds on the optimal value. To improve scalability, we incorporate correlative sparsity, which can significantly reduce the size of the resulting SDPs for large-scale sparse problems. Furthermore, we introduce a strengthened QSOS relaxation, which enhances the tightness of the standard relaxation by enlarging the monomial basis in a controlled manner. Our various Numerical experiments show that our approach provides comparable bounds to existing approaches, while significantly reducing computation time and memory usage. In particular, applications to the quaternion-based maximum margin criterion problem and the classical orientation synchronization problem illustrate the practical effectiveness of the framework.

ai.tldr: 本文针对一类四元数多项式优化问题，提出了直接在四元数域构建的矩-QSOS层次结构，通过半定规划松弛序列提供单调下界，并利用相关稀疏性和强化松弛提升可扩展性与紧致性。
ai.motivation: 现有四元数优化方法多依赖实值转换，导致计算效率低且难以处理大规模稀疏问题。
ai.method: 直接基于四元数域构建矩-QSOS层次，引入相关稀疏性缩减SDP规模，并通过扩大单项式基提出强化QSOS松弛。
ai.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在保持与现有方法相当精度的同时，显著降低了计算时间和内存占用。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理四元数域的大规模多项式优化问题提供了一种高效、可扩展的求解框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将相关稀疏性模式自动检测与QSOS层次结合，开发自适应稀疏化算法。
idea_spark.risk: 强化松弛可能引入过多单项式基，导致SDP规模失控，需平衡紧致性与计算代价。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受四元数在姿态估计中应用的启发，可探索该框架在机器人运动规划或量子控制中的实时优化场景。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a Moment-QSOS hierarchy directly in the quaternion domain for a class of quaternion polynomial optimization problems, using SDP relaxations with monotonic lower bounds, correlative sparsity, and a strengthened relaxation to improve scalability and tightness.
en.motivation: Existing quaternion optimization methods often rely on real-valued transformations, leading to low computational efficiency and difficulty handling large-scale sparse problems.
en.method: Constructs a Moment-QSOS hierarchy directly in the quaternion domain, incorporates correlative sparsity to reduce SDP size, and introduces a strengthened QSOS relaxation by enlarging the monomial basis in a controlled manner.
en.result: Numerical experiments show that the approach achieves comparable bounds to existing methods while significantly reducing computation time and memory usage.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and scalable framework for solving large-scale quaternion polynomial optimization problems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine automatic detection of correlative sparsity patterns with the QSOS hierarchy to develop an adaptive sparsification algorithm.
idea_spark.risk: The strengthened relaxation may introduce too many monomials, causing SDP size to explode; a balance between tightness and computational cost must be maintained.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by quaternion applications in pose estimation, this framework could be explored for real-time optimization in robot motion planning or quantum control.

papers.title: What-Where Transformer: A Slot-Centric Visual Backbone for Concurrent Representation and Localization
papers.summary: Many image understanding tasks involve identifying what is present and where it appears. However, tasks that address where, such as object discovery, detection, and segmentation, are often considerably more complex than image classification, which primarily focuses on what. One possible reason is that classification-oriented backbones tend to emphasize semantic information about what, while implicitly entangling or suppressing information about where. In this work, we focus on an inductive bias termed what-where separation, which encourages models to represent object appearance and spatial location in a decomposed manner. To incorporate this bias throughout an attentive backbone in the style of Vision Transformer (ViT), we propose the What-Where Transformer (WWT). Our method introduces two key novel designs: (1) it treats tokens as representations of what and attention maps as representations of where, and processes them in concurrent feed-forward modules via a multi-stream, slot-based architecture; (2) it reuses both the final-layer tokens and attention maps for downstream tasks, and directly exposes them to gradients derived from task losses, thereby facilitating more effective and explicit learning of localization. We demonstrate that even under standard single-label classification-based supervision on ImageNet, WWT exhibits emergent multiple object discovery directly from raw attention maps, rather than via additional postprocessing such as token clustering. Furthermore, WWT achieves superior performance compared to ViT-based methods on zero-shot object discovery and weakly supervised semantic segmentation, and it is transferable to various localization setups with minimal modifications. Code will be published after acceptance.

ai.tldr: 提出 What-Where Transformer (WWT)，通过槽位架构分离外观与位置信息，在 ImageNet 分类监督下实现零样本多目标发现。
ai.motivation: 现有分类骨干网络隐式纠缠或抑制位置信息，导致目标发现、检测等定位任务复杂度远高于分类。
ai.method: 将 token 视为“什么”表示、注意力图视为“哪里”表示，通过多流槽位架构并行处理，并直接暴露最终层 token 和注意力图给任务损失梯度。
ai.result: 在 ImageNet 分类监督下，WWT 从原始注意力图中直接发现多个目标，无需后处理；在零样本目标发现和弱监督语义分割上优于 ViT 方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需额外标注即可同时学习表示和定位的视觉骨干，适用于弱监督或零样本定位任务。

zh.method: 将 token 视为“什么”表示、注意力图视为“哪里”表示，通过多流槽位架构并行处理，并直接暴露最终层 token 和注意力图给任务损失梯度。
zh.result: 在 ImageNet 分类监督下，WWT 从原始注意力图中直接发现多个目标，无需后处理；在零样本目标发现和弱监督语义分割上优于 ViT 方法。

en.tldr: Proposes What-Where Transformer (WWT), a slot-based architecture that separates appearance and location, enabling zero-shot multi-object discovery from raw attention maps under ImageNet classification supervision.
en.motivation: Classification-oriented backbones implicitly entangle or suppress location information, making localization tasks like object discovery and segmentation much harder than classification.
en.method: Treats tokens as 'what' representations and attention maps as 'where' representations, processed in parallel via multi-stream slot-based architecture, with final-layer tokens and attention maps directly exposed to task loss gradients.
en.result: Under ImageNet classification supervision, WWT discovers multiple objects directly from raw attention maps without postprocessing; outperforms ViT methods on zero-shot object discovery and weakly supervised semantic segmentation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a visual backbone that learns both representation and localization simultaneously without extra annotations, suitable for weakly supervised or zero-shot localization tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Using attention maps as explicit location representations and exposing them to gradients may inspire other attention-based model designs.
idea_spark.risk: Preset number of slots may limit the number of discoverable objects; classification supervision may constrain localization granularity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrows the 'what-where' separation inductive bias from cognitive science, transforming attention from a feature aggregation tool into a structured representation component.

papers.title: Annotation-Free Indoor Radio Mapping via Physics-Informed Trajectory Inference
papers.summary: Constructing indoor radio maps traditionally requires extensive site surveys with precise user-location labels, making the calibration process costly and time-consuming. Existing calibration-reduction methods either depend on partial location annotations or exploit inertial measurement units (IMUs) to provide relative motion cues; however, IMU-assisted solutions are constrained by hardware availability, device-level access restrictions, and accumulated sensor drift. In this paper, we study a location-label-free indoor radio mapping problem under known access-point deployment geometry and a known walkable spatial domain. We propose a physics-informed trajectory inference framework that uses only Channel State Information (CSI), without relying on user-location labels or IMU measurements. The key idea is to recover the latent spatial coordinates of CSI measurements by exploiting the local spatial continuity of multipath propagation. To this end, we construct a Power-Angle-Delay Profile (PADP) feature distance from MIMO-OFDM CSI and show that, within a local neighborhood and under quasi-static multipath conditions, this distance provides a physically meaningful proxy for small spatial displacements. We then incorporate the PADP-based continuity constraint into a spatially regularized Bayesian inference model for joint trajectory recovery and propagation-parameter estimation. Experiments on a real-world industrial CSI dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves an average localization error of 0.88 m and a relative beam map construction error of 6.68%, improving upon representative channel-embedding and IMU-assisted baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无标注室内无线电地图构建方法，仅利用CSI和已知接入点几何，无需位置标签或IMU。
ai.motivation: 传统室内无线电地图依赖大量带标签现场勘测，成本高；现有方法需部分位置标注或IMU，但IMU受硬件限制和漂移影响。
ai.method: 利用PADP特征距离作为局部空间位移的物理代理，结合贝叶斯推断模型联合恢复轨迹和传播参数。
ai.result: 在真实工业CSI数据集上平均定位误差0.88米，波束图构建相对误差6.68%，优于基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户低成本构建室内无线电地图，适用于无GPS或IMU受限环境。

idea_spark.idea: 将PADP距离与图神经网络结合，建模多径传播的空间图结构。
idea_spark.risk: 准静态多径假设在动态环境中可能失效，需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用物理模型（如射线追踪）生成合成CSI数据，辅助无监督训练。

en.tldr: Proposes an annotation-free indoor radio mapping method using only CSI and known access-point geometry, without location labels or IMU.
en.motivation: Traditional indoor radio mapping requires costly labeled site surveys; existing methods need partial annotations or IMU, which suffer from hardware constraints and drift.
en.method: Uses PADP feature distance as a physical proxy for small spatial displacements, integrated into a Bayesian inference model for joint trajectory recovery and propagation parameter estimation.
en.result: Achieves 0.88 m average localization error and 6.68% relative beam map construction error on real-world industrial CSI dataset, outperforming baselines.
en.help_to_user: Enables low-cost indoor radio map construction in environments without GPS or IMU.

idea_spark.idea: Combine PADP distance with graph neural networks to model spatial graph structure of multipath propagation.
idea_spark.risk: Quasi-static multipath assumption may fail in dynamic environments; robustness needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use physical models (e.g., ray tracing) to generate synthetic CSI data for unsupervised training.

papers.title: Itô integral for a two-sided Lévy process
papers.summary: In this article, we construct an Itô integral with respect to a two-sided finite-variance Lévy process $\{L(x)\}_{x\in \mathbb{R}}$, without a Gaussian component. Using Rosenthal inequality for discrete-time martingales, we give an estimate for the $p$-th moment of this integral, for any even integer $p\geq 2$. Then, using Poisson-Malliavin calculus, we show that the Itô integral is an extension of the Hitsuda-Skorohod integral with respect to the compensated Poisson random measure associated to the Lévy process.

ai.tldr: 本文为无高斯分量的双边有限方差Lévy过程构造了Itô积分，并利用Rosenthal不等式给出了任意偶次矩的估计，通过Poisson-Malliavin微积分证明了该积分是Hitsuda-Skorohod积分的推广。
ai.motivation: 扩展Itô积分理论到双边Lévy过程，填补该方向的研究空白。
ai.method: 利用离散时间鞅的Rosenthal不等式进行矩估计，结合Poisson-Malliavin微积分建立积分等价性。
ai.result: 成功构造了Itô积分，给出了p次矩估计，并证明了与Hitsuda-Skorohod积分的关系。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理双边Lévy过程驱动的随机积分提供理论基础和矩估计工具。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似构造应用于带跳的随机偏微分方程或分数阶Lévy过程。
idea_spark.risk: 双边过程可能引入非因果性，需谨慎处理积分定义。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从离散鞅不等式到连续积分的桥梁思路值得借鉴。

en.tldr: This paper constructs an Itô integral for a two-sided finite-variance Lévy process without Gaussian component, provides p-th moment estimates via Rosenthal inequality, and shows it extends the Hitsuda-Skorohod integral using Poisson-Malliavin calculus.
en.motivation: Extend Itô integration theory to two-sided Lévy processes, filling a gap in the literature.
en.method: Uses Rosenthal inequality for discrete-time martingales for moment estimates and Poisson-Malliavin calculus to establish integral equivalence.
en.result: Successfully constructs the Itô integral, provides p-th moment estimates, and proves relation to Hitsuda-Skorohod integral.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical foundation and moment estimation tools for stochastic integrals driven by two-sided Lévy processes.

idea_spark.idea: Try similar construction for stochastic partial differential equations with jumps or fractional Lévy processes.
idea_spark.risk: Two-sided processes may introduce non-causality, requiring careful definition of the integral.
idea_spark.inspiration: The bridge from discrete martingale inequalities to continuous integrals is worth adopting.

papers.title: The choice of variables in cosmological dynamical systems
papers.summary: Dynamical systems techniques are a powerful tool to analyse systems of ordinary differential equations, written in an appropriate form. For a given theory of gravity, the cosmological field equations typically lead to a system of ordinary differential equations. Casting these cosmological equations into the form of a dynamical system requires a careful choice of the dynamical variables. Despite this being a critical step, relatively little is said about this process in the literature. We discuss how different variable choices affect the information that can be extracted from the Friedmann equations. We begin by reviewing the standard cosmological model with dark matter, radiation, and dark energy, and include quintessence models. We revisit well-known models with an exponential potential using new variables. This discussion is then extended to models with scalar fields and more intricate coupling terms.

ai.tldr: 讨论了在宇宙学动力系统中变量选择如何影响从弗里德曼方程中提取的信息。
ai.motivation: 变量选择是构建动力系统的关键步骤，但文献中对此讨论不足。
ai.method: 回顾标准宇宙学模型（含暗物质、辐射、暗能量）及精质模型，并用新变量重新分析指数势模型。
ai.result: 不同变量选择会改变从弗里德曼方程中可提取的信息。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者理解变量选择对宇宙学动力系统分析的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 探索用新变量分析更复杂的耦合项或非标准势能。
idea_spark.risk: 新变量可能引入奇点或使方程更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 变量选择本身可作为动力系统研究的一个独立课题。

papers.title: Premover: Fast Vision-Language-Action Control by Acting Before Instructions Are Complete
papers.summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies are typically evaluated as if the user had finished typing or speaking before the robot begins acting. In real deployment, however, users take several seconds to enter a request, leaving the policy idle for a substantial fraction of the interaction. We introduce Premover, a lightweight module that converts this idle window into useful precomputation. Premover keeps the VLA backbone frozen and attaches two small projection heads, one for image patches, one for language tokens, that map an intermediate layer of the backbone into a shared space. The resulting focus map is supervised by simulator-rendered target-object segmentation masks and applied as a per-patch reweighting of the next step's image tokens. A single scalar readiness threshold, trained jointly from streaming prefixes, decides when the policy should begin acting. On the LIBERO benchmark suite, Premover reduces mean wall-clock time from 34.0 to 29.4 seconds, a 13.6% reduction, while matching the full-prompt baseline's success rate (95.1% vs. 95.0%); naive premoving, by contrast, collapses to 66.4%.

ai.tldr: Premover 通过在用户输入指令期间进行预计算，将空闲时间转化为有用计算，从而加速视觉-语言-动作策略的执行。
ai.motivation: 现有 VLA 策略在用户输入指令时处于空闲状态，导致交互效率低下。
ai.method: 冻结 VLA 骨干网络，附加两个小型投影头（图像块和语言令牌），生成焦点图并作为下一帧图像令牌的加权，同时训练一个标量就绪阈值来决定何时开始行动。
ai.result: 在 LIBERO 基准上，平均墙钟时间从 34.0 秒降至 29.4 秒（降低 13.6%），成功率保持 95.1%（基线 95.0%），而朴素预计算则降至 66.4%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户减少机器人响应等待时间，提升人机交互流畅度。

idea_spark.idea: 利用输入流前缀进行预计算，通过注意力加权和阈值判断实现早期动作。
idea_spark.risk: 预计算可能基于不完整指令导致错误动作，需谨慎设计阈值和加权机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类行为中获取灵感：人在听指令时已开始准备动作，而非等到指令完全结束。

en.tldr: Premover reduces wall-clock time by precomputing during user input, turning idle time into useful computation for VLA policies.
en.motivation: Existing VLA policies remain idle while users enter instructions, wasting interaction time.
en.method: Freeze the VLA backbone, attach two small projection heads for image patches and language tokens, generate a focus map to reweight next-step image tokens, and train a scalar readiness threshold to decide when to start acting.
en.result: On LIBERO, mean wall-clock time drops from 34.0s to 29.4s (13.6% reduction), with success rate matching baseline (95.1% vs 95.0%); naive premoving collapses to 66.4%.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage streaming input prefixes for precomputation, using attention weighting and a threshold to enable early action.
idea_spark.risk: Precomputation based on incomplete instructions may cause incorrect actions; careful threshold and weighting design is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human behavior: people start preparing actions while listening to instructions, not after they finish.

papers.title: Debiasing Message Passing to Mitigate Popularity Bias in GNN-based Collaborative Filtering
papers.summary: Collaborative filtering (CF) models based on graph neural networks (GNNs) achieve strong performance in recommender systems by propagating user-item signals over interaction graphs. However, they are highly susceptible to popularity bias, since skewed interaction distributions and repeated message passing across high-order neighborhoods amplify the influence of popular items while suppressing long-tail ones. Existing debiasing approaches, including re-weighting objectives, regularization, causal methods, and post-processing, are less effective in GNN-based settings because they do not directly counteract bias propagated through the aggregation process, and recent in-aggregation weighting methods often rely on static heuristics or unstable embedding estimates. We propose Debiasing Popularity Amplification in Aggregation (DPAA), a popularity debiasing framework for GNN-based CF that integrates adaptive, embedding-aware interaction weighting and layer-wise weighting directly into message passing. DPAA assigns interaction-level weights from a representation-aware popularity signal, stabilized by a smooth transition from pre-trained to evolving model embeddings during training. It further introduces a layer-wise weighting that amplifies higher-order neighborhoods, surfacing long-range interactions with diverse and underexposed items. Experiments on real-world and semi-synthetic datasets show that DPAA outperforms state-of-the-art popularity-bias correction methods for GNN-based CF.

ai.tldr: 提出DPAA框架，通过自适应交互权重和层级权重直接嵌入消息传递，缓解GNN协同过滤中的流行度偏差。
ai.motivation: GNN协同过滤因交互分布倾斜和消息传递放大流行项影响，现有去偏方法未直接对抗聚合过程中的偏差传播。
ai.method: DPAA在消息传递中集成自适应嵌入感知交互权重和层级权重，利用预训练到演化模型嵌入的平滑过渡稳定信号，并放大高阶邻域以暴露长尾项。
ai.result: 在真实和半合成数据集上，DPAA优于现有GNN协同过滤流行度偏差校正方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在图神经网络推荐中有效减轻流行度偏差，提升长尾物品推荐公平性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合预训练嵌入的平滑过渡与层级加权，可进一步探索动态图场景下的实时偏差校正。
idea_spark.risk: 权重计算依赖嵌入质量，训练初期嵌入不稳定可能导致权重偏差；层级加权可能增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受因果推断中反事实推理启发，可尝试将DPAA与因果去偏方法结合，实现更鲁棒的偏差控制。

idea_spark.idea: 结合预训练嵌入的平滑过渡与层级加权，可进一步探索动态图场景下的实时偏差校正。
idea_spark.risk: 权重计算依赖嵌入质量，训练初期嵌入不稳定可能导致权重偏差；层级加权可能增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受因果推断中反事实推理启发，可尝试将DPAA与因果去偏方法结合，实现更鲁棒的偏差控制。

en.tldr: Proposes DPAA, a framework that integrates adaptive interaction weighting and layer-wise weighting directly into message passing to mitigate popularity bias in GNN-based collaborative filtering.
en.motivation: GNN-based CF suffers from popularity bias due to skewed interaction distributions and message passing amplifying popular items; existing debiasing methods do not directly counteract bias propagated through aggregation.
en.method: DPAA incorporates embedding-aware interaction weighting and layer-wise weighting into message passing, stabilized by a smooth transition from pre-trained to evolving embeddings, and amplifies higher-order neighborhoods to surface long-tail items.
en.result: Experiments on real-world and semi-synthetic datasets show DPAA outperforms state-of-the-art popularity bias correction methods for GNN-based CF.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to effectively mitigate popularity bias in graph neural network recommenders, improving fairness for long-tail items.

idea_spark.idea: Combining smooth transition from pre-trained embeddings with layer-wise weighting could be extended to dynamic graph scenarios for real-time bias correction.
idea_spark.risk: Weight computation depends on embedding quality; unstable embeddings early in training may cause biased weights; layer-wise weighting may increase computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by counterfactual reasoning in causal inference, DPAA could be combined with causal debiasing methods for more robust bias control.

papers.title: Intrinsic volumes of $\ell_p$-balls and a continuum of Maxwell--Poincaré--Borel laws for their curvature measures
papers.summary: For $p>1$, we derive explicit formulas for the intrinsic volumes $V_0(\mathbb B_p^n),\dots,V_{n-1}(\mathbb B_p^n)$ of the $n$-dimensional $\ell_p$-balls $$ \mathbb B_p^n = \{x\in\mathbb R^n:\ |x_1|^p+\ldots+|x_n|^p\le 1\} $$ and, more generally, of their coordinate-weighted analogues. The formula is given in terms of a one-dimensional integral involving the special function $$ \mathcal F_p(t;ν) = \int_{\mathbb R}|u|^νe^{-|u|^p-t|u|^{2p-2}}\,du. $$ Previously known formulas for the intrinsic volumes of ellipsoids, weighted crosspolytopes, and rectangular boxes arise as special or limiting cases. We also obtain asymptotic formulas for $V_{j(n)}(\mathbb B_p^n)$ in the high-dimensional regime $n\to\infty$, where the index $j(n)$ is allowed to depend on $n$.   We further investigate the curvature measures of $\mathbb B_p^n$. These are finite measures $$ Φ_0(\mathbb B_p^n,\cdot),\dots,Φ_{n-1}(\mathbb B_p^n,\cdot) $$ on $\partial\mathbb B_p^n$ that localize the intrinsic volumes. We prove a Maxwell--Poincaré--Borel type limit theorem: if $X_n$ is a random boundary point of $\mathbb B_p^n$ distributed according to the normalized curvature measure $Φ_{j(n)}(\mathbb B_p^n,\cdot)/V_{j(n)}(\mathbb B_p^n)$, where $j(n)/n\toα\in[0,1]$ as $n\to\infty$, then for every fixed $r\in\mathbb N$, the joint distribution of the first $r$ coordinates of $n^{1/p}X_n$ converges weakly to the product measure $ν_{p,α}^{\otimes r}$. Here $ν_{p,α}$ is an explicit probability measure on $\mathbb R$ depending on $p>1$ and $α\in[0,1]$.   The main tool underlying these results is an explicit characterization of the curvature measures of coordinate-weighted $\ell_p$-balls, and in particular an explicit formula for their mixed moments.

ai.tldr: 推导了ℓ_p球内在体积的显式公式，并证明了其曲率测度的极限分布定理。
ai.motivation: 填补ℓ_p球内在体积和曲率测度显式公式的空白，并建立高维极限行为。
ai.method: 利用坐标加权ℓ_p球的曲率测度显式刻画和混合矩公式，结合特殊函数积分表示。
ai.result: 得到内在体积的积分公式、高维渐近公式，以及曲率测度下随机边界点坐标的乘积极限分布。
ai.help_to_user: 提供ℓ_p球几何量计算的解析工具，可用于高维数据分析、几何概率和统计形状分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用特殊函数积分统一处理多种凸体（椭球、加权交叉多面体、矩形盒）的内在体积。
idea_spark.risk: 特殊函数积分可能难以数值计算，高维渐近的收敛速度需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典Maxwell–Poincaré–Borel定律从球面推广到ℓ_p球，启发非欧几何中的极限定理。

en.tldr: Derived explicit formulas for intrinsic volumes of ℓ_p-balls and proved a limit theorem for their curvature measures.
en.motivation: Fill the gap of explicit formulas for intrinsic volumes and curvature measures of ℓ_p-balls, and establish high-dimensional limit behavior.
en.method: Using explicit characterization of curvature measures of coordinate-weighted ℓ_p-balls and mixed moment formulas, combined with integral representations of special functions.
en.result: Obtained integral formulas for intrinsic volumes, high-dimensional asymptotics, and a product limit distribution for coordinates of random boundary points under curvature measures.
en.help_to_user: Provides analytic tools for computing geometric quantities of ℓ_p-balls, useful in high-dimensional data analysis, geometric probability, and statistical shape analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Unify intrinsic volumes of various convex bodies (ellipsoids, weighted crosspolytopes, rectangular boxes) via special function integrals.
idea_spark.risk: Special function integrals may be numerically challenging; convergence rates in high dimensions need further verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Generalizing the classical Maxwell–Poincaré–Borel law from spheres to ℓ_p-balls inspires limit theorems in non-Euclidean geometry.

papers.title: From Clever Hans to Scientific Discovery: Interpreting EEG Foundational Transformers with LRP
papers.summary: Emerging foundation models (FMs) in electroencephalography (EEG) promise a path to scale deep learning in diagnostics and brain-computer interfaces despite data scarcity, yet their opaque nature remains a barrier to wider adoption. We investigate attention-aware Layer-wise relevance propagation (LRP) as a post-hoc attribution method for EEG-FMs, extending LRP's use on convolutional neural network (CNN)-based EEG models to the Transformer architectures that current FMs are based on. We find that LRP can both verify EEG-FM decisions and surface novel, biologically plausible hypotheses from them. In motor imagery, it unmasks 'Clever Hans' behavior where models prioritize task correlated ocular signals over the intended motor correlates. In a naturalistic paradigm for affect prediction, it reveals a recurring reliance on a central electrode cluster, suggesting a candidate sensorimotor signature of arousal. Though heatmap interpretation remains ambiguous in this complex domain, the results position LRP as a tool for both verification and exploration of EEG-FMs, a role that will grow in both importance and discovery potential as the underlying models mature.

ai.tldr: 将注意力感知的层间相关性传播（LRP）应用于脑电图基础模型（EEG-FMs），既能验证模型决策，又能发现新的生物学假设。
ai.motivation: 脑电图基础模型在诊断和脑机接口中潜力巨大，但其不透明性阻碍了广泛应用。
ai.method: 扩展LRP从CNN到Transformer架构的EEG-FMs，用于事后归因解释。
ai.result: 在运动想象中揭示‘聪明汉斯’行为（模型依赖眼动信号而非运动信号）；在情感预测中发现中央电极簇的重复依赖，暗示唤醒的感知运动特征。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解EEG-FMs的决策依据，识别潜在偏差，并探索新的神经生理学假设。

idea_spark.idea: 结合LRP与对抗训练，自动检测并修正模型中的‘聪明汉斯’行为。
idea_spark.risk: 热图解释在复杂领域仍存在歧义，可能误导结论。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用LRP发现的电极簇模式，设计更鲁棒的EEG解码器，减少对伪影的依赖。

en.tldr: Applying attention-aware Layer-wise relevance propagation (LRP) to EEG foundation models (EEG-FMs) can both verify model decisions and uncover novel biological hypotheses.
en.motivation: EEG foundation models hold promise for diagnostics and brain-computer interfaces, but their opacity hinders wider adoption.
en.method: Extend LRP from CNN-based EEG models to Transformer architectures used by current EEG-FMs for post-hoc attribution.
en.result: In motor imagery, LRP reveals 'Clever Hans' behavior where models prioritize ocular signals over motor correlates; in affect prediction, it shows recurring reliance on a central electrode cluster, suggesting a sensorimotor signature of arousal.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand EEG-FM decision rationale, identify potential biases, and explore novel neurophysiological hypotheses.

idea_spark.idea: Combine LRP with adversarial training to automatically detect and correct 'Clever Hans' behavior in models.
idea_spark.risk: Heatmap interpretation remains ambiguous in complex domains, potentially leading to misleading conclusions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage electrode cluster patterns discovered by LRP to design more robust EEG decoders that are less reliant on artifacts.

papers.title: A Feynman-Kac Formula for the Subcritical Ultraviolet-Renormalized Spin Boson Model
papers.summary: We prove a Feynman-Kac formula (FKF) for the self-energy renormalized spin boson Hamiltonian, describing a two-state quantum system linearly coupled to a bosonic quantum field. Similar to recent FKFs for the Fröhlich polaron and the non- and semi-relativistic Nelson models, it yields a probabilistic treatment of the spin as a jump process, but treats the field on the usual bosonic Fock space. As an application, we prove that the existence of ground states for infrared-regular models persists the removal of an ultraviolet cutoff.

ai.tldr: 证明了亚临界紫外重整化自旋玻色子模型的Feynman-Kac公式，并应用该公式证明红外正则模型在移除紫外截断后基态存在性保持。
ai.motivation: 为自旋玻色子模型建立概率论框架，以处理自旋作为跳跃过程，同时保持场在玻色子Fock空间上的标准描述。
ai.method: 通过Feynman-Kac公式将自旋玻色子哈密顿量的自能重整化转化为概率表示，其中自旋动力学由跳跃过程描述。
ai.result: 成功证明Feynman-Kac公式，并利用该公式证明红外正则模型在紫外截断移除后基态仍然存在。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了自旋玻色子模型的一种新概率论工具，有助于理解量子场论中紫外发散的重整化机制。

idea_spark.idea: 将自旋跳跃过程与玻色子场耦合的路径积分表示，可能用于模拟量子比特与环境的相互作用。
idea_spark.risk: 公式的严格性依赖于特定正则化条件，实际数值实现时可能面临高维积分收敛性问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Fröhlich极化子和Nelson模型近期Feynman-Kac公式的启发，将类似概率方法应用于自旋玻色子模型。

zh.motivation: 为自旋玻色子模型建立概率论框架，以处理自旋作为跳跃过程，同时保持场在玻色子Fock空间上的标准描述。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受Fröhlich极化子和Nelson模型近期Feynman-Kac公式的启发，将类似概率方法应用于自旋玻色子模型。

en.tldr: Proves a Feynman-Kac formula for the subcritical ultraviolet-renormalized spin boson model and applies it to show that ground state existence persists after removing the ultraviolet cutoff for infrared-regular models.
en.motivation: To establish a probabilistic framework for the spin boson model, treating the spin as a jump process while keeping the field on the usual bosonic Fock space.
en.method: Represents the self-energy renormalized spin boson Hamiltonian via a Feynman-Kac formula, where the spin dynamics are described by a jump process.
en.result: Successfully proves the Feynman-Kac formula and uses it to demonstrate that ground states exist for infrared-regular models even after removing the ultraviolet cutoff.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new probabilistic tool for the spin boson model, aiding understanding of ultraviolet divergence renormalization in quantum field theory.

idea_spark.idea: The path integral representation coupling spin jump processes with bosonic fields may be used to simulate qubit-environment interactions.
idea_spark.risk: The rigor of the formula depends on specific regularization conditions; practical numerical implementation may face convergence issues in high-dimensional integrals.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by recent Feynman-Kac formulas for the Fröhlich polaron and Nelson models, applying similar probabilistic methods to the spin boson model.

papers.title: TMRL: Diffusion Timestep-Modulated Pretraining Enables Exploration for Efficient Policy Finetuning
papers.summary: Fine-tuning pre-trained robot policies with reinforcement learning (RL) often inherits the bottlenecks introduced by pre-training with behavioral cloning (BC), which produces narrow action distributions that lack the coverage necessary for downstream exploration. We present a unified framework that enables the exploration necessary to enable efficient robot policy finetuning by bridging BC pre-training and RL fine-tuning. Our pre-training method, Context-Smoothed Pre-training (CSP), injects forward-diffusion noise into policy inputs, creating a continuum between precise imitation and broad action coverage. We then fine-tune pre-trained policies via Timestep-Modulated Reinforcement Learning (TMRL), which trains the agent to dynamically adjust this conditioning during fine-tuning by modulating the diffusion timestep, granting explicit control over exploration. Integrating seamlessly with arbitrary policy inputs, e.g., states, 3D point clouds, or image-based VLA policies, we show that TMRL improves RL fine-tuning sample efficiency. Notably, TMRL enables successful real-world fine-tuning on complex manipulation tasks in under one hour. Videos and code available at https://weirdlabuw.github.io/tmrl/.

ai.tldr: 提出TMRL框架，通过扩散时间步调制预训练，在行为克隆预训练与强化学习微调之间建立桥梁，实现高效探索与策略微调。
ai.motivation: 行为克隆预训练产生的动作分布狭窄，缺乏下游强化学习探索所需的覆盖范围，导致微调效率低下。
ai.method: 预训练阶段采用上下文平滑预训练，向策略输入注入前向扩散噪声，形成从精确模仿到广泛动作覆盖的连续体；微调阶段通过时间步调制强化学习，让智能体动态调整扩散时间步以控制探索程度。
ai.result: TMRL显著提升强化学习微调的样本效率，在复杂操作任务上实现一小时内完成真实世界微调。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将扩散模型与强化学习结合的统一框架，帮助用户更高效地微调预训练机器人策略，尤其适用于需要探索的复杂操作任务。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将上下文平滑预训练中的噪声注入策略推广到其他预训练范式（如自监督学习），以提升下游微调的探索能力？
idea_spark.risk: 扩散时间步的调节可能引入额外超参数，增加调优复杂度；噪声注入可能破坏预训练策略的稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受扩散模型在图像生成中控制生成过程的能力启发，将其应用于机器人策略的探索控制，实现从模仿到探索的平滑过渡。

en.tldr: TMRL bridges BC pre-training and RL fine-tuning via diffusion timestep modulation, enabling efficient exploration and policy fine-tuning.
en.motivation: BC pre-training produces narrow action distributions lacking coverage for downstream RL exploration, hindering fine-tuning efficiency.
en.method: Context-Smoothed Pre-training injects forward-diffusion noise into policy inputs to create a continuum from precise imitation to broad coverage; Timestep-Modulated RL dynamically adjusts the diffusion timestep to control exploration during fine-tuning.
en.result: TMRL significantly improves RL fine-tuning sample efficiency, enabling real-world fine-tuning on complex manipulation tasks in under one hour.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified framework combining diffusion models with RL to efficiently fine-tune pre-trained robot policies, especially for tasks requiring exploration.

idea_spark.idea: Could the noise injection strategy in CSP be generalized to other pre-training paradigms (e.g., self-supervised learning) to enhance downstream exploration?
idea_spark.risk: Modulating diffusion timesteps may introduce extra hyperparameters, increasing tuning complexity; noise injection might destabilize pre-trained policies.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by diffusion models' ability to control generation processes in image synthesis, we apply it to robot policy exploration for a smooth transition from imitation to exploration.

papers.title: Deep Probabilistic Unfolding for Quantized Compressive Sensing
papers.summary: We propose a deep probabilistic unfolding model to address the classical quantized compressive sensing problem that leverages an unfolding framework to enhance the reconstruction accuracy and efficiency. Unlike previous unfolding methods that apply L2 projection to measurements, we derive a closed-form, numerically stable likelihood gradient projection, which allows the model to respect the true quantization physics, turning the hard quantization constraint into a soft probabilistic guidance. Furthermore, an efficient, dual-domain Mamba module is specifically designed to dynamically capture and fuse the multi-scale local and global features, ensuring the interactions between the distant but correlated regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of the proposed method over previous works, which is capable of promoting the application of quantized compressive sensing in real life.

ai.tldr: 提出一种深度概率展开模型，通过闭式似然梯度投影和双域Mamba模块，显著提升量化压缩感知的重建精度与效率。
ai.motivation: 现有展开方法使用L2投影忽略真实量化物理过程，导致重建精度受限。
ai.method: 推导闭式稳定似然梯度投影将硬量化约束转为软概率引导，并设计双域Mamba模块动态捕获多尺度局部与全局特征。
ai.result: 在多个基准上达到最先进性能，优于以往方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何将物理约束与深度学习结合，提升量化压缩感知的实际应用效果。

idea_spark.idea: 将量化噪声建模为可学习的概率分布，并与展开网络联合优化。
idea_spark.risk: 闭式梯度推导可能依赖特定量化模型，泛化至非均匀量化需重新推导。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理模型出发设计网络模块，而非仅依赖数据驱动，可提升可解释性与性能。

zh.tldr: 提出一种深度概率展开模型，通过闭式似然梯度投影和双域Mamba模块，显著提升量化压缩感知的重建精度与效率。
zh.motivation: 现有展开方法使用L2投影忽略真实量化物理过程，导致重建精度受限。
zh.method: 推导闭式稳定似然梯度投影将硬量化约束转为软概率引导，并设计双域Mamba模块动态捕获多尺度局部与全局特征。
zh.result: 在多个基准上达到最先进性能，优于以往方法。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何将物理约束与深度学习结合，提升量化压缩感知的实际应用效果。

idea_spark.idea: 将量化噪声建模为可学习的概率分布，并与展开网络联合优化。
idea_spark.risk: 闭式梯度推导可能依赖特定量化模型，泛化至非均匀量化需重新推导。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理模型出发设计网络模块，而非仅依赖数据驱动，可提升可解释性与性能。

en.tldr: A deep probabilistic unfolding model with closed-form likelihood gradient projection and dual-domain Mamba module achieves state-of-the-art quantized compressive sensing reconstruction.
en.motivation: Existing unfolding methods use L2 projection that ignores true quantization physics, limiting reconstruction accuracy.
en.method: Derives a closed-form stable likelihood gradient projection to turn hard quantization into soft probabilistic guidance, and designs a dual-domain Mamba module to capture multi-scale local and global features.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks, outperforming prior methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to integrate physical constraints with deep learning to improve practical quantized compressive sensing.

idea_spark.idea: Model quantization noise as a learnable probability distribution and jointly optimize with the unfolding network.
idea_spark.risk: Closed-form gradient derivation may depend on specific quantization models; generalization to non-uniform quantization requires re-derivation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Designing network modules from physical models rather than purely data-driven approaches can improve interpretability and performance.

papers.title: Encore: Conditioning Trajectory Forecasting via Biased Ego Rehearsals
papers.summary: Learning and representing the subjectivities of agents has become a challenging but crucial problem in the trajectory prediction task. Such subjectivities not only present specific spatial or temporal structures, but also are anisotropic for all interaction participants. Despite great efforts, it remains difficult to explicitly learn and forecast these subjectivities, let alone further modulate models' predictions through a specific ego's subjectivity. Inspired by prefactual thoughts in psychology and relevant theatrical concepts, we interpret such subjectivities in future trajectories as the continuous process from rehearsal to encore. In the rehearsal phase, the proposed ego predictor focuses on how each ego agent learns to derive and direct a set of explicitly biased rehearsal trajectories for all participants in the scene from the short-term observations. Then, these rehearsal trajectories serve as immediate controls to condition final predictions, providing direct yet distinct ego biases for the prediction network to simulate agents' various subjectivities. Experiments across datasets not only demonstrate a consistent improvement in the performance of the proposed \emph{Encore} trajectory prediction model but also provide clear interpretability regarding subjectivities as biased ego rehearsals.

ai.tldr: 提出Encore模型，通过有偏的自我排练轨迹来显式学习并调节轨迹预测中的主体性。
ai.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法难以显式学习并调控不同智能体的主体性（主观意图），导致预测缺乏个性化和可解释性。
ai.method: 受心理学预事实思维和戏剧排练概念启发，设计两阶段框架：排练阶段让每个自我智能体为所有参与者生成一组有偏的排练轨迹；再将这些排练轨迹作为条件，引导最终预测网络输出带有自我偏见的轨迹。
ai.result: 在多个数据集上一致提升预测性能，并提供了关于主体性作为有偏自我排练的清晰可解释性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将智能体的主观意图显式建模为可调节的偏见，并用于提升轨迹预测的准确性和可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将每个智能体的主观偏见视为可学习的排练轨迹，并作为显式条件控制后续预测，实现个性化与可解释的预测。
idea_spark.risk: 排练轨迹的生成可能过度依赖短时观测，导致长期预测偏差累积；偏见引入可能降低多智能体交互的全局一致性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从心理学预事实思维和戏剧排练概念中获取灵感，将抽象的主体性转化为可操作的有偏排练过程。

zh.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法难以显式学习并调控不同智能体的主体性（主观意图），导致预测缺乏个性化和可解释性。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将智能体的主观意图显式建模为可调节的偏见，并用于提升轨迹预测的准确性和可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将每个智能体的主观偏见视为可学习的排练轨迹，并作为显式条件控制后续预测，实现个性化与可解释的预测。
idea_spark.risk: 排练轨迹的生成可能过度依赖短时观测，导致长期预测偏差累积；偏见引入可能降低多智能体交互的全局一致性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从心理学预事实思维和戏剧排练概念中获取灵感，将抽象的主体性转化为可操作的有偏排练过程。

en.tldr: Encore models trajectory prediction by conditioning on biased ego rehearsal trajectories, explicitly capturing agent subjectivities.
en.motivation: Existing methods struggle to explicitly learn and modulate agent subjectivities (subjective intentions) in trajectory prediction, leading to less personalized and interpretable forecasts.
en.method: Inspired by prefactual thoughts and theatrical rehearsal, a two-stage framework is proposed: the ego predictor first generates a set of biased rehearsal trajectories for all participants from short-term observations; these rehearsals then condition the final prediction network to produce trajectories with explicit ego biases.
en.result: Consistent performance improvement across datasets, with clear interpretability of subjectivities as biased ego rehearsals.
en.help_to_user: Provides a way to explicitly model and adjust agent subjective biases in trajectory forecasting, improving accuracy and interpretability.

idea_spark.idea: Treat each agent's subjective bias as learnable rehearsal trajectories that explicitly condition subsequent predictions, enabling personalized and interpretable forecasting.
idea_spark.risk: Rehearsal generation may over-rely on short-term observations, causing long-term bias accumulation; introducing biases may reduce global consistency in multi-agent interactions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from psychological prefactual thinking and theatrical rehearsal to transform abstract subjectivity into an operational biased rehearsal process.

papers.title: Field Theory of Data: Anomaly Detection via the Functional Renormalization Group. The 2D Ising Model as a Benchmark
papers.summary: We establish a correspondence between anomaly detection in high-noise regimes and the renormalization group flow of non-equilibrium field theories. We provide a physical grounding for this framework by proving that the detection of phase transitions in interacting non-equilibrium systems maps to the study of an effective equilibrium field theory near its Gaussian fixed point, which we identify with the universal Marchenko-Pastur distribution. Applying the Functional Renormalization Group to the two-dimensional Model A, we demonstrate that the noise-to-signal ratio acts as a physical temperature, where the signal emerges as ordered domains within a thermalized background of fluctuations. Using the exact Onsager solution as a benchmark, we show that this approach identifies critical thresholds with an error below 4%, significantly outperforming standard information-theoretic metrics such as the Kullback-Leibler divergence. Our results provide a universal strategy for resolving structures in complex datasets near criticality, bridging the gap between statistical mechanics and statistical inference.

ai.tldr: 将高噪声环境下的异常检测问题映射到非平衡场论的重整化群流，以二维Ising模型为基准，证明噪声-信号比充当物理温度，并利用精确Onsager解验证该方法在临界阈值识别上误差低于4%。
ai.motivation: 现有信息论指标（如KL散度）在高噪声、近临界条件下检测异常结构的能力有限，需要一种基于物理原理的通用策略。
ai.method: 建立异常检测与功能重整化群（FRG）之间的对应关系，将检测问题转化为有效平衡场论在Gauss固定点附近的研究，并用二维Model A作为测试系统。
ai.result: 在二维Ising模型上，该方法识别临界阈值的误差低于4%，显著优于KL散度等标准指标。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将统计力学工具（重整化群）应用于数据异常检测的新视角，尤其适用于高噪声、近临界数据集。

idea_spark.idea: 利用FRG的尺度变换思想，将异常检测问题转化为寻找数据中“有序域”在噪声背景下的临界点。
idea_spark.risk: 需要数据满足某种场论假设（如短程相互作用），对于非平稳或长程相关数据可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将物理中的温度概念类比为噪声-信号比，启发我们重新定义数据中的“有序”与“无序”。

idea_spark.risk: 需要数据满足某种场论假设（如短程相互作用），对于非平稳或长程相关数据可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将物理中的温度概念类比为噪声-信号比，启发我们重新定义数据中的“有序”与“无序”。

en.tldr: We map anomaly detection in high-noise regimes to the renormalization group flow of non-equilibrium field theories, using the 2D Ising model as a benchmark. The noise-to-signal ratio acts as a physical temperature, and the method identifies critical thresholds with an error below 4%, outperforming standard metrics like KL divergence.
en.motivation: Standard information-theoretic metrics (e.g., KL divergence) struggle to detect anomalies in high-noise, near-critical regimes, motivating a physics-based universal strategy.
en.method: We establish a correspondence between anomaly detection and the functional renormalization group (FRG), reducing the problem to an effective equilibrium field theory near its Gaussian fixed point, and test it on the 2D Model A.
en.result: On the 2D Ising model, the approach identifies critical thresholds with an error below 4%, significantly outperforming KL divergence and other standard metrics.
en.help_to_user: Provides a novel perspective for applying statistical mechanics tools (renormalization group) to anomaly detection, especially for high-noise, near-critical datasets.

idea_spark.idea: Use the scale transformation idea of FRG to reformulate anomaly detection as finding the critical point where 'ordered domains' emerge from a noisy background.
idea_spark.risk: Requires the data to satisfy certain field-theoretic assumptions (e.g., short-range interactions); may fail for non-stationary or long-range correlated data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analogizing the physical temperature to the noise-to-signal ratio inspires a redefinition of 'order' and 'disorder' in data.

papers.title: GATA2Floor: Graph attention for floor counting in street-view facades
papers.summary: Automated analysis of building facades from street-level imagery has great potential for urban analytics, energy assessment, and emergency planning. However, it requires reasoning over spatially arranged elements rather than solely isolated detections. In this work, we model each facade as a graph over window/door detections with a vertical prior on edges. Additionally, we introduce GATA2Floor, a multi-head Graph Attention v2 (GATv2) based model that predicts the global floor count of a building and, via learnable cross-attention queries, softly assigns elements to latent floor slots, yielding interpretable outputs and robustness to irregular designs. To mitigate the lack of labeled datasets, we demonstrate that the proposed graph-based reasoning can be applied without annotations by leveraging a lightweight label-free proposal mechanism based on self-supervised features and vision-language scoring. Our approach demonstrates the value of graph-attention-based relational reasoning for facade understanding.

ai.tldr: 提出基于图注意力网络GATA2Floor的街景立面楼层计数方法，利用图结构建模门窗检测，通过可学习交叉注意力实现楼层分配，并支持无标注训练。
ai.motivation: 传统立面分析依赖孤立检测，缺乏对空间排列关系的推理，且标注数据稀缺。
ai.method: 将立面建模为门窗检测图，引入垂直先验边；采用多头GATv2预测楼层数，并通过可学习交叉注意力将元素软分配到潜在楼层槽位；提出基于自监督特征和视觉语言打分的无标注提案机制。
ai.result: 在街景立面数据集上验证了图注意力关系推理的有效性，输出可解释且对不规则设计鲁棒。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动从街景图像中准确统计建筑楼层数，支持城市规划、能源评估和应急管理。

idea_spark.idea: 将无标注提案机制扩展到多模态数据（如结合文本描述或卫星图），进一步提升楼层计数精度和泛化能力。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖自监督特征和视觉语言模型的质量，在极端不规则立面或遮挡严重场景下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于图神经网络在关系推理中的成功，以及无标注学习在减少人工标注成本方面的潜力。

zh.tldr: 提出基于图注意力网络GATA2Floor的街景立面楼层计数方法，利用图结构建模门窗检测，通过可学习交叉注意力实现楼层分配，并支持无标注训练。

idea_spark.idea: 将无标注提案机制扩展到多模态数据（如结合文本描述或卫星图），进一步提升楼层计数精度和泛化能力。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于图神经网络在关系推理中的成功，以及无标注学习在减少人工标注成本方面的潜力。

en.tldr: Proposes GATA2Floor, a graph attention network for floor counting in street-view facades, modeling facades as graphs over window/door detections with learnable cross-attention for floor assignment, and a label-free proposal mechanism.
en.motivation: Traditional facade analysis lacks reasoning over spatial arrangements and suffers from scarce labeled data.
en.method: Models facades as graphs with vertical prior edges; uses multi-head GATv2 to predict floor count and cross-attention to softly assign elements to latent floor slots; introduces a label-free proposal mechanism based on self-supervised features and vision-language scoring.
en.result: Demonstrates effectiveness of graph-attention relational reasoning on street-view facade datasets, with interpretable outputs and robustness to irregular designs.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically count building floors from street-view images, supporting urban analytics, energy assessment, and emergency planning.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the label-free proposal mechanism to multimodal data (e.g., combining text descriptions or satellite imagery) to further improve floor counting accuracy and generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on quality of self-supervised features and vision-language models; may fail in extremely irregular facades or heavy occlusion scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of graph neural networks in relational reasoning and the potential of label-free learning to reduce annotation costs.

papers.title: Large $N$ factorization of families of tensor trace-invariants
papers.summary: It was recently proven that, in contrast to their matrix analogues, the moments of a real Gaussian tensor of size N do not in general factorize over their connected components in the asymptotic large N limit. While the original proof of this rather surprising result was not constructive, explicit examples of non-factorizing moments, which are expectation values of trace-invariants, have since then been discovered. We explore further aspects of this problem, with a focus on Haar-distributed (or Gaussian) complex random tensors, which are more directly relevant to quantum information. We start out by exhibiting an explicit example of non-factorizing trace-invariant, thereby filling a gap in the recent literature. We then turn to the opposite question: that of finding interesting families of trace-invariants that do in fact factorize at large N. We establish three main theorems in this regard. The first one provides a sufficient combinatorial bound ensuring large N factorization, that is also simple enough to be applicable to various cases of practical relevance. Our second main result shows that the expectation value of any compatible trace-invariant is dominated by certain tree-like combinatorial structures at large N, which we refer to as tree-like dominant pairings. Our third main theorem establishes that any trace-invariant admitting tree-like dominant pairings does actually factorize at large N. In this way, we are able to prove that various families of trace-invariants that have been previously studied in the literature do factorize at large N. We apply our findings to the theory of multipartite quantum entanglement: to any trace-invariant is associated a multipartite generalization of Rényi entanglement entropy, whose typical expectation value in the uniform random quantum state can be explicitly computed assuming large N factorization.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了随机张量迹不变量在大N极限下的因式分解性质，证明了某些迹不变量确实可以因式分解，并应用于多体量子纠缠熵的计算。
ai.motivation: 矩阵情形下矩的因式分解性质在张量情形下不再普遍成立，需要系统研究哪些迹不变量仍能因式分解。
ai.method: 通过组合图论方法，定义树状主导配对，并建立三个主要定理来刻画因式分解的充分条件。
ai.result: 证明了存在非因式分解的显式例子，同时给出了确保因式分解的组合边界条件，并应用于多体Rényi纠缠熵的期望值计算。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机张量在大N极限下的统计性质，为量子信息中多体纠缠的典型行为提供理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用组合图论方法，将迹不变量因式分解问题转化为树状结构的识别问题。
idea_spark.risk: 树状主导配对的条件可能过于严格，导致实际应用中许多重要不变量无法满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从矩阵情形到张量情形的因式分解失效，启发我们重新审视高维随机结构中的统计独立性假设。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了随机张量迹不变量在大N极限下的因式分解性质，证明了某些迹不变量确实可以因式分解，并应用于多体量子纠缠熵的计算。

idea_spark.idea: 利用组合图论方法，将迹不变量因式分解问题转化为树状结构的识别问题。
idea_spark.risk: 树状主导配对的条件可能过于严格，导致实际应用中许多重要不变量无法满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从矩阵情形到张量情形的因式分解失效，启发我们重新审视高维随机结构中的统计独立性假设。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the factorization properties of tensor trace-invariants in the large N limit, proving that certain invariants do factorize, and applies the results to multipartite Rényi entanglement entropy.
en.motivation: Unlike matrix moments, tensor moments do not generally factorize; a systematic study is needed to identify which trace-invariants still factorize.
en.method: Combinatorial graph theory is used to define tree-like dominant pairings, and three main theorems characterize sufficient conditions for factorization.
en.result: An explicit non-factorizing example is given, along with a combinatorial bound ensuring factorization; the results are applied to compute the expected multipartite Rényi entropy in random quantum states.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools to understand the statistical properties of random tensors at large N, relevant to multipartite entanglement in quantum information.

idea_spark.idea: Use combinatorial graph theory to reduce the factorization problem of trace-invariants to identifying tree-like structures.
idea_spark.risk: The tree-like condition may be too restrictive for many practically relevant invariants.
idea_spark.inspiration: The failure of factorization from matrices to tensors prompts a re-examination of statistical independence assumptions in high-dimensional random structures.

papers.title: Efficient Adjoint Matching for Fine-tuning Diffusion Models
papers.summary: Reward fine-tuning has become a common approach for aligning pretrained diffusion and flow models with human preferences in text-to-image generation. Among reward-gradient-based methods, Adjoint Matching (AM) provides a principled formulation by casting reward fine-tuning as a stochastic optimal control (SOC) problem. However, AM inevitably requires a substantial computational cost: it requires (i) stochastic simulation of full generative trajectories under memoryless dynamics, resulting in a large number of function evaluations, and (ii) backward ODE simulation of the adjoint state along each sampled trajectory. In this work, we observe that both bottlenecks are closely tied to the \textit{non-trivial base drift} inherited from the pretrained model. Motivated by this observation, we propose \textbf{Efficient Adjoint Matching (EAM)}, which substantially improves training efficiency by reformulating the SOC problem with a \textit{linear base drift} and a correspondingly modified \textit{terminal cost}. This reformulation removes both sources of inefficiency; it enables training-time sampling with a few-step deterministic ODE solver and yields a closed-form adjoint solution that eliminates backward adjoint simulation. On standard text-to-image reward fine-tuning benchmarks, EAM converges up to 4x faster than AM and matches or surpasses it across various metrics including PickScore, ImageReward, HPSv2.1, CLIPScore and Aesthetics.

ai.motivation: 现有伴随匹配方法因非平凡基漂移导致大量函数评估和反向伴随模拟，计算成本高昂。
ai.method: 将随机最优控制问题重新表述为线性基漂移，并修改终端代价，从而支持少步确定性ODE采样和闭式伴随解。
ai.result: 在标准文本到图像奖励微调基准上，收敛速度比AM快4倍，在PickScore、ImageReward等指标上相当或更优。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效地将预训练扩散模型与人类偏好对齐，减少微调计算开销。
