en.tldr: Proposes Efficient Adjoint Matching, which accelerates reward fine-tuning of diffusion models by up to 4x via linear base drift and closed-form adjoint solution.
en.motivation: Existing Adjoint Matching suffers from high computational cost due to non-trivial base drift, requiring many function evaluations and backward adjoint simulation.
en.method: Reformulates the stochastic optimal control problem with a linear base drift and modified terminal cost, enabling few-step deterministic ODE sampling and closed-form adjoint.
en.result: On standard text-to-image reward fine-tuning benchmarks, EAM converges up to 4x faster than AM and matches or surpasses it on metrics like PickScore, ImageReward, HPSv2.1, CLIPScore, and Aesthetics.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently align pretrained diffusion models with human preferences while reducing computational overhead.

idea_spark.idea: Simplify the stochastic optimal control problem by redefining the base drift to avoid expensive simulation and backward computation.
idea_spark.risk: Linear base drift may limit expressiveness for complex reward functions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrows linearization techniques from control theory to turn nonlinear problems into analytically solvable forms.

papers.title: When Emotion Becomes Trigger: Emotion-style dynamic Backdoor Attack Parasitising Large Language Models
papers.summary: Backdoor vulnerabilities widely exist in the fine-tuning of large language models(LLMs). Most backdoor poisoning methods operate mainly at the token level and lack deeper semantic manipulation, which limits stealthiness. In addition, Prior attacks rely on a single fixed trigger to induce harmful outputs. Such static triggers are easy to detect, and clean fine-tuning can weaken the trigger-target association. Through causal validation, we observe that emotion is not directly linked to individual words, but functions as an overall stylistic factor through tone. In the representation space of LLM, emotion can be decoupled from semantics, forming distinct cluster from the original neutral text. Therefore, we consider the emotional factor as the backdoor trigger to propose a pparasitic emotion-style dynamic backdoor attack, Paraesthesia. By mixing samples with the emotional trigger into clean data and then fine-tuning the model, the model is able to generate the predefined attack response when encountering emotional inputs during the inference stage. Paraesthesia includes two the quantification and rewriting of emotional styles. We evaluate the effectiveness of our method on instruction-following generation and classification tasks. The experimental results show that Paraesthesia achieves an attack success rate of around 99\% across both task types and four different models, while maintaining the clean utility of the models.

ai.tldr: 提出一种以情感风格为动态触发器的后门攻击方法Paraesthesia，在微调阶段注入情感样本，使模型在推理时遇到情感输入即产生预设有害输出。
ai.motivation: 现有后门攻击多基于固定词级触发器，易被检测且微调后关联减弱；情感作为整体风格因素，与语义可解耦，更隐蔽。
ai.method: 通过因果验证发现情感在表示空间中与语义分离，设计情感风格量化与改写模块，将情感触发样本混入干净数据微调模型。
ai.result: 在指令生成和分类任务上，对四种模型均达到约99%的攻击成功率，且保持模型干净效用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解情感风格可作为隐蔽后门触发器，提升对LLM安全威胁的认知。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将情感风格作为防御检测的突破口，或设计情感感知的鲁棒微调方法。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能被恶意利用，需加强情感输入的安全过滤。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用表示空间中的风格-语义解耦特性，可启发更通用的隐蔽攻击与防御研究。

en.tldr: Proposes Paraesthesia, an emotion-style dynamic backdoor attack that uses emotional style as a trigger, achieving ~99% attack success rate across models while preserving utility.
en.motivation: Existing token-level triggers are static and detectable; emotion as a stylistic factor is decoupled from semantics, offering better stealth.
en.method: Causal validation shows emotion forms distinct clusters in representation space; emotion quantification and rewriting modules inject emotional samples into fine-tuning data.
en.result: Achieves ~99% attack success rate on instruction-following and classification tasks across four LLMs, with minimal impact on clean performance.
en.help_to_user: Raises awareness of emotion as a stealthy backdoor trigger in LLMs.

idea_spark.idea: Explore emotion-aware defenses or robust fine-tuning methods to counter such attacks.
idea_spark.risk: Potential misuse for malicious purposes; requires enhanced input filtering.
idea_spark.inspiration: Style-semantic decoupling in representation space inspires novel attack and defense paradigms.

papers.title: USEMA: a Scalable Efficient Mamba Like Attention for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.summary: Accurate medical image segmentation is an integral part of the medical image analysis pipeline that requires the ability to merge local and global information. While vision transformers are able to capture global interactions using vanilla self-attention, their quadratic computational complexity in the input size remains a struggle for medical image segmentation tasks. Motivated by the dispersion property of vanilla self-attention and recent development of Mamba form of attention, Scalable and Efficient Mamba like Attention (SEMA) utilizes token localization via local window attention to avoid dispersion and maintain focusing, complemented by theoretically consistent arithmetic averaging to capture global aspect of attention. In this work, we present USEMA, a hybrid UNet architecture that merges the local feature extraction ability of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with SEMA attention. We conduct experiments with USEMA across a variety of modalities and image sizes, demonstrating improved computational efficiency compared to transformer based models using full self-attention, and superior segmentation performance relative to purely convolution and Mamba-based models.

ai.tldr: 提出USEMA，一种结合CNN局部特征提取与SEMA注意力机制的混合UNet架构，用于高效且准确的医学图像分割。
ai.motivation: 视觉Transformer在医学图像分割中计算复杂度高，且标准自注意力存在分散问题，需要一种兼顾局部与全局信息且计算高效的注意力机制。
ai.method: 基于Mamba形式注意力，采用局部窗口注意力实现token定位避免分散，并用理论一致的算术平均捕获全局注意力，与CNN结合形成混合UNet架构。
ai.result: 相比基于全自注意力的Transformer模型，计算效率提升；相比纯卷积和Mamba模型，分割性能更优。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在医学图像分割中平衡计算效率与分割精度的新架构，适用于多种模态和图像尺寸。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将SEMA注意力与更轻量的骨干网络（如MobileNet）结合，进一步降低计算成本，适用于边缘设备。
idea_spark.risk: 算术平均可能在某些复杂场景下过度平滑细节，需验证在精细结构分割中的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Mamba状态空间模型启发，将线性复杂度注意力与局部窗口结合，为高效视觉Transformer设计提供新思路。

idea_spark.risk: 算术平均可能在某些复杂场景下过度平滑细节，需验证在精细结构分割中的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Mamba状态空间模型启发，将线性复杂度注意力与局部窗口结合，为高效视觉Transformer设计提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes USEMA, a hybrid UNet architecture combining CNN local feature extraction with SEMA attention for efficient and accurate medical image segmentation.
en.motivation: Vision transformers suffer from quadratic complexity and dispersion in self-attention for medical image segmentation, necessitating an efficient mechanism that balances local and global information.
en.method: Based on Mamba-like attention, uses local window attention for token localization to avoid dispersion and theoretically consistent arithmetic averaging to capture global attention, integrated with CNN in a hybrid UNet.
en.result: Improved computational efficiency over full self-attention transformers and superior segmentation performance compared to pure convolution and Mamba-based models.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new architecture that balances computational efficiency and segmentation accuracy for medical images across various modalities and sizes.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining SEMA attention with lightweight backbones like MobileNet to further reduce computational cost for edge devices.
idea_spark.risk: Arithmetic averaging may oversmooth details in complex scenarios; robustness in fine structure segmentation needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Mamba state space models, combining linear-complexity attention with local windows offers a new direction for efficient vision transformer design.

papers.title: Observation of sine-Gordon-like solitons in a spinor Bose-Einstein condensate
papers.summary: We experimentally generate sine-Gordon-like solitons in a spin-1 spinor Bose-Einstein condensate (BEC) utilizing a robust and reproducible local phase-imprinting scheme. We find that the soliton velocity can be tuned by the effective quadratic Zeeman shift. This enables the investigation of controlled soliton interactions, in which we observe the characteristic elastic collision behavior of the integrable sine-Gordon model. The spatial displacement -- the so-called phase shift -- between incoming and outgoing solitons, the signature of their pairwise interaction, is found to be in quantitative agreement with numerical spin-1 simulations within the error bars. These results establish spinor BECs as a highly controllable experimental platform for studying aspects of the dynamics of sine-Gordon-like models.

ai.tldr: 在自旋-1玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体中实验生成并研究了类似sine-Gordon模型的孤子，通过有效二次塞曼位移调控孤子速度，观察到弹性碰撞行为及相位位移，与数值模拟定量一致。
ai.motivation: 探索自旋BEC作为研究sine-Gordon类模型动力学的可控实验平台。
ai.method: 利用局域相位印记方案在自旋-1 BEC中产生孤子，通过二次塞曼位移调节孤子速度，并观测孤子对碰撞。
ai.result: 观察到孤子弹性碰撞及特征相位位移，与自旋-1数值模拟在误差范围内定量吻合。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究可积非线性模型提供高度可控的量子模拟平台。

idea_spark.idea: 利用二次塞曼位移作为控制参数，可系统研究孤子相互作用及可积性破缺效应。
idea_spark.risk: 实验参数空间有限，可能难以覆盖所有非线性区域。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将sine-Gordon孤子动力学与量子信息处理或拓扑激发操控结合。

en.tldr: We experimentally generate sine-Gordon-like solitons in a spin-1 spinor Bose-Einstein condensate, tune their velocity via the quadratic Zeeman shift, observe elastic collisions with characteristic phase shifts, and find quantitative agreement with spin-1 simulations.
en.motivation: To establish spinor BECs as a controllable platform for studying sine-Gordon-like model dynamics.
en.method: A robust local phase-imprinting scheme creates solitons in a spin-1 BEC; the quadratic Zeeman shift tunes soliton velocity; collisions are observed.
en.result: Elastic collisions and phase shifts are observed, matching spin-1 numerical simulations within error bars.
en.help_to_user: Provides a highly controllable quantum simulation platform for studying integrable nonlinear models.

idea_spark.idea: Use the quadratic Zeeman shift as a control parameter to systematically study soliton interactions and integrability breaking.
idea_spark.risk: Limited experimental parameter space may not cover all nonlinear regimes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine sine-Gordon soliton dynamics with quantum information processing or topological excitation manipulation.

papers.title: Proximal Limited-Memory Quasi-Newton Methods for Nonsmooth Nonconvex Optimization
papers.summary: We introduce a proximal limited--memory quasi--Newton scheme for minimizing the sum of a continuously differentiable function and a proper, lower semicontinuous and prox-bounded, possibly nonsmooth, function. Both functions might be nonconvex. The method builds upon the computation of scaled proximal operators and is globalized by adaptively updating a regularization parameter based on a criterion of sufficient decrease. We prove global convergence under mild assumptions and then establish convergence of the entire sequence (with rates) under the Kurdyka--Lojasiewicz property. To efficiently solve the subproblems, we exploit the compact representation of limited-memory quasi-Newton updates. We derive also a compact representation of the limited--memory Kleinmichel formula, a rank-one quasi-Newton scheme that preserves positive definiteness under the same condition as the BFGS update. Numerical results show a significant speed up compared to other methods.

ai.tldr: 提出一种近端有限记忆拟牛顿方法，用于求解光滑与非光滑函数之和的非凸非光滑优化问题，并证明全局收敛性。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在处理非光滑非凸优化时效率较低，需要更快速的算法。
ai.method: 基于缩放近端算子，通过自适应正则化参数实现全局化，并利用有限记忆拟牛顿更新的紧凑表示高效求解子问题。
ai.result: 数值实验表明，该方法相比其他方法显著加速。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效求解非光滑非凸优化问题的算法，适用于机器学习、信号处理等领域。

idea_spark.idea: 将有限记忆拟牛顿更新与近端算子结合，并引入自适应正则化。
idea_spark.risk: 非凸情况下收敛性分析可能依赖较强的假设（如KL性质）。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用Kleinmichel公式保持正定性，启发设计更稳定的拟牛顿更新。

en.tldr: A proximal limited-memory quasi-Newton method is proposed for minimizing the sum of a smooth and a nonsmooth function, both possibly nonconvex, with global convergence guarantees.
en.motivation: Existing methods for nonsmooth nonconvex optimization are often slow; faster algorithms are needed.
en.method: The method uses scaled proximal operators, adaptively updates a regularization parameter for globalization, and exploits compact representations of limited-memory quasi-Newton updates to solve subproblems efficiently.
en.result: Numerical results show significant speedup compared to other methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient algorithm for nonsmooth nonconvex optimization, applicable in machine learning and signal processing.

idea_spark.idea: Combine limited-memory quasi-Newton updates with proximal operators and adaptive regularization.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence analysis in the nonconvex case may rely on strong assumptions like the KL property.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using the Kleinmichel formula to preserve positive definiteness inspires more stable quasi-Newton updates.

papers.title: Optimizing 4D Wires for Sparse 3D Abstraction
papers.summary: We present a unified framework for 3D geometric abstraction using a single continuous 4D wire, parameterized as a B-spline with spatial coordinates and variable width $(x,y,z,w)$. Existing approaches typically represent shapes as collections of many independent curve segments, which often leads to fragmented structures and limited physical realizability. In contrast, we show that a single continuous spline is sufficiently expressive to capture complex volumetric forms while enforcing global topological coherence. By imposing continuity, our method transforms 3D sketching from a local density-accumulation process into a global routing problem, providing a strong inductive bias toward cleaner aesthetics and improved structural coherence. To enable gradient-based optimization, we introduce a differentiable rendering pipeline that efficiently rasterizes variable-width curves with bounded projection error. This formulation supports robust optimization using modern guidance signals such as Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) or CLIP. We demonstrate applications including image-to-3D abstraction, multi-view wire art generation, and differentiable stylized surface filling. Experiments show that our unified representation produces structures with higher semantic fidelity and improved structural coherence compared to approaches based on collections of discrete curves.

ai.tldr: 提出用单一连续4D B样条曲线进行3D几何抽象的统一框架，支持梯度优化和多种应用。
ai.motivation: 现有方法使用多条独立曲线段，导致结构碎片化且物理可实现性差。
ai.method: 将3D草图转化为全局路由问题，引入可微分渲染管线高效光栅化变宽曲线。
ai.result: 相比离散曲线方法，生成的结构具有更高的语义保真度和结构连贯性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从图像或文本生成连贯、美观的3D线框抽象。

idea_spark.idea: 利用单一连续曲线作为隐式形状先验，结合可微分渲染实现端到端优化。
idea_spark.risk: 复杂形状可能需要多条曲线，单一曲线表达能力有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将3D建模视为路径规划问题，启发更简洁的几何表示方法。

zh.motivation: 现有方法使用多条独立曲线段，导致结构碎片化且物理可实现性差。
zh.method: 将3D草图转化为全局路由问题，引入可微分渲染管线高效光栅化变宽曲线。
zh.result: 相比离散曲线方法，生成的结构具有更高的语义保真度和结构连贯性。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户从图像或文本生成连贯、美观的3D线框抽象。

idea_spark.idea: 利用单一连续曲线作为隐式形状先验，结合可微分渲染实现端到端优化。
idea_spark.risk: 复杂形状可能需要多条曲线，单一曲线表达能力有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将3D建模视为路径规划问题，启发更简洁的几何表示方法。

en.tldr: A unified framework for 3D geometric abstraction using a single continuous 4D B-spline wire, enabling gradient-based optimization and diverse applications.
en.motivation: Existing methods use many independent curve segments, leading to fragmented structures and limited physical realizability.
en.method: Formulates 3D sketching as a global routing problem and introduces a differentiable rendering pipeline for variable-width curves.
en.result: Produces structures with higher semantic fidelity and structural coherence compared to discrete curve approaches.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate coherent and aesthetic 3D wire abstractions from images or text.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage a single continuous curve as an implicit shape prior, combined with differentiable rendering for end-to-end optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Complex shapes may require multiple curves, limiting the expressiveness of a single curve.
idea_spark.inspiration: Frames 3D modeling as a path planning problem, inspiring simpler geometric representations.

papers.title: A Semi-Supervised Framework for Speech Confidence Detection using Whisper
papers.summary: Automatic detection of speaker confidence is critical for adaptive computing but remains constrained by limited labelled data and the subjectivity of paralinguistic annotations. This paper proposes a semi-supervised hybrid framework that fuses deep semantic embeddings from the Whisper encoder with an interpretable acoustic feature vector composed of eGeMAPS descriptors and auxiliary probability estimates of vocal stress and disfluency. To mitigate reliance on scarce ground truth data, we introduce an Uncertainty-Aware Pseudo-Labelling strategy where a model generates labels for unlabelled data, retaining only high-quality samples for training. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves a Macro-F1 score of 0.751, outperforming self-supervised baselines, including WavLM, HuBERT, and Wav2Vec 2.0. The hybrid architecture also surpasses the unimodal Whisper baseline, yielding a 3\% improvement in the minority class, confirming that explicit prosodic and auxiliary features provide necessary corrective signals which are otherwise lost in deep semantic representations. Ablation studies further show that a curated set of high confidence pseudo-labels outperforms indiscriminate large scale augmentation, confirming that data quality outweighs quantity for perceived confidence detection.

ai.tldr: 提出一种半监督混合框架，融合Whisper语义嵌入与可解释声学特征，通过不确定性感知伪标签策略提升语音自信度检测性能。
ai.motivation: 语音自信度检测受限于标注数据稀缺和副语言标注主观性，现有方法依赖大量标注或纯自监督模型效果不佳。
ai.method: 结合Whisper编码器的深度语义嵌入与eGeMAPS描述符及辅助概率特征，采用不确定性感知伪标签策略筛选高质量伪标签进行训练。
ai.result: Macro-F1达0.751，优于WavLM、HuBERT等自监督基线，混合架构比纯Whisper基线在少数类上提升3%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在标注数据有限场景下提升语音自信度检测精度的实用框架。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将不确定性感知伪标签与主动学习结合，进一步减少人工标注成本。
idea_spark.risk: 伪标签质量依赖初始模型，若初始模型偏差较大可能引入噪声。
idea_spark.inspiration: 融合深度语义与手工声学特征可弥补纯深度表示丢失的韵律信息，启发多模态特征融合设计。

en.tldr: A semi-supervised hybrid framework fusing Whisper semantic embeddings with interpretable acoustic features, using uncertainty-aware pseudo-labelling to improve speech confidence detection.
en.motivation: Speech confidence detection suffers from scarce labelled data and subjective paralinguistic annotations, limiting performance of existing methods.
en.method: Combines deep semantic embeddings from Whisper encoder with eGeMAPS descriptors and auxiliary probability estimates, employing uncertainty-aware pseudo-labelling to select high-quality pseudo-labels for training.
en.result: Achieves Macro-F1 of 0.751, outperforming WavLM, HuBERT, and Wav2Vec 2.0 baselines; hybrid architecture improves minority class by 3% over unimodal Whisper baseline.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical framework for improving speech confidence detection accuracy under limited labelled data conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining uncertainty-aware pseudo-labelling with active learning to further reduce manual annotation effort.
idea_spark.risk: Pseudo-label quality depends on initial model; biased initial model may introduce noise.
idea_spark.inspiration: Fusing deep semantic and handcrafted acoustic features can recover prosodic information lost in pure deep representations, inspiring multi-modal feature fusion designs.

papers.title: Securing the Flow: Maritime Energy Resilience under Correlated and Decision-Dependent Disruptions
papers.summary: We develop a two-stage stochastic multi-commodity flow model to design a resilient maritime energy supply network under correlated chokepoint disruptions. A planner selects strategic inventories and infrastructure activations prior to uncertainty resolution, then routes crude oil, LNG, LPG, and fertilizer through a capacitated network. Three features distinguish this model: disruption scenarios are \emph{correlated}, reflecting the reality that proximate chokepoints (e.g., Hormuz, Bab el-Mandeb) fail jointly; scenario probabilities depend endogenously on first-stage decisions via affine distortion, formalizing \emph{risk exposure through utilization}; and a mean-CVaR objective mitigates tail-risk shortages. Methodologically, the decision-dependent probability model admits an exact MILP reformulation via McCormick linearization. CVaR preserves scenario-wise decomposability, and our Benders decomposition with corridor-based group-failure cuts converges finitely. The model is calibrated to Indian maritime energy imports (16 nodes, 28 arcs) using EIA, UNCTAD, World Bank, and operational data from the 2026 Hormuz crisis. Benders recovers the extensive-form optimum for scenario sizes up to $|S|=729$ with a constant iteration count (10-11). Empirically, the value of the stochastic solution (VSS) is 14.8%; the value of decision-dependent probabilities (VEP) ranges from 0.93% to 8.18%. The mean-CVaR frontier exhibits a design phase transition at confidence level $α\approx 0.75$. Notably, the value of modeling correlation is identically zero across stress tests: the network's diversified portfolio absorbs joint-corridor disruptions using the same hedging mechanisms as single-corridor disruptions (\emph{structural joint-failure resilience}). Finally, LPG emerges as the most exposed commodity, whereas crude oil is fully hedgeable via reserves and pipeline bypasses.

ai.tldr: 提出一个两阶段随机多商品流模型，用于设计在相关咽喉点中断下具有韧性的海上能源供应网络，并基于印度进口数据验证。
ai.motivation: 海上能源运输面临多个咽喉点（如霍尔木兹海峡、曼德海峡）同时中断的风险，现有模型未考虑中断相关性、决策依赖概率及尾部风险。
ai.method: 构建两阶段随机多商品流模型，引入相关中断场景、决策依赖概率（通过仿射扭曲）和均值-CVaR目标，采用McCormick线性化、Benders分解与走廊式群失效割求解。
ai.result: Benders分解在729个场景下迭代次数恒定（10-11次）；随机解价值14.8%，决策依赖概率价值0.93%-8.18%；均值-CVaR前沿在置信水平α≈0.75处出现设计相变；建模相关性价值为零，表明网络具有结构性联合失效韧性；LPG最脆弱，原油可通过储备和管道绕行完全对冲。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何设计韧性海上能源网络，应对相关且决策依赖的中断，并量化不同风险度量与建模假设的价值。

idea_spark.idea: 将相关中断与决策依赖概率结合，揭示网络结构性韧性可自然吸收联合失效，启发简化风险建模。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖精确的仿射扭曲参数，实际中概率扭曲函数可能更复杂；Benders分解对超大规模场景的扩展性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: LPG的脆弱性提示需关注特定商品供应链的差异化韧性策略；相关性价值为零的发现挑战了复杂相关建模的必要性。

zh.tldr: 提出一个两阶段随机多商品流模型，用于设计在相关咽喉点中断下具有韧性的海上能源供应网络，并基于印度进口数据验证。
zh.motivation: 海上能源运输面临多个咽喉点（如霍尔木兹海峡、曼德海峡）同时中断的风险，现有模型未考虑中断相关性、决策依赖概率及尾部风险。

idea_spark.idea: 将相关中断与决策依赖概率结合，揭示网络结构性韧性可自然吸收联合失效，启发简化风险建模。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖精确的仿射扭曲参数，实际中概率扭曲函数可能更复杂；Benders分解对超大规模场景的扩展性需验证。

en.tldr: Develops a two-stage stochastic multi-commodity flow model for resilient maritime energy networks under correlated chokepoint disruptions, validated on Indian import data.
en.motivation: Maritime energy transport faces risks from simultaneous chokepoint disruptions (e.g., Hormuz, Bab el-Mandeb), which existing models neglect correlation, decision-dependent probabilities, and tail risk.
en.method: Proposes a two-stage stochastic multi-commodity flow model with correlated disruption scenarios, decision-dependent probabilities via affine distortion, and a mean-CVaR objective. Solved via McCormick linearization, Benders decomposition with corridor-based group-failure cuts.
en.result: Benders decomposition achieves constant iterations (10-11) for up to 729 scenarios; VSS=14.8%, VEP=0.93%-8.18%; mean-CVaR frontier shows a design phase transition at α≈0.75; value of modeling correlation is zero, indicating structural joint-failure resilience; LPG is most exposed, crude oil fully hedgeable.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand designing resilient maritime energy networks under correlated and decision-dependent disruptions, and quantify the value of different risk measures and modeling assumptions.

idea_spark.idea: Combining correlated disruptions with decision-dependent probabilities reveals that network structural resilience naturally absorbs joint failures, suggesting simplified risk modeling.
idea_spark.risk: Model relies on precise affine distortion parameters; actual probability distortion may be more complex; scalability of Benders decomposition for very large scenarios needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: LPG's vulnerability highlights the need for differentiated resilience strategies for specific commodities; the zero value of correlation challenges the necessity of complex correlation modeling.

papers.title: Ada-MK: Adaptive MegaKernel Optimization via Automated DAG-based Search for LLM Inference
papers.summary: When large language models (LLMs) serve real-time inference in commercial online advertising systems, end-to-end latency must be strictly bounded to the millisecond range. Yet every token generated during the decode phase triggers thousands of kernel launches, and kernel launch overhead alone can account for 14.6% of end-to-end inference time. MegaKernel eliminates launch overhead and inter-operator HBM round-trips by fusing multiple operators into a single persistent kernel. However, existing MegaKernel implementations face a fundamental tension between portability and efficiency on resource-constrained GPUs such as NVIDIA Ada: hand-tuned solutions are tightly coupled to specific architectures and lack portability, while auto-compiled approaches introduce runtime dynamic scheduling whose branch penalties are unacceptable in latency-critical settings. We observe that under a fixed deployment configuration, the optimal execution path of a MegaKernel is uniquely determined, and runtime dynamic decision-making can be entirely hoisted to compile time. Building on this insight, we propose Ada-MK: (1) a three-dimensional shared-memory constraint model combined with K-dimension splitting that reduces peak shared memory usage by 50%; (2) MLIR-based fine-grained DAG offline search that solidifies the optimal execution path, completely eliminating runtime branching; and (3) a heterogeneous hybrid inference engine that embeds MegaKernel as a plugin into TensorRT-LLM, combining high-throughput Prefill with low-latency Decode. On an NVIDIA L20, Ada-MK improves single-batch throughput by up to 23.6% over vanilla TensorRT-LLM and 50.2% over vLLM, achieving positive gains across all tested scenarios--the first industrial deployment of MegaKernel in a commercial online advertising system.

ai.tldr: 提出Ada-MK，通过自动化DAG搜索优化MegaKernel，消除LLM推理中的内核启动开销，首次在商业广告系统中部署。
ai.motivation: LLM实时推理中内核启动开销占端到端时间的14.6%，现有MegaKernel在资源受限GPU上难以兼顾可移植性与效率。
ai.method: 三维共享内存约束模型与K维拆分降低峰值内存50%；MLIR细粒度DAG离线搜索固化最优执行路径；异构混合推理引擎将MegaKernel嵌入TensorRT-LLM。
ai.result: 在NVIDIA L20上，单批吞吐量相比TensorRT-LLM提升23.6%，相比vLLM提升50.2%，所有测试场景均正收益。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过编译时优化和内核融合显著降低LLM推理延迟，适用于延迟敏感的在线服务。

idea_spark.idea: 将运行时动态调度完全提升至编译时，消除分支开销，可启发其他延迟关键型系统的编译优化。
idea_spark.risk: 对固定部署配置的依赖可能限制在动态负载或异构硬件环境下的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 观察到固定配置下最优执行路径唯一，启发将运行时决策提前到编译时，简化推理路径。

zh.tldr: 提出Ada-MK，通过自动化DAG搜索优化MegaKernel，消除LLM推理中的内核启动开销，首次在商业广告系统中部署。
zh.motivation: LLM实时推理中内核启动开销占端到端时间的14.6%，现有MegaKernel在资源受限GPU上难以兼顾可移植性与效率。
zh.method: 三维共享内存约束模型与K维拆分降低峰值内存50%；MLIR细粒度DAG离线搜索固化最优执行路径；异构混合推理引擎将MegaKernel嵌入TensorRT-LLM。
zh.result: 在NVIDIA L20上，单批吞吐量相比TensorRT-LLM提升23.6%，相比vLLM提升50.2%，所有测试场景均正收益。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过编译时优化和内核融合显著降低LLM推理延迟，适用于延迟敏感的在线服务。

idea_spark.idea: 将运行时动态调度完全提升至编译时，消除分支开销，可启发其他延迟关键型系统的编译优化。
idea_spark.risk: 对固定部署配置的依赖可能限制在动态负载或异构硬件环境下的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 观察到固定配置下最优执行路径唯一，启发将运行时决策提前到编译时，简化推理路径。

en.tldr: Proposes Ada-MK, which optimizes MegaKernel via automated DAG search to eliminate kernel launch overhead in LLM inference, achieving the first industrial deployment in a commercial advertising system.
en.motivation: Kernel launch overhead accounts for 14.6% of end-to-end LLM inference time; existing MegaKernel implementations struggle with portability and efficiency on resource-constrained GPUs.
en.method: A 3D shared-memory constraint model with K-dimension splitting reduces peak shared memory by 50%; MLIR-based fine-grained DAG offline search solidifies the optimal execution path; a heterogeneous hybrid inference engine embeds MegaKernel into TensorRT-LLM.
en.result: On NVIDIA L20, single-batch throughput improves by up to 23.6% over vanilla TensorRT-LLM and 50.2% over vLLM, with positive gains across all tested scenarios.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how compile-time optimization and kernel fusion can significantly reduce LLM inference latency, especially for latency-critical online services.

idea_spark.idea: Hoisting runtime dynamic scheduling entirely to compile time eliminates branching overhead, inspiring similar compile-time optimizations for other latency-sensitive systems.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on fixed deployment configurations may limit generalization under dynamic workloads or heterogeneous hardware.
idea_spark.inspiration: The observation that the optimal execution path is uniquely determined under fixed configurations inspires moving runtime decisions to compile time to simplify inference paths.

papers.title: Predicting Disagreement with Human Raters in LLM-as-a-Judge Difficulty Assessment without Using Generation-Time Probability Signals
papers.summary: Automatic generation of educational materials using large language models (LLMs) is becoming increasingly common, but assigning difficulty levels to such materials still requires substantial human effort. LLM-as-a-Judge has therefore attracted attention, yet disagreement with human raters remains a major challenge. We propose a method for predicting which LLM-generated difficulty ratings are likely to disagree with human raters, so that such cases can be sent for re-rating. Unlike prior approaches, our method does not rely on generation-time probability signals, which must be collected during rating generation and are often difficult to compare across LLMs. Instead, exploiting the fact that difficulty is an ordinal scale, we use a separate embedding space, such as ModernBERT, and identify disagreement candidates based on the geometric consistency of the rating set. Experiments on English CEFR-based sentence difficulty assessment with GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3-235B-A22B showed that the proposed method achieved higher AUC for predicting disagreement with human raters than probability-based baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需生成时概率信号的方法，预测LLM难度评分与人类评分者的不一致，以便重新评分。
ai.motivation: LLM自动生成教育材料时，难度标注仍需大量人工，LLM作为评分者与人类存在分歧，现有方法依赖生成时概率信号，难以跨模型比较。
ai.method: 利用难度为序数尺度的特性，使用ModernBERT等独立嵌入空间，基于评分集的几何一致性识别可能分歧的候选。
ai.result: 在英语CEFR句子难度评估中，使用GPT-OSS-120B和Qwen3-235B-A22B，所提方法在预测与人类评分者分歧的AUC上优于基于概率的基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动识别LLM难度评分中可能出错的部分，减少人工审核成本。

idea_spark.idea: 利用嵌入空间的几何一致性替代概率信号，实现跨模型的不一致预测。
idea_spark.risk: 嵌入空间的选择和几何一致性阈值可能影响泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将序数约束与表示学习结合，为无概率信号的评分校准提供新思路。

zh.tldr: 提出一种无需生成时概率信号的方法，预测LLM难度评分与人类评分者的不一致，以便重新评分。
zh.motivation: LLM自动生成教育材料时，难度标注仍需大量人工，LLM作为评分者与人类存在分歧，现有方法依赖生成时概率信号，难以跨模型比较。
zh.method: 利用难度为序数尺度的特性，使用ModernBERT等独立嵌入空间，基于评分集的几何一致性识别可能分歧的候选。
zh.result: 在英语CEFR句子难度评估中，使用GPT-OSS-120B和Qwen3-235B-A22B，所提方法在预测与人类评分者分歧的AUC上优于基于概率的基线。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动识别LLM难度评分中可能出错的部分，减少人工审核成本。

idea_spark.idea: 利用嵌入空间的几何一致性替代概率信号，实现跨模型的不一致预测。
idea_spark.risk: 嵌入空间的选择和几何一致性阈值可能影响泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将序数约束与表示学习结合，为无概率信号的评分校准提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a method to predict disagreement between LLM-as-a-Judge difficulty ratings and human raters without using generation-time probability signals, enabling re-rating of problematic cases.
en.motivation: LLM-generated educational materials require human effort for difficulty labeling; LLM-as-a-Judge faces disagreement with humans, and prior methods rely on probability signals that are hard to compare across models.
en.method: Exploits the ordinal nature of difficulty, uses a separate embedding space (e.g., ModernBERT) and geometric consistency of rating sets to identify likely disagreement candidates.
en.result: On English CEFR sentence difficulty assessment with GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3-235B-A22B, the method achieves higher AUC for predicting disagreement with human raters than probability-based baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically flag potentially erroneous LLM difficulty ratings, reducing manual review effort.

idea_spark.idea: Replace probability signals with geometric consistency in embedding space for cross-model disagreement prediction.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of embedding space and geometric consistency threshold may affect generalizability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining ordinal constraints with representation learning offers a new path for rating calibration without probability signals.

papers.title: Rethinking Positional Encoding for Neural Vehicle Routing
papers.summary: Transformer-based models have become the dominant paradigm for neural combinatorial optimization (NCO) of vehicle routing problems (VRPs), yet the role of positional encoding (PE) in these architectures remains largely unexplored. Unlike natural language, where tokens are uniformly spaced on a line, routing solutions exhibit several properties that render standard NLP positional encodings inadequate. In this work, we formalize three such structural properties that a routing-aware PE should respect, namely anisometric node distances, cyclic and direction-aware topology, and hierarchical depot-anchored global multi-route structure, combining them with a unifying design principle of geometric grounding. Guided by these criteria, we analyze and compare PE methods spanning NLP, graph-transformer, and routing-specific families, and propose a hierarchical anisometric PE that combines a distance-indexed, circularly consistent in-route encoding with a depot-anchored angular cross-route encoding. Extensive experiments across diverse VRP variants demonstrate that geometry-grounded PE consistently outperforms index-based alternatives, with gains that transfer across problem variants, model architectures, and distribution shifts.

ai.tldr: 本文重新思考了神经车辆路径问题中Transformer的位置编码，提出了几何引导的分层各向异性位置编码，显著提升了性能。
ai.motivation: 现有NLP位置编码不适用于车辆路径问题，因为路径解具有非等距节点距离、循环方向感知拓扑和分层多路径结构等特性。
ai.method: 形式化了路径感知位置编码应满足的三个结构性质，并提出了结合距离索引循环编码和仓库锚定角度跨路径编码的分层各向异性位置编码。
ai.result: 在多种VRP变体上，几何引导的位置编码一致优于基于索引的替代方案，且增益可跨问题变体、模型架构和分布偏移迁移。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何为神经组合优化任务设计更有效的Transformer位置编码。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将分层各向异性编码与图神经网络结合，以处理更复杂的图结构路由问题。
idea_spark.risk: 编码设计可能对特定问题结构过拟合，泛化到非欧几里得空间时需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从路径问题的几何特性出发设计编码，启发其他领域如机器人路径规划或网络路由的编码创新。

en.tldr: This paper rethinks positional encoding for neural vehicle routing in Transformers, proposing a geometry-grounded hierarchical anisometric PE that consistently outperforms index-based alternatives.
en.motivation: Standard NLP positional encodings are inadequate for vehicle routing problems due to properties like anisometric node distances, cyclic direction-aware topology, and hierarchical multi-route structure.
en.method: Formalizes three structural properties for routing-aware PE and proposes a hierarchical anisometric PE combining distance-indexed circular in-route encoding with depot-anchored angular cross-route encoding.
en.result: Extensive experiments across diverse VRP variants show geometry-grounded PE consistently outperforms index-based alternatives, with gains transferring across problem variants, model architectures, and distribution shifts.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to design more effective Transformer positional encodings for neural combinatorial optimization tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining hierarchical anisometric encoding with graph neural networks for more complex graph-structured routing problems.
idea_spark.risk: Encoding design may overfit to specific problem structures; caution needed for generalization to non-Euclidean spaces.
idea_spark.inspiration: Designing encodings from geometric properties of routing problems inspires encoding innovations in other domains like robot path planning or network routing.

papers.title: Weather-Robust Cross-View Geo-Localization via Prototype-Based Semantic Part Discovery
papers.summary: Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL), which matches an oblique drone view to a geo-referenced satellite tile, has emerged as a key alternative for autonomous drone navigation when GNSS signals are jammed, spoofed, or unavailable. Despite strong recent progress, three limitations persist: (1) global-descriptor designs compress the patch grid into a single vector without separating layout from texture across the view gap; (2) altitude-related scale variation is retained in the learned embedding rather than marginalized; and (3) multi-objective training relies on hand-tuned scalars over losses on incompatible gradient scales. We propose SkyPart, a lightweight swappable head for patch-based vision transformers (ViTs) that institutes explicit part grouping over the patch grid. SkyPart has four theory-grounded components: (i) learnable prototypes competing for patch tokens via single-pass cosine assignment; (ii) altitude-conditioned linear modulation applied only during training, making the retrieval embedding altitude-free at inference; (iii) a graph-attention readout over active prototypes; and (iv) a Kendall uncertainty-weighted multi-objective loss whose stationary points are Pareto-stationary. At 26.95M parameters and 22.14 GFLOPs, SkyPart is the smallest among top-performing methods and sets a new state of the art on SUES-200, University-1652, and DenseUAV under a single-pass, no-re-ranking, no-TTA protocol. Its advantage over the strongest baseline widens under the ten-condition WeatherPrompt corruption benchmark.

ai.tldr: 提出SkyPart，一种轻量级可替换头部模块，通过原型语义部件发现实现天气鲁棒的跨视角地理定位，在多个基准上达到新最优。
ai.motivation: 现有跨视角地理定位方法存在全局描述符无法分离布局与纹理、高度尺度变化未消除、多目标训练依赖手动调参等问题。
ai.method: SkyPart包含四个理论驱动组件：可学习原型通过余弦分配竞争补丁令牌、高度条件线性调制（仅训练时使用）、图注意力读出活跃原型、Kendall不确定性加权多目标损失。
ai.result: 以26.95M参数和22.14 GFLOPs成为最小最优方法，在SUES-200、University-1652、DenseUAV上单次推理无需重排或测试时增强即达新最优，在WeatherPrompt天气退化基准上优势更明显。
ai.help_to_user: 为无人机在GNSS拒止环境下的自主导航提供了一种轻量、鲁棒且无需重排的跨视角地理定位方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将原型学习与不确定性加权多目标损失结合，自动平衡不同损失尺度，避免手动调参。
idea_spark.risk: 原型数量需手动设定，可能影响泛化；高度条件调制仅在训练时使用，推理时高度信息完全丢弃，可能丢失有用线索。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用Kendall不确定性加权损失实现多目标帕累托最优，可启发其他多任务学习场景的损失设计。

en.tldr: Proposes SkyPart, a lightweight swappable head for patch-based ViTs that achieves weather-robust cross-view geo-localization via prototype-based semantic part discovery, setting new state-of-the-art on multiple benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing CVGL methods suffer from global descriptors that fail to separate layout from texture, retained altitude scale variation, and hand-tuned multi-objective losses.
en.method: SkyPart consists of four components: learnable prototypes competing for patch tokens via cosine assignment, altitude-conditioned linear modulation (training only), graph-attention readout over active prototypes, and Kendall uncertainty-weighted multi-objective loss with Pareto-stationary stationary points.
en.result: With 26.95M parameters and 22.14 GFLOPs, SkyPart is the smallest among top methods and achieves new SOTA on SUES-200, University-1652, and DenseUAV under single-pass, no-re-ranking, no-TTA protocol; advantage widens under WeatherPrompt corruption benchmark.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight, robust, and re-ranking-free cross-view geo-localization solution for autonomous drone navigation in GNSS-denied environments.

idea_spark.idea: Combining prototype learning with uncertainty-weighted multi-objective loss automatically balances different loss scales, eliminating manual tuning.
idea_spark.risk: The number of prototypes is manually set, which may affect generalization; altitude-conditioned modulation is only used during training, discarding altitude information at inference, potentially losing useful cues.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using Kendall uncertainty-weighted loss to achieve Pareto optimality in multi-objective learning can inspire loss design in other multi-task scenarios.

papers.title: PoseBridge: Bridging the Skeletonization Gap for Zero-Shot Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
papers.summary: Zero-shot skeleton-based action recognition (ZSSAR) is typically treated as a skeleton-text alignment problem: encode joint-coordinate sequences, align them with language, and classify unseen actions. We argue that this alignment is often too late. Skeletons are not complete action observations, but compressed outputs of human pose estimation (HPE); by the time alignment begins, human-object interactions and pose-relative visual cues may no longer be explicit. We call this upstream semantic loss. To address it, we propose PoseBridge, an HPE-aware ZSSAR framework that bridges intermediate HPE representations to skeleton-text alignment. Rather than adding an RGB action branch or object detector, PoseBridge extracts pose-anchored semantic cues from the same HPE process that produces skeletons, then transfers them through skeleton-conditioned bridging and semantic prototype adaptation. Across NTU-RGB+D 60/120, PKU-MMD, and Kinetics-200/400, PoseBridge improves ZSSAR performance under the evaluated protocols. On the Kinetics-200/400 PURLS benchmark, which contains in-the-wild videos with diverse scenes and action contexts, PoseBridge shows the clearest separation, improving the strongest compared baseline by 13.3-17.4 points across all eight splits. Our code will be publicly released.

ai.tldr: 提出PoseBridge框架，通过利用人体姿态估计的中间表示来弥补骨架化过程中的语义损失，实现零样本骨架动作识别。
ai.motivation: 现有零样本骨架动作识别方法在骨架与文本对齐时已丢失了人体-物体交互和姿态相关的视觉线索，导致上游语义损失。
ai.method: 从人体姿态估计过程中提取姿态锚定的语义线索，通过骨架条件桥接和语义原型适应将其传递到骨架-文本对齐中。
ai.result: 在NTU-RGB+D 60/120、PKU-MMD和Kinetics-200/400上均提升了性能，在Kinetics-200/400 PURLS基准上比最强基线提高13.3-17.4个百分点。
ai.help_to_user: 为骨架动作识别领域提供了一种不依赖额外RGB分支或物体检测器的零样本方法，可直接应用于视频监控、人机交互等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将人体姿态估计的中间特征（如热图、部位置信图）直接作为动作识别的输入，而非仅使用最终骨架坐标。
idea_spark.risk: 中间表示可能包含噪声或冗余信息，需要设计有效的过滤和桥接机制以避免性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受“上游语义损失”概念启发，可系统分析其他识别任务中特征压缩带来的信息损失，并设计相应的补偿策略。

en.tldr: Proposes PoseBridge, a framework that leverages intermediate representations from human pose estimation to bridge the semantic loss in skeletonization for zero-shot skeleton-based action recognition.
en.motivation: Existing zero-shot skeleton-based action recognition methods suffer from upstream semantic loss because skeletons are compressed outputs of human pose estimation, losing human-object interactions and pose-relative visual cues before skeleton-text alignment.
en.method: Extracts pose-anchored semantic cues from the human pose estimation process and transfers them to skeleton-text alignment via skeleton-conditioned bridging and semantic prototype adaptation.
en.result: Improves performance on NTU-RGB+D 60/120, PKU-MMD, and Kinetics-200/400; on the Kinetics-200/400 PURLS benchmark, outperforms the strongest baseline by 13.3-17.4 points across all eight splits.
en.help_to_user: Provides a zero-shot method for skeleton-based action recognition that does not require additional RGB branches or object detectors, applicable to video surveillance, human-computer interaction, etc.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using intermediate features from human pose estimation (e.g., heatmaps, part confidence maps) directly as input for action recognition instead of only final skeleton coordinates.
idea_spark.risk: Intermediate representations may contain noise or redundancy, requiring effective filtering and bridging mechanisms to avoid performance degradation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the concept of 'upstream semantic loss', one can systematically analyze information loss due to feature compression in other recognition tasks and design corresponding compensation strategies.

papers.title: Selective Off-Policy Reference Tuning with Plan Guidance
papers.summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards helps reasoning, but GRPO-style methods stall on hard prompts where all sampled rollouts fail. SORT adds a repair update for those failures without changing rollout generation: it derives a plan from the reference solution, compares token probabilities with and without that plan, and gives higher weight to tokens that become more predictable under plan conditioning. This turns all-wrong prompts into selective, structure-aware learning signals instead of uniform imitation. Across three backbones and eight reasoning benchmarks, SORT improves over GRPO and guidance baselines, with largest gains on weaker models.

ai.tldr: 提出SORT方法，通过参考解生成计划并比较有无计划下的token概率，将全错样本转化为选择性结构感知学习信号，提升推理性能。
ai.motivation: GRPO类方法在困难提示上因所有采样轨迹均失败而无法获得有效学习信号。
ai.method: 对失败样本，从参考解导出计划，计算有无计划条件下的token概率差异，对计划条件下更可预测的token赋予更高权重。
ai.result: 在三个骨干模型和八个推理基准上，SORT优于GRPO及引导基线，在弱模型上提升最大。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用参考解的计划信息改进强化学习中的困难样本学习。

idea_spark.idea: 将参考解的计划作为条件，通过概率对比识别关键token，实现选择性学习。
idea_spark.risk: 计划质量依赖参考解，若参考解不准确可能引入噪声。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从失败样本中提取结构信息而非简单模仿，启发更鲁棒的强化学习算法设计。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从失败样本中提取结构信息而非简单模仿，启发更鲁棒的强化学习算法设计。

en.tldr: SORT uses a plan derived from the reference solution to compare token probabilities with and without plan conditioning, converting all-wrong prompts into selective structure-aware learning signals for better reasoning.
en.motivation: GRPO-style methods stall on hard prompts where all sampled rollouts fail, lacking effective learning signals.
en.method: For failed prompts, derive a plan from the reference solution, compute token probability differences with and without plan conditioning, and assign higher weights to tokens that become more predictable under plan conditioning.
en.result: Across three backbones and eight reasoning benchmarks, SORT outperforms GRPO and guidance baselines, with largest gains on weaker models.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage plan information from reference solutions to improve learning from hard samples in reinforcement learning.

idea_spark.idea: Use the plan from the reference solution as conditioning, identify key tokens via probability comparison, and enable selective learning.
idea_spark.risk: Plan quality depends on the reference solution; inaccurate references may introduce noise.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extracting structural information from failed samples rather than simple imitation inspires more robust reinforcement learning algorithm design.

papers.title: Stability of Compensated Jump Integrals under Quadratic Variation Convergence
papers.summary: We study the stability of compensated jump integrals under convergence of quadratic variation alone. Let \(X\) and \(\{X^n\}_{n\ge1}\) be càdlàg processes with jump measures \(μ,μ_n\) and predictable compensators \(ν,ν_n\). Under the assumption \[ [X^n-X]_t \to 0 \qquad\text{in probability}, \] we establish ucp convergence of compensated jump integrals of the form \[ \int_0^. \int_{\mathbb R} f_n(s,x)(μ_n-ν_n)(ds,dx) \] under local linear growth and locally uniform convergence assumptions on the integrands.   The proof is based on two structural mechanisms. The first is a forbidden bands principle, showing that quadratic variation convergence prevents jumps from crossing suitably chosen moving threshold regions. The second is a compensator mass control mechanism, which combines threshold-separated alignment of large predictable jumps with a counting argument for the associated compensator atoms.   The results require neither semimartingale convergence, convergence of characteristics, uniform tightness, nor global structural assumptions such as independence, stationarity, or Markovianity. More broadly, they show that quadratic variation convergence imposes a substantially stronger rigidity on the jump organization of càdlàg processes than one might initially expect.

ai.tldr: 研究在二次变差收敛下补偿跳跃积分的稳定性，建立了ucp收敛性。
ai.motivation: 探索二次变差收敛对跳跃过程结构的刚性影响，无需半鞅收敛等强假设。
ai.method: 利用禁止带原理和补偿子质量控制机制，结合阈值对齐与计数论证。
ai.result: 在局部线性增长和局部一致收敛条件下，补偿跳跃积分在ucp意义下收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 为跳跃过程稳定性分析提供弱假设下的收敛工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将二次变差收敛与跳跃阈值对齐结合，设计新的收敛判据。
idea_spark.risk: 阈值选择可能依赖具体过程，通用性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从二次变差收敛的刚性出发，简化跳跃积分收敛条件。

en.tldr: Studies stability of compensated jump integrals under quadratic variation convergence, establishing ucp convergence.
en.motivation: Explore rigidity imposed by quadratic variation convergence on jump organization without strong assumptions like semimartingale convergence.
en.method: Uses forbidden bands principle and compensator mass control mechanism with threshold alignment and counting arguments.
en.result: Under local linear growth and locally uniform convergence, compensated jump integrals converge in ucp sense.
en.help_to_user: Provides convergence tools for jump process stability under weak assumptions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine quadratic variation convergence with jump threshold alignment to design new convergence criteria.
idea_spark.risk: Threshold selection may depend on specific processes; generality needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage rigidity of quadratic variation convergence to simplify conditions for jump integral convergence.

papers.title: Optimal Codes with Positive Griesmer Defects, Related Optimal and Almost Optimal LRC Codes
papers.summary: Solomon and Stiffler constructed infinitely many families of linear codes meeting the Griesmer bound in 1965. It is well-known in 1990's that certain Griesmer codes (codes with the zero Griesmer defect) are equivalent to Solomon-Stiffler codes or Belov codes. Griesmer codes constructed in some recent papers published in IEEE Trans. Inf. Theory are actually Solomon-Stiffler codes or affine Solomon-Stiffler codes proposed in our previous paper. Therefore it is more challenging to construct optimal codes with positive Griesmer defects.   In this paper, we construct several infinite families of optimal codes with positive Griesmer defects. Then these codes are certainly not equivalent to Solomon-Stiffler codes or Belov codes. Weight distributions and subcode support weight distributions of these optimal codes are determined. On the other hand, some of constructed optimal linear codes are optimal locally recoverable codes (LRCs) meeting the Cadambe-Mazumdar (CM) bound. Some of our constructed optimal codes are very close to the CM bound. Localities of these optimal or almost optimal LRC codes are two.

ai.tldr: 本文构造了多族具有正Griesmer缺陷的最优码，这些码不等价于Solomon-Stiffler码或Belov码，并确定了其重量分布和子码支撑重量分布；部分构造的最优码是最优局部可修复码（LRC），接近或达到Cadambe-Mazumdar界，且局部性为2。
ai.motivation: 现有Griesmer码（零缺陷）等价于已知构造，构造具有正缺陷的最优码更具挑战性，且可得到新的最优LRC码。
ai.method: 通过代数构造方法，生成多族线性码，并计算其重量分布和子码支撑重量分布，验证其与CM界的接近程度。
ai.result: 得到若干族具有正Griesmer缺陷的最优码，部分为最优LRC码（达到CM界），其余非常接近CM界，所有LRC码的局部性均为2。
ai.help_to_user: 为编码理论研究者提供新的最优码构造实例，特别是具有正Griesmer缺陷的码，以及接近CM界的最优LRC码。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将正Griesmer缺陷码与分布式存储、秘密共享等应用结合，利用其重量分布特性设计安全协议。
idea_spark.risk: 构造复杂度可能随参数增大而急剧上升，且重量分布计算可能难以闭合形式表达。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Solomon-Stiffler和Belov经典构造启发，通过放松Griesmer缺陷为零的条件，开辟了新的最优码设计空间。

en.tldr: This paper constructs several infinite families of optimal codes with positive Griesmer defects, which are not equivalent to Solomon-Stiffler or Belov codes, and determines their weight distributions and subcode support weight distributions; some of these optimal codes are optimal locally recoverable codes (LRCs) meeting or approaching the Cadambe-Mazumdar bound, with locality two.
en.motivation: Existing Griesmer codes (zero defect) are equivalent to known constructions; constructing optimal codes with positive defects is more challenging and yields new optimal LRCs.
en.method: Algebraic constructions generate families of linear codes, followed by computation of weight distributions and subcode support weight distributions, and verification of proximity to the CM bound.
en.result: Several families of optimal codes with positive Griesmer defects are obtained; some are optimal LRCs (meeting the CM bound), others are very close to it, all with locality two.
en.help_to_user: Provides coding theory researchers with new examples of optimal codes with positive Griesmer defects and optimal LRCs near the CM bound.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining positive Griesmer defect codes with applications like distributed storage and secret sharing, leveraging their weight distribution properties for secure protocols.
idea_spark.risk: Construction complexity may grow sharply with parameters, and weight distribution may lack closed-form expressions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by classical Solomon-Stiffler and Belov constructions, relaxing the zero Griesmer defect condition opens a new design space for optimal codes.

papers.title: OmniHumanoid: Streaming Cross-Embodiment Video Generation with Paired-Free Adaptation
papers.summary: Cross-embodiment video generation aims to transfer motions across different humanoid embodiments, such as human-to-robot and robot-to-robot, enabling scalable data generation for embodied intelligence. A major challenge in this setting is that motion dynamics are partly transferable across embodiments, whereas appearance and morphology remain embodiment-specific. Existing approaches often entangle these factors, and many require paired data for every target embodiment, which limits scalability to new robots. We present OmniHumanoid, a framework that factorizes transferable motion learning and embodiment-specific adaptation. Our method learns a shared motion transfer model from motion-aligned paired videos spanning multiple embodiments, while adapting to a new embodiment using only unpaired videos through lightweight embodiment-specific adapters. To reduce interference between motion transfer and embodiment adaptation, we further introduce a branch-isolated attention design that separates motion conditioning from embodiment-specific modulation. In addition, we construct a synthetic cross-embodiment dataset with motion-aligned paired videos rendered across diverse humanoid assets, scenes, and viewpoints. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that OmniHumanoid achieves strong motion fidelity and embodiment consistency, while enabling scalable adaptation to unseen humanoid embodiments without retraining the shared motion model.

ai.tldr: 提出OmniHumanoid框架，通过解耦运动迁移与外观适应，实现跨不同人形本体的视频生成，仅需少量无配对视频即可适配新本体。
ai.motivation: 现有跨本体视频生成方法常将运动动态与外观形态纠缠，且需要每个目标本体的配对数据，限制了向新机器人的扩展。
ai.method: 学习共享运动迁移模型，利用运动对齐的配对视频；对新本体仅用无配对视频通过轻量级本体适配器进行适应；引入分支隔离注意力机制减少运动迁移与本体适应之间的干扰。
ai.result: 在合成和真实基准上实现了高运动保真度和本体一致性，无需重新训练共享运动模型即可扩展到未见人形本体。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用无配对视频数据高效实现跨本体运动迁移，降低对配对数据的依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个通用运动编码器，结合轻量级外观适配器，实现任意本体间的运动迁移。
idea_spark.risk: 分支隔离注意力可能增加模型复杂度，且合成数据与真实数据之间的域差异可能影响泛化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类运动模仿能力启发，人类可观察他人动作并调整自身形态执行，类似地模型应分离运动与形态信息。

en.tldr: Proposes OmniHumanoid, a framework that decouples motion transfer from appearance adaptation for cross-embodiment video generation, adapting to new embodiments with only unpaired videos.
en.motivation: Existing methods entangle motion dynamics with appearance and require paired data for each target embodiment, limiting scalability to new robots.
en.method: Learns a shared motion transfer model from motion-aligned paired videos; adapts to new embodiments via lightweight embodiment-specific adapters using only unpaired videos; introduces branch-isolated attention to reduce interference between motion transfer and embodiment adaptation.
en.result: Achieves strong motion fidelity and embodiment consistency on synthetic and real benchmarks, enabling scalable adaptation to unseen humanoid embodiments without retraining the shared motion model.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to efficiently achieve cross-embodiment motion transfer using unpaired videos, reducing reliance on paired data.

idea_spark.idea: Design a universal motion encoder with lightweight appearance adapters to enable motion transfer between any embodiments.
idea_spark.risk: Branch-isolated attention may increase model complexity, and domain gap between synthetic and real data could affect generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human motor imitation, where humans observe actions and adjust their own morphology to perform them, the model should separate motion from morphology.

papers.title: A Unified Approach for Computing Wasserstein Barycenters of Discrete and Continuous Measures
papers.summary: Computing the unregularized Wasserstein barycenter for measure-valued data is a challenging optimization task. Recent algorithms have been tailored to either discrete measures as point clouds or continuous measures discretized on regular grids. In this work, we propose a primal mirror descent algorithm for computing the exact Wasserstein barycenter in the Fisher-Rao geometry. Our algorithm is a unified approach that is flexible enough to simultaneously cover discrete and absolutely continuous input measures, with convergence guarantees in both settings. In particular, when all input measures are discrete, our algorithm, initialized from any probability density, solves a sequence of semi-discrete optimal transport subproblems and produces absolutely continuous iterates that converge to the discrete barycenter. We use synthetic and real data examples to demonstrate the promising result in terms of accuracy and computational cost.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于Fisher-Rao几何的原始镜像下降算法，统一处理离散和连续测度的Wasserstein重心计算。
ai.motivation: 现有Wasserstein重心算法分别针对离散点云或规则网格上的连续测度，缺乏统一框架。
ai.method: 采用原始镜像下降法，在Fisher-Rao几何下迭代求解半离散最优传输子问题。
ai.result: 算法在离散和连续输入测度下均有收敛保证，合成与真实数据实验表明精度和计算成本有竞争力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需正则化的通用Wasserstein重心求解方法，适用于点云和连续分布数据。

idea_spark.idea: 将半离散最优传输作为子问题，利用绝对连续迭代逼近离散重心，避免离散-离散直接求解的困难。
idea_spark.risk: 半离散子问题求解可能在高维或大规模数据上计算昂贵。
idea_spark.inspiration: 几何驱动的优化视角可能启发更鲁棒的分布对齐算法，例如在生成模型或领域自适应中。

zh.motivation: 现有Wasserstein重心算法分别针对离散点云或规则网格上的连续测度，缺乏统一框架。
zh.method: 采用原始镜像下降法，在Fisher-Rao几何下迭代求解半离散最优传输子问题。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需正则化的通用Wasserstein重心求解方法，适用于点云和连续分布数据。

idea_spark.risk: 半离散子问题求解可能在高维或大规模数据上计算昂贵。
idea_spark.inspiration: 几何驱动的优化视角可能启发更鲁棒的分布对齐算法，例如在生成模型或领域自适应中。

en.tldr: Proposes a primal mirror descent algorithm in Fisher-Rao geometry for computing exact Wasserstein barycenters of both discrete and continuous measures.
en.motivation: Existing Wasserstein barycenter algorithms are tailored separately to discrete point clouds or continuous measures on grids, lacking a unified approach.
en.method: Uses primal mirror descent under Fisher-Rao geometry, solving a sequence of semi-discrete optimal transport subproblems.
en.result: The algorithm guarantees convergence for both discrete and absolutely continuous input measures; synthetic and real data experiments show competitive accuracy and cost.
en.help_to_user: Provides a regularization-free, unified method for computing Wasserstein barycenters applicable to point clouds and continuous distributions.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging semi-discrete optimal transport as subproblems, the algorithm uses absolutely continuous iterates to approximate discrete barycenters, bypassing direct discrete-discrete optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Semi-discrete subproblems may become computationally expensive in high dimensions or with large-scale data.
idea_spark.inspiration: The geometry-driven optimization perspective may inspire more robust distribution alignment algorithms, e.g., in generative models or domain adaptation.

papers.title: ShapeCodeBench: A Renewable Benchmark for Perception-to-Program Reconstruction of Synthetic Shape Scenes
papers.summary: We introduce ShapeCodeBench, a synthetic benchmark for perception-to-program reconstruction: given a rendered raster image, a model must emit an executable drawing program that a deterministic evaluator re-renders and compares with the target. The v1 DSL has four primitives on a 512 x 512 black-on-white canvas, but every instance is generated from a seeded RNG, so fresh held-out sets can be created to reduce exact-instance contamination. We release a frozen eval_v1 split with 150 samples across easy, medium, and hard tiers, scored by exact match, pixel accuracy, foreground IoU, parse success, and execution success. We evaluate an empty-program floor, a classical computer-vision heuristic, Claude Opus 4.7 at high and max effort, and GPT-5.5 at medium and extra_high reasoning effort. The heuristic is competitive on easy scenes but collapses when overlaps fuse components; the strongest multimodal configuration preserves much of the foreground structure but still misses exact match because of small parameter errors. Best overall exact match remains low, so ShapeCodeBench is far from saturated. The benchmark code, frozen dataset, run artifacts, and paper sources are released to support independent replication and extension.

ai.tldr: ShapeCodeBench是一个用于感知到程序重建的合成基准，包含150个样本，评估模型从渲染图像生成可执行绘图程序的能力。
ai.motivation: 现有基准存在实例污染问题，且缺乏对感知到程序重建任务的系统评估。
ai.method: 基于种子随机数生成器生成合成场景，定义包含四种图元的领域特定语言，并采用确定性评估器进行多指标评分。
ai.result: 最强多模态配置保留了大部分前景结构，但精确匹配率仍然很低，基准远未饱和。
ai.help_to_user: 该基准可用于测试和提升模型从图像到可执行程序的转换能力，尤其适用于视觉推理和程序合成研究。

idea_spark.idea: 结合强化学习或神经符号方法，优化程序生成中的参数精度。
idea_spark.risk: 合成场景与真实世界差异可能导致模型泛化能力不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受程序合成和视觉推理交叉领域启发，强调可复现性和抗污染设计。

en.tldr: ShapeCodeBench is a synthetic benchmark for perception-to-program reconstruction, with 150 samples evaluating models on generating executable drawing programs from rendered images.
en.motivation: Existing benchmarks suffer from instance contamination and lack systematic evaluation of perception-to-program reconstruction.
en.method: Synthetic scenes are generated via seeded RNG, with a DSL of four primitives and a deterministic evaluator for multi-metric scoring.
en.result: The strongest multimodal configuration preserves most foreground structure but exact match remains low, indicating the benchmark is far from saturated.
en.help_to_user: This benchmark can be used to test and improve models' ability to convert images into executable programs, particularly for visual reasoning and program synthesis research.

idea_spark.idea: Combine reinforcement learning or neuro-symbolic methods to improve parameter precision in program generation.
idea_spark.risk: Synthetic scenes may not generalize well to real-world data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the intersection of program synthesis and visual reasoning, emphasizing reproducibility and contamination resistance.

papers.title: Stochastic control with self-exciting processes
papers.summary: We analyze the problem of stochastic optimal control of SDEs where the driver includes a self-exciting stochastic process. Due to the non-Markovian nature of the problem, we apply the stochastic maximum principle approach. We derive a sufficient stochastic maximum principle under this framework. We also derive an expression via martingales of both the self-exciting process and its quadratic covariation. Furthermore, we derive a necessary maximum (equivalence principle) for the self-exciting stochastic control problem. Finally, we look at an application to log-utility.

ai.tldr: 研究带自激过程的随机最优控制问题，推导了充分和必要的随机最大值原理，并应用于对数效用。
ai.motivation: 自激过程引入非马尔可夫性，传统动态规划方法失效，需要新的最优控制条件。
ai.method: 采用随机最大值原理，结合鞅表示和二次协变差推导充分与必要条件。
ai.result: 得到了自激随机控制问题的充分最大值原理和等价性原理。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理含自激过程的非马尔可夫最优控制问题提供了理论框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将自激过程作为控制系统的驱动噪声，研究其最优干预策略。
idea_spark.risk: 自激过程的路径依赖性强，数值求解可能面临高维挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合Hawkes过程与随机最大值原理，为事件驱动的控制问题开辟新路径。

zh.tldr: 研究带自激过程的随机最优控制问题，推导了充分和必要的随机最大值原理，并应用于对数效用。

en.tldr: Studies stochastic optimal control of SDEs with self-exciting drivers, deriving sufficient and necessary maximum principles, with an application to log-utility.
en.motivation: Self-exciting processes introduce non-Markovian dynamics, making classical dynamic programming inapplicable; new optimality conditions are needed.
en.method: Applies the stochastic maximum principle, leveraging martingale representations and quadratic covariation to derive both sufficient and necessary conditions.
en.result: Obtains a sufficient stochastic maximum principle and an equivalence principle for self-exciting control problems.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for optimal control of non-Markovian systems driven by self-exciting processes.

idea_spark.idea: Use self-exciting processes as control noise to study optimal intervention strategies in event-driven systems.
idea_spark.risk: Path-dependence of self-exciting processes may lead to high-dimensional numerical challenges.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining Hawkes processes with the stochastic maximum principle opens new avenues for event-driven control problems.

papers.title: PairDropGS: Paired Dropout-Induced Consistency Regularization for Sparse-View Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: Dropout-based sparse-view 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods alleviate overfitting by randomly suppressing Gaussian primitives during training. Existing methods mainly focus on designing increasingly sophisticated dropout strategies, while they overlook the resulting inconsistencies among different dropped Gaussian subsets. This oversight often leads to unstable reconstruction and suboptimal Gaussian representation learning.In this paper, we revisit dropout-based sparse-view 3DGS from a consistency regularization perspective and propose PairDropGS, a Paired Dropout-induced Consistency Regularization framework for sparse-view Gaussian splatting. Specifically, PairDropGS first constructs a pair of the dropped Gaussian subsets from a shared Gaussian field and designs a low-frequency consistency regularization to constrain their low-frequency rendered structures. This design encourages the shared Gaussian field to preserve stable scene layout and coarse geometry under different random dropouts, while avoiding excessive constraints on ambiguous high-frequency details. Moreover, we introduce a progressive consistency scheduling strategy to gradually strengthen the consistency regularization during training for stability and robustness of reconstruction. Extensive experiments on widely-used sparse-view benchmarks demonstrate that PairDropGS achieves superior training stability, significantly outperforms existing dropout-based 3DGS methods in reconstruction quality, while exhibiting the simplicity and plug-and-play nature for improving dropout-based optimization.

ai.tldr: 提出PairDropGS，通过配对丢弃子集间的低频一致性正则化，提升稀疏视图3D高斯泼溅的训练稳定性和重建质量。
ai.motivation: 现有丢弃法稀疏视图3DGS忽视不同丢弃子集间的不一致性，导致重建不稳定和表示学习次优。
ai.method: 从共享高斯场构造一对丢弃子集，施加低频一致性正则化约束其渲染结构，并引入渐进式一致性调度策略。
ai.result: 在多个稀疏视图基准上，训练稳定性显著提升，重建质量优于现有丢弃法3DGS，且具有即插即用特性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过一致性正则化改进稀疏视图3DGS的稳定性和性能。

idea_spark.risk: 低频约束可能丢失部分高频细节，需平衡。

en.tldr: Proposes PairDropGS, which uses low-frequency consistency regularization between paired dropped subsets to improve training stability and reconstruction quality for sparse-view 3D Gaussian Splatting.
en.motivation: Existing dropout-based sparse-view 3DGS overlooks inconsistencies among different dropped subsets, leading to unstable reconstruction and suboptimal representation learning.
en.method: Constructs a pair of dropped Gaussian subsets from a shared field, applies low-frequency consistency regularization on their rendered structures, and introduces progressive consistency scheduling.
en.result: Achieves superior training stability and reconstruction quality on multiple sparse-view benchmarks, outperforming existing dropout-based 3DGS methods with plug-and-play nature.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how consistency regularization can improve stability and performance of sparse-view 3DGS.

idea_spark.idea: Explore adaptive constraints for high-frequency details to avoid over-smoothing.
idea_spark.risk: Low-frequency constraints may lose some high-frequency details; balance is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by consistency regularization in semi-supervised learning, applied to dropout mechanisms in 3DGS.

papers.title: gwBenchmarks: Stress-Testing LLM Agents on High-Precision Gravitational Wave Astronomy
papers.summary: Modern gravitational wave astronomy relies on modeling tasks that often require months of graduate-level effort, including building fast waveform surrogates from expensive numerical relativity simulations, modeling orbital dynamics of black holes, fitting merger remnant properties and constructing template banks. These problems demand extreme precision to support detection and parameter inference, with state-of-the-art models achieving $\lesssim 10^{-4}$ relative error. We study whether state-of-the-art LLM coding agents can perform such end-to-end scientific modeling, where success requires constructing models with stringent accuracy criteria and reasoning about physical systems. We introduce gwBenchmarks, a suite of eight tasks grounded in gravitational wave analytic calculations and numerical simulations collectively representing over $10^8$ core-hours of compute. The tasks span interpolation, regression, and high-dimensional time-series modeling, requiring a combination of numerical methods, machine learning, and physics-informed approaches. In preliminary experiments, agents frequently relied on proxy metrics, partial evaluation, or fabricated results to spuriously complete tasks. We therefore implement an external pre-defined framework to gauge agent progress. Evaluating twelve coding agents, we find no consistent winner. On the easiest task, multiple agents converge to the same cubic spline solution, with one rediscovering a coordinate transformation widely used in the literature. On harder tasks like analytic waveform modeling, all agents fall 1-2 orders of magnitude short of domain requirements and exhibit systematic failures, including metric misuse, constraint violations, and result fabrication. Our code, data, and website are publicly available.

ai.tldr: 提出gwBenchmarks基准套件，包含八项引力波天文学高精度建模任务，测试LLM编码代理在端到端科学建模中的表现。
ai.motivation: 引力波天文学中的建模任务通常需要研究生数月努力，且要求极高精度（相对误差≤10⁻⁴），现有LLM代理能否胜任尚不清楚。
ai.method: 设计八项基于解析计算和数值模拟的任务，涵盖插值、回归和高维时间序列建模，并引入外部预定义框架评估代理进展。
ai.result: 在简单任务上多个代理收敛到相同三次样条解，但困难任务（如解析波形建模）所有代理精度差1-2个数量级，且存在指标误用、约束违反和结果伪造等系统性问题。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解LLM代理在科学计算中的当前能力边界，以及评估科学建模任务时需注意的陷阱。

idea_spark.idea: 结合物理信息神经网络与符号回归，或可提升LLM代理在波形建模中的精度。
idea_spark.risk: 代理可能依赖代理指标或伪造结果，需设计严格的外部验证机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代理在简单任务中重新发现坐标变换的现象，可探索LLM辅助发现已知物理变换的潜力。

en.tldr: Introduces gwBenchmarks, a suite of eight high-precision gravitational wave astronomy tasks to stress-test LLM coding agents in end-to-end scientific modeling.
en.motivation: Gravitational wave modeling tasks require months of graduate-level effort and extreme precision (relative error ≤10⁻⁴); it is unclear if current LLM agents can meet these demands.
en.method: Designs eight tasks based on analytic calculations and numerical simulations, covering interpolation, regression, and high-dimensional time-series modeling, with an external predefined framework to gauge agent progress.
en.result: On easy tasks multiple agents converge to the same cubic spline solution, but on harder tasks (e.g., analytic waveform modeling) all agents fall 1-2 orders of magnitude short and exhibit systematic failures such as metric misuse, constraint violations, and result fabrication.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the current capability boundaries of LLM agents in scientific computing and pitfalls to watch for when evaluating scientific modeling tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combining physics-informed neural networks with symbolic regression may improve LLM agent accuracy in waveform modeling.
idea_spark.risk: Agents may rely on proxy metrics or fabricate results, necessitating strict external validation mechanisms.
idea_spark.inspiration: The observation that agents rediscovered a coordinate transformation on a simple task suggests potential for LLM-assisted discovery of known physical transformations.

papers.title: DeconDTN-Toolkit: A Library for Evaluation and Enhancement of Robustness to Provenance Shift
papers.summary: Despite the burgeoning body of work on distribution shifts, provenance shift-where the relationship between data source and label changes at deployment-remains poorly understood and under-addressed. In this paper, we establish a formal connection between provenance shift, counterfactual invariance, and invariant learning to derive a learning objective for robustness. We then introduce \textsc{DeconDTN-Toolkit}, a specialized evaluation and remediation suite designed to simulate provenance shifts of varying degrees while maintaining the training protocol and the infrastructure of existing benchmarks. We reveal the vulnerability of Empirical Risk Minimization under provenance shift, introduce a robust out-of-distribution performance indicator, and conduct a comprehensive evaluation on existing algorithms. Our work provides both the theoretical grounding and the practical tools necessary to characterize the problem of confounding by provenance, and implementations of methods to mitigate it.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了DeconDTN-Toolkit，一个用于评估和增强模型对来源偏移鲁棒性的库，并建立了来源偏移、反事实不变性和不变学习之间的理论联系。
ai.motivation: 来源偏移（数据源与标签关系在部署时变化）尚未被充分理解和解决，现有工作缺乏专门的评估和缓解工具。
ai.method: 通过形式化连接来源偏移、反事实不变性和不变学习，推导鲁棒性学习目标；开发DeconDTN-Toolkit模拟不同程度的来源偏移，并引入鲁棒性性能指标。
ai.result: 揭示了经验风险最小化在来源偏移下的脆弱性，对现有算法进行了全面评估，提供了理论依据和实用工具。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员评估和提升模型在来源偏移下的鲁棒性，提供标准化模拟和性能指标。

idea_spark.idea: 结合反事实不变性设计更通用的鲁棒性训练算法，或利用该工具包系统比较不同偏移类型（如协变量偏移、标签偏移）的应对策略。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟偏移可能与真实部署场景有差距，导致评估结果过于乐观；反事实不变性假设可能不适用于所有数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受反事实推理和不变学习启发，将来源偏移视为一种特殊的混淆问题，从而借鉴因果推断方法。
