en.tldr: This paper introduces DeconDTN-Toolkit, a library for evaluating and enhancing robustness to provenance shift, and establishes a theoretical connection between provenance shift, counterfactual invariance, and invariant learning.
en.motivation: Provenance shift (change in data source-label relationship at deployment) is poorly understood and under-addressed, lacking specialized evaluation and mitigation tools.
en.method: Formally connects provenance shift, counterfactual invariance, and invariant learning to derive a robustness objective; develops DeconDTN-Toolkit to simulate varying degrees of provenance shift and introduces a robust performance indicator.
en.result: Reveals vulnerability of empirical risk minimization under provenance shift, provides comprehensive evaluation of existing algorithms, and offers theoretical grounding and practical tools.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers evaluate and improve model robustness under provenance shift with standardized simulations and performance metrics.

idea_spark.idea: Design more general robust training algorithms by combining counterfactual invariance, or use this toolkit to systematically compare strategies for different shift types (e.g., covariate shift, label shift).
idea_spark.risk: Simulated shifts may not fully match real deployment scenarios, leading to overly optimistic evaluations; counterfactual invariance assumptions may not hold for all data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by counterfactual reasoning and invariant learning, treating provenance shift as a special confounding problem to leverage causal inference methods.

papers.title: Search Your Block Floating Point Scales!
papers.summary: Quantization has emerged as a standard technique for accelerating inference for generative models by enabling faster low-precision computations and reduced memory transfers. Recently, GPU accelerators have added first-class support for microscaling Block Floating Point (BFP) formats. Standard BFP algorithms use a fixed scale based on the maximum magnitude of the block. We observe that this scale choice can be suboptimal with respect to quantization errors. In this work, we propose ScaleSearch, an alternative strategy for selecting these scale factors: using a fine-grained search leveraging the mantissa bits in microscaling formats to minimize the quantization error for the given distribution. ScaleSearch can be integrated with existing quantization methods such as Post Training Quantization and low-precision attention, and is shown to improve their performance. Additionally, we introduce ScaleSearchAttention, an accelerated NVFP4-based attention algorithm, which uses ScaleSearch and adapted prior techniques to ensure near-0 performance loss for causal language modeling. Experiments show that ScaleSearch reduces quantization error by 27% for NVFP4 and improves language model PTQ by up to 15 points for MATH500 (Qwen3-8B), while ScaleSearchAttention improves Wikitext-2 PPL by upto 0.77 points for Llama 3.1 70B. The proposed methods closely match baseline performance while providing quantization accuracy improvements.

ai.tldr: 提出ScaleSearch方法，通过精细搜索块浮点格式的缩放因子来最小化量化误差，并集成到现有量化技术中，显著提升生成模型推理性能。
ai.motivation: 标准块浮点算法使用基于块最大幅度的固定缩放因子，该选择在量化误差方面可能不是最优的。
ai.method: 利用微缩格式中的尾数位进行细粒度搜索，选择最优缩放因子以最小化量化误差；并基于此设计加速的NVFP4注意力算法ScaleSearchAttention。
ai.result: NVFP4量化误差降低27%，Qwen3-8B在MATH500上PTQ提升最多15点，Llama 3.1 70B在Wikitext-2上困惑度改善0.77点。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过优化缩放因子选择来提升低精度量化模型的精度，适用于加速生成模型推理。

idea_spark.idea: 将缩放因子搜索与自适应精度分配结合，根据层或块的重要性动态调整搜索粒度。
idea_spark.risk: 搜索过程可能引入额外计算开销，需平衡精度提升与推理速度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从浮点数的尾数位利用出发，启发其他量化参数（如零点、步长）的优化搜索方法。

zh.tldr: 提出ScaleSearch方法，通过精细搜索块浮点格式的缩放因子来最小化量化误差，并集成到现有量化技术中，显著提升生成模型推理性能。
zh.motivation: 标准块浮点算法使用基于块最大幅度的固定缩放因子，该选择在量化误差方面可能不是最优的。
zh.method: 利用微缩格式中的尾数位进行细粒度搜索，选择最优缩放因子以最小化量化误差；并基于此设计加速的NVFP4注意力算法ScaleSearchAttention。
zh.result: NVFP4量化误差降低27%，Qwen3-8B在MATH500上PTQ提升最多15点，Llama 3.1 70B在Wikitext-2上困惑度改善0.77点。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过优化缩放因子选择来提升低精度量化模型的精度，适用于加速生成模型推理。

idea_spark.idea: 将缩放因子搜索与自适应精度分配结合，根据层或块的重要性动态调整搜索粒度。
idea_spark.risk: 搜索过程可能引入额外计算开销，需平衡精度提升与推理速度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从浮点数的尾数位利用出发，启发其他量化参数（如零点、步长）的优化搜索方法。

en.tldr: Proposes ScaleSearch, a fine-grained search over block floating point scale factors to minimize quantization error, integrated with existing quantization methods to improve generative model inference.
en.motivation: Standard BFP algorithms use a fixed scale based on the block's maximum magnitude, which can be suboptimal in terms of quantization error.
en.method: Leverages mantissa bits in microscaling formats for fine-grained scale factor search to minimize quantization error; introduces ScaleSearchAttention, an accelerated NVFP4-based attention algorithm.
en.result: Reduces NVFP4 quantization error by 27%, improves Qwen3-8B PTQ on MATH500 by up to 15 points, and improves Llama 3.1 70B Wikitext-2 PPL by up to 0.77 points.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how optimizing scale factor selection can improve accuracy in low-precision quantized models for faster generative model inference.

idea_spark.idea: Combine scale search with adaptive precision allocation, dynamically adjusting search granularity based on layer or block importance.
idea_spark.risk: Search process may introduce additional computational overhead, requiring a trade-off between accuracy gain and inference speed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging mantissa bits inspires optimization of other quantization parameters (e.g., zero-point, step size) via search methods.

papers.title: OptArgus: A Multi-Agent System to Detect Hallucinations in LLM-based Optimization Modeling
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to translate natural-language optimization problems into mathematical formulations and solver code, but matching the reference objective value is not a reliable test of correctness: an artifact may agree numerically while still changing the underlying optimization semantics. We formulate this issue as \emph{optimization-modeling hallucination detection}, namely structural consistency auditing over the problem description, symbolic model, and solver implementation. We develop, to our knowledge, the first fine-grained hallucination taxonomy specifically for optimization modeling, spanning objective, variable, constraint, and implementation failures. We use this taxonomy to design OptArgus, a multi-agent detector with conductor routing, specialist auditors, and evidence consolidation. To evaluate this setting, we introduce a three-part benchmark suite with $484$ clean artifacts, $1266$ controlled injected artifacts, and $6292$ natural LLM-generated artifacts. Against a matched single-agent baseline, OptArgus produces fewer false alarms on clean artifacts, more accurate top-ranked localization on controlled single-error cases, and stronger detection on natural model outputs. Together, these contributions turn optimization-modeling hallucination detection into a concrete empirical problem and suggest that modular, taxonomy-grounded auditing is a practical route to more reliable optimization modeling.

ai.tldr: 提出OptArgus，一个基于多智能体的系统，用于检测LLM在优化建模中的幻觉，并构建了细粒度分类体系和基准测试。
ai.motivation: LLM生成的优化模型在数值上可能正确但语义错误，现有方法无法可靠检测此类结构不一致问题。
ai.method: 设计优化建模幻觉分类法，并开发多智能体检测器OptArgus，包含指挥路由、专业审计员和证据整合模块。
ai.result: 在三个基准测试集上，OptArgus相比单智能体基线减少了误报，提高了单错误定位精度和自然模型输出的检测能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别LLM生成的优化模型中的语义错误，提升建模可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将幻觉检测从数值验证扩展到结构一致性审计，并引入细粒度分类法指导模块化检测。
idea_spark.risk: 分类法可能不覆盖所有幻觉类型，且多智能体系统复杂度高，部署成本较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受软件工程中静态代码审计和形式化验证启发，将类似思想应用于LLM输出验证。

zh.tldr: 提出OptArgus，一个基于多智能体的系统，用于检测LLM在优化建模中的幻觉，并构建了细粒度分类体系和基准测试。
zh.motivation: LLM生成的优化模型在数值上可能正确但语义错误，现有方法无法可靠检测此类结构不一致问题。
zh.method: 设计优化建模幻觉分类法，并开发多智能体检测器OptArgus，包含指挥路由、专业审计员和证据整合模块。
zh.result: 在三个基准测试集上，OptArgus相比单智能体基线减少了误报，提高了单错误定位精度和自然模型输出的检测能力。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别LLM生成的优化模型中的语义错误，提升建模可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将幻觉检测从数值验证扩展到结构一致性审计，并引入细粒度分类法指导模块化检测。
idea_spark.risk: 分类法可能不覆盖所有幻觉类型，且多智能体系统复杂度高，部署成本较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受软件工程中静态代码审计和形式化验证启发，将类似思想应用于LLM输出验证。

en.tldr: Proposes OptArgus, a multi-agent system for detecting hallucinations in LLM-based optimization modeling, with a fine-grained taxonomy and benchmark suite.
en.motivation: LLM-generated optimization models can be numerically correct but semantically wrong; existing methods fail to reliably detect such structural inconsistencies.
en.method: Designs an optimization-modeling hallucination taxonomy and develops OptArgus, a multi-agent detector with conductor routing, specialist auditors, and evidence consolidation.
en.result: On three benchmark sets, OptArgus reduces false alarms, improves single-error localization accuracy, and enhances detection on natural model outputs compared to a single-agent baseline.
en.help_to_user: Helps users identify semantic errors in LLM-generated optimization models, improving modeling reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Extends hallucination detection from numerical verification to structural consistency auditing, guided by a fine-grained taxonomy for modular detection.
idea_spark.risk: The taxonomy may not cover all hallucination types, and the multi-agent system introduces complexity and deployment cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by static code auditing and formal verification in software engineering, applying similar ideas to LLM output validation.

papers.title: CaC: Advancing Video Reward Models via Hierarchical Spatiotemporal Concentrating
papers.summary: In this paper, we propose Concentrate and Concentrate (CaC), a coarse-to-fine anomaly reward model based on Vision-Language Models. During inference, it first conducts a global temporal scan to anchor anomalous time windows, then performs fine-grained spatial grounding within the localized interval, and finally derives robust judgments via structured spatiotemporal Chain-of-Thought reasoning. To equip the model with these capabilities, we construct the first large-scale generated video anomaly dataset with per-frame bounding-box annotations, temporal anomaly windows, and fine-grained attribution labels. Building on this dataset, we design a three-stage progressive training paradigm. The model initially learns spatial and temporal anchoring through single- and multi-frame supervised fine-tuning, and then is optimized by a reinforcement learning strategy based on two-turn Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Beyond conventional accuracy rewards, we introduce Temporal and Spatial IoU rewards to supervise the intermediate localization process, effectively guiding the model toward more grounded and interpretable spatiotemporal reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CaC can stably concentrate on subtle anomalies, achieving a 25.7% accuracy improvement on fine-grained anomaly benchmarks and, when used as a reward signal, CaC reduces generated-video anomalies by 11.7% while improving overall video quality.

ai.tldr: 提出CaC，一种基于视觉语言模型的粗到细异常奖励模型，通过分层时空聚焦实现视频异常检测与奖励信号优化。
ai.motivation: 现有视频奖励模型难以精准定位细微异常，缺乏可解释的时空推理能力。
ai.method: 构建大规模生成视频异常数据集（含逐帧边界框、时间窗口和归因标签），设计三阶段渐进训练：单/多帧监督微调学习时空锚定，再通过双轮GRPO强化学习优化，引入时间IoU和空间IoU奖励监督中间定位过程。
ai.result: 在细粒度异常基准上准确率提升25.7%，作为奖励信号使生成视频异常减少11.7%，整体视频质量提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用分层时空聚焦和结构化推理提升视频异常检测的准确性和可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将时空IoU奖励与强化学习结合，可推广至需要中间过程监督的视觉推理任务。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖大规模精细标注数据集，标注成本高；GRPO训练稳定性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类先全局扫描再局部聚焦的认知过程启发，设计分层推理机制。

en.tldr: Proposes CaC, a coarse-to-fine anomaly reward model based on Vision-Language Models, achieving hierarchical spatiotemporal focusing for video anomaly detection and reward signal optimization.

papers.title: Geometric Factual Recall in Transformers
papers.summary: How do transformer language models memorize factual associations? A common view casts internal weight matrices as associative memories over pairs of embeddings, requiring parameter counts that scale linearly with the number of facts. We develop a theoretical and empirical account of an alternative, \emph{geometric} form of memorization in which learned embeddings encode relational structure directly, and the MLP plays a qualitatively different role. In a controlled setting where a single-layer transformer must memorize random bijections from subjects to a shared attribute set, we prove that a logarithmic embedding dimension suffices: subject embeddings encode \emph{linear superpositions} of their associated attribute vectors, and a small MLP acts as a relation-conditioned selector that extracts the relevant attribute via ReLU gating, and not as an associative key-value mapping. We extend these results to the multi-hop setting -- chains of relational queries such as ``Who is the mother of the wife of $x$?'' -- providing constructions with and without chain-of-thought that exhibit a provable capacity-depth tradeoff, complemented by a matching information-theoretic lower bound. Empirically, gradient descent discovers solutions with precisely the predicted structure. Once trained, the MLP transfers zero-shot to entirely new bijections when subject embeddings are appropriately re-initialized, revealing that it has learned a generic selection mechanism rather than memorized any particular set of facts.

ai.tldr: 本文提出并证明了一种新的几何记忆机制：Transformer通过嵌入向量的线性叠加和MLP的关系条件选择来记忆事实，而非传统的键值关联记忆。
ai.motivation: 解释Transformer语言模型如何记忆事实关联，挑战传统的键值记忆观点，揭示更高效的几何记忆机制。
ai.method: 在单层Transformer记忆随机双射的受控设置中，理论证明对数维度的嵌入即可实现记忆；嵌入编码属性向量的线性叠加，MLP通过ReLU门控作为关系条件选择器。扩展到多跳查询，给出有无思维链的构造并匹配信息论下界。
ai.result: 梯度下降发现具有预测结构的解；MLP在重新初始化主题嵌入后零样本迁移到全新双射，表明其学习的是通用选择机制而非具体事实。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Transformer内部记忆机制，为设计更高效、可解释的语言模型提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用线性叠加和条件选择设计新型记忆模块，替代传统键值记忆，减少参数并支持零样本迁移。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果基于受控设置，真实语言数据中关系复杂，可能难以直接应用；MLP的选择机制可能对嵌入初始化敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物记忆的分布式表示启发，将事实存储为向量叠加，通过上下文门控提取，类似神经科学中的模式分离与完成。

en.tldr: This paper proposes and proves a novel geometric memory mechanism: Transformers memorize facts via linear superposition of embeddings and MLP as a relation-conditioned selector, rather than traditional associative key-value memory.
en.motivation: To explain how transformer language models memorize factual associations, challenging the conventional key-value memory view and revealing a more efficient geometric mechanism.
en.method: In a controlled setting where a single-layer transformer memorizes random bijections, we prove that logarithmic embedding dimension suffices: embeddings encode linear superpositions of attribute vectors, and the MLP acts as a relation-conditioned selector via ReLU gating. Extensions to multi-hop queries include constructions with and without chain-of-thought, matched by information-theoretic lower bounds.
en.result: Gradient descent discovers solutions with the predicted structure; the MLP transfers zero-shot to entirely new bijections after re-initializing subject embeddings, showing it learns a generic selection mechanism rather than memorized facts.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insights into transformer memory mechanisms, aiding the design of more efficient and interpretable language models.

idea_spark.idea: Design novel memory modules using linear superposition and conditional selection to replace traditional key-value memory, reducing parameters and enabling zero-shot transfer.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results are based on controlled settings; real language data involves complex relations that may hinder direct application; MLP selection may be sensitive to embedding initialization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by distributed representations in biological memory, storing facts as vector superpositions and extracting them via contextual gating, akin to pattern separation and completion in neuroscience.

papers.title: From Noise to Diversity: Random Embedding Injection in LLM Reasoning
papers.summary: Recent soft prompt research has tried to improve reasoning by inserting trained vectors into LLM inputs, yet whether the gain comes from the learned content or from the act of injection itself has not been carefully separated. We study Random Soft Prompts (RSPs), which drop the training step entirely and append a freshly drawn sequence of random embedding vectors to the input. Each RSP vector is sampled from an isotropic Gaussian fitted to the entrywise mean and variance of the pretrained embedding table; the sequence carries no learned content, and yet reaches accuracy comparable to optimized soft prompts on math reasoning benchmarks in several settings. The mechanism unfolds in two stages: because attention has to absorb a never-seen-before random position, the distribution over the first few generated tokens flattens and reasoning trajectories branch, and as generation continues this influence dilutes naturally so the response commits to a single completion. We show that during inference RSPs lift early-stage token diversity and, combined with temperature sampling, widen Pass@N, the probability that at least one out of N attempts is correct. Beyond inference, we carry the same effect into DAPO training and demonstrate practical gains. Our contributions are: (i) RSP isolates the simplest form of soft prompt -- training-free, freshly resampled -- providing a unified lens for the structural effect of injection that variants otherwise differing in training and form all share; (ii) a theoretical and empirical validation of the underlying mechanism; and (iii) an extension from inference to training.

ai.tldr: 提出随机软提示（RSP），无需训练即可提升大模型推理多样性，效果接近优化后的软提示。
ai.motivation: 现有软提示研究未区分性能提升来自学习内容还是注入操作本身。
ai.method: 从预训练嵌入表的均值和方差拟合各向同性高斯分布，采样随机嵌入向量序列附加到输入中。
ai.result: RSP在数学推理基准上达到与优化软提示相当的准确率，并通过提升早期token多样性和温度采样扩大Pass@N，在DAPO训练中也有实际收益。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需训练的软提示方法，可提升模型推理时的输出多样性，适用于需要多次尝试提高正确率的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机嵌入注入与强化学习策略结合，动态调整随机性强度以平衡探索与利用。
idea_spark.risk: 随机注入可能引入不稳定输出，需谨慎控制随机性强度以避免性能退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受注意力机制对未见位置敏感性的启发，利用随机位置打乱推理轨迹，类似随机扰动促进探索。

en.tldr: Proposes Random Soft Prompts (RSPs) that require no training and improve LLM reasoning diversity, achieving accuracy comparable to optimized soft prompts.
en.motivation: Existing soft prompt research does not separate performance gains from learned content versus the injection operation itself.
en.method: Samples random embedding vectors from an isotropic Gaussian fitted to the mean and variance of the pretrained embedding table, then appends them to the input.
en.result: RSPs achieve accuracy comparable to optimized soft prompts on math reasoning benchmarks, boost early-stage token diversity, and widen Pass@N with temperature sampling; also yield practical gains in DAPO training.
en.help_to_user: Provides a training-free soft prompt method that increases output diversity during inference, useful for scenarios requiring multiple attempts to improve correctness.

idea_spark.idea: Combine random embedding injection with reinforcement learning strategies to dynamically adjust randomness strength for balancing exploration and exploitation.
idea_spark.risk: Random injection may introduce unstable outputs; careful control of randomness strength is needed to avoid performance degradation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by attention's sensitivity to unseen positions, using random positions to perturb reasoning trajectories, similar to random perturbations promoting exploration.

papers.title: Quasi-Sierpinski Structure for Uniform Load Distribution
papers.summary: Land reclamation methods, indispensable for the proper development of modern coastal cities, are ecologically destructive. We present a fractal structure, similar to a Sierpinski triangle, which solves this problem by resting directly on the seabed thanks to the uniform load distribution we achieve on its base. To obtain this uniform distribution, we show that the supports of the structure must displace vertically following any function of the Takagi class. This causes the vertical deformations of the structure to follow this same class and the horizontal deformations to be related to the Cantor function. The structure works with an unlimited number of combinations of areas of its elements and materials, which gives designers a high degree of constructive flexibility.

ai.tldr: 提出一种类似谢尔宾斯基三角形的分形结构，通过均匀荷载分布直接坐落在海床上，解决传统填海造地的生态破坏问题。
ai.motivation: 传统填海造地方法生态破坏严重，需要一种更环保的海底支撑结构。
ai.method: 利用分形几何设计结构，要求支撑点垂直位移遵循Takagi类函数，使结构垂直变形也属于该类，水平变形与康托函数相关。
ai.result: 实现了基底均匀荷载分布，且结构在材料与面积组合上具有高度灵活性。
ai.help_to_user: 为生态友好型填海造地提供一种基于分形几何的结构设计思路。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Takagi类函数与康托函数应用于其他分形结构的变形控制。
idea_spark.risk: 实际工程中分形结构的制造与施工精度要求高，可能增加成本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从分形几何的均匀性启发，思考如何利用数学函数类设计自相似承重系统。

en.tldr: A fractal structure resembling a Sierpinski triangle is proposed to achieve uniform load distribution on the seabed, addressing ecological issues of land reclamation.
en.motivation: Traditional land reclamation methods are ecologically destructive, necessitating a more sustainable seabed support structure.
en.method: The structure is designed using fractal geometry, requiring vertical displacements of supports to follow Takagi-class functions, leading to vertical deformations in the same class and horizontal deformations related to the Cantor function.
en.result: Uniform load distribution at the base is achieved, with high flexibility in material and area combinations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a fractal-based structural design approach for eco-friendly land reclamation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying Takagi-class and Cantor functions to deformation control in other fractal structures.
idea_spark.risk: Manufacturing and construction precision for fractal structures may be high, potentially increasing costs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the uniformity of fractal geometry, consider using mathematical function classes to design self-similar load-bearing systems.

papers.title: LiBrA-Net: Lie-Algebraic Bilateral Affine Fields for Real-Time 4K Video Dehazing
papers.summary: Currently, there is a gap in the field of ultra-high-definition (UHD) video dehazing due to the lack of a benchmark for evaluation. Furthermore, existing video dehazing methods cannot run on consumer-grade GPUs when processing continuous UHD sequences of 3--5 frames at a time. In this paper, we address both issues with a new benchmark and an efficient method. Our key observation is that atmospheric dehazing reduces to a per-pixel affine transform governed by the low-frequency depth field, which can be compactly encoded in bilateral grids whose prediction cost is decoupled from the output resolution. Building on this, we propose LiBrA-Net, which factorizes the spatiotemporal affine field into a spatial--color and a temporal bilateral sub-grid predicted at a fixed low resolution, fuses their coefficients in the $\mathfrak{gl}(3)$ Lie algebra under group-theoretic regularization, maps the result to invertible GL(3) transforms via a Cayley parameterization, and restores high-frequency detail through a lightweight input-guided branch. We further release UHV-4K, the first paired 4K video dehazing benchmark with depth, transmission, and optical-flow annotations on every frame. Across UHV-4K, REVIDE, and HazeWorld, LiBrA-Net sets a new state of the art among compared video dehazing methods while running native 4K at 25 FPS on a single GPU with only 6.12 M parameters. Code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LiBrA-Net-42B8.

ai.tldr: 提出LiBrA-Net，利用李代数双线性仿射场实现实时4K视频去雾，并发布首个配对的4K去雾基准UHV-4K。
ai.motivation: 现有方法无法在消费级GPU上实时处理超高清视频去雾，且缺乏4K去雾基准。
ai.method: 将大气去雾建模为逐像素仿射变换，通过双线性网格在低分辨率下预测时空仿射场，在gl(3)李代数中融合系数并利用Cayley参数化映射为可逆变换，轻量级输入引导分支恢复高频细节。
ai.result: 在UHV-4K、REVIDE和HazeWorld上达到新SOTA，单GPU上以6.12M参数实现25 FPS的4K去雾。
ai.help_to_user: 提供高效实时的4K视频去雾方法及配套基准，便于用户评估和部署。

idea_spark.idea: 将时空仿射场分解为空间-颜色和时间子网格，并在李代数中融合，实现分辨率无关的预测。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖低分辨率深度场假设，在深度变化剧烈场景中可能引入伪影。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用群论约束保证变换的可逆性，启发其他需要稳定变换的视觉任务。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖低分辨率深度场假设，在深度变化剧烈场景中可能引入伪影。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用群论约束保证变换的可逆性，启发其他需要稳定变换的视觉任务。

en.tldr: Proposes LiBrA-Net, using Lie-algebraic bilateral affine fields for real-time 4K video dehazing, and releases the first paired 4K dehazing benchmark UHV-4K.
en.motivation: Existing methods cannot process UHD video dehazing in real time on consumer GPUs, and a 4K dehazing benchmark is lacking.
en.method: Models atmospheric dehazing as a per-pixel affine transform, predicts spatiotemporal affine fields at low resolution via bilateral grids, fuses coefficients in the gl(3) Lie algebra with group-theoretic regularization, maps to invertible transforms via Cayley parameterization, and restores high-frequency details with a lightweight input-guided branch.
en.result: Achieves new state-of-the-art on UHV-4K, REVIDE, and HazeWorld, running 4K at 25 FPS on a single GPU with only 6.12M parameters.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient real-time 4K video dehazing method and a benchmark for evaluation and deployment.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose spatiotemporal affine field into spatial-color and temporal sub-grids, fuse in Lie algebra for resolution-independent prediction.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on low-frequency depth assumption, may introduce artifacts in scenes with sharp depth changes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Group-theoretic constraints ensure invertibility, inspiring stable transforms in other vision tasks.

papers.title: A note on universality in refined Chern-Simons theory
papers.summary: We discuss various forms of refinements of Vogel's universality in Chern-Simons theory. While the original universality applies to arbitrary simple Lie groups, its counterpart in refined Chyrn-Simons theory is restricted to simply laced Lie groups.

ai.tldr: 本文讨论了Vogel普遍性在精细Chern-Simons理论中的各种改进形式，指出原始普遍性适用于任意简单李群，而其精细版本仅限于单李群。
ai.motivation: 探索精细Chern-Simons理论中普遍性的适用范围和限制。
ai.method: 通过理论分析和对比，研究Vogel普遍性在不同李群类型下的表现。
ai.result: 精细Chern-Simons理论的普遍性仅适用于单李群，而非所有简单李群。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解精细Chern-Simons理论中普遍性的边界条件。

idea_spark.idea: 研究非单李群下精细Chern-Simons理论的可能修正或替代形式。
idea_spark.risk: 非单李群可能缺乏必要的对称性，导致理论不自洽。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从李群分类出发，探索精细理论中普遍性缺失的深层原因。

en.tldr: This note discusses refinements of Vogel's universality in Chern-Simons theory, showing that while the original universality holds for all simple Lie groups, its refined counterpart is restricted to simply laced Lie groups.
en.motivation: To explore the scope and limitations of universality in refined Chern-Simons theory.
en.method: Theoretical analysis and comparison of Vogel's universality across different Lie group types.
en.result: Refined Chern-Simons universality applies only to simply laced Lie groups, not all simple Lie groups.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the boundary conditions for universality in refined Chern-Simons theory.

idea_spark.idea: Investigate possible modifications or alternative formulations of refined Chern-Simons theory for non-simply laced groups.
idea_spark.risk: Non-simply laced groups may lack necessary symmetries, leading to inconsistencies.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use Lie group classification to uncover deeper reasons for the loss of universality in refined theories.

papers.title: Rigidity and flexibility under spectral Ricci lower bounds and mean-convex boundary
papers.summary: We study Riemannian manifolds $(M^n,g)$ with mean-convex boundary whose Ricci curvature is nonnegative in a spectral sense. Our first main result is a sharp spectral extension of a rigidity theorem by Kasue: we prove that under the conditions \[ λ_1(-γΔ+\mathrm{Ric})\geq 0,\qquad H_{\partial M}\geq 0, \] and in the sharp range $0\leq γ<4$ if $n=2$, and $0\leqγ<\frac{n-1}{n-2}$ if $n\geq3$, a (possibly noncompact) complete manifold with disconnected boundary, with at least one compact boundary component, must split isometrically as a product $[0,L]\times Σ$.   Our second main contribution is a topological rigidity result for the relative fundamental group $π_1(M,\partial M)$, combined with a deep theorem of Lawson--Michelsohn. We prove that, in dimensions $n\neq4$, any compact manifold with boundary satisfying the two inequalities above, with at least one of them strict, admits a metric with positive sectional curvature and strictly mean-convex boundary, provided $γ\geq0$ if $n=2$, and $0\leqγ\leq\frac{n-1}{n-2}$ if $n\geq3$. This range of $γ$ is sharp for the latter result to hold.

ai.tldr: 研究具有平均凸边界的黎曼流形，在谱意义下Ricci曲率非负时的刚性与拓扑刚性。
ai.motivation: 推广Kasue的刚性定理到谱意义下的Ricci下界，并探索拓扑刚性。
ai.method: 利用谱条件、相对基本群以及Lawson-Michelsohn定理。
ai.result: 在特定参数范围内，流形等距分裂为乘积；在n≠4时，若不等式严格，则存在正截面曲率度量。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了谱Ricci曲率条件下流形结构的新刻画。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑用谱条件替代逐点曲率条件，研究更一般的流形分解。
idea_spark.risk: 参数范围的尖锐性可能限制应用场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将谱几何与拓扑刚性结合，可能发现新的几何结构。

en.tldr: We study Riemannian manifolds with mean-convex boundary and nonnegative spectral Ricci curvature, proving a sharp rigidity theorem and topological rigidity under certain parameter ranges.
en.motivation: To extend Kasue's rigidity theorem to a spectral setting and explore topological rigidity.
en.method: Using spectral conditions, relative fundamental group, and the Lawson-Michelsohn theorem.
en.result: In the sharp parameter range, the manifold splits isometrically as a product; for n≠4, strict inequalities imply existence of a metric with positive sectional curvature.
en.help_to_user: Provides new characterizations of manifold structure under spectral Ricci bounds.

idea_spark.idea: Consider replacing pointwise curvature conditions with spectral ones to study more general manifold decompositions.
idea_spark.risk: The sharpness of parameter ranges may limit applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining spectral geometry with topological rigidity may reveal new geometric structures.

papers.title: SB-BEVFusion: Enhancing the Robustness against Sensor Malfunction and Corruptions
papers.summary: Multimodal sensor fusion has demonstrated remarkable performance improvements over unimodal approaches in 3D object detection for autonomous vehicles. Typically, existing methods transform multimodal data from independent sensors, such as camera and LiDAR, into a unified bird's-eye view (BEV) representation for fusion. Although effective in ideal conditions, this strategy suffers from substantial performance deterioration when camera or LiDAR data are missing, corrupted, or noisy. To address this vulnerability, we develop a framework-agnostic fusion module for camera and LiDAR data that allows for handling cases when one of the two modalities is missing or corrupted. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our module, we instantiate it in BEVFusion [1], a well-established framework to combine camera and LiDAR data for 3D object detection. By means of quantitative experiments on the MultiCorrupt dataset, we demonstrate that our module achieves favorable performance improvements under scenarios of missing and corrupted modalities, substantially outperforming existing unified representation approaches across a wide range of sensor deterioration scenarios and reaching state-of-the-art performance in scenarios of corrupted modality due to extreme weather conditions and sensor failure.

ai.tldr: 提出一种框架无关的融合模块，增强相机与LiDAR融合在传感器缺失或损坏时的鲁棒性，在MultiCorrupt数据集上达到最先进性能。
ai.motivation: 现有多模态融合方法在理想条件下有效，但相机或LiDAR数据缺失、损坏或噪声时性能急剧下降。
ai.method: 开发一个与框架无关的融合模块，处理单模态缺失或损坏情况，并在BEVFusion框架中实例化验证。
ai.result: 在MultiCorrupt数据集上，该方法在多种传感器退化场景下显著优于现有统一表示方法，在极端天气和传感器故障场景下达到最先进水平。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何提升自动驾驶3D检测系统在传感器故障或恶劣环境下的可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 可探索将缺失模态的隐式重建或跨模态注意力机制融入该模块，进一步提升鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 模块在极端退化场景下可能仍存在性能瓶颈，且对计算资源要求较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受传感器故障场景下鲁棒性需求启发，可进一步研究在线自适应融合策略。

en.tldr: Proposes a framework-agnostic fusion module to enhance robustness of camera-LiDAR fusion under sensor missing or corruption, achieving state-of-the-art on MultiCorrupt dataset.
en.motivation: Existing multimodal fusion methods perform well in ideal conditions but degrade severely when camera or LiDAR data is missing, corrupted, or noisy.
en.method: Develops a framework-agnostic fusion module to handle missing or corrupted single modality, instantiated in the BEVFusion framework.
en.result: On MultiCorrupt dataset, the method significantly outperforms existing unified representation approaches across various sensor deterioration scenarios, achieving state-of-the-art under extreme weather and sensor failure.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to improve the reliability of autonomous driving 3D detection systems under sensor failures or adverse conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Could explore implicit reconstruction of missing modalities or cross-modal attention mechanisms within the module to further enhance robustness.
idea_spark.risk: The module may still have performance bottlenecks in extreme degradation scenarios and requires high computational resources.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the need for robustness under sensor failure, further research could explore online adaptive fusion strategies.

papers.title: From Submodularity to Matrix Determinants: Strengthening Han's, Szász's, and Fischer's Inequalities
papers.summary: Dembo, Cover, and Thomas (1991) developed an elegant information-theoretic framework for proving determinantal inequalities for positive definite matrices, which relies on the structural inequalities of differential entropy. Submodular functions, which subsume entropy, inherently satisfy these structural inequalities because they obey generalized forms of the fundamental properties of entropy -- a chain rule and the property that conditioning reduces the function's value (under an appropriate definition of conditioning). Applying subadditivity, Han's inequality (1978), and partition subadditivity (i.e., subadditivity over a partition) yields Hadamard's, Szász's, and Fischer's inequalities, respectively. Furthermore, this framework recovers Ky Fan's inequality (1955), a strengthening of Hadamard's inequality. This improvement fundamentally arises because conditional subadditivity yields a tighter upper bound on the joint entropy than the one obtained via unconditional subadditivity.   In this paper, we establish conditional strengthenings of Han's inequality and partition subadditivity in the general setting of submodular functions. We derive equality conditions for these strengthened bounds and characterize when they strictly improve their unconditional counterparts. We specialize these results to differential entropy and apply them to establish strengthened versions of Szász's and Fischer's inequalities. The strengthening of Szász's inequality recovers Ky Fan's inequality as a special case, and is strictly stronger than the classical Szász's inequality for any non-diagonal positive definite matrix. We also derive an inequality concerning eigenvalues, which generalizes and strictly strengthens a corresponding eigenvalue inequality of Ky Fan. We provide numerical examples to explicitly illustrate the tightness of our proposed matrix determinantal bounds.

ai.tldr: 本文在次模函数的一般框架下建立了Han不等式和划分次可加性的条件加强版本，推导了等号成立条件，并应用于微分熵，得到了Szász和Fischer不等式的加强形式，其中Szász不等式的加强特例恢复并严格强于Ky Fan不等式。
ai.motivation: 经典的行列式不等式（如Hadamard、Szász、Fischer）已有信息论证明，但条件次可加性可给出比无条件次可加性更紧的联合熵上界，从而导出更强的不等式。本文旨在系统建立次模函数下的条件加强版本，并推广到矩阵行列式。
ai.method: 利用次模函数的链式法则和条件作用降低函数值的性质，定义条件次可加性，推导条件加强的Han不等式和划分次可加性，并给出等号成立条件。然后将结果特化到微分熵，得到矩阵行列式的加强不等式。
ai.result: 得到了Szász和Fischer不等式的条件加强版本，Szász加强不等式严格强于经典Szász不等式（对任何非对角正定矩阵），并恢复Ky Fan不等式为特例；还导出了一个关于特征值的加强不等式。
ai.help_to_user: 本文为研究次模函数和矩阵不等式提供了新的条件加强工具，可用于推导更紧的熵或行列式上界，在信息论、组合优化和矩阵分析中具有潜在应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将条件加强的Han不等式应用于图论中的割函数，可能得到图划分问题的更紧上界，进而改进图分割算法的近似比。
idea_spark.risk: 条件加强不等式的等号条件可能难以满足，实际应用中未必总能获得严格改进；且推广到非次模函数时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受条件熵优于无条件熵的启发，可探索其他信息论量（如互信息、KL散度）的条件版本在矩阵不等式或学习理论中的应用。

en.tldr: This paper establishes conditional strengthenings of Han's inequality and partition subadditivity in the general setting of submodular functions, derives equality conditions, and applies them to differential entropy to obtain strengthened versions of Szász's and Fischer's inequalities, with the Szász strengthening recovering and strictly improving Ky Fan's inequality.
en.motivation: Classical determinantal inequalities (Hadamard, Szász, Fischer) have information-theoretic proofs, but conditional subadditivity yields tighter upper bounds on joint entropy than unconditional subadditivity, enabling stronger inequalities. This work systematically develops conditional strengthenings for submodular functions and extends them to matrix determinants.
en.method: Leveraging the chain rule and the property that conditioning reduces function value for submodular functions, we define conditional subadditivity, derive conditional strengthenings of Han's inequality and partition subadditivity with equality conditions, then specialize to differential entropy to obtain strengthened matrix determinantal inequalities.
en.result: Conditional strengthenings of Szász's and Fischer's inequalities are obtained; the strengthened Szász inequality strictly improves the classical one for any non-diagonal positive definite matrix and recovers Ky Fan's inequality as a special case; an eigenvalue inequality generalizing and strictly strengthening a corresponding Ky Fan inequality is also derived.
en.help_to_user: This work provides new conditional strengthening tools for submodular functions and matrix inequalities, enabling tighter entropy or determinant bounds with potential applications in information theory, combinatorial optimization, and matrix analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the conditional strengthening of Han's inequality to cut functions in graphs to obtain tighter upper bounds on graph partition problems, potentially improving approximation ratios for graph segmentation algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Equality conditions for the conditional strengthenings may be restrictive, limiting practical strict improvements; the approach may not extend to non-submodular functions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by how conditional entropy outperforms unconditional entropy, explore conditional versions of other information-theoretic quantities (e.g., mutual information, KL divergence) for matrix inequalities or learning theory applications.

papers.title: Quantifying Rodda and Graham Gait Classification from 3D Makerless Kinematics derived from a Single-view Video in a Heterogeneous Pediatric Clinical Cohort
papers.summary: Cerebral Palsy (CP) is a neurological disorder of movement and the most common cause of lifelong physical disability in childhood. Approximately 75% of children with CP are ambulatory, and accurate gait assessment is central to preserving walking function, which deteriorates by mid-adulthood in a quarter to half of adults with CP. The Rodda and Graham classification system quantifies sagittal-plane gait deviations using ankle and knee z-scores derived from 3D Instrumented Gait Analysis (3D-IGA), but 3D-IGA is expensive and limited to specialized centers, while observational assessment shows only moderate inter-rater agreement. We developed a markerless gait analysis pipeline that quantifies Rodda and Graham knee and ankle z-scores directly from single-view clinical gait videos. Across 1,058 bilateral limb samples from 529 trials of 152 children (88 male, 63 female; age 12.1 $\pm$ 4.0 years; 60 distinct primary diagnoses, cerebral palsy the most common at $n=54$), the sagittal-view model achieved $R^2 = 0.80 \pm 0.02$ and CCC $= 0.89 \pm 0.02$ for knee z-scores and $R^2 = 0.57 \pm 0.02$ and CCC $= 0.72 \pm 0.02$ for ankle z-scores against 3D-IGA. Binary screening for excess knee flexion achieves AUROC $= 0.88$, correctly identifying 83% of affected children, and applying Rodda and Graham rules yields $43 \pm 1$% 7-class accuracy with macro-AUROC $= 0.78 \pm 0.01$, ankle prediction error remaining the primary bottleneck. Beyond cross-sectional screening, continuous z-scores support longitudinal trajectory tracking across visits, providing a quantitative substrate for monitoring disease progression and treatment response unavailable from observational scales. These results demonstrate the feasibility of video-based z-score estimation, excess-flexion screening, and longitudinal trajectory tracking as a path toward scalable, objective gait assessment in low-resource clinical settings.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于单视角视频的无标记步态分析流程，可直接量化Rodda和Graham分类中的膝踝z分数，在152名儿童（529次试验）中验证，膝部R²=0.80，踝部R²=0.57，并支持纵向轨迹追踪。
ai.motivation: 脑瘫儿童步态评估依赖昂贵的3D仪器步态分析（3D-IGA），而临床观察一致性差；需要一种低成本、可扩展的客观步态评估方法。
ai.method: 从单视角临床视频中提取无标记三维运动学数据，计算膝踝z分数，并应用Rodda和Graham分类规则。
ai.result: 膝部z分数R²=0.80，CCC=0.89；踝部z分数R²=0.57，CCC=0.72；膝过屈筛查AUROC=0.88；7类分类准确率43%，宏AUROC=0.78。
ai.help_to_user: 为临床医生提供一种无需专用设备即可从常规视频中获取定量步态指标的方法，适用于资源有限的环境。

idea_spark.idea: 结合深度学习和运动学模型，从单视角视频中提取多关节角度，实现全下肢步态分类。
idea_spark.risk: 踝部预测误差较大，可能限制精细分类的准确性；单视角可能遗漏侧向运动信息。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用现有临床视频数据，通过无标记技术实现大规模、低成本的步态筛查和纵向监测。

zh.tldr: 提出一种基于单视角视频的无标记步态分析流程，可直接量化Rodda和Graham分类中的膝踝z分数，在152名儿童（529次试验）中验证，膝部R²=0.80，踝部R²=0.57，并支持纵向轨迹追踪。
zh.motivation: 脑瘫儿童步态评估依赖昂贵的3D仪器步态分析（3D-IGA），而临床观察一致性差；需要一种低成本、可扩展的客观步态评估方法。
zh.method: 从单视角临床视频中提取无标记三维运动学数据，计算膝踝z分数，并应用Rodda和Graham分类规则。
zh.result: 膝部z分数R²=0.80，CCC=0.89；踝部z分数R²=0.57，CCC=0.72；膝过屈筛查AUROC=0.88；7类分类准确率43%，宏AUROC=0.78。
zh.help_to_user: 为临床医生提供一种无需专用设备即可从常规视频中获取定量步态指标的方法，适用于资源有限的环境。

idea_spark.idea: 结合深度学习和运动学模型，从单视角视频中提取多关节角度，实现全下肢步态分类。
idea_spark.risk: 踝部预测误差较大，可能限制精细分类的准确性；单视角可能遗漏侧向运动信息。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用现有临床视频数据，通过无标记技术实现大规模、低成本的步态筛查和纵向监测。

en.tldr: A markerless gait analysis pipeline quantifies Rodda and Graham knee and ankle z-scores from single-view clinical videos, validated on 152 children (529 trials), achieving knee R²=0.80 and ankle R²=0.57, with longitudinal tracking capability.
en.motivation: Cerebral palsy gait assessment relies on expensive 3D instrumented gait analysis (3D-IGA) with limited access, while observational assessment has moderate inter-rater reliability; a scalable, objective method is needed.
en.method: Extract 3D markerless kinematics from single-view videos to compute knee and ankle z-scores and apply Rodda and Graham classification rules.
en.result: Knee z-scores: R²=0.80, CCC=0.89; ankle z-scores: R²=0.57, CCC=0.72; excess knee flexion screening AUROC=0.88; 7-class accuracy 43%, macro-AUROC=0.78.
en.help_to_user: Provides clinicians with a quantitative gait assessment tool from routine videos without specialized equipment, suitable for low-resource settings.

idea_spark.idea: Combine deep learning with biomechanical models to extract multi-joint angles from single-view video for full lower-limb gait classification.
idea_spark.risk: Ankle prediction errors may limit fine-grained classification accuracy; single-view may miss lateral movement information.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage existing clinical video archives for large-scale, low-cost gait screening and longitudinal monitoring via markerless techniques.

papers.title: Control Charts for Multi-agent Systems
papers.summary: Generative agents have proven to be powerful assistants in a wide variety of contexts. Given this success, users are now deploying agents with minimal restrictions in open ended, multi-agent environments. Current methods for monitoring the dynamics of open-ended multi-agent systems are limited to qualitative inspection. In this paper, we extend the process-theoretic notion of adaptive control charts to multi-agent systems to enable automated monitoring. Using simulation, we demonstrate that adaptive control charts are necessary for monitoring multi-agent systems that can learn from their environment. We further demonstrate, both empirically and theoretically, that adaptive control charts are susceptible to adversarial agents that defect sufficiently slowly. These results illustrate a fundamental tradeoff in multi-agent system control: either agents in a system cannot learn or the system is susceptible to adversaries.

ai.tldr: 将自适应控制图扩展到多智能体系统，实现自动监控，并揭示学习能力与对抗鲁棒性之间的根本权衡。
ai.motivation: 当前开放多智能体系统的监控仅依赖定性检查，缺乏自动化方法。
ai.method: 扩展过程理论中的自适应控制图到多智能体系统，并通过仿真验证其必要性。
ai.result: 自适应控制图对缓慢叛变的对抗智能体敏感，表明系统要么不能学习，要么易受攻击。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解多智能体系统监控的自动化方法及其安全局限。

idea_spark.idea: 设计混合监控策略，结合自适应控制图与异常检测算法，提升对抗鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 对抗智能体可能利用控制图更新规则进行隐蔽攻击。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴统计过程控制中的累积和（CUSUM）方法增强早期检测能力。

en.tldr: Extends adaptive control charts to multi-agent systems for automated monitoring, revealing a fundamental tradeoff between learning and adversarial robustness.
en.motivation: Current monitoring of open-ended multi-agent systems relies on qualitative inspection, lacking automated methods.
en.method: Extends process-theoretic adaptive control charts to multi-agent systems and validates via simulation.
en.result: Adaptive control charts are susceptible to slowly defecting adversarial agents, implying a tradeoff: either agents cannot learn or the system is vulnerable.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand automated monitoring methods for multi-agent systems and their security limitations.

idea_spark.idea: Design hybrid monitoring strategies combining adaptive control charts with anomaly detection to improve adversarial robustness.
idea_spark.risk: Adversarial agents may exploit control chart update rules for stealthy attacks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw from cumulative sum (CUSUM) methods in statistical process control to enhance early detection.

papers.title: TCP-SSM: Efficient Vision State Space Models with Token-Conditioned Poles
papers.summary: State Space Models (SSMs) have emerged as a compelling alternative to attention models for long-range vision tasks, offering input-dependent recurrence with linear complexity. However, most efficient SSM variants reduce computation cost by modifying scan routes, resolutions, or traversal patterns, while largely leaving the recurrent dynamics implicit. Consequently, the model's state-dependent memory behavior is difficult to control, particularly in compact backbones where long scan paths can exceed the effective memory horizon. We propose Token-Conditioned Poles SSM (TCP-SSM), a structured selective SSM framework that improves efficiency while making recurrence dynamics explicit and interpretable through stable poles. TCP-SSM builds each scan operator with 1) real poles that model monotone or sign-alternating decay, and 2) complex-conjugate poles that capture damped oscillatory responses. Using bounded radius and angle modulation, TCP-SSM converts shared base poles into token-dependent poles, allowing each scan step to adapt its memory behavior to the current visual token while preserving pole stability. For practical scalability, we integrate grouped pole sharing with a lightweight low-rank input pathway, yielding an efficient scan operator that preserves linear-time scan complexity. Across image classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection, TCP-SSM reduces SSM computation complexity up to 44% in Vision Mamba-style models while maintaining or surpassing baseline accuracy.

ai.tldr: 提出TCP-SSM框架，通过令牌条件极点使状态空间模型的递归动态显式可控，在保持精度的同时降低计算复杂度。
ai.motivation: 现有高效SSM变体通过修改扫描路径等方式降低计算成本，但递归动态隐式且难以控制，尤其在紧凑骨干网络中长扫描路径可能超出有效记忆范围。
ai.method: 设计令牌条件极点SSM，包含实极点（建模单调或符号交替衰减）和复共轭极点（捕获阻尼振荡响应），通过有界半径和角度调制将共享基极点转换为令牌相关极点，并采用分组极点共享和轻量低秩输入路径保持线性复杂度。
ai.result: 在图像分类、语义分割和目标检测任务中，相比Vision Mamba风格模型，SSM计算复杂度降低高达44%，同时保持或超越基线精度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过显式可控的递归动态提升状态空间模型在视觉任务中的效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将极点调制与注意力机制结合，或探索自适应极点数量以动态平衡记忆与计算。
idea_spark.risk: 极点稳定性约束可能限制模型表达能力，需验证在更大规模数据集上的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受控制理论中极点配置启发，将系统稳定性与深度学习动态结合。

en.tldr: Proposes TCP-SSM, a structured selective SSM framework that makes recurrence dynamics explicit and interpretable via token-conditioned poles, reducing computation complexity while maintaining accuracy.
en.motivation: Existing efficient SSM variants reduce cost by modifying scan routes but leave recurrent dynamics implicit and hard to control, especially in compact backbones where long scan paths exceed effective memory horizon.
en.method: Designs token-conditioned poles SSM with real poles (monotone/sign-alternating decay) and complex-conjugate poles (damped oscillations), converting shared base poles into token-dependent ones via bounded radius and angle modulation, with grouped pole sharing and lightweight low-rank input pathway for linear complexity.
en.result: Reduces SSM computation complexity up to 44% in Vision Mamba-style models across image classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection, while matching or surpassing baseline accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how explicit and controllable recurrent dynamics can improve efficiency of state space models in vision tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combine pole modulation with attention mechanisms, or explore adaptive number of poles to dynamically balance memory and computation.
idea_spark.risk: Pole stability constraints may limit model expressiveness; generalization on larger datasets needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by pole placement in control theory, integrating system stability with deep learning dynamics.

papers.title: The Granularity Mismatch in Agent Security: Argument-Level Provenance Solves Enforcement and Isolates the LLM Reasoning Bottleneck
papers.summary: Tool-using LLM agents must act on untrusted webpages, emails, files, and API outputs while issuing privileged tool calls. Existing defenses often mediate trust at the granularity of an entire tool invocation, forcing a brittle choice in mixed-trust workflows: allow external content to influence a call and risk hijacked destinations or commands, or quarantine the call and block benign retrieval-then-act behavior. The key observation behind this paper is that indirect prompt injection becomes dangerous not when untrusted content appears in context, but when it determines an authority-bearing argument. We present \textsc{PACT} (\emph{Provenance-Aware Capability Contracts}), a runtime monitor that assigns semantic roles to tool arguments, tracks value provenance across replanning steps, and checks whether each argument's origin satisfies its role-specific trust contract. Under oracle provenance, \textsc{PACT} achieves 100\% utility and 100\% security on mixed-trust diagnostic suites, while flat invocation-level monitors incur false positives or false negatives. In full AgentDojo deployments across five models, \textsc{PACT} reaches 100\% security on the three strongest models while recovering 38.1--46.4\% utility, 8--16 percentage points above CaMeL at the same security level. Ablations show that both semantic roles and cross-step provenance are necessary. \textsc{PACT} reframes agent security as authority binding, and isolates the remaining deployment bottleneck to provenance inference and contract synthesis.

ai.tldr: 提出PACT系统，通过参数级来源追踪解决LLM代理安全中的粒度不匹配问题，实现100%安全性和高实用性。
ai.motivation: 现有防御在混合信任工作流中因粗粒度工具调用监控导致安全与实用性难以兼得。
ai.method: PACT为工具参数分配语义角色，追踪跨重规划步骤的值来源，并检查每个参数来源是否满足角色特定的信任契约。
ai.result: 在混合信任诊断套件上达到100%安全性和100%实用性；在AgentDojo部署中，最强三个模型达到100%安全性，实用性恢复38.1-46.4%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过细粒度来源控制来防御间接提示注入攻击，同时保持代理的正常功能。

idea_spark.idea: 将代理安全重新定义为权威绑定问题，隔离剩余瓶颈至来源推断和契约合成。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖准确的来源推断，若来源信息不完整或错误可能导致安全漏洞。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从软件工程中的能力安全模型获得启发，将参数来源与信任契约结合。

zh.tldr: 提出PACT系统，通过参数级来源追踪解决LLM代理安全中的粒度不匹配问题，实现100%安全性和高实用性。
zh.motivation: 现有防御在混合信任工作流中因粗粒度工具调用监控导致安全与实用性难以兼得。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过细粒度来源控制来防御间接提示注入攻击，同时保持代理的正常功能。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从软件工程中的能力安全模型获得启发，将参数来源与信任契约结合。

en.tldr: PACT uses argument-level provenance tracking to resolve the granularity mismatch in LLM agent security, achieving 100% security and high utility.
en.motivation: Existing coarse-grained defenses force a brittle trade-off between security and utility in mixed-trust workflows.
en.method: PACT assigns semantic roles to tool arguments, tracks value provenance across replanning steps, and checks each argument's origin against role-specific trust contracts.
en.result: Achieves 100% security and 100% utility on mixed-trust diagnostic suites; in AgentDojo deployments, 100% security on the three strongest models with 38.1-46.4% utility recovery.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how fine-grained provenance control can defend against indirect prompt injection while preserving agent functionality.

idea_spark.idea: Reframes agent security as authority binding, isolating the remaining bottleneck to provenance inference and contract synthesis.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on accurate provenance inference; incomplete or erroneous provenance may lead to security vulnerabilities.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by capability security models in software engineering, combining argument provenance with trust contracts.

papers.title: Principled Design of Diffusion-based Optimizers for Inverse Problems
papers.summary: Score-based diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art performance for inverse problems, but their practical deployment is hindered by long inference times and cumbersome hyperparameter tuning. While pretrained diffusion models can be reused across tasks without retraining, inference-time hyperparameters such as the noise schedule and posterior sampling weights typically require ad-hoc adjustment for each problem setup. We propose principled reparameterizations that induce invariances, allowing the same hyperparameters to be reused across multiple problems without re-tuning. In addition, building on the RED-diff framework, which reformulates posterior sampling as an optimization problem, we further develop the OptDiff pipeline. OptDiff provides a simplified tuning framework that facilitates the integration of convex optimization tools to accelerate inference. Experiments on image reconstruction, deblurring, and super-resolution show substantial speedups and improved image quality.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种基于扩散模型的逆问题优化器设计方法，通过重参数化实现超参数跨问题复用，并开发了OptDiff流水线加速推理。
ai.motivation: 扩散模型在逆问题中性能优异，但推理时间长且超参数需针对每个问题手动调整，限制了实际部署。
ai.method: 设计具有不变性的重参数化，使超参数可跨问题复用；基于RED-diff框架，进一步开发OptDiff流水线，集成凸优化工具加速推理。
ai.result: 在图像重建、去模糊和超分辨率任务上，实现了显著加速和图像质量提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户无需重新调参即可将预训练扩散模型应用于不同逆问题，并加速推理过程。

idea_spark.idea: 将凸优化工具集成到扩散模型后验采样中，可能启发更高效的采样算法。
idea_spark.risk: 重参数化可能对某些极端逆问题不适用，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从优化视角重新审视扩散模型推理，可能推动理论分析与实践结合。

zh.tldr: 提出了一种基于扩散模型的逆问题优化器设计方法，通过重参数化实现超参数跨问题复用，并开发了OptDiff流水线加速推理。
zh.motivation: 扩散模型在逆问题中性能优异，但推理时间长且超参数需针对每个问题手动调整，限制了实际部署。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户无需重新调参即可将预训练扩散模型应用于不同逆问题，并加速推理过程。

idea_spark.idea: 将凸优化工具集成到扩散模型后验采样中，可能启发更高效的采样算法。
idea_spark.risk: 重参数化可能对某些极端逆问题不适用，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从优化视角重新审视扩散模型推理，可能推动理论分析与实践结合。

en.tldr: Proposes a principled design for diffusion-based optimizers for inverse problems, using reparameterizations to reuse hyperparameters across tasks and developing the OptDiff pipeline for faster inference.
en.motivation: Diffusion models excel at inverse problems but suffer from long inference times and ad-hoc hyperparameter tuning per problem, hindering deployment.
en.method: Introduces reparameterizations that induce invariances for hyperparameter reuse; builds on RED-diff to create OptDiff, integrating convex optimization tools for accelerated inference.
en.result: Demonstrates substantial speedups and improved image quality on image reconstruction, deblurring, and super-resolution tasks.
en.help_to_user: Enables users to apply pretrained diffusion models to different inverse problems without retuning hyperparameters and speeds up inference.

idea_spark.idea: Integrating convex optimization tools into diffusion posterior sampling may inspire more efficient sampling algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Reparameterizations may not generalize to extreme inverse problems; robustness needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing diffusion inference through an optimization lens could bridge theory and practice.

papers.title: Birds of a Feather Flock Together: Background-Invariant Representations via Linear Structure in VLMs
papers.summary: Vision-language models (VLMs), such as CLIP and SigLIP 2, are widely used for image classification, yet their vision encoders remain vulnerable to systematic biases that undermine robustness. In particular, correlations between foreground objects and their backgrounds constitute a salient and practically important class of spurious dependencies. In this work, we revisit the well-known property of high linear additivity in VLM embedding spaces and show that it enables a decomposition of scene representations into foreground and background components. Leveraging this insight, we introduce a pre-training approach that exploits this property to construct background-invariant representations using synthetic data. Our method achieves, to our knowledge, the first worst-group accuracy exceeding $90\%$ on Waterbirds under perfect ($100\%$) spurious correlation (i.e., no minority-group examples in the training data). Furthermore, it demonstrates strong sim-to-real transfer and requires no access to real-world debiased data, making it practical for real-world deployment.

ai.tldr: 本文利用视觉语言模型嵌入空间中的线性可加性，通过合成数据预训练实现背景不变表示，在Waterbirds数据集上首次在完美虚假相关下达到超过90%的最差组准确率。
ai.motivation: 视觉语言模型（如CLIP、SigLIP 2）的图像编码器易受系统偏差影响，特别是前景与背景之间的虚假相关，导致鲁棒性不足。现有方法通常需要真实去偏数据，限制了实际部署。
ai.method: 重新发现VLM嵌入空间的高线性可加性，将场景表示分解为前景和背景成分；基于此性质，利用合成数据预训练构建背景不变表示。
ai.result: 在Waterbirds数据集上，在训练数据中无少数群体样本（100%虚假相关）的情况下，最差组准确率首次超过90%；同时展示了强模拟到真实迁移能力，无需真实去偏数据。
ai.help_to_user: 该研究提供了一种无需真实去偏数据即可提升模型对背景变化鲁棒性的实用方法，适用于图像分类等下游任务。

idea_spark.idea: 利用合成数据生成不同背景组合，结合线性分解约束，迫使模型学习前景不变特征。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实场景的分布差异可能导致迁移性能下降；线性分解假设在复杂场景中可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从VLM嵌入空间的线性性质出发，启发我们探索其他预训练模型中的结构性质用于鲁棒性提升。

zh.tldr: 本文利用视觉语言模型嵌入空间中的线性可加性，通过合成数据预训练实现背景不变表示，在Waterbirds数据集上首次在完美虚假相关下达到超过90%的最差组准确率。
zh.motivation: 视觉语言模型（如CLIP、SigLIP 2）的图像编码器易受系统偏差影响，特别是前景与背景之间的虚假相关，导致鲁棒性不足。现有方法通常需要真实去偏数据，限制了实际部署。
zh.method: 重新发现VLM嵌入空间的高线性可加性，将场景表示分解为前景和背景成分；基于此性质，利用合成数据预训练构建背景不变表示。
zh.result: 在Waterbirds数据集上，在训练数据中无少数群体样本（100%虚假相关）的情况下，最差组准确率首次超过90%；同时展示了强模拟到真实迁移能力，无需真实去偏数据。
zh.help_to_user: 该研究提供了一种无需真实去偏数据即可提升模型对背景变化鲁棒性的实用方法，适用于图像分类等下游任务。

idea_spark.idea: 利用合成数据生成不同背景组合，结合线性分解约束，迫使模型学习前景不变特征。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实场景的分布差异可能导致迁移性能下降；线性分解假设在复杂场景中可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从VLM嵌入空间的线性性质出发，启发我们探索其他预训练模型中的结构性质用于鲁棒性提升。

en.tldr: This paper leverages the linear additivity in VLM embedding spaces to construct background-invariant representations via synthetic data pre-training, achieving over 90% worst-group accuracy on Waterbirds under perfect spurious correlation.
en.motivation: Vision-language models (e.g., CLIP, SigLIP 2) suffer from systematic biases, especially spurious correlations between foreground and background, which degrade robustness. Existing methods often require real debiased data, limiting practical deployment.
en.method: Revisits the high linear additivity property in VLM embedding spaces to decompose scene representations into foreground and background components; uses synthetic data pre-training to build background-invariant representations.
en.result: Achieves the first worst-group accuracy exceeding 90% on Waterbirds under perfect spurious correlation (no minority-group examples in training data); demonstrates strong sim-to-real transfer without real-world debiased data.
en.help_to_user: This work provides a practical method to improve model robustness against background variations without requiring real debiased data, applicable to downstream tasks like image classification.

idea_spark.idea: Use synthetic data with diverse background combinations and linear decomposition constraints to force the model to learn foreground-invariant features.
idea_spark.risk: Distribution mismatch between synthetic and real data may degrade transfer performance; linear decomposition assumption may fail in complex scenes.
idea_spark.inspiration: The linear structure in VLM embeddings inspires exploring structural properties in other pretrained models for robustness enhancement.

papers.title: The Entropy of Floating-Point Numbers
papers.summary: Here we present an analytic approximation for the entropy of floating-point numbers, along with bounds on the error of this approximation. It is well-known that the differential entropy is tightly linked to the discrete entropy of a uniformly quantized random variable. Our approximation uncovers a different quantity that provides this link for floating-point quantization. Additionally, we prove that the entropy of a floating-point quantized random variable is approximately unchanged under scaling. Closed-form expressions for the floating-point entropy of common distributions are provided and compared to exact results.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了浮点数熵的解析近似公式及其误差界，揭示了浮点量化下微分熵与离散熵的新联系，并证明了浮点量化随机变量的熵在缩放下近似不变。
ai.motivation: 现有理论中微分熵与均匀量化离散熵的关系已知，但浮点量化场景下缺乏类似精确联系。
ai.method: 通过解析推导得到浮点数熵的近似表达式，并给出误差界；利用缩放不变性证明简化计算。
ai.result: 给出了常见分布下浮点熵的闭式表达式，并与精确结果对比验证了近似精度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解浮点表示对信息度量的影响，可用于机器学习模型量化分析或数值计算中的熵估计。

idea_spark.idea: 将浮点熵近似用于神经网络权重的信息瓶颈分析，量化不同精度下的信息损失。
idea_spark.risk: 近似误差在极端分布或低精度浮点格式下可能显著增大，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受微分熵与离散熵经典关系的启发，探索浮点量化特有的信息度量结构。

zh.tldr: 本文提出了浮点数熵的解析近似公式及其误差界，揭示了浮点量化下微分熵与离散熵的新联系，并证明了浮点量化随机变量的熵在缩放下近似不变。
zh.motivation: 现有理论中微分熵与均匀量化离散熵的关系已知，但浮点量化场景下缺乏类似精确联系。

en.tldr: This paper presents an analytic approximation for the entropy of floating-point numbers with error bounds, reveals a new link between differential and discrete entropy under floating-point quantization, and proves approximate scale invariance of the entropy.
en.motivation: Existing theory links differential entropy to discrete entropy under uniform quantization, but lacks a precise analog for floating-point quantization.
en.method: Derives an analytic approximation for floating-point entropy with error bounds; exploits scale invariance to simplify computations.
en.result: Provides closed-form expressions for floating-point entropy of common distributions and validates accuracy against exact results.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the impact of floating-point representation on information measures, useful for quantization analysis in machine learning or entropy estimation in numerical computing.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the floating-point entropy approximation to information bottleneck analysis of neural network weights, quantifying information loss at different precisions.
idea_spark.risk: Approximation errors may become significant under extreme distributions or low-precision floating-point formats; careful validation is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the classical relationship between differential and discrete entropy, exploring the unique information metric structure under floating-point quantization.

papers.title: Nice Fold or Hero Call: Learning Budget-Efficient Thinking for Adaptive Reasoning
papers.summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) improve problem solving through extended reasoning, but often misallocate test-time compute. Existing efficiency methods reduce cost by compressing reasoning traces or conditioning budget on perceived difficulty, yet largely overlook solvability. As a result, they may spend large budgets on queries beyond the model's capability while compressing hard-but-solvable queries that require deeper reasoning. In this work, we formulate adaptive reasoning as a computational investment under uncertainty, where budget should follow the expected return of reasoning rather than perceived difficulty alone. To instantiate this principle, we propose Budget-Efficient Thinking (BET), a two-stage framework that combines behavioral cold-start with GRPO under an investment-cost-aware reward. By aligning solve-or-fold decisions with rollout-derived solvability, BET learns three behaviors: (1) short solve, answering easy queries concisely; (2) nice fold, abstaining early when continued reasoning has near-zero expected return; and (3) hero call, preserving sufficient compute for hard-but-solvable queries. Across seven benchmarks and three base models, BET reduces reasoning tokens by ~55% on average while achieving overall performance improvements, and transfers zero-shot from mathematical reasoning to scientific QA and logical reasoning with comparable efficiency gains.

ai.tldr: 提出预算高效思维（BET）框架，通过投资成本感知奖励和GRPO训练，使大推理模型根据可解性自适应分配推理预算，在减少约55%推理token的同时提升性能。
ai.motivation: 现有大推理模型常浪费计算资源在不可解问题上，而对可解但困难的问题压缩不足，缺乏基于可解性的预算分配机制。
ai.method: 两阶段框架：行为冷启动结合GRPO优化，奖励函数考虑推理投资回报，学习三种行为：简短解答、早期放弃（nice fold）、保留计算（hero call）。
ai.result: 在7个基准和3个基模型上平均减少55%推理token，性能整体提升，且零样本迁移到科学问答和逻辑推理任务。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何让模型更智能地分配推理计算资源，避免浪费，提升效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将推理预算分配建模为投资决策，结合强化学习学习何时放弃、何时深入。
idea_spark.risk: 可解性估计可能不准确，导致错误放弃或过度计算；训练需要大量带可解性标注的样本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从扑克牌游戏中的“nice fold”和“hero call”策略获得灵感，类比推理中的放弃与坚持决策。

idea_spark.idea: 将推理预算分配建模为投资决策，结合强化学习学习何时放弃、何时深入。
idea_spark.risk: 可解性估计可能不准确，导致错误放弃或过度计算；训练需要大量带可解性标注的样本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从扑克牌游戏中的“nice fold”和“hero call”策略获得灵感，类比推理中的放弃与坚持决策。

en.tldr: Proposes Budget-Efficient Thinking (BET), a two-stage framework using GRPO with investment-cost-aware reward to adaptively allocate reasoning budget based on solvability, reducing reasoning tokens by ~55% on average while improving performance.
en.motivation: Large reasoning models often waste compute on unsolvable queries and under-invest on hard-but-solvable ones, lacking solvability-aware budget allocation.
en.method: Two-stage framework: behavioral cold-start followed by GRPO optimization with a reward that accounts for reasoning return on investment, learning three behaviors: short solve, nice fold (early abstention), and hero call (preserving compute).
en.result: Across 7 benchmarks and 3 base models, reduces reasoning tokens by ~55% on average with overall performance gains, and transfers zero-shot to scientific QA and logical reasoning.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to make models allocate reasoning compute more intelligently, avoiding waste and improving efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Model reasoning budget allocation as an investment decision, using reinforcement learning to learn when to fold and when to go deep.
idea_spark.risk: Solvability estimation may be inaccurate, leading to wrong folds or over-computation; training requires samples with solvability labels.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by 'nice fold' and 'hero call' strategies in poker, analogizing the decision to abandon or persist in reasoning.

papers.title: Output Composability of QLoRA PEFT Modules for Plug-and-Play Attribute-Controlled Text Generation
papers.summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) techniques offer task-specific fine-tuning at a fraction of the cost of full fine-tuning, but require separate fine-tuning for every new task (combination). In this paper, we explore three ways of generalising beyond single-task training/inference: (i) training on combinations of multiple, related datasets; (ii) at inference, composing the weight matrices of separately trained PEFT modules; and (iii) at inference, composing the outputs of separately trained PEFT modules. We test these approaches on three different LLMs, QLoRA as the PEFT technique, and three sets of controlled text generation datasets for sentiment control, topic control, and multi-attribute control. We find that summing PEFT module outputs is a particularly strong composition method, which consistently either outperforms or matches the performance of alternative approaches. This is the case even when comparing against single-task specialised modules on the single-task test set, where three-module output composition achieves an average 2% point performance increase across all models for sentiment control.

ai.tldr: 探索了QLoRA PEFT模块的三种泛化方式，发现输出组合在情感、主题和多属性控制文本生成中表现最佳。
ai.motivation: 现有PEFT方法需为每个新任务单独微调，成本高且缺乏灵活性。
ai.method: 对比了多数据集联合训练、推理时权重矩阵组合和输出组合三种方法，在三个LLM和三个控制生成数据集上测试。
ai.result: 输出组合方法一致优于或匹配其他方法，在情感控制单任务测试集上平均提升2个百分点。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种即插即用的属性控制文本生成方案，无需重新训练即可组合多个PEFT模块。

idea_spark.idea: 将多个PEFT模块的输出加权求和，实现多属性联合控制，类似集成学习。
idea_spark.risk: 模块间可能产生冲突或冗余，需设计动态权重或门控机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受模型集成和特征融合启发，将独立训练的模块输出视为特征，通过简单求和实现组合泛化。

idea_spark.risk: 模块间可能产生冲突或冗余，需设计动态权重或门控机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受模型集成和特征融合启发，将独立训练的模块输出视为特征，通过简单求和实现组合泛化。

en.tldr: Explores three ways to generalize QLoRA PEFT modules beyond single-task training, finding output composition consistently outperforms or matches alternatives for sentiment, topic, and multi-attribute controlled text generation.
en.motivation: Existing PEFT methods require separate fine-tuning for each new task, incurring high cost and lacking flexibility.
en.method: Compares multi-dataset joint training, weight matrix composition at inference, and output composition at inference across three LLMs and three controlled generation datasets.
en.result: Output composition consistently outperforms or matches alternative approaches, achieving an average 2% point increase on single-task sentiment control test sets.
en.help_to_user: Provides a plug-and-play solution for attribute-controlled text generation by composing outputs of separately trained PEFT modules without retraining.

idea_spark.idea: Weighted sum of multiple PEFT module outputs enables joint multi-attribute control, akin to ensemble learning.
idea_spark.risk: Modules may conflict or be redundant, requiring dynamic weighting or gating mechanisms.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by model ensembling and feature fusion, treating independently trained module outputs as features and achieving compositional generalization via simple summation.

papers.title: Correction of STEM Distortions
papers.summary: The manuscript considers Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopy (STEM) images and derives transformations needed to correct various distortions occurring during scanning. These transformations form the basis for the correction algorithms implemented in the CEOS Panta Rhei and TEMDM software. The manuscript is intended as a technical reference and is meant to be published only on arXiv rather than in peer-reviewed journals.

ai.tldr: 本文推导了扫描透射电子显微镜（STEM）图像中各种扫描畸变的校正变换，并作为CEOS Panta Rhei和TEMDM软件中校正算法的技术参考。
ai.motivation: STEM成像过程中存在多种扫描畸变，需要系统推导校正变换以提升图像质量。
ai.method: 从STEM成像原理出发，推导描述畸变的数学变换，并基于这些变换实现校正算法。
ai.result: 提供了畸变校正的数学基础，并已集成到商业软件中。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解STEM畸变来源及校正原理，便于使用相关软件进行图像校正。

idea_spark.idea: 将校正算法与深度学习结合，实现自动畸变参数估计与实时校正。
idea_spark.risk: 深度学习方法可能缺乏物理可解释性，且需要大量标注数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从光学像差校正中借鉴自适应光学思想，用于动态校正扫描畸变。

en.tldr: This manuscript derives transformations for correcting various distortions in scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) images, serving as a technical reference for the correction algorithms in CEOS Panta Rhei and TEMDM software.
en.motivation: STEM imaging suffers from multiple scanning distortions that require systematic correction transformations to improve image quality.
en.method: Mathematical transformations describing distortions are derived from STEM imaging principles and implemented as correction algorithms.
en.result: Provides the mathematical foundation for distortion correction, integrated into commercial software.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the sources and correction principles of STEM distortions, facilitating the use of related software for image correction.

idea_spark.idea: Combine correction algorithms with deep learning for automatic distortion parameter estimation and real-time correction.
idea_spark.risk: Deep learning methods may lack physical interpretability and require large annotated datasets.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrow adaptive optics ideas from optical aberration correction for dynamic scanning distortion correction.

papers.title: Generalized pseudo-product structures and finite type distributions via abnormal extremals
papers.summary: We generalize the classical Tanaka result on the finiteness of symmetry algebra for non-degenerate pseudo-product structures to the case when the completely-integrable distributions defining the pseudo-product structure are no longer concentrated in the degree $-1$. In order to do this, we modify the notion of universal prolongation of graded nilpotent Lie algebras and generalize the original finiteness criterion of Tanaka. Using this result, we demonstrate that in real analytic category, distributions that are controllable by regular abnormal extremal trajectories, also known as singularly transitive, have finite-dimensional symmetries. This result settles Problem V in the affirmative from the 2013 list of open problems by Andrei Agrachev. Additionally, we discuss applications to symmetries and natural equivalence problems for systems of ODEs of mixed order.

ai.tldr: 将Tanaka关于非退化伪积结构对称代数有限性的经典结果推广到完全可积分布不再集中在-1度的情况，并证明由正则异常极值轨迹可控的分布具有有限维对称性，从而肯定回答了Agrachev 2013年开放问题列表中的问题V。
ai.motivation: 经典Tanaka结果要求伪积结构中的完全可积分布集中在-1度，限制了其应用范围。本文旨在去除这一限制，建立更一般的有限性准则。
ai.method: 修改了分次幂零李代数的通用延拓概念，推广了Tanaka的有限性判据，并利用该结果在实解析范畴中分析由正则异常极值轨迹可控的分布。
ai.result: 证明了在实解析范畴中，由正则异常极值轨迹可控（即奇异传递）的分布具有有限维对称性，并讨论了在混合阶ODE系统对称性和自然等价问题中的应用。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究伪积结构和分布对称性提供了更一般的理论框架，并解决了该领域一个长期未决的开放问题。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将正则异常极值轨迹的有限维对称性结果应用于更一般的控制系统中，或探索奇异传递分布与李代数分类之间的联系。
idea_spark.risk: 推广到非实解析范畴（如光滑或C^k）时，有限性结论可能不再成立，需要额外的正则性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从控制理论中的异常极值轨迹出发，利用李代数方法研究分布几何，为交叉领域提供了新视角。

zh.tldr: 将Tanaka关于非退化伪积结构对称代数有限性的经典结果推广到完全可积分布不再集中在-1度的情况，并证明由正则异常极值轨迹可控的分布具有有限维对称性，从而肯定回答了Agrachev 2013年开放问题列表中的问题V。
zh.motivation: 经典Tanaka结果要求伪积结构中的完全可积分布集中在-1度，限制了其应用范围。本文旨在去除这一限制，建立更一般的有限性准则。
zh.method: 修改了分次幂零李代数的通用延拓概念，推广了Tanaka的有限性判据，并利用该结果在实解析范畴中分析由正则异常极值轨迹可控的分布。
zh.result: 证明了在实解析范畴中，由正则异常极值轨迹可控（即奇异传递）的分布具有有限维对称性，并讨论了在混合阶ODE系统对称性和自然等价问题中的应用。
zh.help_to_user: 为研究伪积结构和分布对称性提供了更一般的理论框架，并解决了该领域一个长期未决的开放问题。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将正则异常极值轨迹的有限维对称性结果应用于更一般的控制系统中，或探索奇异传递分布与李代数分类之间的联系。
idea_spark.risk: 推广到非实解析范畴（如光滑或C^k）时，有限性结论可能不再成立，需要额外的正则性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从控制理论中的异常极值轨迹出发，利用李代数方法研究分布几何，为交叉领域提供了新视角。

en.tldr: Generalizes Tanaka's classical result on finiteness of symmetry algebra for non-degenerate pseudo-product structures to the case where completely-integrable distributions are not concentrated in degree -1, and proves that distributions controllable by regular abnormal extremal trajectories have finite-dimensional symmetries, affirmatively settling Problem V from Agrachev's 2013 open problem list.
en.motivation: The classical Tanaka result requires completely-integrable distributions to be concentrated in degree -1, limiting its applicability. This paper aims to remove this restriction and establish a more general finiteness criterion.
en.method: Modifies the notion of universal prolongation of graded nilpotent Lie algebras, generalizes Tanaka's finiteness criterion, and applies the result in the real analytic category to distributions controlled by regular abnormal extremal trajectories.
en.result: Proves that in the real analytic category, distributions controllable by regular abnormal extremal trajectories (i.e., singularly transitive) have finite-dimensional symmetries, and discusses applications to symmetries and natural equivalence problems for systems of ODEs of mixed order.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more general theoretical framework for studying symmetries of pseudo-product structures and distributions, and resolves a long-standing open problem in the field.

idea_spark.idea: Consider applying the finite-dimensional symmetry result for regular abnormal extremal trajectories to more general control systems, or explore connections between singularly transitive distributions and Lie algebra classifications.
idea_spark.risk: When generalizing to non-real-analytic categories (e.g., smooth or C^k), the finiteness conclusion may fail and require additional regularity conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using abnormal extremal trajectories from control theory and Lie algebra methods to study distribution geometry offers a new cross-disciplinary perspective.

keywords_raw: systems of odes of mixed order

papers.title: Cluster-Aware Neural Collapse Prompt Tuning for Long-Tailed Generalization of Vision-Language Models
papers.summary: Prompt learning has emerged as an efficient alternative to fine-tuning pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs). Despite its promise, current methods still struggle to maintain tail-class discriminability when adapting to class-imbalanced datasets. In this work, we propose cluster-aware neural collapse prompt tuning (CPT), which enhances the discriminability of tail classes in prompt-tuned VLMs without sacrificing their overall generalization. First, we design a cluster-invariant space by mining semantic assignments from the pre-trained VLM and mapping them to prompt-tuned features. This computes cluster-level boundaries and restricts the constraints to local neighborhoods, which reduces interference with the global semantic structure of the pre-trained VLM. Second, we introduce neural-collapse-driven discriminability optimization with three losses: textual Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF) separation loss, class-wise convergence loss, and rotation stabilization loss. These losses work together to shape intra-cluster geometry for better inter-class separation and intra-class alignment. Extensive experiments on 11 diverse datasets demonstrate that CPT outperforms SOTA methods, with stronger performance on long-tail classes and good generalization to unseen classes.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种聚类感知的神经坍缩提示调优方法，用于提升视觉-语言模型在长尾分布下的尾部类别判别能力。
ai.motivation: 现有提示学习方法在类别不平衡数据集上难以保持尾部类别的判别性。
ai.method: 设计聚类不变空间并引入神经坍缩驱动的判别性优化，包括文本ETF分离损失、类内收敛损失和旋转稳定损失。
ai.result: 在11个数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在长尾类别和未见类别上表现更强。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过提示调优提升模型在长尾分布下的泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用预训练模型的语义分配构建聚类不变空间，减少对全局语义结构的干扰。
idea_spark.risk: 聚类分配可能引入噪声，影响尾部类别的边界定义。
idea_spark.inspiration: 神经坍缩理论在提示调优中的应用为长尾学习提供了新视角。

en.tldr: Proposes cluster-aware neural collapse prompt tuning to enhance tail-class discriminability in vision-language models under long-tailed distributions.
en.motivation: Existing prompt learning methods struggle to maintain tail-class discriminability on class-imbalanced datasets.
en.method: Designs a cluster-invariant space and introduces neural-collapse-driven discriminability optimization with textual ETF separation loss, class-wise convergence loss, and rotation stabilization loss.
