papers.title: Fast Image Super-Resolution via Consistency Rectified Flow
papers.summary: Diffusion models (DMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in real-world image super-resolution (SR), yet their reliance on time-consuming multi-step sampling largely hinders their practical applications. While recent efforts have introduced few- or single-step solutions, existing methods either inefficiently model the process from noisy input or fail to fully exploit iterative generative priors, compromising the fidelity and quality of the reconstructed images. To address this issue, we propose FlowSR, a novel approach that reformulates the SR problem as a rectified flow from low-resolution (LR) to high-resolution (HR) images. Our method leverages an improved consistency learning strategy to enable high-quality SR in a single step. Specifically, we refine the original consistency distillation process by incorporating HR regularization, ensuring that the learned SR flow not only enforces self-consistency but also converges precisely to the ground-truth HR target. Furthermore, we introduce a fast-slow scheduling strategy, where adjacent timesteps for consistency learning are sampled from two distinct schedulers: a fast scheduler with fewer timesteps to improve efficiency, and a slow scheduler with more timesteps to capture fine-grained texture details. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FlowSR achieves outstanding performance in both efficiency and image quality.

ai.tldr: 提出FlowSR，将超分辨率问题重构为从低分辨率到高分辨率图像的整流流，通过改进的一致性学习策略实现单步高质量超分。
ai.motivation: 扩散模型在超分辨率中表现优异，但多步采样耗时；现有少步或单步方法效率低或未能充分利用迭代生成先验，导致保真度和质量下降。
ai.method: 采用整流流框架，结合高分辨率正则化改进一致性蒸馏，并引入快慢调度策略：快调度器用少步提高效率，慢调度器用多步捕捉细粒度纹理。
ai.result: 实验表明FlowSR在效率和图像质量上均取得优异性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过整流流和一致性学习实现快速、高质量的超分辨率重建。

idea_spark.idea: 将快慢调度思想用于多尺度特征融合，或结合自适应步长进一步优化效率与质量平衡。
idea_spark.risk: 单步生成可能在高退化场景下丢失细节，需验证极端低分辨率输入的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从扩散模型的迭代过程受启发，将生成先验融入单步流模型，启发其他生成任务的高效采样设计。

en.tldr: Proposes FlowSR, which reformulates super-resolution as a rectified flow from low-resolution to high-resolution images, achieving single-step high-quality SR via improved consistency learning.
en.motivation: Diffusion models excel in SR but suffer from time-consuming multi-step sampling; existing few- or single-step methods are inefficient or fail to fully exploit iterative generative priors, compromising fidelity and quality.
en.method: Employs a rectified flow framework with high-resolution regularization to improve consistency distillation, and introduces a fast-slow scheduling strategy: a fast scheduler with fewer steps for efficiency and a slow scheduler with more steps for fine-grained texture details.

idea_spark.risk: Single-step generation may lose details in high-degradation scenarios; robustness to extremely low-resolution inputs needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the iterative process of diffusion models, integrating generative priors into single-step flow models may inspire efficient sampling designs for other generative tasks.

papers.title: Rethinking Supervision Granularity: Segment-Level Learning for LLM-Based Theorem Proving
papers.summary: Automated theorem proving with large language models in Lean 4 is commonly approached through either step-level tactic prediction with tree search or whole-proof generation. These two paradigms represent opposite granularities for constructing supervised training data: the former provides dense local signals but may fragment coherent proof processes, while the latter preserves global structure but requires complex end-to-end generation. In this paper, we revisit supervision granularity as a training set construction problem over proof trajectories and propose segment-level supervision, a training data construction strategy that extracts locally coherent proof segments for training policy models. We further reuse the same strategy at inference time to trigger short rollouts for existing step-level models. When trained with segment-level supervision on STP, LeanWorkbook, and NuminaMath-LEAN, the resulting policy models achieve proof success rates of 64.84%, 60.90%, and 66.31% on miniF2F, respectively, consistently outperforming both step-level and whole-proof baselines. Goal-aware rollout further improves existing step-level provers while reducing inference costs. It increases the proof success rate of BFS-Prover-V2-7B from 68.77% to 70.74% and that of InternLM2.5-StepProver from 59.59% to 60.33%, showing that appropriate supervision granularity better aligns model learning with proof structure and search. Code and models are available at https://github.com/NJUDeepEngine/SEG-ATP.

ai.tldr: 提出段级监督策略，在LLM定理证明中平衡局部信号与全局结构，提升证明成功率。
ai.motivation: 现有步级监督碎片化证明过程，整句生成复杂且端到端困难，需要更合适的监督粒度。
ai.method: 从证明轨迹中提取局部连贯的证明段作为训练数据，推理时复用该策略触发短滚动。
ai.result: 在miniF2F上达到64.84%–66.31%的证明成功率，优于步级和整句基线；目标感知滚动进一步提升现有模型。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可复用的训练数据构建与推理策略，帮助改进LLM定理证明器的性能与效率。

idea_spark.idea: 结合段级监督与动态搜索剪枝，自适应调整证明段长度以匹配问题难度。
idea_spark.risk: 段边界定义可能引入主观性，不同领域的最佳段长度需重新调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类证明写作习惯（分步骤、分段落）出发，启发更自然的模型训练范式。

en.method: Extracts locally coherent proof segments from trajectories for training, and reuses the strategy at inference for short rollouts.

papers.title: Vector Scaffolding: Inter-Scale Orchestration for Differentiable Image Vectorization
papers.summary: Differentiable vector graphics have enabled powerful gradient-based optimization of vector primitives directly from raster images. However, existing frameworks formulate this as a flat optimization problem, forcing hundreds to thousands of randomly initialized curves to blindly compete for pixel-level error reduction. This disordered optimization leads to topology collapse, where macroscopic structures are distorted by internal high-frequency noise, resulting in a redundant and uneditable "polygon soup" that limits practical editability. To address this limitation, we propose Vector Scaffolding, a novel hierarchical optimization framework that shifts from flat pixel-matching to structured topological construction tailored for vector graphics. By identifying a key cause of topology collapse as the mathematical imbalance between area and boundary gradients, we introduce Interior Gradient Aggregation to stabilize the learning dynamics of multi-scale curve mixtures. Upon this stabilized landscape, we employ Progressive Stratification and Rapid Inflation Scheduling to progressively densify vector primitives with extremely high learning rates ($\times 50$). Experiments demonstrate that our approach accelerates optimization by $2.5\times$ while simultaneously improving PSNR by up to 1.4 dB over the previous state of the art.

ai.tldr: 提出向量脚手架框架，通过分层优化解决可微图像矢量化中的拓扑坍塌问题，加速优化2.5倍并提升PSNR达1.4 dB。
ai.motivation: 现有可微矢量化方法采用扁平优化，导致大量随机初始曲线盲目竞争像素误差，产生拓扑坍塌和冗余多边形汤，限制可编辑性。
ai.method: 识别拓扑坍塌源于面积与边界梯度的数学不平衡，提出内部梯度聚合稳定多尺度曲线混合的学习动态；在此基础上采用渐进分层和快速膨胀调度，以极高学习率逐步稠密化矢量基元。
ai.result: 优化速度提升2.5倍，PSNR相比先前最优方法提高最多1.4 dB。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过结构化分层优化提升矢量图像转换的质量和效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将矢量基元按尺度分层优化，利用梯度平衡避免拓扑坍塌，并配合高学习率快速收敛。
idea_spark.risk: 分层策略可能增加超参数调优复杂度；极高学习率可能导致训练不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从数学不平衡角度分析优化失败原因，启发设计针对性的梯度调节机制。

idea_spark.idea: Layer vector primitives by scale, use gradient balancing to avoid topology collapse, and combine with high learning rates for fast convergence.
idea_spark.risk: Hierarchical strategies may increase hyperparameter tuning complexity; extremely high learning rates could cause training instability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analyzing optimization failure from a mathematical imbalance perspective inspires designing targeted gradient regulation mechanisms.

papers.title: Choosing features for classifying multiword expressions
papers.summary: Multiword expressions (MWEs) are a heterogeneous set with a glaring need for classifications. Designing a satisfactory classification involves choosing features. In the case of MWEs, many features are a priori available. Not all features are equal in terms of how reliably MWEs can be assigned to classes. Accordingly, resulting classifications may be more or less fruitful for computational use. I outline an enhanced classification. In order to increase its suitability for many languages, I use previous works taking into account various languages.

ai.tldr: 本文探讨了为多词表达分类选择特征的方法，提出了一种增强分类方案，以提高跨语言适用性。
ai.motivation: 多词表达具有异质性，需要有效的分类，但现有分类在特征选择上存在不足，且跨语言适用性有限。
ai.method: 基于前人跨语言研究，分析不同特征对分类可靠性的影响，设计增强的分类方案。
ai.result: 提出了一种更适用于多种语言的增强分类方案。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何为多词表达分类选择有效特征，提升分类的跨语言通用性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用跨语言特征分析，开发一个自动特征评估框架，用于多词表达分类。
idea_spark.risk: 跨语言特征可能因语言差异导致分类不一致，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从多词表达分类的特征选择出发，启发设计更通用的语言分类系统。

zh.result: 提出了一种更适用于多种语言的增强分类方案。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何为多词表达分类选择有效特征，提升分类的跨语言通用性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用跨语言特征分析，开发一个自动特征评估框架，用于多词表达分类。
idea_spark.risk: 跨语言特征可能因语言差异导致分类不一致，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从多词表达分类的特征选择出发，启发设计更通用的语言分类系统。

en.tldr: This paper discusses feature selection for classifying multiword expressions and proposes an enhanced classification scheme to improve cross-linguistic applicability.
en.motivation: Multiword expressions are heterogeneous and require effective classification, but existing classifications have shortcomings in feature selection and limited cross-linguistic applicability.
en.method: Based on previous cross-linguistic studies, the paper analyzes the impact of different features on classification reliability and designs an enhanced classification scheme.
en.result: An enhanced classification scheme more suitable for multiple languages is proposed.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to select effective features for classifying multiword expressions, improving cross-linguistic generality.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage cross-linguistic feature analysis to develop an automatic feature evaluation framework for multiword expression classification.
idea_spark.risk: Cross-linguistic features may lead to inconsistent classification due to language differences, requiring careful validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by feature selection for multiword expression classification, it suggests designing more general language classification systems.

papers.title: Memory Constrained Adversarial Hypothesis Testing
papers.summary: We study adversarial binary hypothesis testing under memory constraints. The test is a time-invariant randomized finite state machine (FSM) with S states. Associated with each hypothesis is a set of distributions. Given the hypothesis, the distribution of each sample is chosen from the set associated with the hypothesis by an adversary who has access to past samples and the history of states of the FSM so far. We obtain upper and lower bounds on the minimax asymptotic probability of error as a function of S. The bounds have the same exponential behaviour in S and match for a class of problems.

ai.tldr: 研究了在记忆约束下的对抗性二元假设检验问题，使用时间不变随机有限状态机，并给出了误差概率的上下界。
ai.motivation: 实际系统中测试设备通常受记忆限制，且数据可能被对手操控，需要理论分析在这种对抗环境下的最优检测性能。
ai.method: 将测试建模为具有S个状态的时间不变随机有限状态机，对手根据历史样本和状态机历史选择分布，分析最小最大渐近错误概率。
ai.result: 得到了错误概率关于S的指数级上下界，且对于一类问题上下界匹配。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解在记忆受限和对抗环境下假设检验的理论极限，为设计鲁棒检测系统提供指导。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将状态机设计为可自适应调整状态数以平衡记忆与性能，或引入学习机制让状态机在线优化。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于特定对抗模型，实际对手行为可能更复杂，导致性能偏离理论界。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受记忆约束下对抗性假设检验的指数级误差界启发，可探索其他资源约束（如计算或能量）下的类似问题。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解在记忆受限和对抗环境下假设检验的理论极限，为设计鲁棒检测系统提供指导。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将状态机设计为可自适应调整状态数以平衡记忆与性能，或引入学习机制让状态机在线优化。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于特定对抗模型，实际对手行为可能更复杂，导致性能偏离理论界。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受记忆约束下对抗性假设检验的指数级误差界启发，可探索其他资源约束（如计算或能量）下的类似问题。

en.tldr: Studies adversarial binary hypothesis testing under memory constraints using a time-invariant randomized finite state machine, providing upper and lower bounds on the error probability.
en.motivation: Real-world testing devices often have memory limitations and data may be manipulated by adversaries, necessitating theoretical analysis of optimal detection performance in such adversarial environments.
en.method: Models the test as a time-invariant randomized finite state machine with S states, where an adversary chooses distributions based on past samples and state history, and analyzes the minimax asymptotic error probability.
en.result: Obtains exponential upper and lower bounds on the error probability as a function of S, which match for a class of problems.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the theoretical limits of hypothesis testing under memory constraints and adversarial settings, guiding the design of robust detection systems.

idea_spark.idea: Consider designing the state machine to adaptively adjust the number of states to balance memory and performance, or incorporate learning mechanisms for online optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on a specific adversarial model; actual adversary behavior may be more complex, causing performance to deviate from theoretical bounds.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the exponential error bounds in memory-constrained adversarial hypothesis testing, explore similar problems under other resource constraints (e.g., computation or energy).

papers.title: STRIDE: Training-Free Diversity Guidance via PCA-Directed Feature Perturbation in Single-Step Diffusion Models
papers.summary: Distilled one-step (T=1) or few-step (T$\leq$4) diffusion models enable real-time image generation but often exhibit reduced sample diversity compared to their multi-step counterparts. In multi-step diffusion, diversity can be introduced through schedules, trajectories, or iterative optimization; however, these mechanisms are unavailable in the few-step or single-step setting, limiting the effectiveness of existing diversity-enhancing methods. A natural alternative is to perturb intermediate features, but naive feature perturbation is often ineffective, either yielding limited diversity gains or degrading generation quality. We argue that effective diversity injection in few-step models requires perturbations that respect the model's learned feature geometry. Based on this insight, we propose STRIDE, a training-free and optimization-free method that operates in a single forward pass. STRIDE injects spatially coherent (pink) noise into intermediate transformer features, projected onto the principal components of the model's own activations, ensuring that perturbations lie on the learned feature manifold. This design enables controlled variation along meaningful directions in the representation space. Extensive experiments on FLUX.1-schnell and SD3.5 Turbo across COCO, DrawBench, PartiPrompts, and GenEval show that STRIDE consistently improves diversity while maintaining strong text alignment. In particular, STRIDE reduces intra-batch similarity with minimal impact on CLIP score, and Pareto-dominates existing training-free baselines on the diversity-fidelity frontier. These results highlight that, in the absence of iterative refinement, improving diversity in few-step and one-step diffusion depends not on increasing perturbation strength, but on aligning perturbations with the model's internal representation structure.

ai.tldr: 提出STRIDE，一种无需训练的单步扩散模型多样性增强方法，通过PCA引导的特征扰动在保持文本对齐的同时提升样本多样性。
ai.motivation: 蒸馏后的单步或少步扩散模型生成速度快但样本多样性不足，而现有多样性增强方法依赖多步迭代机制，在少步场景下失效。
ai.method: 在单次前向传播中，将空间相干粉红噪声投影到模型中间Transformer特征的主成分上，使扰动沿学习到的特征流形方向进行。
ai.result: 在FLUX.1-schnell和SD3.5 Turbo上，STRIDE一致提升多样性，降低批内相似度，CLIP分数损失极小，在多样性-保真度前沿上帕累托优于现有无训练基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在不牺牲生成质量的前提下，从单步扩散模型获得更多样化的图像输出。

idea_spark.idea: 利用模型自身激活的主成分方向作为扰动基，确保扰动位于特征流形上，避免破坏生成质量。
idea_spark.risk: 主成分方向可能随输入变化，需验证对分布外样本的鲁棒性；粉红噪声的空间相干性参数需调优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从特征几何角度出发，将多样性注入视为在流形上的受控探索，而非随机扰动。

zh.motivation: 蒸馏后的单步或少步扩散模型生成速度快但样本多样性不足，而现有多样性增强方法依赖多步迭代机制，在少步场景下失效。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户在不牺牲生成质量的前提下，从单步扩散模型获得更多样化的图像输出。

idea_spark.risk: 主成分方向可能随输入变化，需验证对分布外样本的鲁棒性；粉红噪声的空间相干性参数需调优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从特征几何角度出发，将多样性注入视为在流形上的受控探索，而非随机扰动。

en.tldr: Proposes STRIDE, a training-free diversity enhancement method for single-step diffusion models that uses PCA-guided feature perturbation to improve sample diversity while maintaining text alignment.
en.motivation: Distilled one-step or few-step diffusion models generate images quickly but suffer from reduced sample diversity; existing diversity methods rely on multi-step iterative mechanisms unavailable in few-step settings.
en.method: In a single forward pass, injects spatially coherent pink noise projected onto the principal components of the model's intermediate transformer features, ensuring perturbations lie on the learned feature manifold.
en.result: On FLUX.1-schnell and SD3.5 Turbo across multiple benchmarks, STRIDE consistently improves diversity, reduces intra-batch similarity with minimal CLIP score drop, and Pareto-dominates existing training-free baselines on the diversity-fidelity frontier.
en.help_to_user: Helps users obtain more diverse image outputs from single-step diffusion models without sacrificing generation quality.

idea_spark.idea: Use the principal components of the model's own activations as perturbation bases to ensure perturbations stay on the feature manifold and avoid degrading quality.
idea_spark.risk: Principal components may vary with input; robustness to out-of-distribution samples needs verification; spatial coherence parameters of pink noise require tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: View diversity injection as controlled exploration on the feature manifold rather than random perturbation, guided by the model's internal representation geometry.

papers.title: Optimal LTLf Synthesis
papers.summary: Strategy synthesis typically follows an all-or-nothing paradigm, returning unrealisable whenever a specification cannot be guaranteed in an uncertain environment. In this paper, we introduce optimal LTLf synthesis, where the goal is to realise as many objectives as possible from a given specification consisting of multiple objectives, especially for the case that they are not all jointly realisable. We first consider max-guarantee synthesis, which commits to a maximal set of objectives that we can a priori guarantee to realise. We then introduce max-observation synthesis, which maximises a posteriori realised objectives that may be incomparable on different executions. Finally, we present incremental max-observation synthesis, which further improves strategies by exploiting opportunities for stronger guarantees when they arise during an execution. Experimental results show that different variations of optimal synthesis scale broadly equally well, solving a large fraction of the benchmark instances within the given timeout, demonstrating the practical feasibility of the approach.

ai.tldr: 提出最优LTLf合成方法，在规范不可全部实现时最大化实现目标。
ai.motivation: 传统策略合成采用全有或全无范式，当规范在不确定环境中无法保证时直接返回不可实现。
ai.method: 定义最大保证合成、最大观察合成和增量最大观察合成三种变体，分别实现先验保证最大化、后验实现最大化及执行中动态增强保证。
ai.result: 实验表明各变体扩展性相当，能在超时内解决大部分基准实例，验证了方法的实际可行性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户处理部分可实现的规范，获得尽可能多的保证目标。

idea_spark.idea: 将增量最大观察合成与在线学习结合，动态调整策略以应对环境变化。
idea_spark.risk: 增量方法可能增加运行时开销，且保证集的选择需避免冲突。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受强化学习中部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程的启发，探索执行中保证的在线更新。

idea_spark.risk: 增量方法可能增加运行时开销，且保证集的选择需避免冲突。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受强化学习中部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程的启发，探索执行中保证的在线更新。

en.tldr: Proposes optimal LTLf synthesis to maximize the number of realized objectives when not all are jointly realizable.
en.motivation: Traditional strategy synthesis follows an all-or-nothing paradigm, returning unrealizable whenever a specification cannot be guaranteed in an uncertain environment.
en.method: Defines max-guarantee synthesis (a priori guarantee maximization), max-observation synthesis (a posteriori realized objectives maximization), and incremental max-observation synthesis (dynamic guarantee strengthening during execution).
en.result: Experiments show all variants scale similarly, solving a large fraction of benchmark instances within timeout, demonstrating practical feasibility.
en.help_to_user: Helps users obtain as many guaranteed objectives as possible from partially realizable specifications.

idea_spark.idea: Combine incremental max-observation synthesis with online learning to dynamically adjust strategies in response to environmental changes.
idea_spark.risk: Incremental methods may increase runtime overhead, and guarantee set selection must avoid conflicts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by partially observable Markov decision processes in reinforcement learning, exploring online updates of guarantees during execution.

papers.title: Self-Distilled Trajectory-Aware Boltzmann Modeling: Bridging the Training-Inference Discrepancy in Diffusion Language Models
papers.summary: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive language models, offering stronger global awareness and highly parallel generation. However, post-training DLMs with standard Negative Evidence Lower Bound (NELBO)-based supervised fine-tuning remains inefficient: training reconstructs randomly masked tokens in a single step, whereas inference follows a confidence-guided, multi-step easy-to-hard denoising trajectory. Recent trajectory-based self-distillation methods exploit such inference trajectories mainly for sampling-step compression and acceleration, often improving decoding efficiency without substantially enhancing the model's underlying capability, and may even degrade performance under full diffusion decoding. In this work, we ask whether self-distilled trajectories can be used not merely for faster inference, but for genuine knowledge acquisition. Although these trajectories lie on the pretrained DLM's own distributional manifold and thus offer a potentially lower optimization barrier, we find that naively fine-tuning on them with standard NELBO objectives yields only marginal gains. To address this limitation, we propose \textbf{T}rajectory-\textbf{A}ligned optimization via \textbf{Bo}ltzmann \textbf{M}odeling (\textbf{TABOM}), a self-distilled trajectory-based post-training framework that aligns training with the easy-to-hard structure of inference. TABOM models the inference unmasking preference as a Boltzmann distribution over predictive entropies and derives a tractable pairwise ranking objective to align the model's certainty ordering with the observed decoding trajectory. Empirically, TABOM achieves substantial gains in new domains, expands the effective knowledge boundary of DLMs, and significantly mitigates catastrophic forgetting compared with standard SFT.

ai.tldr: 提出TABOM框架，通过自蒸馏轨迹对齐训练与推理，解决扩散语言模型微调中的训练-推理差异问题。
ai.motivation: 标准NELBO微调中训练单步重建随机掩码，而推理多步置信引导去噪，导致不一致；现有轨迹自蒸馏仅加速推理，未提升模型能力。
ai.method: 将推理掩码偏好建模为预测熵的玻尔兹曼分布，推导可处理的成对排序目标，对齐模型确定性顺序与解码轨迹。
ai.result: 在新领域取得显著提升，扩展有效知识边界，相比标准SFT大幅缓解灾难性遗忘。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过自蒸馏轨迹对齐提升扩散语言模型微调效果。

idea_spark.idea: 将推理轨迹的难易顺序转化为排序损失，引导模型学习更优的生成策略。
idea_spark.risk: 轨迹质量依赖预训练模型，若分布偏移可能导致对齐失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用推理过程中的不确定性信号设计训练目标，而非仅压缩采样步数。

idea_spark.idea: 将推理轨迹的难易顺序转化为排序损失，引导模型学习更优的生成策略。
idea_spark.risk: 轨迹质量依赖预训练模型，若分布偏移可能导致对齐失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用推理过程中的不确定性信号设计训练目标，而非仅压缩采样步数。

en.tldr: Proposes TABOM, a self-distilled trajectory-based post-training framework that aligns training with inference's easy-to-hard structure to bridge the training-inference discrepancy in diffusion language models.
en.motivation: Standard NELBO fine-tuning reconstructs random masked tokens in one step, while inference follows a multi-step confidence-guided denoising trajectory; existing trajectory self-distillation only accelerates decoding without improving model capability.
en.method: Models inference unmasking preference as a Boltzmann distribution over predictive entropies and derives a tractable pairwise ranking objective to align the model's certainty ordering with the observed decoding trajectory.
en.result: Achieves substantial gains in new domains, expands effective knowledge boundary, and significantly mitigates catastrophic forgetting compared to standard SFT.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how self-distilled trajectory alignment can improve fine-tuning of diffusion language models.

idea_spark.idea: Convert the easy-to-hard order of inference trajectories into a ranking loss to guide the model toward better generation strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Trajectory quality depends on the pretrained model; distribution shift may cause alignment failure.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use uncertainty signals from inference to design training objectives, rather than merely compressing sampling steps.

papers.title: Self-Consistent Latent Reasoning: Long Latent Sequence Reasoning for Vision-Language Model
papers.summary: In language reasoning, longer chains of thought consistently yield better performance, which naturally suggests that visual latent reasoning may likewise benefit from longer latent sequences. However, we discover a counterintuitive phenomenon: the performance of existing latent visual reasoning methods systematically degrades as the latent sequence grows longer. We reveal the root cause: Information Gain Collapse -- autoregressive generation makes each step highly dependent on prior outputs, so subsequent tokens can barely introduce new information. We further identify that heavily pooled ($\geq 128\times$) image embeddings used as supervision targets provide no more signal than meaningless placeholders. Motivated by these insights, we propose SCOLAR (Self-COnsistent LAtent Reasoning), which introduces a lightweight detransformer that leverages the LLM's full-sequence hidden states to generate auxiliary visual tokens in a single shot, with each token independently anchored to the original visual space. Combined with three-stage SFT and ALPO reinforcement learning, SCOLAR extends acceptable latent CoT length by over $30\times$, achieves state-of-the-art among open-source models on real-world reasoning benchmarks (+14.12% over backbone), and demonstrates strong out-of-distribution generalization.

ai.tldr: 提出SCOLAR方法，通过轻量级反变换器和三阶段训练，将视觉潜在推理的有效序列长度提升30倍以上，在真实世界推理基准上达到开源模型最优。
ai.motivation: 现有视觉潜在推理方法在增加潜在序列长度时性能反而下降，原因是信息增益崩溃——自回归生成导致后续token几乎不引入新信息。
ai.method: 引入轻量级反变换器，利用LLM完整序列隐藏状态一次性生成辅助视觉token，每个token独立锚定到原始视觉空间；结合三阶段SFT和ALPO强化学习。
ai.result: 可接受的潜在CoT长度提升30倍以上，在真实世界推理基准上比基线提升14.12%，并展现出强分布外泛化能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过自一致潜在推理克服长序列推理中的信息增益崩溃问题，提升视觉语言模型的推理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM完整序列隐藏状态一次性生成辅助视觉token，避免自回归累积误差。
idea_spark.risk: 反变换器可能增加计算开销，且对视觉空间锚定的依赖性可能导致在低质量视觉特征上失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 信息增益崩溃的发现启发我们重新审视自回归生成在潜在推理中的局限性，并探索非自回归或并行生成策略。

zh.tldr: 提出SCOLAR方法，通过轻量级反变换器和三阶段训练，将视觉潜在推理的有效序列长度提升30倍以上，在真实世界推理基准上达到开源模型最优。
zh.motivation: 现有视觉潜在推理方法在增加潜在序列长度时性能反而下降，原因是信息增益崩溃——自回归生成导致后续token几乎不引入新信息。
zh.method: 引入轻量级反变换器，利用LLM完整序列隐藏状态一次性生成辅助视觉token，每个token独立锚定到原始视觉空间；结合三阶段SFT和ALPO强化学习。
zh.result: 可接受的潜在CoT长度提升30倍以上，在真实世界推理基准上比基线提升14.12%，并展现出强分布外泛化能力。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过自一致潜在推理克服长序列推理中的信息增益崩溃问题，提升视觉语言模型的推理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM完整序列隐藏状态一次性生成辅助视觉token，避免自回归累积误差。
idea_spark.risk: 反变换器可能增加计算开销，且对视觉空间锚定的依赖性可能导致在低质量视觉特征上失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 信息增益崩溃的发现启发我们重新审视自回归生成在潜在推理中的局限性，并探索非自回归或并行生成策略。

en.tldr: Proposes SCOLAR, which uses a lightweight detransformer and three-stage training to extend effective latent sequence length by over 30x, achieving state-of-the-art on real-world reasoning benchmarks among open-source models.
en.motivation: Existing visual latent reasoning methods degrade with longer sequences due to Information Gain Collapse, where autoregressive generation causes subsequent tokens to introduce little new information.
en.method: Introduces a lightweight detransformer that leverages LLM full-sequence hidden states to generate auxiliary visual tokens in a single shot, each independently anchored to the original visual space; combined with three-stage SFT and ALPO reinforcement learning.
en.result: Extends acceptable latent CoT length by over 30x, achieves +14.12% over backbone on real-world reasoning benchmarks, and demonstrates strong out-of-distribution generalization.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how self-consistent latent reasoning overcomes information gain collapse in long-sequence reasoning, improving vision-language model reasoning capabilities.

idea_spark.idea: Generate auxiliary visual tokens in a single shot using LLM full-sequence hidden states to avoid autoregressive error accumulation.
idea_spark.risk: The detransformer may increase computational cost, and reliance on visual space anchoring could fail with low-quality visual features.
idea_spark.inspiration: The discovery of Information Gain Collapse inspires rethinking the limitations of autoregressive generation in latent reasoning and exploring non-autoregressive or parallel generation strategies.

papers.title: PD-4DGS:Progressive Decomposition of 4D Gaussian Splatting for Bandwidth-Adaptive Dynamic Scene Streaming
papers.summary: 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) enables high-quality dynamic novel view synthesis, yet current models remain monolithic bitstreams that clients must download in full before any frame can be rendered, causing black-screen waits of tens to hundreds of seconds on mobile bandwidth and leaving 4DGS incompatible with modern adaptive-bitrate delivery. Progressive 3DGS compression alleviates this for static scenes, but it acts only on spatial anchors and cannot partition the temporal deformation networks that dominate dynamic-scene size. We present PD-4DGS, the first framework for progressive compression and on-demand transmission of 4DGS. Hierarchical Deformation Decomposition (HDD) externalises the coarse-to-fine motion hierarchy already latent in 4DGS into three independently transmittable layers -- a static scaffold, a global deformation, and a local refinement -- so that any prefix of the bitstream is already renderable, turning a single training run into a scalable, DASH/HLS-compatible bitstream. A Gaussian-entropy attribute rate-distortion loss together with a temporal mask consistency regulariser shrink the base layer while suppressing low-bitrate flicker; a capacity-weighted rollout schedule, gated online by a learnt activation rate rho, then prevents deformation-network under-training without any per-scene hyperparameter. On the Dycheck iPhone benchmark, PD-4DGS cuts the streamed bitstream by >60% at matched rendering fidelity and reduces first-frame latency from 73--930 s to ~1.7 s on a 2 Mbps link, uniquely enabling true on-demand progressive streaming for 4DGS.

ai.tldr: 提出PD-4DGS，首个支持渐进式压缩和按需传输的4D高斯泼溅框架，通过层次化变形分解将动态场景拆分为静态骨架、全局变形和局部细化三层，实现带宽自适应流式传输。
ai.motivation: 现有4DGS模型为整体比特流，客户端必须完整下载后才能渲染，导致移动带宽下黑屏等待数十至数百秒，无法与现代自适应码率传输兼容。
ai.method: 层次化变形分解（HDD）将4DGS中隐含的粗到细运动层次外化为三个独立传输层；结合高斯熵属性率失真损失和时序掩码一致性正则化压缩基础层；容量加权调度策略防止变形网络欠训练。
ai.result: 在Dycheck iPhone基准上，同等渲染质量下比特流减少>60%，2 Mbps链路首帧延迟从73-930秒降至约1.7秒。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何将4DGS从整体下载转变为渐进式流式传输，适用于移动端和低带宽场景的动态场景渲染。

idea_spark.idea: 将动态场景的粗到细运动层次显式分解为独立传输层，实现任意前缀比特流即可渲染。
idea_spark.risk: 层次化分解可能引入额外计算开销，且对快速运动或复杂动态场景的分解效果需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴视频编码中的分层编码和DASH/HLS自适应流式传输，将静态场景渐进压缩扩展到动态场景。

zh.tldr: 提出PD-4DGS，首个支持渐进式压缩和按需传输的4D高斯泼溅框架，通过层次化变形分解将动态场景拆分为静态骨架、全局变形和局部细化三层，实现带宽自适应流式传输。
zh.motivation: 现有4DGS模型为整体比特流，客户端必须完整下载后才能渲染，导致移动带宽下黑屏等待数十至数百秒，无法与现代自适应码率传输兼容。
zh.method: 层次化变形分解（HDD）将4DGS中隐含的粗到细运动层次外化为三个独立传输层；结合高斯熵属性率失真损失和时序掩码一致性正则化压缩基础层；容量加权调度策略防止变形网络欠训练。
zh.result: 在Dycheck iPhone基准上，同等渲染质量下比特流减少>60%，2 Mbps链路首帧延迟从73-930秒降至约1.7秒。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何将4DGS从整体下载转变为渐进式流式传输，适用于移动端和低带宽场景的动态场景渲染。

idea_spark.idea: 将动态场景的粗到细运动层次显式分解为独立传输层，实现任意前缀比特流即可渲染。
idea_spark.risk: 层次化分解可能引入额外计算开销，且对快速运动或复杂动态场景的分解效果需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴视频编码中的分层编码和DASH/HLS自适应流式传输，将静态场景渐进压缩扩展到动态场景。

en.tldr: PD-4DGS is the first framework for progressive compression and on-demand transmission of 4D Gaussian Splatting, decomposing dynamic scenes into three independently transmittable layers via Hierarchical Deformation Decomposition for bandwidth-adaptive streaming.
en.motivation: Existing 4DGS models are monolithic bitstreams requiring full download before rendering, causing tens to hundreds of seconds of black-screen wait on mobile bandwidth, incompatible with adaptive-bitrate delivery.
en.method: Hierarchical Deformation Decomposition (HDD) externalizes the coarse-to-fine motion hierarchy into static scaffold, global deformation, and local refinement layers; a Gaussian-entropy attribute rate-distortion loss with temporal mask consistency regularizer compresses the base layer; a capacity-weighted rollout schedule prevents under-training.
en.result: On Dycheck iPhone benchmark, PD-4DGS reduces streamed bitstream by >60% at matched fidelity and cuts first-frame latency from 73-930 s to ~1.7 s on a 2 Mbps link.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to transform 4DGS from monolithic download to progressive streaming, enabling dynamic scene rendering on mobile and low-bandwidth scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly decompose coarse-to-fine motion hierarchy of dynamic scenes into independent transmittable layers, enabling renderability from any prefix of the bitstream.
idea_spark.risk: Hierarchical decomposition may introduce extra computation overhead, and its effectiveness on fast motion or complex dynamics needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by layered coding in video compression and DASH/HLS adaptive streaming, extending progressive compression from static to dynamic scenes.

papers.title: G$^2$TR: Generation-Guided Visual Token Reduction for Separate-Encoder Unified Multimodal Models
papers.summary: The development of separate-encoder Unified multimodal models (UMMs) comes with a rapidly growing inference cost due to dense visual token processing. In this paper, we focus on understanding-side visual token reduction for improving the efficiency of separate-encoder UMMs. While this topic has been widely studied for MLLMs, existing methods typically rely on attention scores, text-image similarity and so on, implicitly assuming that the final objective is discriminative reasoning. This assumption does not hold for UMMs, where understanding-side visual tokens must also preserve the model's capabilities for editing images. We propose G$^2$TR, a generation-guided visual token reduction framework for separate-encoder UMMs. Our key insight is that the generation branch provides a task-agnostic signal for identifying understanding-side visual tokens that are not only semantically relevant but also important for latent-space image reconstruction and generation. G$^2$TR estimates token importance from consistency with VAE latent, performs balanced token selection, and merges redundant tokens into retained representatives to reduce information loss. The method is training-free, plug-and-play, and applied only after the understanding encoding stage, making it compatible with existing UMM inference pipelines. Experiments on image understanding and editing benchmarks show that G$^2$TR substantially reduces visual tokens and prefill computation by 1.94x while maintaining both reasoning accuracy and editing quality, outperforming baselines on almost all benchmarks.

ai.tldr: 提出G²TR框架，利用生成分支信号指导视觉令牌缩减，在保持推理准确性和编辑质量的同时，将令牌和预填充计算减少1.94倍。
ai.motivation: 分离编码器统一多模态模型（UMM）因密集视觉令牌处理导致推理成本快速增长，现有视觉令牌缩减方法假设最终目标是判别式推理，不适用于需要保留图像编辑能力的UMM。
ai.method: 通过VAE潜在一致性估计令牌重要性，进行平衡令牌选择，并将冗余令牌合并到保留的代表中，减少信息损失。该方法无需训练、即插即用，仅应用于理解编码阶段后。
ai.result: 在图像理解和编辑基准上，G²TR显著减少视觉令牌和预填充计算1.94倍，同时保持推理准确性和编辑质量，在几乎所有基准上优于基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不牺牲多模态模型理解和编辑能力的前提下，通过生成引导的令牌缩减提升推理效率。

idea_spark.idea: 利用VAE潜在空间的一致性作为令牌重要性的通用信号，可启发其他基于生成先验的令牌选择策略。
idea_spark.risk: 生成分支的引入可能增加额外计算开销，需权衡效率提升与生成信号计算成本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将生成任务作为辅助信号用于视觉令牌缩减，启示在模型设计中利用多任务目标优化效率。

zh.tldr: 提出G²TR框架，利用生成分支信号指导视觉令牌缩减，在保持推理准确性和编辑质量的同时，将令牌和预填充计算减少1.94倍。
zh.motivation: 分离编码器统一多模态模型（UMM）因密集视觉令牌处理导致推理成本快速增长，现有视觉令牌缩减方法假设最终目标是判别式推理，不适用于需要保留图像编辑能力的UMM。
zh.method: 通过VAE潜在一致性估计令牌重要性，进行平衡令牌选择，并将冗余令牌合并到保留的代表中，减少信息损失。该方法无需训练、即插即用，仅应用于理解编码阶段后。
zh.result: 在图像理解和编辑基准上，G²TR显著减少视觉令牌和预填充计算1.94倍，同时保持推理准确性和编辑质量，在几乎所有基准上优于基线。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不牺牲多模态模型理解和编辑能力的前提下，通过生成引导的令牌缩减提升推理效率。

idea_spark.idea: 利用VAE潜在空间的一致性作为令牌重要性的通用信号，可启发其他基于生成先验的令牌选择策略。
idea_spark.risk: 生成分支的引入可能增加额外计算开销，需权衡效率提升与生成信号计算成本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将生成任务作为辅助信号用于视觉令牌缩减，启示在模型设计中利用多任务目标优化效率。

en.tldr: Proposes G²TR, a generation-guided visual token reduction framework that reduces tokens and prefill computation by 1.94x while maintaining reasoning accuracy and editing quality for separate-encoder UMMs.
en.motivation: Separate-encoder Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) suffer from high inference cost due to dense visual token processing; existing token reduction methods assume discriminative reasoning, which fails for UMMs that need to preserve image editing capabilities.
en.method: Estimates token importance via consistency with VAE latent, performs balanced token selection, and merges redundant tokens into retained representatives. It is training-free, plug-and-play, and applied after the understanding encoding stage.
en.result: On image understanding and editing benchmarks, G²TR reduces visual tokens and prefill computation by 1.94x while maintaining both reasoning accuracy and editing quality, outperforming baselines on almost all benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to improve inference efficiency of multimodal models without sacrificing understanding and editing capabilities via generation-guided token reduction.

idea_spark.idea: Using VAE latent consistency as a general signal for token importance can inspire other generation-prior-based token selection strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Introducing the generation branch may add extra computational overhead; trade-off between efficiency gain and generation signal cost needs consideration.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging generation tasks as auxiliary signals for visual token reduction inspires using multi-task objectives to optimize efficiency in model design.

papers.title: CAST: Collapse-Aware multi-Scale Topology Fusion for Multimodal Coreset Selection
papers.summary: The training of large multimodal models fundamentally relies on massive image-text datasets, which inevitably incur prohibitive computational overhead. Dataset selection offers a promising paradigm by identifying a highly informative coreset. However, existing approaches suffer from two critical limitations: (i) single-modality-dominated sampling methods, which ignore the fine-grained cross-modal information imbalance inherent in multimodal datasets and thus lead to semantic loss in the other modality; and (ii) coarse-grained sample-scoring-based sampling methods, where the selected coreset tends to be biased toward the scoring model, making it difficult to guarantee distributional equivalence between the coreset and the original dataset. Meanwhile, existing distribution matching and discrete sampling strategies often fail to jointly account for global semantic structure, local fine-grained details, and redundancy-aware coverage in dense regions. To this end, we propose CAST, a Collapse-Aware multi-Scale Topology fusion framework for multimodal coreset selection. We first construct image- and text-modality topologies, and derive a unified topology via local-collapse-aware refinement and cross-modal fusion. We then introduce a multi-scale distribution matching criterion in the diffusion wavelet domain, encouraging the coreset to approximate the original dataset at multiple scales. Finally, we introduce a local soft relational coverage mechanism that extends pure geometric coverage to relation-aware indirect coverage, penalizing redundant selections in dense clusters. Extensive experiments on Flickr30K and MS-COCO show that CAST outperforms existing dataset selection baselines, showcasing great superiority in cross-architecture generalization and energy efficiency over state-of-the-art multimodal synthesis methods.

ai.tldr: 提出CAST框架，通过塌陷感知的多尺度拓扑融合进行多模态核心集选择，解决单模态主导和分布偏差问题。
ai.motivation: 现有方法存在单模态主导采样导致语义丢失，以及基于样本评分的选择偏向评分模型，难以保证核心集与原始数据集分布等价的问题。
ai.method: 构建图像和文本模态拓扑，通过局部塌陷感知精炼和跨模态融合得到统一拓扑；在扩散小波域引入多尺度分布匹配准则；提出局部软关系覆盖机制，惩罚密集簇中的冗余选择。
ai.result: 在Flickr30K和MS-COCO上超越现有基线，在跨架构泛化和能效方面优于最先进的多模态合成方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效选择高信息量的多模态子集，降低大规模模型训练的计算开销。

idea_spark.idea: 将局部塌陷感知与扩散小波域多尺度匹配结合，实现全局语义与局部细节的联合覆盖。
idea_spark.risk: 拓扑构建和扩散小波变换的计算复杂度可能较高，需验证在大规模数据集上的可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受拓扑数据分析中持续同调和多尺度表示启发，将几何覆盖扩展为关系感知间接覆盖。

zh.tldr: 提出CAST框架，通过塌陷感知的多尺度拓扑融合进行多模态核心集选择，解决单模态主导和分布偏差问题。
zh.motivation: 现有方法存在单模态主导采样导致语义丢失，以及基于样本评分的选择偏向评分模型，难以保证核心集与原始数据集分布等价的问题。

zh.result: 在Flickr30K和MS-COCO上超越现有基线，在跨架构泛化和能效方面优于最先进的多模态合成方法。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效选择高信息量的多模态子集，降低大规模模型训练的计算开销。

idea_spark.idea: 将局部塌陷感知与扩散小波域多尺度匹配结合，实现全局语义与局部细节的联合覆盖。
idea_spark.risk: 拓扑构建和扩散小波变换的计算复杂度可能较高，需验证在大规模数据集上的可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受拓扑数据分析中持续同调和多尺度表示启发，将几何覆盖扩展为关系感知间接覆盖。

en.tldr: Proposes CAST, a collapse-aware multi-scale topology fusion framework for multimodal coreset selection, addressing single-modality dominance and distribution bias.
en.motivation: Existing methods suffer from single-modality-dominated sampling causing semantic loss, and coarse-grained scoring-based sampling leading to biased coresets that fail to match original distribution.
en.method: Constructs image and text topologies, refines via local-collapse-aware fusion; introduces multi-scale distribution matching in diffusion wavelet domain; proposes local soft relational coverage to penalize redundancy in dense clusters.
en.result: Outperforms baselines on Flickr30K and MS-COCO, showing superior cross-architecture generalization and energy efficiency over state-of-the-art multimodal synthesis methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently select informative multimodal subsets, reducing computational cost of large model training.

idea_spark.idea: Combine local collapse-aware refinement with diffusion wavelet multi-scale matching for joint global-local coverage.
idea_spark.risk: Topology construction and diffusion wavelet transform may incur high computational cost; scalability on large datasets needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by topological data analysis (persistent homology) and multi-scale representations, extending geometric coverage to relation-aware indirect coverage.

papers.title: Few-Shot Synthetic Data Generation with Diffusion Models for Downstream Vision Tasks
papers.summary: Class imbalance is a persistent challenge in visual recognition, particularly in safety-critical domains where collecting positive examples is expensive and rare events are inherently underrepresented. We propose a lightweight synthetic data augmentation pipeline that fine-tunes a LoRA adapter on as few as 20-50 real images of a rare class and uses a pretrained diffusion model to generate synthetic samples for training.   We systematically vary the synthetic-to-real ratio and evaluate the approach across two structurally different domains: chest X-ray pathology classification (NIH ChestX-ray14) and industrial surface crack detection (Magnetic Tile Defect dataset). All evaluations are performed on held-out sets of real images only.   Across both domains, synthetic augmentation consistently improves rare-class recall and F1 compared to training with real data alone. Performance improves with moderate synthetic augmentation and shows diminishing returns as the synthetic ratio increases.   These results suggest that LoRA-adapted diffusion models provide a simple and scalable mechanism for augmenting rare classes, enabling effective learning in data-scarce scenarios across heterogeneous visual domains.

ai.tldr: 提出一种轻量级合成数据增强流水线，使用LoRA微调扩散模型，仅需20-50张真实图像即可生成合成样本，有效缓解视觉识别中的类别不平衡问题。
ai.motivation: 在安全关键领域，罕见类别的正样本收集成本高且数量少，导致类别不平衡问题突出，传统数据增强方法难以应对。
ai.method: 在预训练扩散模型上微调LoRA适配器，利用20-50张真实罕见类图像生成合成样本，并与真实数据按不同比例混合训练下游分类模型。
ai.result: 在胸部X光病理分类和工业表面裂纹检测两个异构领域，合成增强一致提升了罕见类的召回率和F1分数，且中等合成比例效果最佳。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种简单可扩展的罕见类数据增强方案，适用于数据稀缺场景下的视觉任务。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将合成数据生成与主动学习结合，优先生成模型最不确定的样本，进一步提升增强效率。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据可能引入分布偏移或伪影，需在真实数据上严格验证；LoRA微调对初始真实样本数量敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受LoRA参数高效微调启发，将大模型生成能力用于数据稀缺场景，实现低成本数据扩充。

zh.tldr: 提出一种轻量级合成数据增强流水线，使用LoRA微调扩散模型，仅需20-50张真实图像即可生成合成样本，有效缓解视觉识别中的类别不平衡问题。
zh.motivation: 在安全关键领域，罕见类别的正样本收集成本高且数量少，导致类别不平衡问题突出，传统数据增强方法难以应对。
zh.method: 在预训练扩散模型上微调LoRA适配器，利用20-50张真实罕见类图像生成合成样本，并与真实数据按不同比例混合训练下游分类模型。
zh.result: 在胸部X光病理分类和工业表面裂纹检测两个异构领域，合成增强一致提升了罕见类的召回率和F1分数，且中等合成比例效果最佳。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种简单可扩展的罕见类数据增强方案，适用于数据稀缺场景下的视觉任务。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将合成数据生成与主动学习结合，优先生成模型最不确定的样本，进一步提升增强效率。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据可能引入分布偏移或伪影，需在真实数据上严格验证；LoRA微调对初始真实样本数量敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受LoRA参数高效微调启发，将大模型生成能力用于数据稀缺场景，实现低成本数据扩充。

en.tldr: Proposes a lightweight synthetic data augmentation pipeline that fine-tunes a LoRA adapter on as few as 20-50 real images and uses a pretrained diffusion model to generate synthetic samples, effectively mitigating class imbalance in visual recognition.
en.motivation: In safety-critical domains, collecting positive examples for rare classes is expensive and rare events are inherently underrepresented, leading to persistent class imbalance challenges.
en.method: Fine-tunes a LoRA adapter on a pretrained diffusion model using 20-50 real images of a rare class, generates synthetic samples, and mixes them with real data at varying ratios for downstream classifier training.
en.result: Across chest X-ray pathology classification and industrial surface crack detection, synthetic augmentation consistently improves rare-class recall and F1, with moderate synthetic ratios yielding the best performance.
en.help_to_user: Provides a simple and scalable method for augmenting rare classes in data-scarce visual tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining synthetic data generation with active learning to prioritize generating samples for which the model is most uncertain, further improving augmentation efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Synthetic data may introduce distribution shift or artifacts, requiring rigorous validation on real data; LoRA fine-tuning is sensitive to the number of initial real samples.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by parameter-efficient fine-tuning with LoRA, leveraging large model generation capabilities for data-scarce scenarios to achieve low-cost data augmentation.

papers.title: Rotation-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning
papers.summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) improves in-domain performance but can degrade out-of-domain (OOD) generalization. Prior work suggests that this degradation is related to changes in dominant singular subspaces of pretrained weight matrices. However, directly identifying loss-sensitive directions with Hessian or Fisher information is computationally expensive at LLM scale. In this work, we propose preserving projected rotations in pretrained singular subspaces as an efficient proxy for Fisher-sensitive directions, which we call Rotation-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning (RPSFT). RPSFT penalizes changes in the projected top-$k$ singular-vector block of each pretrained weight matrix, limiting unnecessary rotation while preserving task adaptation. Across model families and sizes trained on math reasoning data, RPSFT improves the in-domain/OOD trade-off over standard SFT and strong SFT baselines, better preserves pretrained representations, and provides stronger initializations for downstream RL fine-tuning. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/jinhangzhan/RPSFT.git}{https://github.com/jinhangzhan/RPSFT}.

ai.tldr: 提出旋转保持监督微调（RPSFT），通过惩罚预训练权重矩阵中奇异子空间的旋转来改善域内/域外泛化权衡。
ai.motivation: 标准监督微调会降低域外泛化能力，而现有基于Hessian或Fisher信息的方法在大模型上计算昂贵。
ai.method: 在微调时对每个预训练权重矩阵的top-k奇异向量块施加旋转保持惩罚，限制不必要的旋转。
ai.result: 在数学推理任务上，RPSFT相比标准SFT和强基线方法改善了域内/域外权衡，更好地保留了预训练表示，并为后续强化学习微调提供了更强的初始化。
ai.help_to_user: 如果你需要微调大模型同时保持其域外泛化能力，RPSFT提供了一种计算高效的替代方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将旋转惩罚扩展到注意力头或层间交互的奇异子空间，可能进一步改善泛化。
idea_spark.risk: 惩罚强度选择不当可能导致欠拟合或过约束，需要调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从奇异子空间的角度理解微调中的表示退化，启发设计更轻量的正则化方法。

zh.tldr: 提出旋转保持监督微调（RPSFT），通过惩罚预训练权重矩阵中奇异子空间的旋转来改善域内/域外泛化权衡。
zh.motivation: 标准监督微调会降低域外泛化能力，而现有基于Hessian或Fisher信息的方法在大模型上计算昂贵。
zh.method: 在微调时对每个预训练权重矩阵的top-k奇异向量块施加旋转保持惩罚，限制不必要的旋转。
zh.result: 在数学推理任务上，RPSFT相比标准SFT和强基线方法改善了域内/域外权衡，更好地保留了预训练表示，并为后续强化学习微调提供了更强的初始化。
zh.help_to_user: 如果你需要微调大模型同时保持其域外泛化能力，RPSFT提供了一种计算高效的替代方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将旋转惩罚扩展到注意力头或层间交互的奇异子空间，可能进一步改善泛化。
idea_spark.risk: 惩罚强度选择不当可能导致欠拟合或过约束，需要调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从奇异子空间的角度理解微调中的表示退化，启发设计更轻量的正则化方法。

en.tldr: Proposes Rotation-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning (RPSFT) that penalizes rotations in pretrained singular subspaces to improve the in-domain/OOD trade-off.
en.motivation: Standard SFT degrades OOD generalization, and Hessian/Fisher-based methods are computationally expensive for LLMs.
en.method: During fine-tuning, penalize changes in the projected top-k singular-vector block of each pretrained weight matrix to limit unnecessary rotation.
en.result: On math reasoning tasks, RPSFT improves the in-domain/OOD trade-off over standard SFT and strong baselines, better preserves pretrained representations, and provides stronger initializations for downstream RL fine-tuning.
en.help_to_user: If you need to fine-tune large models while maintaining OOD generalization, RPSFT offers a computationally efficient alternative.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the rotation penalty to singular subspaces of attention heads or inter-layer interactions to further improve generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Improper penalty strength may cause underfitting or over-constraining, requiring hyperparameter tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Understanding representation degradation during fine-tuning from the perspective of singular subspaces inspires lighter-weight regularization methods.

papers.title: A Multi-Interface Firmware Acquisition and Validation Methodology for Low-Cost Consumer Drones: A Case Study on Three Holy Stone Platforms
papers.summary: Consumer unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) have evolved into capable computing platforms, yet their embedded firmware remains largely inaccessible to the security community. Entry-level models, in particular those marketed to first-time and younger operators, commonly ship with limited protection mechanisms and no public documentation of their software internals. This paper presents a systematic study of firmware extraction and validation applied to three Holy Stone consumer drone models: the HS175D, HS720, and HS360S. Rather than pursuing reverse-engineering outcomes, the work focuses on obtaining reliable, ground-truth firmware images across heterogeneous hardware designs using only commercially available, low-cost tooling. Four acquisition methods are evaluated SPI flash in-circuit reading, SWD/JTAG debug-port access, UART boot-message capture, and a clip-based contact approach that avoids chip desoldering and each is assessed for success rate, image completeness, and operational practicality. Post-acquisition quality is evaluated through sliding-window Shannon entropy profiling and structural-signature analysis using binwalk, together forming a three-tier validation framework that distinguishes validated images from those that appear successful at the tool level but contain no meaningful firmware content. Static analysis via the EMBA framework confirms that validated images contain identifiable OS components, aging library stacks with known CVE exposure, and no binary-hardening mechanisms. The resulting corpus and methodology provide a reproducible baseline for firmware rehosting, vulnerability analysis, secure-boot assessment, and embedded-systems education within the consumer UAV domain.   Index Terms: consumer UAV, drone firmware, embedded systems security, entropy analysis, firmware extraction, IoT security, SPI flash, SWD/JTAG, UART.

ai.tldr: 提出一种多接口固件获取与验证方法，在低成本条件下从三款Holy Stone消费级无人机中提取可靠固件镜像，并建立三级验证框架。
ai.motivation: 消费级无人机固件安全研究缺乏公开资料和低成本获取手段，入门级机型防护薄弱。
ai.method: 评估SPI在线读取、SWD/JTAG调试口、UART启动消息捕获和免拆焊夹持接触四种获取方法，结合滑动窗口熵分析和binwalk结构签名进行三级验证。
ai.result: 成功获取有效固件镜像，发现其中包含可识别OS组件、已知CVE暴露的老旧库且无二进制加固机制。
ai.help_to_user: 提供可复现的固件获取与验证流程，适用于固件重托管、漏洞分析、安全启动评估和嵌入式系统教学。

idea_spark.idea: 结合熵分析和结构签名，设计自动化固件质量评分系统，区分工具级成功与真正有内容的镜像。
idea_spark.risk: 不同硬件平台接口差异大，夹持接触法可能因引脚间距过小或信号完整性不足而失败。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“工具成功但内容为空”的陷阱出发，启发建立更严格的固件真实性验证标准。

en.tldr: A multi-interface firmware acquisition and validation methodology that extracts reliable firmware images from three Holy Stone consumer drones using low-cost tooling, with a three-tier validation framework.
en.motivation: Consumer drone firmware security research lacks public documentation and low-cost access methods; entry-level models have weak protection.
en.method: Evaluates four acquisition methods (SPI flash in-circuit reading, SWD/JTAG debug-port, UART boot-message capture, clip-based contact) and validates images via sliding-window Shannon entropy profiling and binwalk structural-signature analysis.
en.result: Successfully obtained validated firmware images containing identifiable OS components, aging libraries with known CVEs, and no binary hardening mechanisms.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reproducible baseline for firmware rehosting, vulnerability analysis, secure-boot assessment, and embedded-systems education in the consumer UAV domain.

idea_spark.idea: Design an automated firmware quality scoring system combining entropy and structural signatures to distinguish tool-level success from truly meaningful images.
idea_spark.risk: Hardware interface differences across platforms; clip-based contact may fail due to fine pin pitch or signal integrity issues.
idea_spark.inspiration: The pitfall of 'tool success but empty content' inspires establishing stricter firmware authenticity validation standards.

papers.title: Every Bit, Everywhere, All at Once: A Binomial Multibit LLM Watermark
papers.summary: With LLM watermarking already being deployed commercially, practical applications increasingly require multibit watermarks that encode more complex payloads, such as user IDs or timestamps, into the generated text. In this work, we propose a fundamentally new approach for multibit watermarking: introducing binomial encoding to directly encode every bit of the payload at every token position. We complement our approach with a stateful encoder that during generation dynamically redirects encoding pressure toward underencoded bits. Our evaluation against 8 baselines on up to 64-bit payloads shows that our scheme achieves superior message accuracy and robustness, with the gap to baseline methods widening in more relevant settings (i.e., large payloads and low-distortion regimes). At the same time, we challenge prior works' evaluation metrics, highlighting their lack of practical insights, and introduce per-bit confidence scoring as a practically relevant metric for evaluating multibit LLM watermarks.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于二项式编码的多比特LLM水印方法，在每个token位置直接编码有效载荷的每一位，并引入状态编码器动态调整编码压力。
ai.motivation: 实际部署需要编码用户ID或时间戳等多比特载荷，现有方法在长载荷和低失真场景下精度和鲁棒性不足。
ai.method: 采用二项式编码实现每token每比特直接嵌入，配合状态编码器在生成过程中动态重分配未充分编码的比特压力。
ai.result: 在8个基线方法、最高64比特载荷的实验中，本方案在消息准确率和鲁棒性上均优于基线，尤其在长载荷和低失真设置下差距更显著。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在不显著降低文本质量的前提下，向LLM生成文本中嵌入可提取的多比特信息。

idea_spark.idea: 将编码压力动态分配的思想用于多模态生成水印，例如在图像或音频中按区域重要性分配嵌入强度。
idea_spark.risk: 状态编码器可能增加生成延迟，且极端长载荷下编码压力分配可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从通信编码理论中的不等差错保护概念获得启发，将不同比特的重要性差异纳入编码策略。

zh.tldr: 提出一种基于二项式编码的多比特LLM水印方法，在每个token位置直接编码有效载荷的每一位，并引入状态编码器动态调整编码压力。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从通信编码理论中的不等差错保护概念获得启发，将不同比特的重要性差异纳入编码策略。

en.tldr: Proposes a binomial-encoding-based multibit LLM watermark that encodes every payload bit at every token position, with a stateful encoder dynamically redirecting encoding pressure. Outperforms 8 baselines on up to 64-bit payloads.
en.motivation: Practical deployment requires multibit payloads (e.g., user IDs, timestamps); existing methods lack accuracy and robustness for large payloads and low-distortion regimes.
en.method: Uses binomial encoding to embed each bit of the payload at every token position, complemented by a stateful encoder that dynamically reallocates encoding pressure to under-encoded bits during generation.
en.result: Achieves superior message accuracy and robustness over 8 baselines on up to 64-bit payloads, with larger gaps in more relevant settings (large payloads, low distortion).
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to embed extractable multibit information into LLM-generated text without significantly degrading text quality.

idea_spark.idea: Apply dynamic encoding pressure allocation to multimodal generation watermarking, e.g., adjusting embedding strength by region importance in images or audio.
idea_spark.risk: The stateful encoder may increase generation latency, and encoding pressure allocation might fail under extremely long payloads.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by unequal error protection in communication coding theory, incorporating bit importance differences into the encoding strategy.

papers.title: Byzantine Consensus in Directed Graphs with Message Authentication
papers.summary: We consider the problem of reaching consensus in communication networks that are modeled by directed graphs. We assume the existence of a message authentication mechanism (such as digital signatures) to verify the integrity of messages. We identify the necessary and sufficient conditions on the directed communication graph for the following problems to be solvable: (i) exact consensus in synchronous systems; and (ii) approximate consensus in asynchronous systems.

ai.tldr: 研究在有向通信网络中使用消息认证机制实现拜占庭共识的必要和充分条件。
ai.motivation: 在有向图中，由于通信方向不对称，拜占庭共识问题比无向图更复杂，需要明确可解条件。
ai.method: 基于消息认证（如数字签名）假设，分析同步系统精确共识和异步系统近似共识的图论条件。
ai.result: 给出了同步系统精确共识和异步系统近似共识在有向图中可解的必要充分条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解有向网络下拜占庭共识的理论边界，指导实际系统设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用消息认证简化拜占庭共识的图论要求，可能降低网络连通性需求。
idea_spark.risk: 消息认证机制本身可能引入性能开销或安全假设（如密钥管理）。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将条件应用于区块链或物联网中的非对称通信场景。

zh.tldr: 研究在有向通信网络中使用消息认证机制实现拜占庭共识的必要和充分条件。
zh.motivation: 在有向图中，由于通信方向不对称，拜占庭共识问题比无向图更复杂，需要明确可解条件。

idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将条件应用于区块链或物联网中的非对称通信场景。

en.tldr: Identifies necessary and sufficient conditions for Byzantine consensus in directed graphs with message authentication.
en.motivation: Directed communication graphs pose unique challenges for Byzantine consensus due to asymmetric links, requiring precise solvability conditions.
en.method: Assumes message authentication (e.g., digital signatures) and analyzes graph-theoretic conditions for exact consensus in synchronous systems and approximate consensus in asynchronous systems.
en.result: Provides necessary and sufficient conditions for solvability of both exact and approximate consensus in directed graphs.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies theoretical boundaries of Byzantine consensus in directed networks, aiding system design.

idea_spark.idea: Message authentication can relax connectivity requirements for Byzantine consensus.
idea_spark.risk: Authentication mechanisms introduce performance overhead and security assumptions (e.g., key management).
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply conditions to blockchain or IoT networks with asymmetric communication.

papers.title: SHIA: A Direct SysML-Hardware Interface Architecture for Model-Centric Verification
papers.summary: Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) is widely treated as the backbone of digital engineering, with languages such as the Systems Modeling Language (SysML) providing the means to capture system structure, behaviour, and verification intent. Yet once verification moves to hardware, the system model is routinely left behind. Domain-specific simulation environments, model transformations, and bespoke tool integrations take over, and the model that began as the authoritative reference drifts out of sync with the implementation it was meant to govern. This paper introduces the SysML Hardware Interface Architecture (SHIA), which keeps an executable SysML model directly inside the verification loop, exchanging messages with physical hardware without intermediate transformation chains, co-simulation platforms, or broker-mediated plugins. SHIA is realised through a SysML side server, written in embedded C++ within IBM Rhapsody, and a hardware side server running on a Raspberry Pi, together establishing a bidirectional link between the digital model and the physical system. A logic gate case study demonstrates the approach end-to-end, from hardware model construction and prototype assembly to test harness design, behavioural statechart control, and staged verification of each component before integration. The integrated system exchanged messages correctly in both directions, and Karnaugh map comparison between the SysML-generated and hardware-generated outputs showed zero discrepancy. The result shows that, when paired with a suitable interface, SysML need not remain a static description that informs downstream tools; it can serve as the executable layer through which hardware behaviour is stimulated, observed, and verified. The work demonstrates a route to model-governed verification and a shorter digital thread between system architecture and the hardware that realises it.

ai.tldr: 提出SHIA架构，使SysML模型直接与硬件双向通信，无需中间转换，实现模型主导的验证。
ai.motivation: 传统MBSE中，系统模型在硬件验证阶段被抛弃，导致模型与实现脱节。
ai.method: 在IBM Rhapsody中构建SysML侧服务器（嵌入式C++），硬件侧服务器运行于树莓派，建立双向链路。
ai.result: 逻辑门案例中，SysML与硬件输出经卡诺图比较零差异，系统双向消息交换正确。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种保持模型权威性的硬件验证方法，缩短数字线程。

idea_spark.idea: 将SysML作为可执行层直接驱动硬件测试，替代传统仿真集成。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖特定工具（Rhapsody）和硬件（树莓派），通用性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 模型不应只是文档，而应成为验证循环中的活跃参与者。

zh.motivation: 传统MBSE中，系统模型在硬件验证阶段被抛弃，导致模型与实现脱节。

en.tldr: SHIA enables direct bidirectional communication between SysML models and physical hardware without intermediate transformations, keeping the model in the verification loop.
en.motivation: In traditional MBSE, the system model is abandoned during hardware verification, causing drift between model and implementation.
en.method: A SysML side server (embedded C++ in IBM Rhapsody) and a hardware side server (Raspberry Pi) establish a bidirectional link.
en.result: In a logic gate case study, Karnaugh map comparison showed zero discrepancy; bidirectional message exchange was correct.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method to keep the model authoritative during hardware verification, shortening the digital thread.

idea_spark.risk: Dependence on specific tools (Rhapsody) and hardware (Raspberry Pi); generality needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Models should not be static documents but active participants in the verification loop.

papers.title: Hybrid Analytical--EMT Method for HVDC Protection System Component-Level Design
papers.summary: Protection system design for multi-terminal HVDC grids is challenging due to the complexity of the system and the often conflicting design requirements. Effective specification of protection component parameters (e.g., DC circuit breakers and series DC inductors) during component-level design is crucial due to interdependencies among components, the need for detailed modeling, and the complex interactions between the protection system and converter control systems. Both analytical and simulation-based approaches have been proposed as solutions for component-level design. However, analytical methods may not accurately represent system behavior given that approximation is necessary, and simulation-based approaches often require extensive computational effort and time. Therefore, this paper presents an efficient systematic design method, combining both approaches. First, a fundamental analytical solution is derived to consider the protection system requirements. Then, a hybrid analytical--EMT methodology is proposed to accelerate convergence toward the required design parameters, after which detailed models are applied to ensure accuracy in design and validation. The approach is applicable to component-level design for both fully and partially selective protection strategies in HVDC grids.

papers.title: PhishSigma++: Malicious Email Detection with Typed Entity Relations
papers.summary: Here is a further shortened version (pure text, no extra formatting, academic style preserved, no content change):   Abstract. With the rise of AI-generated content (AIGC), phishing actors now possess richer linguistic capabilities and evasion techniques. Most existing detectors over-rely on mutable textual features, achieving high accuracy on clean data but degrading severely under text-focused adversarial manipulation. This mirrors the lab-to-real performance gap. We investigate invariant signals in phishing emails: even when attackers modify surface text, functional intent constrains relations among typed entities. Threat-actor tradecraft is described via high-level TTPs, but rule-based systems like Sigma express invariants only through manually curated, field-specific patterns, limiting flexibility. We introduce PhishSigma++, an entity-relation-based malicious email detector for RFC822 messages that generalizes Sigma's design. It extracts 40 typed entity classes, computes 5 cross-type relations to build a typed email graph, and uses particle swarm optimization (PSO) to select a sparse discriminative mask, supporting classification and type-level evidence summary. On 29,142 messages, PhishSigma++ achieves 0.9675 F1 on clean data and outperforms text-centric baselines under non-adaptive Good Word padding at \r{ho}=0.8. It maintains 0.9579 F1, while a token-based Bayesian filter collapses to 0.0243 and a DistilBERT phishing checkpoint falls to 0.7284. Compared with traditional Sigma rules, PhishSigma++ offers higher detection, broader relational invariance coverage, and data-driven feature selection. We also show that thresholded typed relation scores encode a useful fragment of Sigma-style field conditions, unifying hand-crafted rule logic and learned relation masks in a single-email framework.

ai.tldr: 提出PhishSigma++，利用实体关系图检测恶意邮件，在对抗攻击下保持高F1分数。

papers.title: ORCHID: Orchestrated Reduction Consensus for Hash-based Integrity in Distributed Ledgers
papers.summary: We present \textbf{ORCHID} (\textit{Orchestrated Reduction Consensus for Hash-based Integrity in Distributed Ledgers}), a novel bio-inspired consensus protocol that maps the neuroscientific \emph{binding problem} -- how the brain integrates distributed neural oscillations into a unified conscious percept -- onto the distributed systems \emph{consensus problem}, how blockchain nodes agree on a single ledger state under Byzantine faults. Grounded in the Penrose--Hameroff Orchestrated Objective Reduction (Orch~OR) hypothesis and the Kuramoto synchronisation model, ORCHID equips each node with a quantum-noisy phase oscillator; consensus is triggered when the network's order parameter $r(t)$ crosses a \emph{binding threshold} $θ_b$, mirroring the gamma-band binding event in conscious perception. ORCHID is further strengthened by a coherence-weighted Quantum Secret Sharing (QSS) layer, extending the survey framework of Weinberg to a concrete consensus application. Simulation results on Watts--Strogatz small-world networks ($n=10$--$150$) demonstrate: (i)~the Kuramoto order parameter reaches $r_{\max}=0.988$ under coupling $K=3.0$, well above the theoretical critical coupling $K_c \approx 1.41$; (ii)~a sharp QSS fidelity phase transition at coherence $c^*\approx 0.82$, confirming Theorem~2; (iii)100\% consensus rate at all tested Byzantine fractions (0\%--40\%), with median convergence under 4~s for $n=30$; and (iv)~ORCHID achieves $O(n{\cdot}k)$ message complexity, outperforming PBFT's $O(n^2)$ at $n\geq150$. These results establish ORCHID as a scalable, biologically plausible, and quantum-augmented consensus mechanism for post-quantum distributed ledgers.

ai.tldr: 提出一种受生物启发的共识协议ORCHID，将神经科学的绑定问题映射到分布式系统的共识问题，利用Kuramoto同步模型和量子秘密共享实现拜占庭容错。
ai.motivation: 现有共识协议（如PBFT）通信复杂度高，且缺乏生物和量子启发的可扩展方案。
ai.method: 每个节点配备量子噪声相位振荡器，网络序参数超过绑定阈值时触发共识，并集成相干性加权的量子秘密共享层。

ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可扩展、生物合理且量子增强的共识机制，适用于后量子分布式账本。

papers.title: The Authorization-Execution Gap Is a Major Safety and Security Problem in Open-World Agents
papers.summary: This position paper argues that the Authorization-Execution Gap (AEG) is a major safety and security problem in open-world agents. The AEG is the divergence between what a principal intends to authorize and what an open-world agent ultimately executes. Because such agents act autonomously across tools, persistent state, and multi-agent handoffs, even small instances of authorization divergence can cause harm that is difficult or impossible to undo. We argue that many observed agent failures can be traced to three structural sources of AEG: delegation-level incompleteness, channel-level corruption, and composition-level fragmentation. The same observed failure may arise from any of these sources. Without identifying the source, a defense targeting the symptom alone cannot address the underlying cause. Agent safety and security should therefore emphasize source-oriented diagnosis and defense. Because the structural sources of AEG arise dynamically during execution, this approach necessarily requires authorization integrity checks applied during execution, rather than relying solely on one-shot upfront filtering or post-hoc audit. For NeurIPS, the implication is that papers on open-world agents should report not only outcome-level metrics such as task success or attack resistance, but also process-level evidence showing where AEG was detected, constrained, and attributed to a structural source during execution.

ai.tldr: 本文提出授权-执行差距（AEG）是开放世界智能体安全与安保的核心问题，并分析了其三种结构性来源。
ai.motivation: 开放世界智能体在工具、持久状态和多智能体交接中自主行动，授权偏差即使很小也可能造成难以挽回的损害。
ai.method: 通过分析代理失败的三种结构性来源（委托级不完整、通道级破坏、组合级碎片化），主张在运行时进行授权完整性检查。
ai.result: 指出仅针对症状的防御无法解决根本原因，需要面向来源的诊断与防御。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员识别和防范开放世界智能体中的授权执行差距。

en.tldr: This position paper argues that the Authorization-Execution Gap (AEG) is a major safety and security problem in open-world agents, and identifies three structural sources.
en.motivation: Open-world agents act autonomously across tools, persistent state, and multi-agent handoffs, where even small authorization divergences can cause irreversible harm.
en.method: Analyzes three structural sources of AEG (delegation-level incompleteness, channel-level corruption, composition-level fragmentation) and advocates for runtime authorization integrity checks.
en.result: Points out that defenses targeting symptoms alone cannot address root causes; source-oriented diagnosis and defense are needed.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers identify and mitigate authorization-execution gaps in open-world agents.

idea_spark.idea: Design a runtime authorization integrity check module that detects and attributes AEG sources in real time.
idea_spark.risk: Runtime checks may increase computational overhead and may not cover all dynamic scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from runtime verification and fault diagnosis in software engineering, applied to agent safety.

papers.title: Enhancing Instruction Prefetching via Cache and TLB Management
papers.summary: Modern server workloads exhibit massive instruction footprints that heavily pressure the processor front-end, making L1 instruction (L1I) prefetching critical for sustaining performance. However, this paper shows that current L1I prefetchers fail to reach their full potential due to two key limitations. First, L1I prefetches crossing page boundaries require address translation before issuance, and translation latency reduces prefetch timeliness. Second, the reuse behavior of code lines fetched by L1I prefetches is highly heterogeneous: while some lines are reused many times, others are dead-on-arrival.   This paper introduces Instruction Prefetch-Centric Cache and TLB Management (IP-CaT), the first microarchitectural framework jointly optimizing TLB and cache management for L1I prefetching. IP-CaT consists of two components: (i) the translation Prefetch Buffer (tPB), a small structure colocated with the second-level TLB (sTLB) that stores page table entries fetched by page-crossing L1I prefetches, reducing translation overheads; and (ii) the Trimodal Instruction Prefetch Replacement Policy (TIPRP), a decision-tree-based L2 cache replacement policy specialized for lines fetched by L1I prefetches.   We evaluate IP-CaT with three state-of-the-art L1I prefetchers: EPI, FNL+MMA, and Barca. Across 105 contemporary server workloads, IP-CaT consistently improves performance. For example, IP-CaT+EPI achieves an 8.7% geomean speedup over EPI alone. We further show that IP-CaT outperforms state-of-the-art instruction TLB prefetching, advanced TLB replacement (CHiRP), and state-of-the-art code-aware, prefetch-aware, and general-purpose cache replacement policies, including Emissary, SHiP++, and Mockingjay.

ai.tldr: 提出IP-CaT框架，通过联合优化TLB和缓存管理，提升L1指令预取性能。
ai.motivation: 现有L1指令预取器因跨页地址转换延迟和预取代码行复用不均而性能受限。
ai.method: 包含翻译预取缓冲(tPB)和三模态指令预取替换策略(TIPRP)两个组件。
ai.result: 在105个服务器负载上，IP-CaT+EPI相比EPI单独使用获得8.7%的几何平均加速。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过硬件协同设计解决指令预取中的TLB和缓存瓶颈。

en.tldr: Proposes IP-CaT, a framework jointly optimizing TLB and cache management for L1I prefetching.
en.motivation: Current L1I prefetchers suffer from translation latency for page-crossing prefetches and heterogeneous reuse of prefetched code lines.
en.method: Includes translation Prefetch Buffer (tPB) and Trimodal Instruction Prefetch Replacement Policy (TIPRP).
en.result: On 105 server workloads, IP-CaT+EPI achieves 8.7% geomean speedup over EPI alone.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how hardware co-design can address TLB and cache bottlenecks in instruction prefetching.

idea_spark.idea: Unify prefetch-aware TLB and cache management into a coordinated framework rather than independent optimizations.
idea_spark.risk: Hardware overhead and implementation complexity may increase; area and power need evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging heterogeneity in prefetch behavior to design specialized replacement policies inspires other prefetch optimizations.

papers.title: Cooperative Robotics Reinforced by Collective Perception for Traffic Moderation
papers.summary: Collisions at non-line-of-sight (NLOS) intersections remain a major safety concern because drivers have limited visibility of approaching traffic. V2X based warnings can reduce these risks, yet many vehicles are not equipped with V2X and drivers may ignore in vehicle alerts. Collective perception (CP) can compensate for low V2X penetration by extending the awareness of connected vehicles, but it cannot influence unconnected vehicles. To fill this gap, our work introduces a complementary concept that adds a cooperative humanoid robot as an active traffic moderator capable of physically stopping a vehicle that attempts to merge into an unseen traffic stream. The system operates on two parallel perception pathways. A dual camera infrastructure unit detects the position, speed and motion of approaching vehicles and transmits this information to the robot as a collective perception message (CPM). The robot also receives cooperative awareness messages (CAM) from connected vehicles through its onboard V2X unit and can act as a relay for decentralized environmental notification messages (DENM) when safety events originate elsewhere along the road. A fusion module combines these streams to maintain a robust real time view of the main road. A Zone of Danger (ZoD) is defined and used to predict whether an approaching vehicle creates a collision risk for a merging road user. When such a risk is detected, the robot issues a human-like STOP gesture and blocks the merging path until the hazard disappears. The full system was deployed at the Future Mobility Park (FMP) in Rotterdam. Experiments show that the combined vision and V2X perception allows the robot to detect approaching vehicles early, predict hazards reliably and prevent unsafe merges in real world NLOS conditions.

ai.tldr: 提出一种协作人形机器人，通过集体感知和V2X通信，在非视距交叉口主动阻止车辆危险并线，提升交通安全。
ai.motivation: 非视距交叉口碰撞事故频发，现有V2X警告受限于低渗透率和驾驶员忽视，集体感知无法影响未联网车辆。
ai.method: 系统包含双摄像头基础设施单元检测来车，机器人通过V2X接收CAM和DENM，融合模块构建实时路况，定义危险区域并预测碰撞风险，机器人做出停止手势并物理阻挡。
ai.result: 在鹿特丹未来移动公园部署实验，机器人能提前检测来车、可靠预测危险并有效阻止不安全并线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用机器人主动干预提升非视距交叉口安全性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合集体感知与物理机器人，为低V2X渗透率环境提供一种主动安全解决方案。
idea_spark.risk: 机器人物理阻挡可能引发新的碰撞风险，需确保决策可靠性和人机交互安全。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将机器人作为主动交通调节器，弥补感知与通信的不足，启发未来混合交通中的物理干预手段。

en.tldr: Introduces a cooperative humanoid robot that uses collective perception and V2X communication to physically stop vehicles from unsafe merging at NLOS intersections, improving traffic safety.
en.motivation: Collisions at NLOS intersections remain a major safety concern; V2X warnings suffer from low penetration and driver disregard, and collective perception cannot influence unconnected vehicles.
en.method: A dual-camera infrastructure unit detects approaching vehicles and sends CPMs to the robot; the robot also receives CAMs and DENMs via onboard V2X. A fusion module builds a real-time view, defines a Zone of Danger, and predicts collision risk. The robot then issues a STOP gesture and physically blocks the merging path.
en.result: Deployed at Future Mobility Park in Rotterdam; experiments show the robot detects vehicles early, predicts hazards reliably, and prevents unsafe merges in real-world NLOS conditions.
en.help_to_user: Understand how robotic active intervention can enhance safety at NLOS intersections.

idea_spark.idea: Combine collective perception with a physical robot to provide an active safety solution for environments with low V2X penetration.
idea_spark.risk: Physical blocking by the robot may introduce new collision risks; decision reliability and human-robot interaction safety must be ensured.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using robots as active traffic moderators to compensate for perception and communication gaps inspires future physical intervention in mixed traffic.

papers.title: NCCLZ: Compression-Enabled GPU Collectives with Decoupled Quantization and Entropy Coding
papers.summary: Collective communication is a major bottleneck for multi-node GPU workloads in scientific computing and distributed deep learning, especially when inter-node bandwidth is limited. Although NCCL provides optimized GPU-centric collectives, large messages can still dominate end-to-end performance. Existing compression-enabled collective libraries either rely on MPI-based stacks that cannot fully exploit NCCL, omit entropy coding, or tightly couple full compressors with communication primitives, limiting compression ratio, flexibility, and communication-computation overlap. This paper presents NCCLZ, a compression-enabled GPU collectives that decouples quantization and entropy coding and integrates them at different layers of the stack. NCCLZ places quantization at the interface, embeds entropy coding into NCCL primitives, uses a lightweight device-side selector to choose coding strategies, and overlaps compression with communication to reduce exposed overhead. Experiments on scientific datasets, training gradients, and synthetic workloads show up to 9.65x speedup over NCCL and up to 3.34x improvement over prior compression-assisted collective libraries.

ai.tldr: 提出NCCLZ，一种将量化与熵编码解耦并分层集成到NCCL中的压缩型GPU集合通信库，显著提升多节点GPU通信效率。
ai.motivation: 多节点GPU工作负载中，集合通信是主要瓶颈，现有压缩库要么依赖MPI无法充分利用NCCL，要么忽略熵编码或耦合过紧，限制了压缩比、灵活性和计算通信重叠。
ai.method: 将量化置于接口层，熵编码嵌入NCCL原语内部，使用轻量级设备端选择器动态选择编码策略，并通过重叠压缩与通信来减少暴露开销。
ai.result: 在科学数据集、训练梯度和合成负载上，相比NCCL最高加速9.65倍，相比现有压缩辅助集合库最高提升3.34倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过解耦压缩组件并分层集成到现有通信库中，实现高效、灵活的GPU集合通信加速。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将设备端选择器扩展为自适应学习模型，根据实时通信特征动态调整量化与编码参数。
idea_spark.risk: 设备端选择器可能引入额外计算开销，且自适应策略在极端负载下可能不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受NCCLZ启发，可设计更通用的压缩通信框架，支持多种压缩算法插拔，并自动优化重叠策略。

zh.tldr: 提出NCCLZ，一种将量化与熵编码解耦并分层集成到NCCL中的压缩型GPU集合通信库，显著提升多节点GPU通信效率。
zh.motivation: 多节点GPU工作负载中，集合通信是主要瓶颈，现有压缩库要么依赖MPI无法充分利用NCCL，要么忽略熵编码或耦合过紧，限制了压缩比、灵活性和计算通信重叠。
